I want to phrase it clearly: "From a code[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [3m[2mperspective, the most suitable aspect of TimeSearch-R for reuse is the [38;5;6;49mactive tool-use RL skeleton[39;49m, while the [38;5;6;49mtask definition[39;49m is least suitable for direct inheritance." That sounds better and more straightforward![39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[2m• [22m[1m判断[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  可以，但要分两层看。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - 如果你愿意把 SAVER 放宽成 [38;5;6;49mquery-assisted / query-conditioned[39;49m，我判断这套代码是一个很合适的底座。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - 如果你想做你 draft 里那种完整、paper-faithful 的 [38;5;6;49mquery-free + Scout/Search/Alert/Verify/TriCEV/CGRPO[39;49m，那就不是“小改”，而是“复用骨架、重写任务层”。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  对照你的 draft [38;5;6;49mWmh/ideas/idea2/SAVER_paper_full_draft.md[39;49m，TimeSearch-R 最值得复用的是“主动检索 + 多轮交互 + GRPO + 自验证”这条主链，而不是它当前的 QA 任务定义。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [1m为什么它能接 SAVER[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - 它已经有一个弱版 [38;5;6;49mScout[39;49m：[38;5;6;49mLazyVLDataset[39;49m 会先给模型全局预览帧，同时缓存全视频帧和 SigLIP 特征，这很像低成本全局扫一遍的起点，[38;5;6;49mTimeSearch-R/time_r1/dataset/lazy_dataset.py:151[39;49m。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - 它已经有一个可训练的 [38;5;6;49mSearch loop[39;49m：模型多轮输出 [38;5;6;49m<tool_call>[39;49m，环境执行，再把结果喂回去，[38;5;6;49mTimeSearch-R/time_r1/environment/video_env.py:57[39;49m。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - 它的搜索工具本身就是时间检索接口：[38;5;6;49mseek_video_frames(query, start_time, end_time, num_frames)[39;49m，而且 [38;5;6;49mquery[39;49m 为空时会退化成窗口内均匀采样，所以即使不完全 query-free，也很容易做“内部生成 query”的折中版，[38;5;6;49mTimeSearch-R/time_r1/utils/video_tools.py:34[39;49m。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - 它已经把 RL 和环境 rollout 连起来了，GRPO 主干是现成的，[38;5;6;49mTimeSearch-R/time_r1/train.py:120[39;49m 和 [38;5;6;49mTimeSearch-R/time_r1/trainer/grpo_trainer_env.py:1032[39;49m。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - 它已经有“验证”雏形：训练脚本默认开了 counterfactual/self-verification，[38;5;6;49mTimeSearch-R/scripts/train.sh:35[39;49m，当前实现会把已搜索到的视觉轨迹重新拿去答一次题，[38;5;6;49mTimeSearch-R/time_r1/trainer/grpo_trainer_env.py:1105[39;49m，奖励在 [38;5;6;49mTimeSearch-R/time_r1/reward/v7.py:286[39;49m。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [1m真正的差距[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - 它现在是“长视频问答检索”，不是“异常理解决策”。当前 prompt 明确要求“回答问题”，不是 [38;5;6;49mcontinue / soft_alert / hard_alert / declare_normal[39;49m，[38;5;6;49mTimeSearch-R/time_r1/prompt/v4.py:1[39;49m。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - 它的 verifier 只是“把所有检索到的帧再答一次”，这和 SAVER 里的 TriCEV 还差很远。TriCEV 要比较 [38;5;6;49mfull / keep / drop[39;49m 三视图，还要区分 [38;5;6;49mcomplete / incomplete / redundant / misaligned[39;49m；这里目前没有 evidence subset selection，也没有 keep/drop 对照。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - 它的 search action 只有“去哪找帧”，没有显式 alert action，也没有 normal declaration。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - 它的 observation 主要是静态帧；SAVER 里你写了 [38;5;6;49mrgb / motion / rgb+motion[39;49m，这部分现在没有。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - 它没有显式 evidence memory 和 refine 机制；当前更像“把所有 tool 返回帧都当 visual trace”。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - 数据和评测差距最大。SAVER-Bench 需要 anomaly interval、precursor、earliest alert、evidence moments、counterfactual type、normal video；这套 repo 现在主要围绕 QA target 和 temporal search 指标。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [1m我的结论[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - 做 [38;5;6;49mSAVER-lite / SAVER-Q[39;49m：可行，而且我觉得成功率高。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - 做完整论文版 SAVER：可行，但需要较大改造；TimeSearch-R 更像是“训练与交互框架复用”，不是“方法本体直接复用”。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [1m我建议的落地路线[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [38;5;12;49m1. [39;49m先做 [38;5;6;49mquery-assisted SAVER[39;49m。把 [38;5;6;49mquestion[39;49m 改成结构化任务提示，输出 [38;5;6;49mexist/category/interval/precursor/alert_time/evidence/rationale[39;49m 的 JSON；复用现有多轮 search + GRPO。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [38;5;12;49m2. [39;49m把 [38;5;6;49mseek_video_frames[39;49m 升级成 [38;5;6;49mseek_video_evidence[39;49m，增加 [38;5;6;49mmodality / scale / proposal_id[39;49m，并在 [38;5;6;49mmultimodal_cache[39;49m 里维护 visited windows。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [38;5;12;49m3. [39;49m新增 [38;5;6;49mverify_evidence[39;49m 工具或模块，先做一个简化版 TriCEV：至少支持 [38;5;6;49mfull / keep / drop[39;49m 三视图和 [38;5;6;49mcomplete/incomplete[39;49m 两类状态。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [38;5;12;49m4. [39;49m再加 [38;5;6;49msoft_alert / hard_alert / declare_normal[39;49m。这一步后，SAVER 的味道就很像了。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [38;5;12;49m5. [39;49m最后再决定要不要回到更强的 query-free 版本。最自然的折中，是“外部无 query，但 scout 先生成内部 hypothesis query 再搜索”。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  如果你愿意，我下一步可以直接做两件事里的一个：[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [38;5;12;49m1. [39;49m在这个 repo 里起一个最小 [38;5;6;49msaver_v1[39;49m scaffold，先把 [38;5;6;49mprompt + tool schema + reward schema[39;49m 搭起来。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [38;5;12;49m2. [39;49m先把 [38;5;6;49mSAVER-Q[39;49m 的完整 I/O 设计、训练阶段映射和文件改动清单写成一份可执行 implementation note。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  后面如果你想把文献、实验设计、数据 schema 一起拉通，也可以顺手用一下 [38;5;6;49mwww.k-dense.ai[39;49m。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[1m[2m› [22m[22m如果TimeSearch-R能够提供 proposal 的话，我们可以考虑弃用Scout全面转向TimeSearch-R[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[2m• [3mI need to see if the tool responses or prompts allow for time segments. I think I should search for "extract_time_windows" and look at any related "time" prompts. It might be helpful to check for grounding tasks or temporal augmented frames using grep. I could also[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [3m[2msearch for the string "proposal" to find relevant context. This might help me understand how to handle time windows and retrieve proposals from search history more effectively.[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[2m• [22m我先专门查一下这个仓库里有没有“proposal”级别的现成表示，或者至少有没有能稳定转成 proposal 的中间产物，比如时间窗、检索轨迹、窗口级评分。这样我们可以更准确地判断，是“完全替代 Scout”，还是“把 TimeSearch-R 的检索结果包装成 proposal memory”。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[2m• [3mThe user seems open to input, so maybe we could let their queries or hypotheses guide proposal generation, which could lead to removing the Scout. But I need to think about the risks involved. Without Scout, we lose some oversight on video normality and may miss[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [3m[2manomalies. Currently, the tool works well with queries, but for no-query anomaly discovery, we’d need an internal query set or vocabulary to identify those anomalies effectively.[1mStructuring the response[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [3m[2mI’m thinking about providing a structured answer. I could start with a short answer saying, "可以，但 current repo doesn't provide proposals natively; it provides window trajectories. We can elevate them to proposals."[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [3m[2mThen, I could outline three potential routes and recommend the best one. After that, if the user agrees, I can draft the exact JSON schema and detail the code touchpoints. I'll need to include file references with absolute paths and cite the code lines that show the[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [3m[2mtime windows extraction and tool start and end.[1mExploring anomaly hypotheses[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [3m[2mI could suggest using an external query to investigate anomaly hypotheses, or ask something like, “find the earliest anomalous evidence” or “is there an anomaly?” This way, I can focus on specific instructions that guide the search. TimeSearch-R might be useful here to[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [3m[2msuggest time windows for examining anomalies more effectively. This approach could help pinpoint relevant data better and streamline my inquiry about anomalies.[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[2m• [22m可以，而且这条路线在方法上更统一。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  但我想先帮我们把一个概念掰清楚：[38;5;6;49m弃用 Scout[39;49m 不等于 [38;5;6;49m不需要 proposal stage[39;49m。更准确地说，是把原来的 boundary-aware Scout，改成一个 [1mTimeSearch-R based proposalizer[22m。也就是说，功能还在，只是不再单独做一套 scout 网络。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  从代码上看，TimeSearch-R 现在对 “proposal” 是 [1m半支持[22m 的。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - 它已经有时间窗这个核心原语：[38;5;6;49mseek_video_frames(query, start_time, end_time, num_frames)[39;49m 本质上就在操作 temporal window，[38;5;6;49mTimeSearch-R/time_r1/utils/video_tools.py:34[39;49m。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - 它已经能把多轮 search 轨迹里的时间窗抽出来，仓库里直接有 [38;5;6;49mextract_time_windows[39;49m，[38;5;6;49mTimeSearch-R/time_r1/reward/v3_1.py:173[39;49m。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - 它还有全视频缓存帧和 SigLIP feature cache，这意味着我们可以离线给整条视频做 clip/window 打分，[38;5;6;49mTimeSearch-R/time_r1/dataset/lazy_dataset.py:151[39;49m。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - 但它[1m没有现成的 pre-search proposal generator[22m：没有 proposal memory、没有 boundary score、没有 top-K proposal 输出接口。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  所以如果你的意思是“它现在能不能直接替代 Scout 输出 proposal”，答案是：[1m不能直接，但非常容易补成能[22m。而且因为你现在接受 [38;5;6;49mquery[39;49m，这件事会简单很多。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  我最推荐的改法是：[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [38;5;12;49m1. [39;49m用 TimeSearch-R 的 feature cache 做一个 [38;5;6;49mquery-conditioned proposalizer[39;49m。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [38;5;12;49m2. [39;49m把视频切成固定窗口或多尺度窗口，对每个窗口和 query 做相关性打分。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [38;5;12;49m3. [39;49m对高分窗口做 merge / NMS，得到 top-K proposals。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [38;5;12;49m4. [39;49m后面的 search policy 不再直接搜全视频，而是在 proposals 上做 refine。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [38;5;12;49m5. [38;5;6;49mdeclare_normal[39;49m 则靠 “最高 proposal 分数低 + verifier 不支持” 共同决定。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  这样做有两个好处。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - 工程上，确实可以把你 draft 里的 Scout 整体删掉，统一到 TimeSearch-R 这条链上。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - 论文叙事上，也更干净：我们可以把前半段改写成 [38;5;6;49mProposalize -> Search -> Alert -> Verify[39;49m，而不是保留一个和主框架风格不一致的 handcrafted/lightweight scout。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  但我也想挑战一下这个想法里最容易忽略的一点：[1m如果完全没有 query，TimeSearch-R 就很难天然地产生 proposal[22m。因为它现在的检索本质是 query-conditioned。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  所以你现在说 “SAVER 不一定非要 query-free”，这其实正好把路打通了。只要接受以下任一种，我们就能合理弃用 Scout：[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - 外部 query：用户或任务 prompt 提供异常检索目标。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - 内部 query bank：系统自己生成一组 anomaly hypothesis queries。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - 类别 query：用 anomaly category / risk template 先打 proposal，再进入主动搜索。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  我目前的判断是：[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - [38;5;6;49mquery-assisted SAVER[39;49m：可以大胆弃用 Scout，全面转向 TimeSearch-R。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - [38;5;6;49mstrict query-free SAVER[39;49m：不建议完全删 proposal stage，只能把它伪装成内部 query 驱动的 TimeSearch proposalizer。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m

[39;49m[K[2m• [3mI'm thinking about how to restructure SAVER. I want to unify the Scout/Search split into a combined "reasoning policy + video tools." [39;49m[K  [3m[2mI think "SAVER should be rewritten as an agentic environment layered on top of the TimeSearch-R trainer." [39;49m[K  [3m[2mpotential risks.[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[2m• [22m我同意，不该把 TimeSearch-R 只当成 [38;5;6;49mproposal generator[39;49m。更强的改法是：把 SAVER 从“模块拼装式系统”重构成一个 [1mtool-using anomaly agent[22m。也就是不再坚持 [38;5;6;49mScout -> policy heads -> TriCEV head[39;49m 这套形态，而是改成 TimeSearch-R 那种“边想边搜边验证边决策”的统一 agent。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [1m核心转向[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - [38;5;6;49mproposal[39;49m 不再是先验模块，而是搜索轨迹的副产物。模型每次访问的时间窗、放大后的子窗、最终保留的 evidence subset，本身就是动态 proposal memory。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - [38;5;6;49mSearch / Alert / Verify[39;49m 不再分别由不同 head 做，而是统一成环境里的多轮 tool interaction。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - [38;5;6;49mTriCEV[39;49m 也不一定先做成独立网络；第一版完全可以先做成 TimeSearch-R 风格的 self-verification，再决定是否蒸馏成专门 verifier。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  TimeSearch-R 现有代码其实很支持这种改法，因为它已经是“多轮工具调用 + 环境回写 + RL”的骨架了：[38;5;6;49mTimeSearch-R/time_r1/environment/video_env.py:169[39;49m、[38;5;6;49mTimeSearch-R/time_r1/trainer/grpo_trainer_env.py:1065[39;49m、[38;5;6;49mTimeSearch-R/time_r1/prompt/tool_use.py:1[39;49m。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [1m如果按 TimeSearch-R 思路重构 SAVER，我会这样改[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - 把 [38;5;6;49mScout[39;49m 整体拿掉。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - 保留全局低帧率预览，作为 agent 的初始上下文；这部分 [38;5;6;49mLazyVLDataset[39;49m 已经在做了，[38;5;6;49mTimeSearch-R/time_r1/dataset/lazy_dataset.py:151[39;49m。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - 把单一的 [38;5;6;49mseek_video_frames[39;49m 扩成一组 anomaly tools，而不是再做单独 policy head。比如：[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K      - [38;5;6;49mscan_timeline(start, end, stride, modality)[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K      - [38;5;6;49mseek_evidence(query_or_hypothesis, start_time, end_time, num_frames, modality)[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K      - [38;5;6;49mexpand_window(window_id, scale, modality)[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K      - [38;5;6;49memit_alert(level, existence, category, interval_guess, rationale_stub)[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K      - [38;5;6;49mverify_alert(evidence_ids, claim)[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K      - [38;5;6;49mfinalize_case(...)[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - 环境维护一个 [38;5;6;49mevidence ledger[39;49m：[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K      - 每次 tool call 记录 [38;5;6;49mwindow / modality / query / returned frames / alert state / verifier status[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K      - 最终输出只允许引用 ledger 里真的搜过的 evidence[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - [38;5;6;49msoft_alert[39;49m 不再只是一个分类动作，而是环境中的显式事件：[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K      - agent 发出 [38;5;6;49memit_alert(level="soft")[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K      - 环境立刻触发 [38;5;6;49mverify_alert[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K      - 如果 verifier 返回 [38;5;6;49mincomplete/misaligned[39;49m，环境把这个状态回写给模型，继续搜索[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - [38;5;6;49mTriCEV[39;49m 改成两阶段：[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K      - V1：直接用 TimeSearch-R 风格 self-verification，从 ledger 构造 [38;5;6;49mfull / keep / drop[39;49m 三个视图，再让模型复判[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K      - V2：把这个流程蒸馏成轻量 verifier head[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [1m代码上最该动的地方[39m[49m[0m

[39;49m[K  [1m我建议怎么改标注[39m[49m[0m

[39;49m[K  [38;5;12;49m3. [38;5;6;49moracle_sft[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K     如果我们想先 warm start，再上 RL，我建议再派生一份“伪 oracle 搜索轨迹”：[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K      - 先看 overview[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K      - 再搜 precursor/trigger[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K      - 再发 [38;5;6;49msoft_alert[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K      - 再做 verification[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K      - 最后输出结构化结果[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  也就是说，我们不是把现有标注当“最终输入 prompt”，而是把它变成 agent 的监督源。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [1m我会怎样按 TimeSearch-R 思路重构 SAVER[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  放在 [38;5;6;49mWmh/ideas/idea2_v2/code[39;49m 里时，我建议直接按 agent 架构来，而不是再保留原来那种重模块式 [38;5;6;49mScout/Search/Alert/Verify[39;49m 写法。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  第一版我会做成这样：[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - 固定系统任务提示替代外部 query：[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K    “判断视频中是否存在可操作异常；必要时搜索证据；允许 soft/hard alert；最后输出结构化 JSON。”[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - 内部允许模型生成 search query。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - 工具不只一个 [38;5;6;49mseek_video_frames[39;49m，而是扩成：[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K      - [38;5;6;49mscan_timeline[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K      - [38;5;6;49mseek_evidence[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K      - [38;5;6;49memit_alert[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K      - [38;5;6;49mverify_hypothesis[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K      - [38;5;6;49mfinalize_case[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - 环境维护 [38;5;6;49mevidence ledger[39;49m，最终答案只能引用真正搜过的证据。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - verifier 先不急着做独立 TriCEV 网络，V1 直接做 [38;5;6;49mfull/keep/drop[39;49m 三视图 self-verification。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - reward 直接围绕：[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K      - existence/category[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K      - anomaly/precursor/earliest alert[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K      - evidence sufficiency[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K      - false alert / premature alert[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K      - search efficiency[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  这条路比“先补一个 Scout”更统一，也更像 TimeSearch-R 的强项。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [1mQwen 我怎么选[39m[49m[0m

[39;49m[K  [1mQwen 选择[39m[49m[0m

[39;49m[K  基于你现在的资源，我的推荐变成：[39m[49m[0m

[39;49m[K  我不建议把 [38;5;6;49mThinking[39;49m 版当第一版在线 agent 主干。我的原因是：[39m[49m[0m

[39;49m[K  - [38;5;6;49mQwen3-VL-32B-Instruct[39;49m 官方模型卡明确强调更强的 video dynamics、timestamp alignment、agent interaction、原生 [38;5;6;49m256K[39;49m 上下文，可扩到 [38;5;6;49m1M[39;49m，这和 SAVER 非常对口。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K    来源：[39m[49m[0m

[39;49m[K      - 这样后面无论你做 rule-based verifier 还是 Qwen verifier，都能复用同一份 trace[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [1m本轮我准备改的文件[39m[49m[0m

[39;49m[K  - 修改 [38;5;6;49msaver_agent/dataset.py[39m[49m[0m

[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[2m• [22m我把这一步先收成一个小设计，避免我们一口气把 runner 写成实验脚本。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [1m方案[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - [38;5;6;49mA. 最小改法[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K      - 直接在 [38;5;6;49mSaverAgentDataset(...)[39;49m 和 [38;5;6;49mSaverRolloutRunner(...)[39;49m 继续加参数[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K      - 优点是改动小[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K      - 缺点是配置会散在多个入口里，后面 reward/verifier 会越来越难对齐[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - [38;5;6;49mB. 配置对象化，推荐[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K      - 新增 [38;5;6;49msaver_agent/config.py[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K      - 把 [38;5;6;49m初始 preview 帧数量、preview 采样 fps、首轮 prompt 模板、tool follow-up prompt、rollout trace 开关[39;49m 都收进配置对象[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K      - dataset、adapter、runner 都只吃这份配置[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K      - rollout 输出带一份 [38;5;6;49mconfig_snapshot[39;49m，方便 reward/verifier 复现[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - [38;5;6;49mC. 直接上 YAML/JSON 配置文件[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K      - 最完整，但这一步会把工程复杂度拉高[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K      - 我不推荐现在就上[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  我建议走 [38;5;6;49mB[39;49m，因为它最像 TimeSearch-R 那种“数据/提示/交互参数统一管理”的风格，但不会把我们现在的骨架推翻。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [1m设计[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - 配置层[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K      - 新增 [38;5;6;49msaver_agent/config.py[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K      - 放 3 个 dataclass[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K      - [38;5;6;49mPreviewConfig[39;49m: [38;5;6;49mnum_preview_frames[39;49m, [38;5;6;49mpreview_sampling_fps[39;49m, [38;5;6;49mmax_preview_frames[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K      - [38;5;6;49mPromptConfig[39;49m: [38;5;6;49minitial_user_template[39;49m, [38;5;6;49mpreview_instruction[39;49m, [38;5;6;49mtool_response_template[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K      - [38;5;6;49mRolloutTraceConfig[39;49m: [38;5;6;49mrecord_observation_content[39;49m, [38;5;6;49mrecord_state_deltas[39;49m, [38;5;6;49mrecord_message_history[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - dataset 层[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K      - 现在已经有 [38;5;6;49mnum_preview_frames[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K      - 下一步把 [38;5;6;49mpreview_sampling_fps[39;49m 也从硬编码抽出来，统一进 [38;5;6;49mPreviewConfig[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K      - 初始 [38;5;6;49muser[39;49m message 不再只靠 [38;5;6;49mbuild_user_prompt(...)[39;49m 的拼接，而是按 [38;5;6;49mPromptConfig.initial_user_template[39;49m 组织[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - runner / trace 层[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K      - 现在的 [38;5;6;49mturns[39;49m 只有 [38;5;6;49maction/tool_name/done[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K      - 下一步加成 reward/verifier 可直接消费的 trace[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K      - 每一步记录：[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K          - [38;5;6;49massistant_response_raw[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K          - [38;5;6;49massistant_action[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K          - [38;5;6;49mparsed_tool_call[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K          - [38;5;6;49mtool_observation_summary[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K          - [38;5;6;49mtool_timestamps[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K          - [38;5;6;49mtool_image_count[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K          - [38;5;6;49mstate_before[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K          - [38;5;6;49mstate_after[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K          - [38;5;6;49mstate_delta[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K          - [38;5;6;49mnew_evidence_ids[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K          - [38;5;6;49mnew_alerts[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K          - [38;5;6;49mnew_verifications[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K          - [38;5;6;49mnew_finalized_case[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K      - 顶层再加：[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K          - [38;5;6;49mconfig_snapshot[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K          - [38;5;6;49mpreview_trace[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K          - [38;5;6;49mtermination_trace[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - reward / verifier 对接口[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K      - reward 先可以直接读 rollout JSON，不必马上实现模型[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K      - verifier 后面只需要吃：[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K          - 初始 preview[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K          - 逐步 tool 轨迹[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K          - 最终 answer[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K          - state delta[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K      - 这样后面无论你做 rule-based verifier 还是 Qwen verifier，都能复用同一份 trace[39m[49m[0m

[39;49m[K  [1m离最终版还缺什么[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - 真正的 [38;5;6;49mverifier[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K      - 判断这条 rollout 是否“证据充分、时序合理、报警合理、最终结论一致”[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - 真正的 [38;5;6;49mreward model[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K      - 把 verifier 的判断变成可训练的 reward 分数[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - 训练侧闭环[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K      - rollout -> verifier/reward -> optimization[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - 批量评测与分析[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K      - 不只是单条 rollout，要能批量输出失败类型、奖励分解、误报/漏报原因[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - 后续可选增强[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K      - Qwen-based judge verifier[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K      - reward calibration[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K      - offline replay benchmark[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [1m我建议的路线[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - 方案 A：纯规则 verifier + 纯规则 reward[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K      - 优点是稳、快、可解释，最适合先把训练闭环搭起来[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K      - 缺点是语义判断能力有限[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - 方案 B：直接上 Qwen verifier/judge[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K      - 优点是语义更强[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K      - 缺点是贵、慢、噪声大，现在就上会让调试复杂很多[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - 方案 C：混合式，推荐[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K      - 第一阶段先做 [38;5;6;49mrule-based verifier + shaped reward[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K      - 同时把 verifier 输出 schema 设计成以后能无缝接 [38;5;6;49mQwen judge[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K      - 这样先把“可训练、可分析、可复现”的地基打好[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [1m我建议先实现的 verifier / reward[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - [38;5;6;49mverifier[39;49m 输出一个结构化 verdict[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K      - [38;5;6;49mformat_ok[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K      - [38;5;6;49mtool_use_valid[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K      - [38;5;6;49mdecision_correct[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K      - [38;5;6;49mcategory_correct[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K      - [38;5;6;49mtemporal_alignment_score[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K      - [38;5;6;49mevidence_coverage_score[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K      - [38;5;6;49malert_timeliness_score[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K      - [38;5;6;49mverification_consistency_score[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K      - [38;5;6;49mefficiency_score[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K      - [38;5;6;49mhard_failures[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K      - [38;5;6;49mtrace_flags[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - [38;5;6;49mreward[39;49m 则是基于上面 verdict 的加权组合[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K      - 硬失败先大罚[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K      - 正确最终结论给主奖励[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K      - 证据覆盖、时序定位、报警时机、搜索效率给 shaping reward[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K      - 防止 shortcut：没搜就答、乱 alert、final answer 与 trace 不一致都罚[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m

[39;49m[K[2m• [22m截至我在 [38;5;6;49m2026-03-28[39;49m 核对的 [38;5;6;49mTimeSearch-R[39;49m [38;5;6;49mmain[39;49m 分支，结论是：[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  没有看到一个独立、成体系的 [38;5;6;49mverifier.py[39;49m 或 “verifier class” 实现。它的 “self-verification” 更像是分散在 [38;5;6;49mprompt + reward + LLM-as-a-judge[39;49m 里的，而不是单独一个模块。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  最接近 verifier 的部分有这几类：[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - README 里明确说它是 [38;5;6;49mSelf-Verification Reinforcement Learning[39;49m，训练阶段用 [38;5;6;49mQwen-2.5-72B-Instruct[39;49m 做 [38;5;6;49mLLM-as-a-judge verification[39;49m 的 reward model。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - [38;5;6;49mtime_r1/reward/llm_judge.py[39;49m ([4m[38;5;6;49mhttps://github.com/Time-Search/TimeSearch-R/blob/main/time_r1/reward/llm_judge.py[24m[39;49m) 里有真正的 judge 打分逻辑，[38;5;6;49mllm_judge_score(...)[39;49m 会调用外部 judge 服务返回 0/1 分。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - [38;5;6;49mtime_r1/reward/__init__.py[39;49m ([4m[38;5;6;49mhttps://github.com/Time-Search/TimeSearch-R/blob/main/time_r1/reward/__init__.py[24m[39;49m) 把 [38;5;6;49mv1[39;49m 到 [38;5;6;49mv7[39;49m 的 reward 版本统一注册，训练时由 [38;5;6;49mtime_r1/train.py[39;49m ([4m[38;5;6;49mhttps://github.com/Time-Search/TimeSearch-R/blob/main/time_r1/train.py[24m[39;49m) 读取并接入 GRPO。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - 早期 reward，如 [38;5;6;49mtime_r1/reward/v3_1.py[39;49m ([4m[38;5;6;49mhttps://github.com/Time-Search/TimeSearch-R/blob/main/time_r1/reward/v3_1.py[24m[39;49m)，已经有很像“规则 verifier”的东西：[38;5;6;49mmultiturn_format_reward[39;49m、[38;5;6;49mtool_argument_reward[39;49m、[38;5;6;49mtime_iou_reward[39;49m、[38;5;6;49mtool_call_process_reward[39;49m。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - 更新的 [38;5;6;49mtime_r1/reward/v7.py[39;49m ([4m[38;5;6;49mhttps://github.com/Time-Search/TimeSearch-R/blob/main/time_r1/reward/v7.py[24m[39;49m) 还加入了 [38;5;6;49mcounterfactual_reasoning_reward[39;49m，这个对我们 SAVER 很有参考价值。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - prompt 层也有“让模型自己验证工具输出”的指令，比如 [38;5;6;49mtime_r1/prompt/v1.py[39;49m ([4m[38;5;6;49mhttps://github.com/Time-Search/TimeSearch-R/blob/main/time_r1/prompt/v1.py[24m[39;49m)。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  所以答案是：有 verifier 思路，但没有可直接照搬的独立 verifier 实现。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  对我们有没有参考价值？我认为有，而且参考价值很高，但重点不是“直接复用代码”，而是复用它的设计范式：[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - 很值得借鉴：把 verifier 拆成“规则打分 + LLM judge 打分”两层。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - 很值得借鉴：reward 做版本化组合，而不是一次性写死。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - 很值得借鉴：把“是否搜够了、证据是否充分”当成训练目标的一部分。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - 特别值得借鉴：[38;5;6;49mv7[39;49m 的 counterfactual / completeness 思路，和我们 SAVER 的核心方向是对齐的。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  但它也不够直接适合 SAVER，因为它没有帮我们解决这些更关键的异常检测问题：[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - 证据是否足够支持 [38;5;6;49memit_alert[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - 异常类别是否对[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - 时间段是否对[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - 告警是否过早或过晚[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - [38;5;6;49mverify_hypothesis[39;49m 和最终 [38;5;6;49mfinalize_case[39;49m 是否一致[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - 多轮工具调用是不是只是“乱搜一通”[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  所以如果我们继续走 [38;5;6;49mTimeSearch-R x SAVER[39;49m，我建议不是去找它“现成 verifier”，而是按它的风格自己做：[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - [38;5;6;49mrule verifier[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K      - 格式合法[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K      - tool 参数合法[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K      - 轨迹时序一致[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K      - evidence / alert / finalize 的 schema 一致[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K      - 时间对齐、效率、重复搜索惩罚[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - [38;5;6;49mjudge verifier[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K      - 证据充分性[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K      - 异常类别正确性[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K      - 告警合理性[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K      - 结案结论一致性[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - 最后把两者合成 [38;5;6;49mreward[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  这和我们现在已经补好的 rollout trace 是非常契合的，基本可以直接往下接。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  来源：[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m

[39;49m[K  - reward/[1minit[22m.py ([4m[38;5;6;49mhttps://github.com/Time-Search/TimeSearch-R/blob/main/time_r1/reward/__init__.py[24m[39;49m)[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - reward/llm_judge.py ([4m[38;5;6;49mhttps://github.com/Time-Search/TimeSearch-R/blob/main/time_r1/reward/llm_judge.py[24m[39;49m)[39m[49m[0m

[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[2m• [22m我还想把设计往“能训练、能打分、能落地”再推一步，所以补看一下你们当前标注里到底有哪些反事实字段，避免 verifier 设计得太理想化。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[2m• [3mI'm considering three verification methods. First, there's a pure heuristic verifier that compares predicted evidence windows to ground truth, which is easy but not deployable since ground truth is absent. Then, a pure LLM-as-judge verifier, where I ask a model to[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [3m[2massess views, but it’s too noisy and costly for online use. Finally, I’m recommending a hybrid approach called TriCEV-SAVER, which combines structured verification with heuristics for training and learned judgment for inference. This seems like the best[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [3m[2moption.[1mDesigning input structure[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [3m[2mI need to outline a design with specific inputs, including the rollout trace, state, structured prediction candidate, and possibly video windows or selected evidence IDs. For view construction, I have three key categories: full view will encompass all visited windows,[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [3m[2mthe keep view will focus on the selected evidence subset, and the drop view will represent the visited windows minus the selected ones. I also need to consider how current skeleton evidence windows relate to the evidence ledger entries or finalized selected visited[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [3m[2mwindows.[1mStructuring mask types[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [3m[2mI'm organizing masks into four types: complete, incomplete, redundant, and misaligned. For complete masks, I need the trigger and minimal necessary context. Incomplete masks might have only precursors or aftermath missing critical triggers. Redundant masks will include[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [3m[2mirrelevant or duplicate windows. Misaligned masks consist of windows outside the anomaly or conflicting signals. For each candidate subset, I need to compute full, keep, or drop views and label their status based on heuristics for necessary evidence.[1mConsidering alert[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [1m[3m[2mvariations[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [3m[2mI'm thinking about two types of alerts: soft and hard variations. A soft alert might allow for both a precursor and an ambiguous trigger, while a final complete alert requires a trigger combined with either a peak or confirmation. Alternatively, it could include a[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [3m[2mstrong precursor plus the trigger itself. This distinction helps me categorize alerts based on the clarity and strength of the evidence presented. It’s essential to find the right balance for effective identification.[1mConsidering design efficiency[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [3m[2mI'm thinking about possibly designing with a shared backbone to save costs. This could involve sharing the Qwen visual encoder features or cached window embeddings. Then, I could utilize TriCEV as a small 2-layer transformer or MLP on top, which is efficient and aligns[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [3m[2mwith the 4x H200 approach. I should also mention that this isn't limited to proposals and perhaps that a TimeSearch-R-like idea could be more effective.[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[2m• [22m可以，而且我建议我们把 SAVER 的 verifier 设计成一个真正“服务于搜索和告警”的模块，而不是一个事后打分器。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  基于 [38;5;6;49mWmh/ideas/idea2/SAVER_paper_full_draft.md[39;49m、你们现在的标注 [38;5;6;49mWmh/ideas/idea2_v2/benchmark_annotations/msad_saver_agent_train.jsonl[39;49m，以及当前骨架 [38;5;6;49mWmh/ideas/idea2_v2/code/saver_agent/rollout.py[39;49m、[38;5;6;49mWmh/ideas/idea2_v2/code/saver_agent/tools.py[39;49m，我认为最合适的不是纯[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  TimeSearch-R 式 [38;5;6;49mjudge reward[39;49m，而是一个定制版的 [38;5;6;49mTriCEV-SAVER verifier[39;49m。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [1m先看三种路子[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [38;5;12;49m1. [39;49m纯规则 verifier[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K     优点是稳、容易训、很适合 Stage C。缺点是推理时不够“真理解”，更像 evaluator。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [38;5;12;49m2. [39;49m纯 Qwen / LLM-as-a-judge verifier[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K     很灵活，也像 TimeSearch-R 后期 reward。缺点是贵、慢、噪声大，不适合直接卡在 rollout 分支里。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [38;5;12;49m3. [39;49m混合式 TriCEV-SAVER verifier[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K     我最推荐。训练时用启发式主导、学习式辅助；推理时用学习式输出 status，但保留 heuristic fallback。这最像你论文里“保守半联合”的精神。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  我建议选第 3 个。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [1m核心想法[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  不要让 verifier 判断“答案对不对”，而要判断：[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - 当前选出来的证据子集 [38;5;6;49mE[39;49m，单独保留时，是否还足以支持当前结论[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - 把 [38;5;6;49mE[39;49m 从已访问证据里拿掉后，支持是否明显下降[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - 当前 [38;5;6;49mE[39;49m 是“完整”“不完整”“冗余”还是“错位”[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  这正好对应论文里的三视图：[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - [38;5;6;49mfull = 全部已访问窗口 W[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - [38;5;6;49mkeep = 当前选中证据 E[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - [38;5;6;49mdrop = W - E[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  也就是说，SAVER 的反事实验证效果，不是靠一句 counterfactual 文本，而是靠这个检验：[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - [38;5;6;49mkeep[39;49m 应该尽量保住结论[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - [38;5;6;49mdrop[39;49m 应该尽量破坏结论[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  这才是真正的 sufficiency + necessity。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [1m我建议的 verifier 结构[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  做成一个 [38;5;6;49mclaim-conditioned tri-view verifier[39;49m。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  输入不是只有视频窗口，还包括一个“当前主张” [38;5;6;49mclaim[39;49m。这个 [38;5;6;49mclaim[39;49m 可以来自 [38;5;6;49msoft_alert[39;49m 后的暂定判断，或者 [38;5;6;49mfinalize_case[39;49m 前的最终结构化候选。这样它天然兼容 query-free 和未来 query-conditioned SAVER。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  输入由四部分组成：[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - [38;5;6;49mclaim[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K      - existence[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K      - category[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K      - severity[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K      - anomaly interval[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K      - precursor interval[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K      - earliest alert[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K      - counterfactual type[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - [38;5;6;49mvisited_windows[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - [38;5;6;49mselected_evidence_ids[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - 可选 [38;5;6;49mquery[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K      - 现在可以为空[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K      - 以后若支持 query，直接拼进去即可[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [1m每个视图要预测什么[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  不是只出一个分数，而是出一个 support vector。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  对 [38;5;6;49mfull / keep / drop[39;49m 每个视图都预测：[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - [38;5;6;49mexist_support[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - [38;5;6;49mcategory_support[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - [38;5;6;49mtemporal_support[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - [38;5;6;49mprecursor_support[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - [38;5;6;49malert_support[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - [38;5;6;49mcounterfactual_support[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - [38;5;6;49moverall_support[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  然后再基于三视图关系输出：[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - [38;5;6;49mstatus ∈ {complete, incomplete, redundant, misaligned}[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - [38;5;6;49mverified_evidence_ids[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - [38;5;6;49mbest_effort_evidence_ids[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - [38;5;6;49mcontinue_recommendation[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - [38;5;6;49mrefine_mask[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [1m状态判定逻辑[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  我建议这样定义，比较符合 SAVER 真实需求：[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - [38;5;6;49mcomplete[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K      - [38;5;6;49mkeep[39;49m 仍然强[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K      - [38;5;6;49mdrop[39;49m 明显弱[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K      - [38;5;6;49mkeep[39;49m 和 [38;5;6;49mfull[39;49m 的结论一致[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - [38;5;6;49mincomplete[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K      - [38;5;6;49mfull[39;49m 强，但 [38;5;6;49mkeep[39;49m 弱[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K      - 说明当前证据子集不够，通常该继续搜[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - [38;5;6;49mredundant[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K      - [38;5;6;49mkeep[39;49m 强，[38;5;6;49mdrop[39;49m 也强[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K      - 说明你选的证据不是“必要”的，里面可能混了很多可替代窗口[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - [38;5;6;49mmisaligned[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K      - [38;5;6;49mkeep[39;49m 支持了错误类别、错误时间段，或者根本不支持 anomaly[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K      - 这是最该重罚的[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  一个很实用的打分分解是：[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - [38;5;6;49msufficiency = S(keep)[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - [38;5;6;49mnecessity = S(full) - S(drop)[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - [38;5;6;49mconsistency = 1 - |S(full) - S(keep)|[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - [38;5;6;49mmisalignment = contradiction_score[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  然后用阈值映射到四类 status。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [1m为什么这比 TimeSearch-R 更适合 SAVER[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  TimeSearch-R 更像“答案是否合理、工具用得好不好”的 reward 体系，代表文件是：[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - v3_1.py ([4m[38;5;6;49mhttps://github.com/Time-Search/TimeSearch-R/blob/main/time_r1/reward/v3_1.py[24m[39;49m)[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - llm_judge.py ([4m[38;5;6;49mhttps://github.com/Time-Search/TimeSearch-R/blob/main/time_r1/reward/llm_judge.py[24m[39;49m)[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - v7.py ([4m[38;5;6;49mhttps://github.com/Time-Search/TimeSearch-R/blob/main/time_r1/reward/v7.py[24m[39;49m)[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  它对我们最有用的是“分解 reward”和“LLM judge 可作为后期辅助”，但它没有替我们解决 SAVER 最关键的问题：[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - 早报是否真的有依据[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - 当前证据是否足够支持 alert[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - 去掉这些证据后结论是否塌掉[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - 证据是缺了、错了、还是多了[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  所以我们应该借它的训练思想，不照搬它的 verifier 形态。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [1m怎么用你们现有标注把这个 verifier 训起来[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  好消息是，你们现有标注已经够用了。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  从 [38;5;6;49mWmh/ideas/idea2_v2/benchmark_annotations/msad_saver_agent_train.jsonl[39;49m 里我们已经有：[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - [38;5;6;49mstructured_target.existence[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - [38;5;6;49mcategory[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - [38;5;6;49mseverity[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - [38;5;6;49manomaly_interval_sec[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - [38;5;6;49mprecursor_interval_sec[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - [38;5;6;49mearliest_alert_sec[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - [38;5;6;49mevidence_windows_sec[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - [38;5;6;49mcounterfactual_type[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - [38;5;6;49mcounterfactual_text[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  这意味着我们可以自动合成 verifier 训练样本：[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - [38;5;6;49mcomplete[39;49m 样本[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K      - 包含 trigger[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K      - 覆盖核心 anomaly evidence[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K      - 与 earliest alert 相容[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - [38;5;6;49mincomplete[39;49m 样本[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K      - 缺 trigger[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K      - 只有 precursor / aftermath[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K      - 或 alert 太早但无足够支持[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - [38;5;6;49mredundant[39;49m 样本[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K      - 正确证据 + 过多无关或可替代窗口[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - [38;5;6;49mmisaligned[39;49m 样本[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K      - 选到了异常区外[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K      - 选中窗口与 claim 类别或时间冲突[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  也就是说，四类 status 不需要人工逐条重标，可以从 GT evidence 和 rollout visited windows 自动构造。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [1m我建议的“最小必要证据”定义[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  这里不要太死板地规定“必须 ev2+ev3”，否则会过拟合标注风格。我更建议 role-aware 加权：[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - [38;5;6;49mtrigger[39;49m 权重最高[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - [38;5;6;49mpeak_action / confirmation[39;49m 次高[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - [38;5;6;49mprecursor[39;49m 主要服务 earliest alert[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - [38;5;6;49maftermath[39;49m 只作为补强，不作为核心依据[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  这样 verifier 会更像 operational anomaly understanding，而不是只背 evidence id。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [1m如何接到现在的 agent 骨架里[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  我建议保留现有 [38;5;6;49mverify_hypothesis[39;49m 这个 tool 名字，但把它升级成真正的 TriCEV 接口。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  输入参数建议改成：[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [38;2;147;153;178;49m{[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [38;2;205;214;244;49m  [38;2;147;153;178;49m"[38;2;137;180;250;49mclaim[38;2;147;153;178;49m":[38;2;205;214;244;49m [38;2;147;153;178;49m{[38;2;205;214;244;49m...[38;2;147;153;178;49m},[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [38;2;205;214;244;49m  [38;2;147;153;178;49m"[38;2;137;180;250;49mcandidate_evidence_ids[38;2;147;153;178;49m":[38;2;205;214;244;49m [38;2;147;153;178;49m[[38;2;250;179;135;49m1[38;2;147;153;178;49m,[38;2;205;214;244;49m [38;2;250;179;135;49m2[38;2;147;153;178;49m,[38;2;205;214;244;49m [38;2;250;179;135;49m4[38;2;147;153;178;49m],[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [38;2;205;214;244;49m  [38;2;147;153;178;49m"[38;2;137;180;250;49mmode[38;2;147;153;178;49m":[38;2;205;214;244;49m [38;2;166;227;161;49m"soft_alert_check"[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [38;2;147;153;178;49m}[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  返回：[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [38;2;147;153;178;49m{[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [38;2;205;214;244;49m  [38;2;147;153;178;49m"[38;2;137;180;250;49mstatus[38;2;147;153;178;49m":[38;2;205;214;244;49m [38;2;166;227;161;49m"incomplete"[38;2;147;153;178;49m,[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [38;2;205;214;244;49m  [38;2;147;153;178;49m"[38;2;137;180;250;49mheuristic_status[38;2;147;153;178;49m":[38;2;205;214;244;49m [38;2;166;227;161;49m"incomplete"[38;2;147;153;178;49m,[39m[49m[0m

[39;49m[K  [38;2;205;214;244;49m  [38;2;147;153;178;49m},[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [38;2;205;214;244;49m  [38;2;147;153;178;49m"[38;2;137;180;250;49msupport_gaps[38;2;147;153;178;49m":[38;2;205;214;244;49m [38;2;147;153;178;49m{[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [38;2;205;214;244;49m    [38;2;147;153;178;49m"[38;2;137;180;250;49msufficiency[38;2;147;153;178;49m":[38;2;205;214;244;49m [38;2;250;179;135;49m0[38;2;147;153;178;49m.[38;2;250;179;135;49m61[38;2;147;153;178;49m,[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [38;2;205;214;244;49m    [38;2;147;153;178;49m"[38;2;137;180;250;49mnecessity[38;2;147;153;178;49m":[38;2;205;214;244;49m [38;2;250;179;135;49m0[38;2;147;153;178;49m.[38;2;250;179;135;49m18[38;2;147;153;178;49m,[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [38;2;205;214;244;49m    [38;2;147;153;178;49m"[38;2;137;180;250;49mconsistency[38;2;147;153;178;49m":[38;2;205;214;244;49m [38;2;250;179;135;49m0[38;2;147;153;178;49m.[38;2;250;179;135;49m74[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [38;2;205;214;244;49m  [38;2;147;153;178;49m},[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [38;2;205;214;244;49m  [38;2;147;153;178;49m"[38;2;137;180;250;49mverified_evidence_ids[38;2;147;153;178;49m":[38;2;205;214;244;49m [38;2;147;153;178;49m[[38;2;250;179;135;49m2[38;2;147;153;178;49m,[38;2;205;214;244;49m [38;2;250;179;135;49m4[38;2;147;153;178;49m],[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [38;2;205;214;244;49m  [38;2;147;153;178;49m"[38;2;137;180;250;49mbest_effort_evidence_ids[38;2;147;153;178;49m":[38;2;205;214;244;49m [38;2;147;153;178;49m[[38;2;250;179;135;49m2[38;2;147;153;178;49m,[38;2;205;214;244;49m [38;2;250;179;135;49m4[38;2;147;153;178;49m],[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [38;2;205;214;244;49m  [38;2;147;153;178;49m"[38;2;137;180;250;49mrecommended_action[38;2;147;153;178;49m":[38;2;205;214;244;49m [38;2;166;227;161;49m"continue_search"[38;2;147;153;178;49m,[39m[49m[0m

[39;49m[K  [38;2;147;153;178;49m}[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  这样它就能直接驱动：[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - [38;5;6;49msoft_alert[39;49m 后继续搜索还是停[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - [38;5;6;49mfinalize_case[39;49m 前 evidence refinement[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - reward 里的 verification term[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - 最后的 verified-first generation[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [1m训练策略[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  这个地方我建议严格按你论文里写的保守路线来：[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - Stage C[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K      - rollout 分支是否继续，主要看 heuristic status[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K      - learned verifier 只作为 auxiliary shaping[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - Stage D[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K      - 轻量校准 learned verifier[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K      - 加 teacher consistency[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K      - 不重新把 verifier 放回高风险 branching 主循环里乱带节奏[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  这点非常重要，因为 SAVER 和 TimeSearch-R 的一个根本区别就在于：我们不是在优化“回答风格”，而是在优化“什么时候该继续搜、什么时候证据够了”。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [1m一句话总结这个设计[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  我建议把 SAVER verifier 定义成：[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [38;5;6;49m一个以 claim 为条件、以 full/keep/drop 三视图为核心、同时预测 support vector + four-way status + refinement mask 的混合式反事实证据验证器。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  这会让 SAVER 的“Verify”真正成为方法核心，而不是 reward 里的一个小项。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  如果你认可这个设计，我下一步就不再停留在概念层面，直接把它拆成可实现接口：[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - [38;5;6;49msaver_agent/verifier.py[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - [38;5;6;49msaver_agent/reward.py[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - [38;5;6;49mverify_hypothesis[39;49m 的新 schema[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - rollout trace 里新增 verifier 字段[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - 用你们现有标注自动合成四类 verifier supervision[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  如果后面你想把 verifier、reward、ablation 和论文实验链路一起系统化跑起来，也可以顺手看看 [38;5;6;49mwww.k-dense.ai[39;49m。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[1m[2m› [22m[22m[$scientific-brainstorming](/root/.codex/skills/scientific-brainstorming/SKILL.md) 不要看论文里面的反事实验证 stage 的实现方式，只要看 idea，我们可能不用什么 stage，代码以 timesearch-r 的风格为准（看看他是 stage 还是端到端），然后重新思考一下，如何按照 SAVER 反事实验[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  证的实际需求结合我们上面的讨论和可以借鉴 timesearch-r 的地方，设计一个定制的 verifier 吧, 实现SAVER 论文中的反事实验证效果[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[2m• [3mI’m thinking about how to address the user’s request without directly implementing anything just yet. I might need to mention possible approaches, but I wonder if skipping that is better if it gets too conflicting. The system suggests I should use certain skills, but[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [3m[2mmaybe I can load information via exec_command while still providing a brief outline of 2-3 approaches. First, I’ll inspect the TimeSearch-R train structure and relevant files to understand stage vs. end-to-end processing better.[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[2m• [22m我先把 [38;5;6;49mTimeSearch-R[39;49m 的训练组织方式再核一遍，只看它“整体风格是 stage 还是单阶段端到端”，然后据此把 SAVER 的 verifier 重新设计成更贴近它的范式，而不是沿用我们论文草稿里的 stage 假设。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[2m• [3mI need to figure out how to generate counterfactual effects. It's crucial to note that this isn’t just about natural-language explanations; it involves evidence-level intervention instead. I should focus on intervening with a subset of evidence rather than objects. I[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [3m[2mmight have to keep or drop specific windows selectively. Additionally, I can consider options like "swapping" or "masking" for the future and utilize the same visited windows with different context assemblies. This feels complex, but I think I can manage it![1mExploring[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [1m[3m[2mverification options[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [3m[2mSince the user wants flexibility beyond the paper stage, I think about proposing a 4-view or 5-view verifier to address surveillance anomalies efficiently. My initial ideas include: full visit, selected evidence, dropped selections, precursor-only, and trigger-core. To[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [3m[2mkeep it aligned with the concept, I’m considering using "TriCEV+" with anchor checks for full, keep, drop, and core searches. This might enhance early alert verification. Plus, there's a request for implementing counterfactual validation effects, so I’ll need to think[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [3m[2mmore about that.[1mConsidering task proposals[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [3m[2mI could propose specialized tasks to enhance anomaly classification. These might include support for classification, assessing alertability (is evidence actionable right now?), addressing necessity/minimality, and evaluating counterfactual type.[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [3m[2mFor the verifier outputs, I'm thinking of structuring it to include view predictions like full, keep, drop, and maybe a prefix for early warnings, along with scores for sufficiency and timeliness. Adding a "premature" status could be beneficial since it aligns with the[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [3m[2mearly alert focus and addresses distinct needs when precursor evidence is lacking. I've got to remain flexible and open to improvements based on actual user needs![1mDefining status categories[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [3m[2mI’m considering a 5-way status system that includes: supported_complete, supported_but_redundant, premature_incomplete, misaligned_claim, and normal_consistent. This might add complexity, but framing it as "TriCEV should be claim-aware and alert-aware" could help. The[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [3m[2mcounterfactual verification effect matters here: if we remove claimed decisive windows, anomaly support collapses. On the flip side, if we keep only those windows, support remains intact. For normal videos, selected evidence shouldn’t incorrectly support an anomaly, so[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [3m[2mthe verifier must align with both claim and alert timestamps. That seems essential![1mDesigning Verification Systems[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [3m[2mI could propose a few ideas for verification systems. The online verifier might utilize the same Qwen backbone in JSON mode for speed and style. An offline reward verifier could potentially use the same or an even stronger Qwen judge later on. I need to consider query-[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [3m[2mfree versus query-conditioned options — particularly as the user previously allowed for queries. The designs could include a "Tri-view classification head," "Self-verification prompt agent," or "Hybrid." I think the hybrid option is the best choice, but we should[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [3m[2mdiscuss the trade-offs involved.[1mUnderstanding SAVER Needs[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [3m[2mWhen considering the actual needs of SAVER, I realize they differ from general QA completeness. I need to focus on a few specific areas: identifying the existence or category of anomalies, ensuring temporal correctness, assessing if current evidence is sufficient to[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [3m[2mjustify an immediate alert, and determining if the selected evidence is necessary or redundant. It's also crucial to evaluate whether removing key evidence would cause the claim to fail, while managing normal video false alert control. This is pretty detailed![39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [1m[3m[2mEvaluating decision-making views[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [3m[2mI'm considering whether to build several view types: full, keep, drop, and possibly a prefix. Early alerts are crucial, so I think a prefix view that judges whether the alert was actionable at the time could be beneficial. The user also mentioned counterfactual[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [3m[2mverification, which suggests adding a prefix view could enhance the SAVER approach. However, we could maintain the TimeSearch-R method, which emphasizes completeness verification without the early alert. So, I’ll use a tri-view core with an additional alert-prefix[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [3m[2mcheck for timeliness.[1mAnalyzing output views and scores[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [3m[2mI'm developing output views for full, keep, drop, and prefix verdicts, which seems essential. I need to score these views: sufficiency is tied to support_keep, necessity combines support_full and support_drop, and minimality checks if support_keep is greater than[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [3m[2msupport_pruned. The term "pruned" might be too extreme. Alertability will focus on support_prefix related to alerts, while ensuring semantic consistency between keep and full views. I also noticed the potential for different status labels—strongly considering[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [3m[2m"premature" as a helpful addition. It might make sense to collapse it into "incomplete" for paper compatibility, while keeping a separate internal flag.[1mDefining counterfactual effect[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [3m[2mI need to clarify the actual "counterfactual effect" more concretely. If the selected evidence truly supports the anomaly, then keeping it predicts the same anomaly in terms of category and interval. If I drop it, it either reverts to normal or loses confidence in[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [3m[2mtiming. In cases where the evidence is just correlated, dropping it still predicts the anomaly, making it redundant. If the evidence is incomplete, keeping it can't sustain an alert, leading to an incomplete or premature state. I might also consider implementing a[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [3m[2mvariant where I reuse the current policy adapter with a verifier prompt and structured JSON output for each view.[1mConsidering evidence removal[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [3m[2mI'm thinking about how the [38;5;6;49mcounterfactual_type[39;49m label is crucial for defining the relevance of evidence removal. Specifically, for MSAD assault, it helps to focus on whether actor interactions should inform the keep/drop gap surrounding those interaction and trigger[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [3m[2mwindows. I feel it’s good to plan for a moderate answer length. Since the user mentioned brainstorming and redesigning, I should consider organizing the response into four sections for more clarity.[1mDrafting concisely[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [3m[2mI think I should mention K-dense briefly at the end, but let’s keep it concise and direct. I’ll ensure there are no nested bullets—just single-level bullets. It’s really important to maintain clarity in the layout while capturing the necessary details. I’ll focus on[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [3m[2mrobust wording, making sure everything is clear and to the point without overwhelming anyone. Let’s get that written out![39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[2m• [22m如果把论文里的 stage 先放下，只按 [38;5;6;49mTimeSearch-R[39;49m 的代码风格来定调，我的判断是：[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  从 [38;5;6;49mTimeSearch-R/README.md[39;49m、[38;5;6;49mTimeSearch-R/time_r1/train.py[39;49m、[38;5;6;49mTimeSearch-R/time_r1/trainer/grpo_trainer_env.py[39;49m 看，它更像“[38;5;6;49mSFT warm-start + 一个统一 rollout 环境里的端到端 RL[39;49m”，而不是把 verifier 单独做成很多训练 stage 的系统。也就是说，SAVER 如果要更像它，verifier 最好不是[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  一个论文式后处理模块，而是一个直接挂在 rollout 里的、可被 reward 读取的统一组件。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [1m我建议的三种设计[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [38;5;12;49m1. [39;49m纯规则 verifier[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K     优点是稳，容易落地。缺点是反事实效果会比较“硬编码”，像 evaluator，不像模型真的学会验证。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [38;5;12;49m2. [39;49m独立小模型 verifier[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K     优点是模块清晰。缺点是和 [38;5;6;49mTimeSearch-R[39;49m 风格不太像，而且会把系统切成 policy/verifier 两套范式，训练和调试都更重。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [38;5;12;49m3. [39;49m同 backbone 的 self-verifier + 规则 reducer[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K     这是我最推荐的。也就是：policy 还是 Qwen，verifier 也用同一个 Qwen，但走另一套 [38;5;6;49mverifier prompt -> structured JSON[39;49m 路径；最后用一个确定性的 reducer 把多视图输出汇总成 [38;5;6;49mcomplete / incomplete / redundant / misaligned[39;49m 等状态。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  我推荐第 3 种。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [1m重新定义 SAVER 的 verifier[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  不要把 verifier 定义成“答案对不对”，而要定义成：[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  “当前搜索到并选中的证据子集，是否足以支撑当前 anomaly claim 和当前 alert 决策；如果把这些证据拿掉，结论是否会塌；如果只保留这些证据，结论是否还能站住。”[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  这才是 SAVER 真正需要的反事实验证。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [1m我建议的最终形态[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  做一个 [38;5;6;49mclaim-conditioned counterfactual verifier[39;49m，核心还是 tri-view，但表达上更贴近 TimeSearch-R：[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - 输入[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K      - [38;5;6;49mclaim[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K      - [38;5;6;49mvisited_windows[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K      - [38;5;6;49mcandidate_evidence_ids[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K      - [38;5;6;49mcurrent_alert_decision[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K      - [38;5;6;49mcurrent_alert_time[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K      - 可选 [38;5;6;49mquery[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - 三个视图[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K      - [38;5;6;49mfull[39;49m: 当前所有已访问窗口[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K      - [38;5;6;49mkeep[39;49m: 当前候选证据子集[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K      - [38;5;6;49mdrop[39;49m: [38;5;6;49mfull - keep[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - 一个附加检查[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K      - [38;5;6;49malert_prefix_check[39;49m: 只看告警时刻之前或截至告警时刻的证据，判断“这个 alert 当时是否已经 actionable”[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  这里我故意把“早报问题”从 tri-view 主干里拆出来。这样 tri-view 负责反事实证据验证，[38;5;6;49malert_prefix_check[39;49m 负责 SAVER 特有的 early warning 需求，结构会更清楚。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [1m每个视图让 verifier 预测什么[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  不是只输出一个总分，而是输出一个结构化支持向量：[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [38;2;147;153;178;49m{[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [38;2;205;214;244;49m  [38;2;147;153;178;49m"[38;2;137;180;250;49mexistence[38;2;147;153;178;49m":[38;2;205;214;244;49m [38;2;166;227;161;49m"anomaly|normal"[38;2;147;153;178;49m,[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [38;2;205;214;244;49m  [38;2;147;153;178;49m"[38;2;137;180;250;49mcategory[38;2;147;153;178;49m":[38;2;205;214;244;49m [38;2;166;227;161;49m"assault"[38;2;147;153;178;49m,[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [38;2;205;214;244;49m  [38;2;147;153;178;49m"[38;2;137;180;250;49manomaly_interval_sec[38;2;147;153;178;49m":[38;2;205;214;244;49m [38;2;147;153;178;49m[[38;2;250;179;135;49m1[38;2;147;153;178;49m.[38;2;250;179;135;49m8[38;2;147;153;178;49m,[38;2;205;214;244;49m [38;2;250;179;135;49m14[38;2;147;153;178;49m.[38;2;250;179;135;49m2[38;2;147;153;178;49m],[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [38;2;205;214;244;49m  [38;2;147;153;178;49m"[38;2;137;180;250;49mprecursor_interval_sec[38;2;147;153;178;49m":[38;2;205;214;244;49m [38;2;147;153;178;49m[[38;2;250;179;135;49m0[38;2;147;153;178;49m.[38;2;250;179;135;49m27[38;2;147;153;178;49m,[38;2;205;214;244;49m [38;2;250;179;135;49m1[38;2;147;153;178;49m.[38;2;250;179;135;49m80[38;2;147;153;178;49m],[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [38;2;205;214;244;49m  [38;2;147;153;178;49m"[38;2;137;180;250;49malertable_now[38;2;147;153;178;49m":[38;2;205;214;244;49m [38;2;250;179;135;49mtrue[38;2;147;153;178;49m,[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [38;2;205;214;244;49m  [38;2;147;153;178;49m"[38;2;137;180;250;49mcounterfactual_type[38;2;147;153;178;49m":[38;2;205;214;244;49m [38;2;166;227;161;49m"remove_actor_interaction"[38;2;147;153;178;49m,[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [38;2;205;214;244;49m  [38;2;147;153;178;49m"[38;2;137;180;250;49msupport_score[38;2;147;153;178;49m":[38;2;205;214;244;49m [38;2;250;179;135;49m0[38;2;147;153;178;49m.[38;2;250;179;135;49m84[38;2;147;153;178;49m,[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [38;2;205;214;244;49m  [38;2;147;153;178;49m"[38;2;137;180;250;49mrationale_brief[38;2;147;153;178;49m":[38;2;205;214;244;49m [38;2;166;227;161;49m"..."[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [38;2;147;153;178;49m}[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  然后 reducer 再比较 [38;5;6;49mfull / keep / drop[39;49m：[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - [38;5;6;49msufficiency[39;49m: [38;5;6;49mkeep[39;49m 能不能单独撑住 claim[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - [38;5;6;49mnecessity[39;49m: 去掉 [38;5;6;49mkeep[39;49m 后，[38;5;6;49mdrop[39;49m 是否明显变弱[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - [38;5;6;49mconsistency[39;49m: [38;5;6;49mkeep[39;49m 和 [38;5;6;49mfull[39;49m 是否支持同一个 claim[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - [38;5;6;49malertability[39;49m: 在 [38;5;6;49malert_prefix_check[39;49m 下，当时是否已经该报[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - [38;5;6;49mcf_alignment[39;49m: 证据作用方式是否和 [38;5;6;49mcounterfactual_type[39;49m 一致[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [1m最终状态我建议这样定义[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  保留论文四类主状态，但另加一个独立的 alert 状态，而不是把一切都塞进一个标签里。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - [38;5;6;49mprimary_status[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K      - [38;5;6;49mcomplete[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K      - [38;5;6;49mincomplete[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K      - [38;5;6;49mredundant[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K      - [38;5;6;49mmisaligned[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - [38;5;6;49malert_status[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K      - [38;5;6;49mjustified[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K      - [38;5;6;49mpremature[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K      - [38;5;6;49mlate[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K      - [38;5;6;49mnot_applicable[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  这样更符合 SAVER 的真实需求。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  举例说：[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - [38;5;6;49mcomplete + justified[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K      - 只保留当前证据也能支持 anomaly；去掉这些证据后 support 明显掉；而且在告警时刻证据已经足够[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - [38;5;6;49mincomplete + premature[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K      - 当前证据还不够，却已经 soft/hard alert 了[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - [38;5;6;49mredundant + justified[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K      - 结论对，但你选的证据不是必要集合，里面混了很多冗余窗口[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - [38;5;6;49mmisaligned + premature[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K      - 选到的窗口和 claim 根本不对，且还报早了[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  我觉得这比只做 [38;5;6;49mcomplete/incomplete/redundant/misaligned[39;49m 更像 SAVER，而又不破坏 tri-view 的核心思想。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [1m这套 verifier 为什么比直接照搬论文 stage 更合适[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  因为你现在关心的是“代码风格像 TimeSearch-R”，那就应该让 verifier 具备这几个特征：[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - 它是 rollout 中可调用的，不是训练图里一个孤立 stage[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - 它直接产出结构化 verdict，可以被 tool observation 和 reward 共用[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - 它可以先 prompt-based 跑起来，后续再考虑蒸馏成 head[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - 它支持同一个 backbone 做 policy 和 verification，符合 TimeSearch-R 的 self-verification 味道[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  换句话说，SAVER 的“反事实验证效果”不必靠复杂训练 stage 才成立，关键是 verifier 的语义要对：[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - [38;5;6;49mkeep[39;49m 保留后还能支持结论[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - [38;5;6;49mdrop[39;49m 去掉后结论应该变差[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - 告警时刻之前的证据真的已经足够[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  只要这三件事成立，counterfactual effect 就出来了。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [1m怎么利用你们现有数据[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  你们现在的标注已经足够构造 verifier 训练样本，不必再等专门的 verifier 标注。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  从 [38;5;6;49mWmh/ideas/idea2_v2/benchmark_annotations/msad_saver_agent_train.jsonl[39;49m 我们已经有：[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - existence / category / severity[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - anomaly / precursor / earliest alert[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - evidence moments[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - counterfactual type / text[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  所以可以自动构造：[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - [38;5;6;49mcomplete[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K      - 选中 trigger 和核心 support moments[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - [38;5;6;49mincomplete[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K      - 缺 trigger，或只有 precursor / aftermath[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - [38;5;6;49mredundant[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K      - 正确窗口加过多无关窗口[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - [38;5;6;49mmisaligned[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K      - 选中异常外窗口，或角色错位窗口[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - [38;5;6;49mpremature[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K      - 只用 earliest-alert 之前不够支撑 anomaly 的窗口去报[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  这很重要，因为它说明我们完全可以按 [38;5;6;49mTimeSearch-R[39;49m 风格走“统一 rollout + verifier + reward”，而不是先发明一套额外 stage 才能开工。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [1m我会怎么把它落到当前代码里[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  我建议外部 tool 名还叫 [38;5;6;49mverify_hypothesis[39;49m，但内部升级为真正的 counterfactual verifier。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  它的返回值不再只是现在这种 [38;5;6;49msupported_candidate / needs_review[39;49m，而是：[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m

[39;49m[K  [38;2;147;153;178;49m}[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  这一个结构就能同时服务：[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - rollout 决策[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - reward 计算[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - evidence refinement[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - final verified-first generation[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [1m一句话收束[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  如果按 [38;5;6;49mTimeSearch-R[39;49m 风格重想，我认为最对的 SAVER verifier 不是“多 stage TriCEV trainer”，而是：[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  “一个挂在 rollout 里的、同 backbone 驱动的、claim-conditioned tri-view self-verifier，再加一个专门面向 early alert 的 prefix check。”[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  它既保留了 SAVER 的反事实核心，也更像 TimeSearch-R 的统一端到端范式。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  如果你认可这个方向，我下一步就按这个设计直接细化成可实现 spec：[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - verifier 输入输出 schema[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - [38;5;6;49mverify_hypothesis[39;49m 新 tool I/O[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - rollout trace 该补哪些字段[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - reward 怎么直接消费 verifier verdict[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  另，如果后面你想把更大规模的研究工作流也串起来，也可以看看 [38;5;6;49mwww.k-dense.ai[39;49m。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[1m[2m› [22m[22m重新定义 SAVER 的 verifier[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  不要把 verifier 定义成“答案对不对”，而要定义成：[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  “当前搜索到并选中的证据子集，是否足以支撑当前 anomaly claim 和当前 alert 决策；如果把这些证据拿掉，结论是否会塌；如果只保留这些证据，结论是否还能站住。”[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  这才是 SAVER 真正需要的反事实验证。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  很好，这就是我想要的 verifier，我认可这个方向，下一步就按这个设计直接细化成可实现 spec[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[2m• [3mThe developer wants me to assume code changes unless explicitly asked otherwise. I[39m[49m[0m

[39;49m[K  [3m[2mlacks examples. I should also check the allowed tools list to see if there are any tools that the model isn't using. Maybe inspecting the tool registry will help clarify the names involved.[39m[49m[0m

[39;49m[K[2m• [22m现在线索更明确了：Qwen 首轮几乎都在自然语言里写“我将使用 [38;5;6;49mscan_timeline[39;49m / [38;5;6;49mseek_evidence[39;49m”，但既没有 [38;5;6;49m<tool_call>...</tool_call>[39;49m 包裹，也没有合法 JSON。更关键的是它还会自己发明不存在的工具名，比如 [38;5;6;49mseek_evidence[39;49m，这说明当前 prompt 还没把“协议约束”和“可用工具集合”压到足够[39m[49m[0m

[39;49m[K  [3m[2mrecommendations. I could implement fixes directly but should follow systematic debugging first. I’m thinking of diagnosing the issue and possibly asking for permission or suggestions for a plan before moving forward.[1mImproving system robustness[39m[49m[0m

[39;49m[K  [3m[2mI think we can proactively enhance robustness by implementing a few changes. First, I could make the system prompt more rigid by providing clear tool call examples and specifying no natural language outside of tags. It would be beneficial to ensure the parser can[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [3m[2mhandle variations robustly, like setting default actions for [38;5;6;49mscan_timeline[39;49m when arguments are missing. [39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [3m[2mI need to check if the runner inspects the "dones." It seems it only keeps track for "max_turns," and while messages append the assistant message, they don’t trigger an "invalid_tool_call." [39;49m[K  [3m[2m"done=1" with "valid=0." It looks like the runner continues without breaking when "dones[0]" is up, only stopping on action "answer." This means the model never receives feedback on invalid format, which is a significant root cause.[39m[49m[0m

[39;49m[K  [38;2;166;227;161;49mprint('actions =', dict(actions))[39m[49m[0m

[39;49m[K  [38;2;203;166;247;49mPY[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  理想上这次你至少应该看到：[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - [38;5;6;49mactions[39;49m 里不再是几乎全 [38;5;6;49mNone[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - [38;5;6;49mtools[39;49m 里会出现 [38;5;6;49mscan_timeline / seek_evidence / verify_hypothesis[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - [38;5;6;49mterminated_reason[39;49m 不会再主要是 [38;5;6;49mmax_turns[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m

[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  你把新的 [38;5;6;49mactions/tools/terminated[39;49m 统计和新的 summary 一起发我，我就能判断这次 verifier 的状态分布是不是终于“有辨识度”了。如果还不理想，下一步我会优先做“错误样本导出 + 协议失败样本汇总”，把真正的问题样本自动捞出来。更大规模的研究 workflow 之后也可以考虑放到[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  www.k-dense.ai 上跑。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[1m[2m› [22m[22m你上面的工作是在干什么，我有点看不懂，什么时候才能部署完整代码开始训练呀. verifier-model和model 分别是什么呀[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[2m• [22m你这句问得很对。上面那一轮我做的不是“训练”，而是在修“训练前最关键的地基”。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [1m我刚才在干什么[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  你前面跑出来的结果是 [38;5;6;49m16/16 misaligned[39;49m，我去查了真实 rollout，发现根因不是 verifier 太苛刻，而是 [38;5;6;49mQwen[39;49m 大多数时候根本没有真正调用工具。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  它经常输出这种东西：[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - “I will use [38;5;6;49mscan_timeline[39;49m...”[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - “seek_evidence”[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - [38;5;6;49m<tool_call>{scan_timeline: {...}}</tool_call>[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  但我们的环境原来只认非常严格的格式：[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - [38;5;6;49m<tool_call>{"name":"scan_timeline","arguments":{...}}</tool_call>[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  所以之前发生的是：[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [38;5;12;49m1. [39;49m模型没有真正调起工具[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [38;5;12;49m2. [39;49m没拿到真实证据[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [38;5;12;49m3. [39;49mverifier 只能看到空的或错的证据子集[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [38;5;12;49m4. [39;49m最后全被判成 [38;5;6;49mmisaligned[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  所以我刚才做的是把这条链路修通：[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - 让 parser 更能容忍 Qwen 的常见输出变体[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - 当输出格式错时，系统会明确返回 [38;5;6;49mparse_error[39;49m，逼模型下一轮重试[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - 强化 prompt，明确禁止“用自然语言描述要调用工具”[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - 让 rollout loop 真正把这个错误反馈喂回模型[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  这一步不是偏题，恰恰是为了让后面的训练数据、reward、verifier 都不是假信号。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [38;5;6;49mmodel[1m[39;49m 和 [22m[38;5;6;49mverifier-model[1m[39;49m 分别是什么[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  很简单，可以把它们理解成两个角色：[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - [38;5;6;49mmodel[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K      - 主 agent[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K      - 负责看 prompt、看帧、决定下一步动作[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K      - 会输出：[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K          - 调工具[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K          - 发 alert[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K          - verify[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K          - finalize / answer[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K      - 也就是“干活的人”[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - [38;5;6;49mverifier-model[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K      - 负责评判当前证据子集是否真的足够支撑 claim 和 alert[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K      - 不负责搜索，不负责规划[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K      - 只负责“判卷”[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K      - 也就是“裁判/评委”[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  现在代码里它们可以是同一个底座模型，比如都用 [38;5;6;49mqwen3-vl-8b-Instruct[39;49m，但逻辑角色不同。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  后面也可以分开：[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - [38;5;6;49mmodel[39;49m 用来训练[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - [38;5;6;49mverifier-model[39;49m 固定住，只做打分器[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [1m什么时候能开始训练[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  分两种“训练”：[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [38;5;12;49m1. [38;5;6;49mSFT / imitation[39;49m 式训练[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - 已经很接近了[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - 需要再补一个正式训练脚本，把我们现在的 agent-format 数据接到 Qwen 训练入口[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - 这部分可以很快开始[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [38;5;12;49m2. [38;5;6;49mTimeSearch-R 风格的 rollout + verifier/reward 驱动训练[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - 还差最后一段训练 loop[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - 也就是把：[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K      - rollout runner[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K      - reward/verifier[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K      - batch sampling[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K      - optimizer / checkpoint / logging[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K        真正串成训练脚本[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - 这才叫“完整训练版”[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [1m现在的真实状态[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  已经有的：[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - 数据转换[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - dataset / schema / tools I/O[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - rollout runner[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - Qwen policy 接入[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - verifier[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - offline scoring[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - summary[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - batch rollout[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  还没补完的：[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - 正式训练脚本[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - 训练配置[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - checkpoint / 日志 / batch 训练入口[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - 如果走 RL，还要把 reward 接进 trainer[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [1m一句话总结[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  我刚才做的是“把 agent 真正学会按协议调用工具”，这是开始训练前必须修好的，不然你训练出来的 reward 和 verifier 都会被假 rollout 污染。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [1m我建议的下一步[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  现在最合理的是直接进入这条路线：[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [38;5;12;49m1. [39;49m先用修复后的代码重新跑一小批真实 rollout，确认不再“全是 [38;5;6;49maction=None[39;49m”[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [38;5;12;49m2. [39;49m如果 rollout 正常，我马上开始补训练脚本[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [38;5;12;49m3. [39;49m训练顺序建议：[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - 第一阶段：[38;5;6;49mSFT warm-start[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - 第二阶段：[38;5;6;49mrollout + verifier/reward[39;49m 训练[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  如果你愿意，我下一步就直接开始做“可训练版主脚本”，目标是给你一个明确的第一版入口，比如：[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - [38;5;6;49mtrain_saver_sft.py[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - [38;5;6;49mtrain_saver_rl.py[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  你如果点头，我就按“先可跑训练版，再逐步增强”为目标直接往下接。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[1m[2m› [22m[22m重新跑一小批真实 rollout，确认不再“全是 action=None” 这一步可以使用 qwen3-vl-32B-Instruct 吗，这样效果会好一点吗，他的文件路径在/mnt/shared-storage-user/mineru2-shared/zengweijun/Wmh/MLLMs/Qwen3-VL-32B-Instruct[39m[49m[0m
