[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [3m[2mI’m recognizing that, based on the new summary, the fix actually worked! It seems like the action-none collapse likely solved the issue. Now, the verifier is showing mixed statuses, which is interesting. I'm curious about what this means moving forward and how I can[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [3m[2mhelp the user maintain clarity with the statuses. It's always nice to see progress, and I want to ensure everything stays on track![39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[2m• [22m[1m结论[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  这份新 summary 很好，说明我前面修的那一层是对的。上一轮 [38;5;6;49m16/16 misaligned[39;49m 不是 verifier 坏了，而是 agent 根本没真正调起工具；现在变成：[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - [38;5;6;49m15 complete / 1 incomplete[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - [38;5;6;49m0 misaligned[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - [38;5;6;49mjustified / premature / late / not_applicable[39;49m 开始有分布[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  这说明 verifier 现在已经在看“真实证据子集”了，不是在空转。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  但还有一个明显问题：[38;5;6;49mmean_num_turns = 6.0[39;49m，而且 [38;5;6;49mdecision_reward[39;49m 很低。这表示模型大多能搜到足够证据，但不会及时 [38;5;6;49memit_alert[39;49m / [38;5;6;49mfinalize_case[39;49m / [38;5;6;49manswer[39;49m，而是一直拖到 [38;5;6;49mmax_turns[39;49m。所以现在不是 verifier 卡住了，而是 policy 的“收尾决策”还弱。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [1m32B[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  可以，用 [38;5;6;49mqwen3-vl-32B-Instruct[39;49m 跑这一步是合理的，而且大概率会比 8B 更稳，尤其是在：[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - 工具调用格式遵从[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - 多轮搜索规划[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - 何时 verify / 何时 finalize[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  这几个点上，32B 通常会更好。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  我建议这样用：[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - [38;5;6;49mmodel[39;49m 先换成 32B[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - [38;5;6;49mverifier-model[39;49m 先保持原来的设置不变[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  这样我们能隔离变量，只看“主 agent 变强后 rollout 是否更好”。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  两者区别很简单：[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - [38;5;6;49mmodel[39;49m：主 agent，本体，负责搜索、调工具、告警、收尾[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - [38;5;6;49mverifier-model[39;49m：裁判，只负责判断当前证据子集是否足够支撑 claim 和 alert[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  你可以直接把主模型换成这个路径：[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [38;5;6;49m/mnt/shared-storage-user/mineru2-shared/zengweijun/Wmh/MLLMs/Qwen3-VL-32B-Instruct[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  例如只改 [38;5;6;49m--model-path[39;49m：[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [38;2;137;180;250;49mpython[38;2;205;214;244;49m batch_run_saver_rollout.py [38;2;147;153;178;49m\[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [38;2;205;214;244;49m  ... [38;2;147;153;178;49m\[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [38;2;147;153;178;49m  --[38;2;235;160;172;49mpolicy-backend[38;2;205;214;244;49m qwen [38;2;147;153;178;49m\[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [38;2;147;153;178;49m  --[38;2;235;160;172;49mmodel-path[38;2;205;214;244;49m /mnt/shared-storage-user/mineru2-shared/zengweijun/Wmh/MLLMs/Qwen3-VL-32B-Instruct [38;2;147;153;178;49m\[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [38;2;205;214;244;49m  ...[39m[49m[0m

[39;49m[K[2m• [3mI’m considering the issue of negative sample weights in relation to cross-entropy, which could indeed yield negative loss and lead to instability, but there may be a way to work with it. The user asked about KL regularization, so I’m thinking of maintaining a positive[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [3m[2mfilter. It's crucial for the SAVER approach, as it deals with sparse delayed rewards and unstable policy. I’d recommend starting with a low KL beta to keep exploration flexible while implementing any necessary tests for the training helper functions.[1mCreating training[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [1m[3m[2mfunction updates[39m[49m[0m

[39;49m[K  [3m[2mdefault of 0.02, and consider adding a [38;5;6;49m--kl-loss-type[39;49m for reverse KL.[1mConsidering KL regularization[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [3m[2mI’m thinking about the implications of having a negative KL estimate when lp is less than ref_lp. It seems that penalizing the mean could encourage values lower than the reference. For the Proximal Policy Optimization (PPO), the approximated KL on samples uses an[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [3m[2mexponential difference model. But I wonder if a simpler, more stable approach could be to use squared differences with positive clamping instead. However, the user is looking for insights more related to reference policy and KL regularization.[1mConsidering test[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [1m[3m[2mimplementation[39m[49m[0m

[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[2m• [22m我先把 reference policy / KL 的失败测试补上，锁两个新行为：[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - RL 默认可以固定一个 reference checkpoint，不会跟着当前 policy 一起漂[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - 训练目标里会把 [38;5;6;49madvantage[39;49m 项和 [38;5;6;49mKL[39;49m 正则合在一起[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  这样改完之后，我们说“更适合 SAVER”的依据就比较实在，而不是口头上的。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[2m• [22mContext compacted[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[2m• [22m这一步我会先检查现有的 [38;5;6;49mtrain_saver_rl.py[39;49m、训练模块和测试，确认当前已经做到哪里，再把 reference policy / KL regularization 这条线完整接上，并顺手把 README 的运行说明补齐。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[2m• [22m我会按这个小设计继续推进：固定一个 [38;5;6;49mreference policy[39;49m 作为锚点，RL 训练里保留现在的 group-relative advantage，再在响应 token 上加 KL 惩罚，避免策略把工具协议和 finalize 行为学坏。这个方向对 SAVER 是合适的，因为我们现在最怕的不是“不会探索”，而是 verifier/reward 一上来把策[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  略推偏；你已经明确希望我直接推进，我就按这个实现并补对应测试。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[2m• [22m我已经定位到关键接口了：目前 [38;5;6;49mtrain_saver_rl.py[39;49m 已经有 grouped rollout 和 relative advantage，但训练侧还是“加权 SFT”，还没有固定 reference policy 和 KL 项。下一步我会先补测试，把我们想要的行为钉死，再改训练器和 CLI。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[2m• [22m我刚确认了训练数据接口：每个样本已经有 [38;5;6;49mmessages + target_response + sample_weight[39;49m，这很好，因为 KL 只需要在现有 response-token 掩码上多算一遍 reference logprob 就能接进去，不用重做数据格式。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[2m• [3mI need to create design tests, and it seems like I could add these tests in the training.py module if they aren't already there. [39;49m[K  [3m[2mcause issues. It's all about ensuring everything works smoothly without breaking changes! Let's make sure I cover all the necessary testing points here.[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[2m• [22m现在的改造点已经很清楚了：[38;5;6;49mtrain_saver_rl.py[39;49m 负责决定 reference checkpoint 用谁，[38;5;6;49msaver_agent/training.py[39;49m 负责真正把 KL 加进 loss。这样可以保持 SFT 入口几乎不变，同时让 RL 训练更像“有锚点的 GRPO-like update”。[39m[49m[0m

[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  这版适合 SAVER，而且我已经把 reference policy / KL regularization 接进去了。原因很直接：SAVER 的 reward 和 verifier 都是高层、偏稀疏的信号，如果没有 reference anchor，策略很容易把工具调用格式、[38;5;6;49mfinalize_case[39;49m 时机、甚至 alert 节奏一起学坏；固定 reference policy 加小 KL，[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  正好能把策略锚在你们现在这套 TimeSearch-R 风格 rollout 空间里，同时允许 reward 去推动更好的证据搜索和反事实验证。它现在仍然是 “GRPO-like”，不是完整 token-level PPO/GRPO，这一点我没有夸大。[39m[49m[0m

[39;49m[K  第四，训练节必须重写，而且这是最需要改的一块。草稿写的是四阶段训练、Stage C 的 [38;5;6;49mCGRPO[39;49m、以及“without a reference model” [38;5;6;49mWmh/ideas/idea2_v2/SAVER_paper_full_draft.md:219[39;49m, [38;5;6;49mWmh/ideas/idea2_v2/SAVER_paper_full_draft.md:244[39;49m。但当前代码已经是另一套范式了：先做 oracle[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  trajectory SFT，再做 grouped-rollout 的 GRPO-like RL，并且已经接上了 fixed reference policy 和 KL regularization [38;5;6;49mWmh/ideas/idea2_v2/code/train_saver_rl.py:35[39;49m, [38;5;6;49mWmh/ideas/idea2_v2/code/train_saver_rl.py:48[39;49m, [38;5;6;49mWmh/ideas/idea2_v2/code/saver_agent/training.py:239[39;49m, [38;5;6;49mWmh/ideas/[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [38;5;6;49midea2_v2/code/saver_agent/training.py:284[39;49m, [38;5;6;49mWmh/ideas/idea2_v2/code/README.md:176[39;49m。也就是说，论文里不能再写 PPO-style clipped ratio 的 [38;5;6;49mCGRPO[39;49m 公式当成当前实现，尤其不能再写“没有 reference model”。如果按当前代码对齐，最合理的训练叙事应该是“两阶段”：[38;5;6;49moracle stepwise SFT +[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [38;5;6;49mreference-anchored grouped-rollout RL[39;49m。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  第五，benchmark 和 experiments 的 claim 目前也偏超前。草稿把 SAVER-Bench 写成已经统一了 MSAD、CUVA、ECVA，并给出总量统计 [38;5;6;49mWmh/ideas/idea2_v2/SAVER_paper_full_draft.md:74[39;49m。但当前 converter 里真正落地的 adapter 只有 [38;5;6;49mmsad_saver_qwen[39;49m [38;5;6;49mWmh/ideas/idea2_v2/code/[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [38;5;6;49mconvert_to_saver_agent.py:311[39;49m, [38;5;6;49mWmh/ideas/idea2_v2/code/convert_to_saver_agent.py:615[39;49m。如果 CUVA/ECVA 的完整 adapter、训练视图和实验还没做完，我建议主文先收敛到 “MSAD-based current release”，把 SAVER-Bench 写成 extensible schema，而不是已经 fully unified benchmark[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  release。否则 reviewer 很容易顺着 repo 发现落差。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  第六，语言生成与 evidence refinement 也要降格描述。草稿第 4.7 和 4.8 把这部分写成了明显更完整的系统，包括 evidence subset refinement、best-effort subset optimization、verified-first language generation [38;5;6;49mWmh/ideas/idea2_v2/SAVER_paper_full_draft.md:197[39;49m, [38;5;6;49mWmh/ideas/[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [38;5;6;49midea2_v2/SAVER_paper_full_draft.md:215[39;49m。而当前代码更接近“verifier returns structured verdict, then agent finalize_case, then output final answer” [38;5;6;49mWmh/ideas/idea2_v2/code/saver_agent/tools.py:179[39;49m, [38;5;6;49mWmh/ideas/idea2_v2/code/saver_agent/tools.py:201[39;49m。所以这两节不该继续写成[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  一个已经完成的独立 generation/refinement module，更合适的说法应该是“verifier-informed structured finalization”，把真正的 rich summary/rationale/counterfactual generation 留到下一版。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  如果让我给一个最推荐的新主线，我会这样定。SAVER 不是一个“proposal scout 网络 + tri-view verifier + 复杂四阶段 RL”的论文了，而是一个“TimeSearch-R 风格的主动视频异常 agent”。它在 task level 上没有外部 query，但在 rollout 内部允许自生成 hypothesis query；它通过[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [38;5;6;49mscan_timeline[39;49m 和 [38;5;6;49mseek_evidence[39;49m 搜索证据，通过 [38;5;6;49memit_alert[39;49m 做显式早期告警，通过 claim-conditioned multi-view verifier 检查 sufficiency / necessity / alertability，再通过 [38;5;6;49mfinalize_case[39;49m 产生结构化结论。训练上，它先从 oracle tool trajectory warm-start，再用 grouped rollout[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  + offline verifier/reward + reference-KL 做稳定的 RL 微调。这个版本和你们现在的代码是一致的，而且我觉得论文逻辑其实更干净。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  所以我的结论很明确：要改，而且值得改。不是因为论文方向错了，而是因为你们这段时间把系统想清楚了，代码也把真正可运行、可复用、可扩展的核心搭起来了。现在最危险的不是“idea 不够强”，而是“论文还停留在旧叙事”。如果你认可，我下一步最适合直接做三件事之一。第一，我直接给你改标[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  题、摘要和 contribution 三段。第二，我直接把第 4 节方法整体重写成代码对齐版。第三，我先给你出一个“论文重构提纲”，让你一眼看到哪些段落删、哪些段落改、哪些段落保留。[39m[49m[0m

[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  方案 1，最推荐：[38;5;6;49mSFT/RL[39;49m 保持 [38;5;6;49mtorchrun[39;49m 多卡训练，[38;5;6;49mBatch Rollout/Score/Summarize[39;49m 增加“分片并行 + 进度日志”。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  理由是现在训练底层已经是 [38;5;6;49mtransformers.Trainer[39;49m，天然更适合走 DDP；而 rollout/score 本质上是样本级独立任务，最稳的是做 [38;5;6;49m--num-shards/--shard-index[39;49m，你可以 4 张卡各起一个进程并行跑，最后再合并或直接按 shard 输出。这样改动最小、最符合你机器的用法，也最容易排查问题。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  方案 2，次优：所有脚本都强行做单命令内部多进程多卡调度。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  理由是使用上更“自动”，但这会把 GPU 分配、进程生命周期、输出合并、异常恢复都写复杂，当前代码不值得一下子上这么重。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  方案 3，保守：只补日志，不补并行。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  这个只能解决“终端没输出”的体验，不解决 4 卡利用率问题，我不推荐。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  我建议直接做方案 1。具体会包含三类改动：[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [38;5;12;49m1. [39;49m训练：[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K     [38;5;6;49mtrain_saver_sft.py[39;49m 和 [38;5;6;49mtrain_saver_rl.py[39;49m 明确支持 DDP 启动场景，补主进程日志，避免每个 rank 都乱打印。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [38;5;12;49m2. [39;49m推理与打分：[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K     [38;5;6;49mbatch_run_saver_rollout.py[39;49m、[38;5;6;49mscore_saver_rollout.py[39;49m、[38;5;6;49msummarize_saver_scores.py[39;49m 增加分片参数和周期性进度输出。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [38;5;12;49m3. [39;49m文档与命令：[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K     README 里补你这台 4×H200 的推荐启动命令。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  另外，“终端一直没有输出”的根因现在基本已经定位了：[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - rollout / score / rl 主循环里几乎没有任何 [38;5;6;49mprint[39m[49m[0m

[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
