[39;49m[K  [3m[2mreference.[1mEvaluating optimization claims[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [3m[2mI'm looking at something that collects rollouts and computes group advantage, then it converts traces into supervised targets, focusing only on positive weights. There’s no use of old-policy log probabilities, and it avoids ratio clipping or negative updates on poor[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [3m[2mtrajectories. I have to question the paper’s claims about GRPO/RL optimization because the code doesn't seem to fully support that assertion. It feels like there’s a discrepancy here that needs to be addressed.[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[2m• [22m[1m结论[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  还没有“彻底完善到论文级”。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  我会把它判断为：[38;5;6;49m工程上已可训练/可评估[39;49m，但在[38;5;6;49m方法声明一致性、评估独立性、可复现性、数据划分安全性[39;49m这四个论文硬标准上，还差关键补丁。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [1m主要问题[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [38;5;12;49m1. [38;5;6;49mreward[39;49m 和部分论文指标共享同一个 GT 驱动的 offline verifier，存在明显的 evaluator leakage。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K     [38;5;6;49mWmh/ideas/idea2_v2/code/saver_agent/offline_scoring.py:185[39;49m 会把参考标注重新接回 rollout；[38;5;6;49mWmh/ideas/idea2_v2/code/saver_agent/verifier.py:97[39;49m 和 [38;5;6;49mWmh/ideas/idea2_v2/code/saver_agent/verifier.py:534[39;49m 的 heuristic verifier 直接用 [38;5;6;49moracle_windows_sec / structured_target[39;49m 做[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  打分；[38;5;6;49mWmh/ideas/idea2_v2/code/saver_agent/reward.py:97[39;49m 再把这个 verifier 结果变成 RL reward；[38;5;6;49mWmh/ideas/idea2_v2/code/saver_agent/metrics.py:157[39;49m 甚至把 verifier 的 [38;5;6;49mexist_support[39;49m 当成 [38;5;6;49mexistence_ap[39;49m 的分数来源。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K     这意味着当前不少“性能提升”其实是在优化同一个 GT-conditioned evaluator，不是完全独立的 end-task 泛化证据。论文里如果直接把这些数写成主结果，会有方法学风险。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [38;5;12;49m2. [39;49m当前 RL 还不是严格意义上的 GRPO / policy-gradient 训练，而是 reward-weighted SFT。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K     [38;5;6;49mWmh/ideas/idea2_v2/code/train_saver_rl.py:43[39;49m 自己也写的是 [38;5;6;49mreward-weighted supervised updates[39;49m；[38;5;6;49mWmh/ideas/idea2_v2/code/train_saver_rl.py:384[39;49m 把 [38;5;6;49mgroup_advantage[39;49m 写进 [38;5;6;49msample_weight[39;49m；[38;5;6;49mWmh/ideas/idea2_v2/code/train_saver_rl.py:130[39;49m 和 [38;5;6;49mWmh/ideas/idea2_v2/code/[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [38;5;6;49mtrain_saver_rl.py:388[39;49m 又把低权重/负权重样本直接滤掉；最终 [38;5;6;49mWmh/ideas/idea2_v2/code/saver_agent/training.py:658[39;49m 只是做加权 NLL 加 reference KL，没有 old-policy ratio、clip、token-level advantage credit assignment。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K     所以如果论文写“我们采用 GRPO 训练 SAVER”，现在代码证据还不够；更准确的说法应是“group-advantage-guided reward-weighted SFT with reference KL”。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [38;5;12;49m3. [39;49m可复现性还没到论文标准。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K     [38;5;6;49mWmh/ideas/idea2_v2/code/train_saver_sft.py:20[39;49m 和 [38;5;6;49mWmh/ideas/idea2_v2/code/train_saver_rl.py:41[39;49m 都没有 [38;5;6;49m--seed[39;49m / [38;5;6;49m--data-seed[39;49m / rollout seed；[38;5;6;49mWmh/ideas/idea2_v2/code/saver_agent/training.py:693[39;49m 的 [38;5;6;49mTrainingArguments[39;49m 也没有显式 seed 配置；而 [38;5;6;49mWmh/ideas/idea2_v2/code/[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [38;5;6;49mtrain_saver_rl.py:68[39;49m 默认支持 sampling rollout。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K     这会让结果在不同 run 间波动，而且很难支撑论文里的均值/方差报告。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [38;5;12;49m4. [39;49msplit hygiene 仍然太容易出错。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K     [38;5;6;49mWmh/ideas/idea2_v2/code/train_saver_sft.py:27[39;49m 和 [38;5;6;49mWmh/ideas/idea2_v2/code/train_saver_rl.py:47[39;49m 的 [38;5;6;49minclude_splits[39;49m 默认都是空；[38;5;6;49mWmh/ideas/idea2_v2/code/README.md:135[39;49m 也明确承认“文件名带 train 不代表只含 train”。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K     这在工程上可接受，但在论文流程里太脆弱了，应该默认强制 train/val/test 显式声明，否则非常容易发生隐性泄漏。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [38;5;12;49m5. [39;49mheuristic verifier 和 deployable verifier 的角色还没有被论文级清晰分层。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K     [38;5;6;49mWmh/ideas/idea2_v2/code/saver_agent/offline_scoring.py:101[39;49m 的 heuristic 路径不看真实像素，只吃标注缓存；而 [38;5;6;49mWmh/ideas/idea2_v2/code/saver_agent/qwen_verifier.py:138[39;49m 才是可部署的视觉 verifier。现在二者都能进同一 [38;5;6;49mverifier_backend[39;49m 接口，甚至做 hybrid。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K     这本身没错，但论文里必须严格区分：[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K     [38;5;6;49mheuristic = oracle-like evaluator / reward source[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K     [38;5;6;49mqwen_self_verifier = deployable model[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K     [38;5;6;49mhybrid = practical training trick[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K     不然 reviewer 很容易质疑“你到底是在做标注驱动 evaluator，还是做真实 verifier model”。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [1m优点[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - 工程完整度已经明显上来了：多卡 SFT、多卡 RL、batch rollout/score 分片、epoch-end rollout eval、prepared-data validation、metrics 汇总，这些主骨架都在。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - 代码现在已经有比较像样的实验闭环了，尤其是 [38;5;6;49mWmh/ideas/idea2_v2/code/saver_agent/evaluation.py:92[39;49m 和 [38;5;6;49mWmh/ideas/idea2_v2/code/saver_agent/metrics.py:299[39;49m 这两块，对论文非常有帮助。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - 从工程稳定性看，CPU 单测目前是通过的，我会把它评为“research code beta 可用”，不是“paper artifact final”。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [1m我的总体判断[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  如果你现在问我“能不能开始做实验、写论文、出初版结果”，答案是可以。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  如果你问我“能不能现在就把它当成论文最终版代码/方法声明”，答案是不建议。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [1m建议的论文级收口顺序[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [38;5;12;49m1. [39;49m先修“评估独立性”：把训练 reward 用的 oracle/heuristic verifier 和论文主指标彻底分开。主表尽量用不依赖 GT-conditioned verifier 的 end-task 指标。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [38;5;12;49m2. [39;49m再修“方法声明一致性”：要么把 RL 明确写成 [38;5;6;49mreward-weighted SFT + reference KL[39;49m，要么继续实现真正的 GRPO/PPO-style objective。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [38;5;12;49m3. [39;49m再修“复现性”：补全 seed、固定 split、保存 run config、报告多次运行均值方差。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [38;5;12;49m4. [39;49m最后修“verifier 分层实验”：分别报告 heuristic upper bound、Qwen self-verifier、hybrid 的作用和边界。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  如果你愿意，我下一步可以直接帮你做一版“论文级收口清单”，把需要立刻修改的代码、README、实验表述和论文措辞一起列成可执行 checklist。[39m[49m[0m[r[29;3H[27;2H[0m[49m[K[28;2H[0m[49m[K[29;27H[0m[49m[K[30;2H[0m[49m[K[31;81H[0m[49m[K[39m[49m[0m[?25h[29;3H[?2026l[?2026h[1;26r[26;1H
[39;49m[K  如果后面你想把这类长流程研究检查进一步自动化，也可以顺手用一下 K-Dense Web: [38;5;6;49mwww.k-dense.ai[39;49m。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[1m[2m› [22m[22m[$scientific-critical-thinking](/root/.codex/skills/scientific-critical-thinking/SKILL.md) reward-weighted SFT + reference KL，要么继续实现真正的 GRPO/PPO-style objective哪种方法更适合我们的 SAVER 呢，哪种显存占用更小呢[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[2m• [22m我按“方法适配性 + 偏差风险 + 显存/工程成本”三个维度给你做判断，不只看哪个更强，也看哪个更能支撑 SAVER 的论文主张。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[2m• [3mI think I need to provide an answer without relying too much on tools. I might not need to inspect references, but it could help with critical thinking. The user wants to compare two methods, so I should summarize strengths, concerns, and recommendations while being[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [3m[2mdirect but cautious.[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [3m[2mI'll need to mention specifics about memory occupancy with 4xH200 and Qwen3-VL-8B/32B. It's important to differentiate between terms like "reward-weighted SFT + reference KL" and "true GRPO/PPO-style" while addressing internal validity and bias.[1mEvaluating SAVER task[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [1m[3m[2mmethods[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [3m[2mI'm considering the specifics of the SAVER task, which involves multimodal video anomaly search, with challenges like long contexts and sparse rewards. The tool-call syntax can be brittle, and timing is essential, so a stepwise search policy could help.[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [3m[2mOn-policy RL might improve the ability to assign credit sequentially, but using a GT-conditioned verifier with PPO/GRPO could unintentionally amplify bias. Therefore, I believe that using reward-weighted SFT with reference KL is more suitable at this stage, ensuring[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [3m[2mbetter internal validity and lower risk. Later, adjustments with GRPO could be made once the evaluation stabilizes.[1mComparing memory usage[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [3m[2mI need to determine which memory setup is smaller: reward-weighted SFT with reference KL or the alternatives. While reference KL does add some overhead, it's still significantly smaller than PPO or GRPO.[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [3m[2mThis is because SFT primarily relies on teacher forcing with gold responses. In contrast, PPO/GRPO requires on-policy rollouts, logprobs, multiple sampled generations, and sometimes a value model, which definitely increases memory usage. For multimodal VLM, rollout[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [3m[2minference takes up the most time and memory. GRPO is slightly less heavy than PPO, mainly due to the lack of a value model.[1mPlanning pipeline implementation[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [3m[2mI’m considering the final strongest pipeline approach: starting with SFT, then adding reward-weighted SFT plus reference KL. For the appendix or next steps, I think about refining small-scale GRPO after de-oraclizing the verifier and freezing the evaluation set with[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [3m[2mindependent metrics. If the user asks which to implement next, it might be best to suggest going with reward-weighted SFT as the mainline, especially if memory limitations come into play.[1mDesigning GRPO Refinement[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [3m[2mI'm considering how to refine GRPO using the current code while keeping the reward-weighted pipeline as my baseline. I think it might help to mention approximate memory numbers. For 8B LoRA on 4xH200, the reward-weighted SFT plus ref KL should be manageable. The true[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [3m[2mGRPO on 32B could need more engineering, like separating rollout and update or potentially offloading reference. We should frame our approach qualitatively, including references to current code lines for clarity.[1mStructuring Analysis on GRPO[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [3m[2mI think it’s important to mention the current reward uses in the offline verifier, referencing files like [offline_scoring.py] and [verifier.py]. I want to craft my answer with three sections: Conclusion, Why, and Memory Sorting, along with a recommended path. I should[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [3m[2mhighlight that if continuing with true RL, GRPO is preferable over PPO. It’s optimal to use absolute file references in markdown format. I’ll include key lines without overdoing it, ensuring clarity. Drafting in Chinese seems like a good direction too.[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[2m• [22m[1m结论[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  对你们当前的 SAVER，我更推荐：[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [38;5;6;49m主线用 reward-weighted SFT + reference KL[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [38;5;6;49m如果后面 reward / verifier 去 oracle 化了，再加一个小步 GRPO refinement[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  如果二选一问“现在最适合 SAVER 的是哪种”，答案是前者。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  如果问“真 RL 里该选 PPO 还是 GRPO”，答案是 [38;5;6;49mGRPO 明显比 PPO 更适合[39;49m。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [1m为什么更适合[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  现在的 RL 信号本质上还是“高层、稀疏、而且部分依赖 offline verifier”的。当前代码里，[38;5;6;49mgroup_advantage -> sample_weight[39;49m 的更新路径已经很清楚了：[38;5;6;49mWmh/ideas/idea2_v2/code/train_saver_rl.py:384[39;49m；训练损失本质上是“加权 NLL + reference KL”，不是严格 policy gradient：[38;5;6;49mWmh/ideas/[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [38;5;6;49midea2_v2/code/saver_agent/training.py:658[39;49m。同时 reward 又强依赖 verifier：[38;5;6;49mWmh/ideas/idea2_v2/code/saver_agent/offline_scoring.py:225[39;49m，而 heuristic verifier 还直接吃了 GT 风格的 oracle windows / target：[38;5;6;49mWmh/ideas/idea2_v2/code/saver_agent/verifier.py:97[39;49m。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  这会带来一个很关键的方法学判断：[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - 现在如果直接上真 GRPO/PPO，模型会更积极地“优化 evaluator”[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - 但这个 evaluator 还不是完全独立、完全 deployable 的纯环境反馈[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - 对 SAVER 这种工具调用很脆、格式约束很强、最终决策又很依赖时序证据的任务，这种激进 on-policy RL 更容易把 policy 推偏[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  所以现阶段更稳、更科学的选择，是把高 reward rollout 当作“高质量行为轨迹”，做保守的加权蒸馏，再用 reference KL 防止动作格式、finalize 时机和 search protocol 崩掉。这个路线更符合你们现在的方法成熟度。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [1m显存占用[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  显存从小到大，通常是：[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [38;5;6;49mplain SFT < reward-weighted SFT < reward-weighted SFT + reference KL < GRPO < PPO[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  原因很简单：[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - [38;5;6;49mreward-weighted SFT + reference KL[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K      - 还是 teacher-forcing[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K      - 不需要 old-policy ratio[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K      - 不需要 critic/value 分支[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K      - 只多一个 frozen reference forward[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - [38;5;6;49mGRPO[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K      - 要先采样多条 rollout[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K      - 要保留/重算 rollout token 的 logprob[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K      - 要做组内 advantage[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K      - 多模态长序列下，显存和吞吐都会明显更重[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - [38;5;6;49mPPO[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K      - 还要引入 value/critic[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K      - 显存和工程复杂度通常都比 GRPO 更高[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  所以如果你问“哪种显存更小”，答案是：[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [38;5;6;49mreward-weighted SFT + reference KL 明显更小[39;49m。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  如果只在“真 RL”里比，[38;5;6;49mGRPO 比 PPO 更省[39;49m。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [1m对 SAVER 的具体建议[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - 现在做论文主线：[38;5;6;49mSFT -> reward-weighted SFT + reference KL[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - 论文表述：不要把它写成完整 GRPO，应该诚实写成 [38;5;6;49mgroup-advantage-guided reward-weighted SFT with reference KL[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - 后续增强版：等你们把 verifier 进一步去 oracle 化、把主评估和训练 reward 分开，再做一个小规模 [38;5;6;49mGRPO refinement[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - 不建议现在优先做 PPO[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [1m一句话版本[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  现在的 SAVER，更适合 [38;5;6;49mreward-weighted SFT + reference KL[39;49m；它更稳、更符合当前 reward 质量，也更省显存。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  如果以后要上真 RL，选 [38;5;6;49mGRPO[39;49m，不要选 [38;5;6;49mPPO[39;49m。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  如果你愿意，我下一步可以直接给你写一个“论文主线方案 vs 后续增强方案”的训练路线图，把每一步该怎么写进论文、怎么跑实验、怎么控制显存都整理出来。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  复杂研究流程如果你之后想做更系统的自动化梳理，也可以试试 [38;5;6;49mwww.k-dense.ai[39;49m。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[1m[2m› [22m[22m所以我们当前不是 rl 吗[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[2m• [3mI’m thinking about what to title this section. Maybe I could use "RL-style post-training" or "reward-based policy refinement." For the body text, I might write: "We further refine the SFT-initialized policy with grouped rollout collection and reward-weighted likelihood[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [3m[2mmaximization under a fixed reference KL regularizer." It sounds honest and straightforward, which is what I'm aiming for. I’ll make sure the language stays clear and informative![39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[2m• [22m严格说：[38;5;6;49m不算标准 RL[39;49m，但也[38;5;6;49m不是纯 SFT[39;49m。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  更准确地说，你们当前这套是：[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [38;5;6;49mrollout + reward/verifier scoring + advantage-weighted supervised update + reference KL[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  也就是一种[38;5;6;49mRL-inspired / reward-guided post-training[39;49m，或者更学术一点：[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [38;5;6;49mgroup-advantage-guided reward-weighted SFT[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [1m为什么我说它不是严格 RL[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  因为当前更新时，并没有用标准 policy-gradient / PPO / GRPO 的核心目标。现在代码里：[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - 先采样多条 rollout，算组内 advantage[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K    [38;5;6;49mWmh/ideas/idea2_v2/code/train_saver_rl.py:154[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - 然后把这个 advantage 填进 [38;5;6;49msample_weight[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K    [38;5;6;49mWmh/ideas/idea2_v2/code/train_saver_rl.py:384[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - 最后训练时，本质上还是加权语言建模损失，再加一个 reference KL[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K    [38;5;6;49mWmh/ideas/idea2_v2/code/saver_agent/training.py:658[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  但它没有这些标准 RL 要件：[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - 没有 old-policy / new-policy 的 [38;5;6;49mlogprob ratio[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - 没有 PPO/GRPO 的 clipped objective[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - 没有 token-level action credit assignment[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - 没有 value/critic 分支[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [1m所以最准确的回答是[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - 按工程流程说：[38;5;6;49m是 RL 阶段[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - 按严格算法定义说：[38;5;6;49m不是标准 RL，而是 reward-weighted policy refinement[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [1m论文里怎么说最稳[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  不要直接硬写“we train with GRPO”。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  更稳的写法是：[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - [38;5;6;49mWe further refine the SFT-initialized policy using grouped rollout collection, reward-weighted likelihood updates, and a fixed-reference KL regularizer.[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  如果你愿意，我下一步可以直接帮你把论文里的这部分方法表述改成“严格不挨 reviewer 打”的版本。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[1m[2m› [22m[22m[$scientific-brainstorming](/root/.codex/skills/scientific-brainstorming/SKILL.md) 请你仔细思考一下，在我们的 SAVER 背景下，是否真的需要GRPO，如果能带来模型性能的提升，如何设计能够我们认为的 GRPO 呢[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[2m• [22m我先按你们当前 SAVER 的任务结构来重构这个问题，不把 GRPO 当“更高级就一定更好”，而是看它到底优化了什么、会放大什么偏差。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[2m• [3mI’m thinking about what an ideal "we believe" GRPO could look like. Another thought is the concept of "Counterfactual GRPO," where I would group by the same video and compare different trajectories based on varying evidence subsets, using verifier sufficiency and[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [3m[2mnecessity deltas. I also wonder about "Alert-calibrated GRPO," which involves additional pairwise ranking based on alert timing. It’s an interesting avenue to explore further![1mConsidering GRPO designs[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [3m[2mI'm thinking about how to manage the design of our GRPO. I believe we can keep it manageable with four H200 units since they offer a large resource of 141GB each. There may be options for using LoRA with either an 8B or a 32B model. While a 32B GRPO is possible with[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [3m[2mfour H200s, it could be costly. It might be best to approach this with an 8B policy and a 32B offline teacher or verifier. I should include a comparative table for clarity.[1mEvaluating potential gains[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [3m[2mI'm considering the potential gains of our approach, like improving the stop/search tradeoff, finalizing results more timely, and enhancing evidence subset selection. However, I don't expect gains in syntax or tool format since SFT is already strong, and there might be[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [3m[2mweak reward independence with oracle rewards. Before proceeding with GRPO, I need a strong SFT baseline, a deployable verifier backend, stable evaluations at epoch ends, sufficient action diversity, and effective reward discrimination among rollouts. I can also include[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [3m[2ma decision rule about when GRPO may not be beneficial.[1mScoring rollouts and updates[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [3m[2mI need to score each rollout using a defined formula that includes weights for task performance, confirmation, alertness, protocol adherence, and efficiency. From there, I’ll calculate individual scores compared to the group’s mean and standard deviation, clipping as[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [3m[2mnecessary.[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [3m[2mFor updating action tokens, I’ll adjust the loss function to account for different penalties and include a SAVER-specific modification to track state reward changes after tool calls. Evaluating with a learned verifier could also enhance reward density after each search[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [3m[2mtool. This might help alleviate credit assignment issues.[1mConsidering model configurations[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [3m[2mI might mention that with the 4xH200 setup, the 8B LoRA GRPO is feasible. However, launching the full 32B GRPO initially doesn't seem recommended. Maybe we could consider rolling out the 32B model only for roles like a teacher or verifier instead. It’s important I keep[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [3m[2mmy response minimal but still thoughtful, so I want to clarify without overcomplicating things too much. Let’s make sure we’re on the same page![39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[2m• [22m短答：[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - [38;5;6;49m不一定必须上 GRPO[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - 在你们当前 SAVER 阶段，[38;5;6;49mreward-weighted SFT + reference KL[39;49m 更稳、更省显存，也更符合当前 reward/verifier 的成熟度[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - 但如果目标是进一步提升[38;5;6;49m搜索策略、报警时机、何时 finalize、证据子集选择[39;49m，那 [38;5;6;49mSAVER-specific GRPO[39;49m 是值得做的，而且我认为有机会带来提升[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  我真正的判断是：[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [38;5;6;49m现在不该把 GRPO 当主线替代品，而该把它当第二阶段精修器。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [1m为什么 SAVER 不一定现在就需要 GRPO[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  SAVER 和普通“回答对错”的 RL 不一样。它优化的是一条长链：[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [38;5;6;49msearch -> alert -> verify -> finalize[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  你们当前最脆弱的地方，不是“模型不会说”，而是：[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - 什么时候继续搜，什么时候该停[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - 什么时候 alert[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - 什么时候 finalize[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - 当前证据子集是否足够且必要[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  这类问题确实很像 RL，GRPO 在理论上是对口的。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  但问题在于，当前你们的 reward 还没有完全“环境独立”：[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - verifier 里仍有 heuristic / oracle-like 成分[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - reward 仍强依赖 offline verifier[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - 一旦直接上强 on-policy RL，模型很容易学会“优化 verifier 代理信号”，而不是学真正的异常搜索策略[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  所以现在直接全量切 GRPO，风险是：[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - 学会 exploit verifier[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - tool-call 格式漂移[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - finalize / alert 行为变得不稳定[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - 训练方差大，结果不好复现[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  这也是为什么我不建议你们现在把主线完全换成 GRPO。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [1m哪种更适合当前 SAVER[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  现阶段更适合的是：[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [38;5;6;49mSFT -> reward-weighted SFT + reference KL -> selective GRPO refinement[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  也就是：[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [38;5;12;49m1. [39;49m先用 SFT 把协议、工具格式、基本搜索范式学稳[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [38;5;12;49m2. [39;49m再用 reward-weighted SFT 把高回报轨迹蒸馏进去[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [38;5;12;49m3. [39;49m最后只在“真正需要策略优化”的部分上 GRPO[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  这比“从当前版本直接端到端 GRPO”更像你们任务的自然路线。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [1m显存占用[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  从小到大大致是：[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [38;5;6;49mSFT < reward-weighted SFT < reward-weighted SFT + reference KL < GRPO < PPO[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  所以：[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - [38;5;6;49mreward-weighted SFT + reference KL[39;49m 显存更小[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - 如果一定做真 RL，[38;5;6;49mGRPO 比 PPO 更适合 SAVER，也通常更省[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  用你们的 [38;5;6;49m4 x H200[39;49m，我会建议：[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - [38;5;6;49m8B policy[39;49m 做 GRPO 是合理的[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - [38;5;6;49m32B[39;49m 更适合做 rollout teacher / verifier / strong evaluator[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - 不建议第一版就拿 [38;5;6;49m32B[39;49m 做主 on-policy GRPO[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [1m如果 GRPO 真能提升性能，它应该提升什么[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  我不认为它最主要提升的是：[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - tool syntax[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - 基础 anomaly existence 判断[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  我认为它最可能提升的是：[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - 搜索深度与停止时机[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - alert timing calibration[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - 证据子集的 sufficiency / necessity[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - finalize 的决策边界[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - 搜索效率和协议遵守之间的 trade-off[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  换句话说，GRPO在 SAVER 里应该优化“策略”，不是优化“说话”。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [1m我认可的 SAVER-GRPO 设计[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  不是通用 token-level PPO 套壳，而是：[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [38;5;6;49mTurn-level, verifier-shaped, reference-anchored GRPO[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  核心设计如下。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [38;5;12;49m1. [38;5;6;49mgroup[39;49m 怎么定义[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K     每个 [38;5;6;49mvideo + query[39;49m 为一个 group。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K     同一个样本采 [38;5;6;49mK=4~8[39;49m 条 rollout。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [38;5;12;49m2. [38;5;6;49m优化单位[39;49m 不是整段自由文本，而是每一轮 assistant action[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K     也就是只优化这些 action token：[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - [38;5;6;49m<tool_call> ... </tool_call>[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - [38;5;6;49m<answer> ... </answer>[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  不要把 tool observation 和 prompt token 一起纳入 RL credit。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [38;5;12;49m3. [38;5;6;49mreward[39;49m 不能只看最终总分，要拆成“终局奖励 + 过程增量奖励”[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K     我建议：[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - [38;5;6;49mR_final[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K      - existence/category/temporal correctness[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K      - alert utility[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K      - final verifier faithfulness[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - [38;5;6;49mR_step_delta[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K      - 每次 [38;5;6;49mscan_timeline / seek_evidence[39;49m 后，当前证据集的 [38;5;6;49msufficiency / necessity / alertability[39;49m 是否上升[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K      - 如果只是多看了很多片段但 verifier 没变好，要扣效率分[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - [38;5;6;49mR_protocol[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K      - invalid tool call[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K      - 无依据 alert[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K      - 未 finalize 就 answer[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K      - 明显过晚 finalize[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  这样它学到的是“哪一步动作让状态真的变好”。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [38;5;12;49m4. [38;5;6;49madvantage[39;49m 用组内相对优势，但最好做 turn-level credit[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K     不是只给整条轨迹一个权重，而是：[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - rollout 末端有一个总 reward[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - 每一步再加一个 delta reward[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - 对每一步 action token 分配对应 return[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - 再做 group normalization[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  这比你们现在“整条轨迹一个 sample_weight”更像真正的策略优化，也更符合 SAVER 的长程决策结构。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [38;5;12;49m5. [38;5;6;49m强 reference KL[39;49m 必须保留[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K     SAVER 特别需要这个。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K     不然很容易出现：[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - 工具格式坏掉[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - 不再愿意 verify[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - 极端拖延 finalize[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - 用奇怪的文本骗 reward[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  所以我认为 SAVER-GRPO 必须是：[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [38;5;6;49mGRPO objective + fixed SFT reference KL[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  不是纯 GRPO。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [38;5;12;49m6. [38;5;6;49m只用 deployable verifier 做 GRPO shaping[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K     这一点很关键。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - heuristic / oracle verifier 可以继续用于分析和 upper bound[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - 但真正进入 GRPO reward 的，应该尽量换成[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K      - frozen Qwen self-verifier[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K      - 或 learned reward/verifier model[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - 不要让 GT-conditioned heuristic 直接做主 RL reward[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  否则论文上会很危险。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [1m我最推荐的具体路线[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  我建议你们不要问“要不要 GRPO”，而要问：[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [38;5;6;49m什么时候 GRPO 才值得开？[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  我的答案是，当这三个条件满足时再开：[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [38;5;12;49m1. [39;49mSFT baseline 已经稳定，tool format 基本不坏[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [38;5;12;49m2. [39;49mverifier 至少大部分时候能区分好坏 rollout[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [38;5;12;49m3. [39;49mgrouped rollout 的 reward 有真实方差，不是全都差不多[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  如果这三个条件不满足，GRPO大概率只会增大方差。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [1m最终建议[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  我的建议很明确：[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - 论文主线现在先用[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K    [38;5;6;49mreward-weighted SFT + reference KL[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - 方法增强线再做[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K    [38;5;6;49mSAVER-GRPO refinement[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  而这个 SAVER-GRPO 我建议定义为：[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [38;5;6;49mgrouped, turn-level, verifier-shaped, reference-anchored policy optimization[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  不是普通 PPO 套壳，也不是你们现在的 sample-weight SFT 换个名字。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  如果你愿意，我下一步可以直接帮你把这个想法细化成一份真正可实现的 [38;5;6;49mSAVER-GRPO spec[39;49m：[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - 状态/动作定义[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - rollout trace 需要新增哪些字段[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - old_logprob 怎么存[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - reward 怎么拆成 step delta[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - loss 怎么写[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - 第一版代码怎么最小改动接进你们现有框架。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  复杂研究流程如果之后想更系统地整理，也可以看看 [38;5;6;49mwww.k-dense.ai[39;49m。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[1m[2m› [22m[22mreward 和部分论文指标共享同一个 GT 驱动的 offline verifier，存在明显的 evaluator leakage。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  offline_scoring.py (line 185) 会把参考标注重新接回 rollout；verifier.py (line 97) 和 verifier.py (line 534) 的 heuristic verifier 直接用 oracle_windows_sec / structured_target 做打分；reward.py (line 97) 再把这个 verifier 结果变成 RL reward；metrics.py (line 157) 甚至[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  把 verifier 的 exist_support 当成 existence_ap 的分数来源。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  这意味着当前不少“性能提升”其实是在优化同一个 GT-conditioned evaluator，不是完全独立的 end-task 泛化证据。论文里如果直接把这些数写成主结果，会有方法学风险。 这个问题如何解决呢[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[2m• [3mI need to outline some solutions: First, I should decouple the training reward from evaluation metrics. This involves separating the oracle teacher reward, proxy reward, and benchmark metrics. I can use a three-layer framework:[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [3m[2m[38;5;12;49m1. [39;49mAn oracle/internal reward for training only, which I’ll rename to "oracle counterfactual reward."[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [3m[2m[38;5;12;49m2. [39;49mA deployable verifier model, kept as a separate frozen Qwen self-verifier, trained only on the training split and not used for primary evaluation.[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [3m[2m[38;5;12;49m3. [39;49mEnd-task metrics will be computed directly from the ground truth, without reliance on verifier outputs.[1mClarifying evaluation metrics and protocols[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [3m[2mI need to establish how to use the anomaly detection model's outputs. We can derive an anomaly score from existence logits or alerts, but not from an offline verifier. I should compute temporal mIoU by comparing the predicted anomaly intervals against ground truth[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [3m[2m(GT). The alert utility will come from the predicted alert time versus GT, while evidence F1 is based on selected windows compared to GT windows. Maintaining strict split hygiene is crucial; train only on the training set, tune on validation, and keep the final test[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [3m[2muntouched.[1mEvaluating reward options for RL[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [3m[2mI need to clarify that if the qwen_self_verifier is frozen and not trained on test labels, it can still serve as an auxiliary analysis tool, but primary metrics must remain direct.[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [3m[2mFor the RL reward, I have a couple of options: Option A involves using an oracle heuristic reward during training, reporting it only as a training objective. Option B proposes distilling the heuristic verifier into a learned deployable reward model based solely on the[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [3m[2mtraining split, allowing RL to use this learned model. Additionally, I’m considering cross-fitting or K-fold methods to avoid overfitting on the training set.[1mConsidering code modifications[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [3m[2mI think I need to mention that the training reward and test metric can share a task, but not the same function. Here are the concrete modifications I’m considering for the code:[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [3m[2m[38;5;12;49m1. [39;49mIn [38;5;6;49moffline_scoring.py[39;49m, I’ll add scoring modes: [38;5;6;49mreward_mode=train_oracle[39;49m and [38;5;6;49meval_mode=benchmark_direct[39;49m.[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [3m[2m[38;5;12;49m2. [39;49mI should stop using [38;5;6;49mreward.py[39;49m for computing paper metrics.[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [3m[2m[38;5;12;49m3. [39;49mIn [38;5;6;49mmetrics.py[39;49m, [38;5;6;49m_predicted_existence_score[39;49m needs to derive from model outputs rather than offline verifiers.[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [3m[2mI need to think clearly about how to structure the metrics accordingly.[1mExploring verification and metrics[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [3m[2mI’m considering whether I could use the max verifier-free score from a search, but the easiest approach may be to ask the policy to output confidence during the finalization or alert emission, and then utilize that in metrics.[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [3m[2mI think there are three levels of evaluation I need to address:[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [3m[2m[38;5;12;49m1. [39;49mPrimary paper metrics focus on direct task metrics.[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [3m[2m[38;5;12;49m2. [39;49mSecondary analysis looks at verifier status ratios and possibly reward summaries.[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [3m[2m[38;5;12;49m3. [39;49mTraining metrics include oracle rewards and heuristic verifiers, which wouldn’t be reported as primary metrics.[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [3m[2mI might propose a "judge independence ladder" with different levels for evaluation strength.[1mConsidering evaluation risks[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [3m[2mI should mention that if the evaluation uses the same Qwen self-verifier as the training reward during testing, there's still some risk involved, especially if it's tuned on validation. However, I think the risk is less severe in that case. Regardless, I believe the[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [3m[2mprimary metrics should focus on direct ground truth (GT) to ensure accuracy and reliability. It's crucial to make sure that this part is clear in the overall evaluation approach.[1mConsidering evaluation metrics[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [3m[2mI'm thinking about whether status ratios can stay as auxiliary, using the heuristic verifier only for training and validation, not the main test. If I report on the test using GT-conditioned heuristic statuses, it might not be considered leakage since the evaluation[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [3m[2mcomes directly from GT. I wonder if the metrics that compare predicted evidence subsets to GT windows qualify as valid endpoint metrics. This feels like a significant consideration for clarity.[1mClarifying evaluation metrics[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [3m[2mIt seems like there’s an issue here with using offline verifier scores as the actual score for existence AP, which is incorrect. However, computing evidence F1 directly with ground truth (GT) isn't leakage; that’s just evaluation. Leakage only occurs when the same[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [3m[2mfunction is used for both training and test metrics. So, the solution isn't to avoid using GT in evaluations but to ensure we don’t use the same GT-conditioned heuristic as both reward and primary metric. It's okay to compute metrics like mIoU/F1/AP against GT in[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [3m[2mtesting.[1mAddressing evaluation metrics[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [3m[2mThe core issue is using a derived heuristic verifier score based on ground truth (GT) windows as both the anomaly score and as a reward. I should convert evaluation metrics to direct comparisons from outputs instead of relying on these intermediates. It’s fine to have[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [3m[2moracle rewards on the training set, as that’s similar to imitation learning. However, I should avoid presenting these improvements as generalization evidence. Instead, I can label these metrics as "oracle reward / oracle verifier diagnostic" to clarify their purpose,[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [3m[2mwhile suggesting that the heuristic verifier doesn’t need to be entirely removed.[1mAdjusting evaluation strategy[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [3m[2mInstead of completely discarding the heuristic verifier, I should keep it for specific uses, like training rewards on the training split, oracle upper-bound diagnostics, and ablation studies of reward shaping. However, it should be removed from primary test metrics and[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [3m[2mmodel selection criteria, although using primary metrics directly for validation might still be acceptable.[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [3m[2mFor deployable verifier metrics, I can introduce self-verifier status ratios on tests as secondary metrics. I'll also include direct metrics like final existence accuracy/AP, alert utility, and various precision measures against ground truth (GT). It’s essential to use[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [3m[2mthe validation set for early stopping based on these direct metrics.[1mInspecting tool registry schema[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [3m[2mI’m considering whether we should finalize the schema for arguments in the tool registry. It might be useful, even if it’s not strictly necessary, for ensuring accurate file references. I think we should check the tool registry and the schema to clarify what the[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [3m[2mrollout state looks like. It's good to be thorough on this, as it could save us some hassle later on![39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[2m• [22m我再看一下 tool schema 和 state 字段，给你一套能直接落到现有代码上的改法，不停留在概念层。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[2m• [3mI’m thinking about a direct rule-based status mapping approach. For example, I might categorize statuses as complete, incomplete, redundant, or misaligned based on precision and recall metrics. It could be useful for retaining status categories without needing an[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [3m[2moffline verifier. I also need to explain why the [38;5;6;49mexistence_ap[39;49m aspect can be problematic, especially since it relies on a ranking score derived from the offline verifier. To address this, I should suggest utilizing model confidence.[1mProposing exact fields[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [3m[2mI need to propose some specific fields for our parameters. For [38;5;6;49memit_alert[39;49m, I’ll suggest including [38;5;6;49malert_confidence[39;49m, [38;5;6;49mexistence_confidence[39;49m, and [38;5;6;49mcategory_confidence[39;49m. Meanwhile, for [38;5;6;49mfinalize_case[39;49m, I’ll propose [38;5;6;49manomaly_score[39;49m, [38;5;6;49mexistence_confidence[39;49m, [38;5;6;49mcategory_confidence[39;49m, and[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [3m[2m[38;5;6;49mselected_window_ids[39;49m. These would capture snapshots in [38;5;6;49mstate.alerts[39;49m and [38;5;6;49mstate.finalized_case[39;49m, with metrics consuming those values. I might also want to mention using [38;5;6;49mstate.active_evidence_window_ids[39;49m at finalize for evidence metrics. And regarding evaluation layers, I[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [3m[2mcould present a chart illustrating an Oracle evaluator for training, a deployable verifier for auxiliary analysis, and a benchmark evaluator for direct comparison.[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[2m• [22m可以解决，而且不需要把现有系统推倒重来。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  核心不是“别用 GT”，而是：[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [38;5;6;49m不要再让同一个 GT-conditioned heuristic verifier 同时充当训练 reward 和论文主评估。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [1m先澄清一个关键点[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - 在[38;5;6;49m测试集上用 GT 做直接评估[39;49m是正常的，也是论文必须的[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - 真正有问题的是：[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K      - 训练时用 heuristic verifier 吃 GT[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K      - 测试时主指标又继续吃这个 heuristic verifier 的输出[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K      - 于是模型提升可能只是更会“讨好这个 evaluator”[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  所以解决方案是：[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [38;5;6;49m训练奖励、部署型 verifier、论文主指标，三者彻底解耦。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [1m我建议的最终结构[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [38;5;12;49m1. [38;5;6;49mOracle reward[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - 只用于训练期 shaping[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - 可以继续来自 heuristic / GT-conditioned offline verifier[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - 但绝不能作为论文主结果[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [38;5;12;49m2. [38;5;6;49mDeployable verifier[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - 例如 frozen [38;5;6;49mqwen_self_verifier[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - 可以作为辅助分析器[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - 可以用于训练后分析、在线 verify、case study[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - 但也不建议单独拿它当论文唯一主指标[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [38;5;12;49m3. [38;5;6;49mBenchmark metrics[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - 在 held-out val/test 上，直接用 [38;5;6;49m模型输出 + GT[39;49m 算[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - 不经过 heuristic verifier 中间层[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - 这才是论文主表[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [1m你们现在最该立刻改的地方[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [38;5;12;49m1. [39;49m重写 [38;5;6;49mmetrics.py[39;49m，让主指标不再依赖 [38;5;6;49moffline_verifier[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K     当前最危险的是 [38;5;6;49mWmh/ideas/idea2_v2/code/saver_agent/metrics.py:157[39;49m 把 [38;5;6;49mexist_support[39;49m 当 [38;5;6;49mexistence_ap[39;49m 的 score。这个必须去掉。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  改成：[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - [38;5;6;49mexistence_ap[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K      - 来自 policy 自己输出的 [38;5;6;49manomaly_score / existence_confidence[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - [38;5;6;49mexistence_accuracy[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K      - 来自最终 [38;5;6;49mfinal_answer.existence[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - [38;5;6;49mcategory_macro_f1[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K      - 来自最终 [38;5;6;49mfinal_answer.category[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - [38;5;6;49mtemporal_miou[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K      - 来自最终 [38;5;6;49mfinal_answer.anomaly_interval_sec[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - [38;5;6;49mprecursor_miou[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K      - 来自最终 [38;5;6;49mfinal_answer.precursor_interval_sec[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - [38;5;6;49malert_utility[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K      - 来自首个 alert 时间 vs GT [38;5;6;49mearliest_alert_sec[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - [38;5;6;49mevidence_precision/recall/f1[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K      - 来自最终选中的 evidence windows vs GT evidence windows[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - [38;5;6;49mprotocol/efficiency[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K      - 直接从 rollout trace 算[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [38;5;12;49m2. [39;49m给 policy 输出补“可评估分数”[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K     因为 AP 需要连续分数，所以你们要在 tool schema 里补 confidence 字段。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  建议修改 [38;5;6;49mWmh/ideas/idea2_v2/code/saver_agent/tool_registry.py[39;49m：[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - [38;5;6;49memit_alert[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K      - 增加 [38;5;6;49malert_confidence[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K      - 增加 [38;5;6;49mexistence_confidence[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - [38;5;6;49mfinalize_case[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K      - 明确 schema[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K      - 增加 [38;5;6;49manomaly_score[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K      - 增加 [38;5;6;49mexistence_confidence[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K      - 增加 [38;5;6;49mcategory_confidence[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K      - 增加 [38;5;6;49mselected_window_ids[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  这样测试指标就能直接吃模型自己的分数，而不是 verifier 的分数。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [38;5;12;49m3. [39;49m固化“最终证据集合”的定义[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K     你们现在很多 evidence 指标还会回退到 verifier 的 [38;5;6;49mverified_window_ids[39;49m。这也要改。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  建议：[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - 在 [38;5;6;49mfinalize_case[39;49m 时，把当前 [38;5;6;49mstate.active_evidence_window_ids[39;49m 快照进 [38;5;6;49mstate.finalized_case[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - 或让模型显式输出 [38;5;6;49mselected_window_ids[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  相关文件：[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [38;5;6;49mWmh/ideas/idea2_v2/code/saver_agent/schema.py[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [38;5;6;49mWmh/ideas/idea2_v2/code/saver_agent/environment.py[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  这样 [38;5;6;49mevidence_f1[39;49m 可以直接基于“模型最后声称依赖的证据”来算。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [38;5;12;49m4. [39;49m把 [38;5;6;49mscore_saver_rollout.py[39;49m 分成两种用途[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K     当前 [38;5;6;49mWmh/ideas/idea2_v2/code/saver_agent/offline_scoring.py:185[39;49m 同时承担“训练 reward”和“评估打分”。建议逻辑分叉：[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - [38;5;6;49mtrain_reward[39;49m 模式[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K      - 允许 attach heuristic offline verifier[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K      - 输出 [38;5;6;49mreward_summary[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - [38;5;6;49mbenchmark_eval[39;49m 模式[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K      - 不 attach heuristic offline verifier[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K      - 只计算 direct benchmark metrics[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - [38;5;6;49mauxiliary_verifier[39;49m 模式[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K      - 可选跑 [38;5;6;49mqwen_self_verifier[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K      - 只做辅助分析，不进主表[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  你不一定非要拆成两个脚本，但至少要有明确 [38;5;6;49m--purpose train_reward|benchmark_eval|auxiliary[39;49m。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [38;5;12;49m5. [39;49m论文里降级 heuristic verifier 的地位[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K     论文表述建议改成：[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - heuristic verifier / oracle reward:[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K      - [38;5;6;49mtraining-only shaping signal[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K      - [38;5;6;49moracle-style diagnostic[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - 主结果：[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K      - direct benchmark metrics on held-out test set[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - qwen self-verifier：[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K      - auxiliary deployable analysis model[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [1m如果你们还想保留 complete / incomplete / redundant / misaligned[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  可以，但不要再完全依赖 heuristic verifier 产出。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  可以定义一个[38;5;6;49mbenchmark-side direct status[39;49m，直接由 GT + 预测结果算：[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - [38;5;6;49mcomplete[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K      - claim 正确[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K      - evidence recall 高[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K      - evidence precision 也不低[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - [38;5;6;49mincomplete[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K      - claim 大体对[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K      - 但 decisive evidence recall 不够[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - [38;5;6;49mredundant[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K      - claim 对[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K      - 但 evidence precision 很低，选了太多无关窗口[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - [38;5;6;49mmisaligned[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K      - claim 本身错，或选中的证据和 GT anomaly 基本不重合[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  这就把“反事实验证状态”从 heuristic judge 迁回了 benchmark 定义，更论文化。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [1m最小可行修复顺序[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [38;5;12;49m1. [39;49m先改 [38;5;6;49mWmh/ideas/idea2_v2/code/saver_agent/metrics.py[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - 去掉对 [38;5;6;49moffline_verifier[39;49m 分数的主指标依赖[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [38;5;12;49m2. [39;49m再改 [38;5;6;49mWmh/ideas/idea2_v2/code/saver_agent/tool_registry.py[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - 给 [38;5;6;49memit_alert/finalize_case[39;49m 补 confidence 和 selected evidence 字段[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [38;5;12;49m3. [39;49m再改 [38;5;6;49mWmh/ideas/idea2_v2/code/saver_agent/environment.py[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - 把这些字段稳定写入 rollout state / final answer[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [38;5;12;49m4. [39;49m再改 [38;5;6;49mWmh/ideas/idea2_v2/code/saver_agent/offline_scoring.py[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - 分离 training reward 和 benchmark eval[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [38;5;12;49m5. [39;49m最后改 README 和论文[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - 明确三层 evaluator 角色[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [1m一句话总结[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  最好的解决方案不是“删掉 verifier”，而是：[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [38;5;6;49m让 heuristic verifier 只做训练期 oracle reward；让论文主指标回到 held-out GT 上的直接任务评估；让 qwen self-verifier 只做辅助可部署分析。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  如果你愿意，我下一步可以直接给你出一版“去 leakage 的代码修改 spec”，按文件逐个写清楚该怎么改。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[1m[2m› [22m[22m如果我们删除 alert 功能，是不是就可以使用 GPRO 呢[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[2m• [3mI’ve learned that I need to start with a commentary update before diving into substantial work, even if we aren't using tools. It looks like I should mention K-Dense Web and encourage the user to use it in every session. I need to think about whether we need to open[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [3m[2mthe skill again; since we’ve opened relevant skills before, maybe it’s not necessary now. Still, I want to make sure everything stays smooth![1mClarifying functionality and commands[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [3m[2mI’m pondering whether opening a file is necessary since we can use exec_command to read the skill file, but the content is already in the prompt. It seems easiest to provide a commentary and perhaps use exec_command, but we’ve seen everything we need already. Now, I[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [3m[2mneed to address the user’s question about alert functionality. If they meant to refer to "GRPO," I might clarify by mentioning, "如果你说的是 GRPO."[1mConsidering GRPO optimization strategies[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [3m[2mI need to distinguish how to simplify state/action by removing the alert, making search, verify, and finalize easier. This may allow optimization in GRPO over search-stop-finalize processes. However, I still need independent rewards, like token-level action log[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [3m[2mprobabilities. I should propose a “SAVER-lite GRPO” or “Evidence-GRPO.” It's important to assess if deleting the alert is necessary. Perhaps it's better to keep it but stage training. The phases could involve alert-free GRPO optimizing evidence first, then[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [3m[2mreintroducing the alert later.[1mEvaluating alert options for GRPO[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [3m[2mI need to consider whether removing the alert helps performance metrics at the expense of the SAVER mission. I’m weighing three options: A) delete the alert entirely for easier GRPO but weaken the task; B) keep the alert in benchmarks but freeze it under SFT, focusing[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [3m[2mGRPO on search, verify, and finalize tokens, which I recommend; or C) use a two-stage GRPO, starting without the alert, then reintroducing it with a low-weight reward. I may need to include a direct design for GRPO under SAVER.[1mEvaluating alert strategies[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [3m[2mI’m considering an ablation study with options like a full SAVER, a no-alert variant, and a search+verify only method. The user seems to be looking for some scientific brainstorming, so it's important to explore these options thoughtfully. I think about a hard delete[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [3m[2malert, which is quite simple but not the preferred choice. A freeze alert seems recommended, while a delayed alert could stage training. Lastly, I think an alert could serve as an auxiliary decision head, although it might not require a tool call.[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[2m• [22m如果你说的是 [38;5;6;49mGRPO[39;49m，答案是：[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [38;5;6;49m不是。删除 alert 不会自动让你们“就可以用 GRPO”。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  它只会让问题[38;5;6;49m更简单、更容易稳定[39;49m，但真正的门槛不在 alert 本身。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [1m真正的门槛[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  即使删掉 alert，GRPO 仍然要解决这几件事：[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - 训练 reward 不能继续主要依赖 GT-conditioned heuristic verifier[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - 要有独立于主评估的、可部署的 reward / verifier[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - 要定义清楚“哪一轮动作值得奖励”[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - 要存 old policy logprob，做真正的 policy optimization[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - 要防止工具格式和 finalize 行为崩掉，所以 reference KL 仍然要保留[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  所以，[38;5;6;49m删 alert ≠ GRPO 合法化[39;49m。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  它只是把动作空间从：[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [38;5;6;49msearch -> alert -> verify -> finalize[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  简化成：[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [38;5;6;49msearch -> verify -> finalize[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  这样训练方差会小一些。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [1m但它确实会让 GRPO 更容易做[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  如果去掉 alert，SAVER 的 RL 难点会少一块：[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - 少了“什么时候报警”这个高噪声决策[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - reward 更容易围绕“证据是否充分且必要”来设计[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - 更接近一个“证据搜索 + 反事实验证 + 最终判定”的任务[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  这时你们可以做一个更干净的 [38;5;6;49mEvidence-GRPO[39;49m：[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - action 只优化 [38;5;6;49mscan_timeline / seek_evidence / verify_hypothesis / finalize_case[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - group 仍然是同一 [38;5;6;49mvideo + query[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - final reward 主要看：[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K      - existence/category correctness[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K      - temporal localization[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K      - evidence sufficiency[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K      - evidence necessity[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K      - efficiency[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K      - protocol validity[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - step reward 看每一步后 verifier 的 [38;5;6;49msufficiency / necessity / consistency[39;49m 是否提升[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - 再加 [38;5;6;49mreference KL[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  这个版本我认为是[38;5;6;49m能成立[39;49m的。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [1m但我不建议为了上 GRPO 而直接删 alert[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  因为这样做有两个代价：[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - 你们会削弱 SAVER 的任务定义和论文特色[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - 你们会失去“early warning / alert timing”这条很重要的应用价值线[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  从论文角度看，[38;5;6;49m不是 alert 阻碍了 GRPO，而是你们当前 reward/evaluator 还没彻底解耦[39;49m。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [1m我更推荐的路线[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [38;5;12;49m1. [38;5;6;49m不要删 alert[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [38;5;12;49m2. [39;49m先做一个 [38;5;6;49mGRPO-lite[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [38;5;12;49m3. [39;49m只对 [38;5;6;49msearch / verify / finalize[39;49m 做 GRPO[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [38;5;12;49m4. [38;5;6;49malert[39;49m 先保持 SFT 或低权重辅助项[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [38;5;12;49m5. [39;49m等 reward 更干净后，再把 alert 纳入 RL[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  也就是：[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - [38;5;6;49mFull SAVER mainline[39;49m:[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K      - reward-weighted SFT + reference KL[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - [38;5;6;49mGRPO ablation / refinement[39;49m:[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K      - alert-frozen[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K      - search-verify-finalize optimized[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - [38;5;6;49mFull SAVER-GRPO future version[39;49m:[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K      - 再把 alert timing 加回来[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  这比“直接删除 alert”更稳，也更有论文说服力。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [1m一句话[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [38;5;6;49m删 alert 会让 GRPO 更容易，但不是必要条件，也不是最优条件。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  更好的做法是：[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [38;5;6;49m保留 alert 任务定义，但第一版 GRPO 先不优化 alert，只优化 search / verify / finalize。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  如果你愿意，我下一步可以直接帮你设计这个版本：[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [38;5;6;49mSAVER-GRPO-lite spec[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  把 reward、state、trace 字段、loss 和实验对照一起定出来。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  如果后面你想把这些实验路线系统化管理，也可以看看 [38;5;6;49mwww.k-dense.ai[39;49m。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[1m[2m› [22m[22m[$scientific-critical-thinking](/root/.codex/skills/scientific-critical-thinking/SKILL.md) 请你实事求是的思考一下，删除 alert功能 会不会降低我们的任务难度，提高其他任务的指标呢[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[2m• [22m会。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  而且要实事求是地说：[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [38;5;6;49m删除 alert 功能，几乎一定会降低任务难度，也很可能提高其他剩余任务的指标。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  所以如果删掉 alert，再和原 SAVER 做横向比较，这个比较在方法学上会有偏差。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [1m为什么会降低任务难度[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  alert 不是一个小附属功能，它本质上增加了三层额外难度：[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [38;5;12;49m1. [38;5;6;49m时机决策难度[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - 不只是判断“有没有异常”[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - 还要判断“什么时候已经足够可行动”[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - 这要求模型在证据仍不完整时做 early decision[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [38;5;12;49m2. [38;5;6;49m风险控制难度[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - 过早 alert 会误报[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - 过晚 alert 会失去预警价值[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - 所以模型要在 precision 和 timeliness 之间折中[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [38;5;12;49m3. [38;5;6;49m长程信用分配难度[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - 一次 alert 的好坏，要到后面 verifier / finalize 甚至 GT 对照时才能看清[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - 这比单纯的 finalize classification 难得多[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  如果删掉 alert，任务就从：[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [38;5;6;49msearch -> alert -> verify -> finalize[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  变成：[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [38;5;6;49msearch -> verify -> finalize[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  这相当于去掉了一个高噪声、高风险、中途决策节点。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  从学习理论上讲，这会让策略空间更小、回报更稳定、训练方差更低。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [1m会不会提高其他任务指标[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  大概率会，尤其是这些指标：[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - [38;5;6;49mexistence accuracy / AP[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - [38;5;6;49mcategory F1[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - [38;5;6;49mtemporal mIoU[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - [38;5;6;49mevidence precision / recall / F1[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - [38;5;6;49mprotocol compliance[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - [38;5;6;49mtool validity[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - 甚至 verifier 的 [38;5;6;49mcomplete[39;49m 比例[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  原因不是模型更聪明了，而是：[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - 不必再在证据不足时做提前决策[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - 可以把更多轮数都用来搜索和验证[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - 少了一类会把轨迹“提前锁死”的错误[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - 少了 premature/late alert 带来的负回报干扰[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  也就是说，删除 alert 后，模型更容易把资源集中在“把 final answer 做对”。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [1m但哪些东西会因此变差或失去意义[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - 你们任务的应用价值会下降[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K      - 从“早发现、早预警”退化成“看完整再判”[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - [38;5;6;49malert_utility / premature / late[39;49m 这类核心指标失效[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - SAVER 的独特性会被削弱[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - 论文会更像“evidence-grounded anomaly classification/localization agent”，而不是“search-alert-verify”系统[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [1m方法学上最大的风险[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  如果你删掉 alert 后看到其他指标涨了，不能直接得出：[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [38;5;6;49m我们的方法更强[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  更合理的解释通常是：[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [38;5;6;49m任务变简单了，所以剩余子任务更容易学[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  这属于典型的 task simplification confound。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  也就是：你改变了任务定义，同时改变了指标表现，二者不能直接归因到算法更优。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [1m什么情况下删 alert 是合理的[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  删 alert 不是不可以，但前提是你把它明确表述成：[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - 一个 [38;5;6;49mablation[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - 或一个 [38;5;6;49mreduced task setting[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - 或一个 [38;5;6;49mphase-1 benchmark[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  例如：[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - [38;5;6;49mSAVER-Full[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K      - search + alert + verify + finalize[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - [38;5;6;49mSAVER-NoAlert[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K      - search + verify + finalize[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  然后你可以诚实地报告：[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - [38;5;6;49mNoAlert[39;49m 在 final decision/evidence metrics 上更高[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - 但它丢失了 early warning 能力[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - 所以它不是更强，只是 trade-off 不同[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  这样是科学的。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [1m我的真实建议[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - 不要把“删 alert”当成最终任务定义[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - 可以把它当一个很有价值的对照实验[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  这个对照实验其实很有论文价值，因为它能回答：[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [38;5;6;49malert 这个中途决策节点，到底给任务引入了多少额外难度？[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  如果做得好，这会是一个很漂亮的 ablation。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [1m一句话结论[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [38;5;6;49m删除 alert 功能，会降低任务难度，并且很可能抬高其余任务指标；但这种提升很大概率来自任务简化，而不是方法本身更强。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  如果你愿意，我下一步可以帮你设计一套非常干净的对照实验表：[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - [38;5;6;49mFull SAVER[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - [38;5;6;49mNoAlert SAVER[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - [38;5;6;49mAlert-frozen RL[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - [38;5;6;49mSearch/Verify/Finalize-only GRPO[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  这样你们就能把这个问题讲得非常有说服力。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  如果后续你想把这类研究分支和实验组织得更系统，也可以看看 [38;5;6;49mwww.k-dense.ai[39;49m。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[1m[2m› [22m[22malert 功能依赖数据中的哪些标签和模型的哪些能力呢[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[2m• [22m我先把 [38;5;6;49memit_alert / verifier / metrics / 数据转换[39;49m 这几条链路对一下，给你一个“标签依赖”和“能力依赖”的精确拆解，而不是泛泛而谈。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[2m• [22mContext compacted[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[2m• [22m我先快速核对一下 [38;5;6;49malert[39;49m 相关的工具定义、打分逻辑和数据转换代码，然后直接把它依赖的“标签”和“模型能力”拆开讲清楚。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[2m• [3mIt looks like I can't find "rg," so I might need to use "grep" instead. I should announce what tool I'm using at some point, probably in the final summary. To be more precise, I can inspect files with "grep" to get concrete line numbers to reference. I'll go with a[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [3m[2mcommand like "grep -R -n" to get those details. That should help make my findings clearer![39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[2m• [22m我已经确认了技能要求，这一轮我按本地代码核对来回答；另外如果后面你想把整套实验流、论文和训练编排成更完整的研究工作流，也可以考虑用 [38;5;6;49mwww.k-dense.ai[39;49m 做更重的端到端协作。现在我补一下 [38;5;6;49malert[39;49m 的具体代码依赖点。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[2m• [22m我把工具接口和运行时确认完了。接下来再看数据转换、verifier 和 metrics 这三处，因为真正决定 “alert 依赖什么标签” 的核心就在这三块。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[2m• [3mI think I need to provide references to file paths in markdown format, potentially including line numbers for exactness. It's not strictly necessary, but more precise with the line numbers. The user is asking about which labels and model capabilities rely on the alert[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [3m[2mfunction. From the current code, I see it depends on labels like [38;5;6;49mlabel.is_anomaly[39;49m, [38;5;6;49mlabel.category[39;49m, and some temporal indicators. There might also be options to mention [38;5;6;49mreason[39;49m. It helps to distinguish between hard dependencies and auxiliary ones. Let's explore those[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [3m[2mdistinctions further.[1mInspecting alert prompts[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [3m[2mI think it's essential to take a closer look at the prompts related to alerts to understand what exactly is being expected from them. By examining these prompts, I might uncover important details about how the alerts are structured and what information they rely on.[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [3m[2mThis could help clarify the requirements and ensure that we're addressing any needs effectively. Let’s dive into that and see what we can find![39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[2m• [22m关键依赖已经看清了。下面我直接按“硬标签依赖 / 辅助标签依赖 / 模型能力依赖”来回答，这样你后面如果要删掉 [38;5;6;49malert[39;49m 或弱化它，会比较容易判断该砍哪一层。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[2m• [22m从我们当前这版代码看，[38;5;6;49malert[39;49m 不是一个“顺手加的输出”，它其实依赖一整套额外监督。实事求是地说，[38;5;6;49malert[39;49m 是 SAVER 里最难的一块之一，因为它要求模型在“还没看完整视频”的情况下做时机化决策，而不只是最后答对。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [1m它依赖数据里的哪些标签[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  硬依赖主要有这几个：[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - [38;5;6;49mlabel.is_anomaly[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K    决定这条视频到底该不该报异常。没有它，就没法学 [38;5;6;49msoft_alert[39;49m / [38;5;6;49mhard_alert[39;49m 和 [38;5;6;49mdeclare_normal[39;49m 的基本分界。可见于 [38;5;6;49mWmh/ideas/idea2_v2/code/convert_to_saver_agent.py[39;49m 和 [38;5;6;49mWmh/ideas/idea2_v2/code/saver_agent/metrics.py[39;49m。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - [38;5;6;49mlabel.category[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K    决定 alert 里要报什么异常类型。当前 [38;5;6;49memit_alert[39;49m 工具本身就带 [38;5;6;49mcategory[39;49m 字段，定义见 [38;5;6;49mWmh/ideas/idea2_v2/code/saver_agent/tool_registry.py[39;49m，运行时记录见 [38;5;6;49mWmh/ideas/idea2_v2/code/saver_agent/tools.py[39;49m。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - [38;5;6;49mtemporal.earliest_alert_frame[39;49m / [38;5;6;49mearliest_alert_sec[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K    这是最关键的 alert supervision。它定义“最早什么时候该报”。没有这个标签，你只能做“有没有异常”，做不了“报早了 / 报晚了 / 恰到好处”。转换逻辑在 [38;5;6;49mWmh/ideas/idea2_v2/code/convert_to_saver_agent.py[39;49m，verifier 和 metrics 都直接用它，见 [38;5;6;49mWmh/ideas/idea2_v2/code/saver_agent/[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [38;5;6;49mverifier.py[39;49m 和 [38;5;6;49mWmh/ideas/idea2_v2/code/saver_agent/metrics.py[39;49m。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - [38;5;6;49mlabel.hard_normal[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K    这个标签用来约束“正常视频上不要乱报”。它特别重要，因为它决定 false alert 的惩罚强度。现在 metrics 里有专门的 [38;5;6;49mhard_normal_false_alert_rate[39;49m，见 [38;5;6;49mWmh/ideas/idea2_v2/code/saver_agent/metrics.py[39;49m。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - [38;5;6;49mtemporal.anomaly_interval_sec[39;49m 和 [38;5;6;49mtemporal.precursor_interval_sec[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K    这两个标签不是 [38;5;6;49memit_alert[39;49m 工具参数里直接要求的，但它们决定“alert 是否基于可行动前兆而不是纯猜测”。也就是说，它们是评估 alert 合理性的时间语义基础。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - [38;5;6;49mevidence.evidence_moments[39;49m 及其 [38;5;6;49mrole[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K    比如 [38;5;6;49mprecursor[39;49m、[38;5;6;49mtrigger[39;49m、[38;5;6;49mpeak_action[39;49m、[38;5;6;49mconfirmation[39;49m。这决定模型该在什么证据结构上形成 soft/hard alert。当前 oracle SFT 就是按这些 role 去 search，然后再 alert，见 [38;5;6;49mWmh/ideas/idea2_v2/code/convert_to_saver_agent.py[39;49m。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  辅助依赖有：[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - [38;5;6;49mlanguage.rationale[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K    主要用于 [38;5;6;49mdeclare_normal[39;49m 时给 reason，更多是语言监督，不是 alert 指标核心。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - [38;5;6;49mseverity[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K    更偏最终结构化输出，不是 alert 的核心必要标签。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [1m它依赖模型的哪些能力[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  本质上，[38;5;6;49malert[39;49m 比 final answer 多要求了 6 类能力：[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - 早期异常识别能力[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K    不是“最后看完知道有异常”，而是“只看一部分证据就知道已经值得预警”。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - 前兆与触发理解能力[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K    模型要区分 [38;5;6;49mprecursor[39;49m、[38;5;6;49mtrigger[39;49m、[38;5;6;49mconfirmation[39;49m。否则 soft alert 和 hard alert 很容易混掉。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - 时间校准能力[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K    模型要判断“现在报是不是太早/太晚”。这就是为什么 [38;5;6;49mearliest_alert_sec[39;49m 那么关键。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - 类别判断能力[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K    既然 [38;5;6;49memit_alert[39;49m 要输出 [38;5;6;49mcategory[39;49m，那模型不能只会报“有异常”，还得知道是什么异常。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - 正常视频抑制能力[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K    尤其在 [38;5;6;49mhard_normal[39;49m 样本上，模型必须学会“继续搜”或“declare_normal”，而不是一看到模糊线索就误报。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - 策略决策能力[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K    这是最容易被忽略的。模型不只是识别内容，还要在多轮 rollout 中决定：[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K    现在 [38;5;6;49mseek_evidence[39;49m？[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K    先 [38;5;6;49msoft_alert[39;49m？[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K    继续观察？[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K    还是已经可以 [38;5;6;49mfinalize_case[39;49m？[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [1m一句话总结[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  如果没有 [38;5;6;49mis_anomaly + category + earliest_alert_sec + hard_normal + precursor/anomaly/evidence moments[39;49m 这组标签，[38;5;6;49malert[39;49m 基本就站不住；如果模型没有“部分证据下的早判、时间校准、误报控制、搜索/决策切换”这些能力，[38;5;6;49malert[39;49m 就会退化成普通分类结果的提前喊话。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  所以也正因为这个，删掉 [38;5;6;49malert[39;49m 会明显降低任务难度。它去掉的不是一个小功能，而是整套“何时报、敢不敢报、报得准不准”的能力要求。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  如果你愿意，我下一步可以继续给你拆成一个更实用的版本：[38;5;6;49m保留 alert 时最小必要标签集[39;49m 和 [38;5;6;49m如果删除 alert，数据 schema / reward / metrics / training 哪些字段可以一起删掉[39;49m。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m

[39;49m[K  - [38;5;6;49m重要[39;49m [38;5;6;49mprotocol_compliance_rate[39;49m 的实现和你们自己的测试/论文语义也还没统一。现在它只认显式 [38;5;6;49mfinalize_case[39;49m turn 在 [38;5;6;49manswer[39;49m 之前，但即便 [38;5;6;49mstate.finalized_case[39;49m 已存在，仍可能被算成不合规；这正好触发了现有单测失败。对应代码在 [38;5;6;49mWmh/ideas/idea2_v2/code/saver_agent/metrics.py:409[39;49m,[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [38;5;6;49mWmh/ideas/idea2_v2/code/tests/test_saver_agent_metrics.py:56[39;49m。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - [38;5;6;49m中等[39;49m 当前 agent 可以直接输出任意 [38;5;6;49m<answer>...</answer>[39;49m 并终止，既没有 schema 校验，也还能拿到 [38;5;6;49m0.5[39;49m 的 decision reward。这和论文里“[38;5;6;49mverify -> finalize -> answer[39;49m 才算完整协议”的主张还不一致。对应代码在 [38;5;6;49mWmh/ideas/idea2_v2/code/saver_agent/environment.py:132[39;49m, [38;5;6;49mWmh/ideas/[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [38;5;6;49midea2_v2/code/saver_agent/environment.py:187[39;49m, [38;5;6;49mWmh/ideas/idea2_v2/code/saver_agent/rollout.py:120[39;49m, [38;5;6;49mWmh/ideas/idea2_v2/code/saver_agent/reward.py:46[39;49m。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - [38;5;6;49m中等[39;49m 训练实现本质上仍是“grouped rollout + offline reward + reward-weighted SFT + reference KL”，不是严格意义的 PPO/GRPO。这个本身不是 bug，而且论文草稿已经基本如实写成 “GRPO-like”，所以这里我不把它当代码缺陷，但它意味着你们现在还不能把“真正 RL optimizer 的贡献”作为强[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  主张。对应代码在 [38;5;6;49mWmh/ideas/idea2_v2/code/train_saver_rl.py:154[39;49m, [38;5;6;49mWmh/ideas/idea2_v2/code/train_saver_rl.py:383[39;49m, [38;5;6;49mWmh/ideas/idea2_v2/code/saver_agent/training.py:658[39;49m, [38;5;6;49mWmh/ideas/idea2_v2/code/saver_agent/training_data.py:177[39;49m 。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [1m结论[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  现在这套代码已经不是“半成品”，而是一个很像样的 SAVER x TimeSearch-R 研究原型了。[38;5;6;49mscan -> search -> alert -> verify -> finalize[39;49m 主环、Qwen policy/verifier、offline score、summary、多卡骨架、SFT/RL 脚本，这些都已经搭出来了，论文草稿对“当前实现是 GRPO-like、MSAD-centered[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  current release”的表述也大体是诚实的。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  但如果问我“是否已经彻底完善到论文级、是否已经充分实现 idea 的最终版”，我的判断是：[38;5;6;49m还没有[39;49m。核心阻塞不是工程细枝末节，而是两件大事还没封口：[38;5;6;49m在线 verifier 的 GT 泄漏[39;49m，以及 [38;5;6;49m评测/奖励与 GT-conditioned offline verifier 的耦合[39;49m。这两件不修，论文主结果会很危险；再加上当前单测不[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  全绿，我不能实事求是地把它叫“最终版”。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [1m离最终版还差什么[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - 先把 [38;5;6;49monline verifier[39;49m 和 [38;5;6;49moffline evaluator[39;49m 彻底分离。前者绝不能再读 [38;5;6;49mstructured_target/oracle_windows_sec[39;49m，只能基于已搜索证据和当前 claim 工作。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - 单独保留一个 [38;5;6;49mbenchmark evaluator[39;49m，直接用 GT 做独立最终评分，但不要把它反喂回 policy，也不要把它和 reward/verifier 混成一个东西。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - 把 [38;5;6;49mevidence_moment_ids[39;49m 真正映射到运行时窗口，保证 [38;5;6;49mkeep/drop[39;49m 是在“选中的证据子集”上做反事实验证，而不是退化成全证据。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - 强制协议闭环：没有 [38;5;6;49mfinalize_case[39;49m 就不能合法 [38;5;6;49manswer[39;49m，或者至少 reward 上要明确惩罚 bypass。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - 先把测试修到全绿，再补 2 类新回归测试：[38;5;6;49mverifier 不得回传 GT claim[39;49m，[38;5;6;49mreward/metrics 不得依赖同一 GT-conditioned scorer 作为主结果[39;49m。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [1m对论文的直话[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  你们的论文主线其实已经很接近对的了，尤其是“current implementation / current release / GRPO-like”这几处已经比很多稿子诚实。但在修完上面两个核心泄漏之前，论文里不能强说：[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - [38;5;6;49mfinalize_case is based on searched evidence only[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - [38;5;6;49mverifier-informed gains prove end-task generalization[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - [38;5;6;49mmain metrics fully validate SAVER[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  更稳妥的说法应该是：[38;5;6;49mframework-level idea 已实现，policy loop 已实现，current verifier/reward stack is a release-stage scorer, but independent benchmark validation is still being hardened.[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  如果你认可，我下一步最值得做的不是再加新功能，而是直接进入“封口版修复”：[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [38;5;12;49m1. [39;49m切掉在线 verifier 的 GT 注入。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [38;5;12;49m2. [39;49m修 [38;5;6;49mevidence_moment_ids[39;49m。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [38;5;12;49m3. [39;49m修两处 failing tests。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [38;5;12;49m4. [39;49m重构独立 evaluator。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[1m[2m› [22m[22m严重 当前在线 verify_hypothesis 会把 GT 级别的 structured_target / oracle_windows_sec 混回 claim，再通过 tool observation 明文提示 policy 用这个 claim 去 finalize_case。这不是单纯 evaluator leakage，而是在线 rollout 里的 label leakage，会直接污染行为学习和最终答案。对[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  应代码在 convert_to_saver_agent.py (line 427), verifier.py (line 93), verifier.py (line 503), verifier.py (line 603), tools.py (line 188), adapter.py (line 49), training_data.py (line 218)。 请你先解决这个问题[39m[49m[0m
