[39;49m[K  新增 attach_reference_diagnostics: bool = False。[39m[49m[0m

[39;49m[K  saver_agent/offline_scoring.py[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  score_rollout_records 增加了 attach_reference_offline_verifier 开关。[39m[49m[0m

[39;49m[K  saver_agent/reward.py[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  reward_summary 现在会写明 verifier_source 和 uses_reference_conditioned_verifier，不再默默混过去。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  直接含义是：[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m

[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[2m• [22m结论：这样改是对的，而且是必要的，但我会把它定义为“把主评估从 oracle-conditioned verifier 里剥离出来了”，而不是“整个方法学风险已经完全消失了”。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [1m为什么说改对了[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - 主结果这条线现在确实更干净了。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K    [38;5;6;49mWmh/ideas/idea2_v2/code/saver_agent/metrics.py[39;49m 里的 [38;5;6;49mexistence_ap[39;49m、[38;5;6;49mevidence_f1_at_3[39;49m 已经不再直接消费 [38;5;6;49moffline_verifier[39;49m 的 GT-conditioned 分数或窗口。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - epoch-end 默认评估也不再自动 [38;5;6;49mforce_reverify=True[39;49m。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K    [38;5;6;49mWmh/ideas/idea2_v2/code/saver_agent/evaluation.py[39;49m 这一步很关键，因为它把“训练期诊断器”从“默认验证器”降级了。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - reward 侧没有再假装自己是主评估。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K    [38;5;6;49mWmh/ideas/idea2_v2/code/saver_agent/reward.py[39;49m 现在会明示 [38;5;6;49mverifier_source[39;49m 和 [38;5;6;49muses_reference_conditioned_verifier[39;49m，这在论文里很重要。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [1m但还不能说彻底无风险[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - 训练奖励仍然是 oracle-conditioned。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K    这意味着你们现在更像是：[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K    “用 GT-conditioned offline verifier 做 reward shaping / offline policy improvement”[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K    而不是：[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K    “用完全独立于 GT evaluator 的 RL”[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - 只要你后面拿 [38;5;6;49mmean_total_reward[39;49m、[38;5;6;49mprimary_status_counts[39;49m、[38;5;6;49malert_status_counts[39;49m、[38;5;6;49mdiagnostic_summary[39;49m 去做 checkpoint selection、超参筛选、主表汇报，泄漏会从“主指标”绕回“模型选择”。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - [38;5;6;49mexistence_ap[39;49m 现在虽然不泄漏了，但它的分数来源比较粗。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K    当前更像由 [38;5;6;49mfinal_answer/state/alert[39;49m 推出来的离散 ranking 分数，方法学上比原来干净，但作为真正的 AP 排序分数还不算特别强。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [1m我觉得现在最准确的学术表述应该是[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - 主评估：[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K    只用直接 end-task metrics，基于最终输出和 GT 对比。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - 辅助诊断：[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K    可以报告 verifier-derived 统计，但只能放 appendix / ablation / training diagnostics。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - 训练信号：[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K    当前 RL reward 仍然带 reference-conditioned oracle 成分，所以论文里不要把它写成“test-time independent reward”。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [1m我还会再补两步，才更稳[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m

[39;49m[K    [38;5;6;49m--attach-reference-offline-verifier[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K    默认最好不要让人一跑 CLI 就自动得到可被误当主结果的 oracle summary。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - 把 [38;5;6;49mWmh/ideas/idea2_v2/code/summarize_saver_scores.py[39;49m 和 README 再改清楚：[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K    顶层 [38;5;6;49mmean_total_reward / primary_status_counts[39;49m 统一标成 [38;5;6;49mdiagnostic[39;49m，避免后面你们自己也不小心拿错表。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m

[39;49m[K  [38;5;12;49m1. [39;49m严重：当前 [38;5;6;49mtrain_saver_rl.py[39;49m 仍然本质上是“只保留正 advantage 轨迹的 reward-weighted imitation”，不是能显式压低坏动作概率的双边 policy optimization。[38;5;6;49mWmh/ideas/idea2_v2/code/train_saver_rl.py:61[39;49m, [38;5;6;49mWmh/ideas/idea2_v2/code/train_saver_rl.py:130[39;49m, [38;5;6;49mWmh/ideas/idea2_v2/code/[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [38;5;6;49mtrain_saver_rl.py:364[39;49m, [38;5;6;49mWmh/ideas/idea2_v2/code/train_saver_rl.py:548[39;49m, [38;5;6;49mWmh/ideas/idea2_v2/code/saver_agent/training_data.py:191[39;49m, [38;5;6;49mWmh/ideas/idea2_v2/code/saver_agent/training.py:658[39;49m。更具体地说，负样本会被 [38;5;6;49mmin_weight[39;49m 过滤掉，而且同一条 rollout 的所有 turn 共享同一个[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  rollout-level 权重，这会把 credit assignment 严重做粗。对性能的直接影响是：坏搜索/坏 finalize 不会被明确压低，训练更容易塌成“模仿少数高分轨迹”。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [38;5;12;49m2. [39;49m严重：训练 reward 还没有和 oracle-style reference supervision 完全解耦。RL 循环里强制做 offline reverify，[38;5;6;49mWmh/ideas/idea2_v2/code/train_saver_rl.py:479[39;49m；offline verifier 明确带 [38;5;6;49muse_reference_supervision=True[39;49m 且标记为 [38;5;6;49mreference_conditioned=True[39;49m，[38;5;6;49mWmh/ideas/idea2_v2/[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [38;5;6;49mcode/saver_agent/offline_scoring.py:212[39;49m, [38;5;6;49mWmh/ideas/idea2_v2/code/saver_agent/offline_scoring.py:245[39;49m。虽然 reward 会优先吃在线 [38;5;6;49mverify_hypothesis[39;49m，只有缺 verifier turn 时才 fallback 到 offline verifier，[38;5;6;49mWmh/ideas/idea2_v2/code/saver_agent/reward.py:30[39;49m；但这恰好会在早期弱[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  policy 阶段最明显。按当前权重看，[38;5;6;49mtemporal + verification + counterfactual[39;49m 这三项 verifier-derived reward 合计权重约占一半，这是我根据 [38;5;6;49mWmh/ideas/idea2_v2/code/saver_agent/reward.py:6[39;49m 和 [38;5;6;49mWmh/ideas/idea2_v2/code/saver_agent/reward.py:105[39;49m 做的推断。结果是策略可能更快学[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  会“讨好 verifier/fallback evaluator”，而不是真正学会更稳的 search policy。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [38;5;12;49m3. [39;49m中等偏严重：当前代码库还不是全绿，至少有一个会直接卡住 rollout 管线的真实 bug。我刚重跑了 [38;5;6;49mpython -m unittest discover -s tests[39;49m，结果是 [38;5;6;49mRan 94 tests ... [39;49m[K  [38;5;6;49mWmh/ideas/idea2_v2/code/saver_agent/training.py[39;49m 现在已经不是原来的 reward-weighted imitation 了，而是带冻结 [38;5;6;49mold_policy[39;49m 的 clipped PPO/GRPO-style surrogate，再叠加 reference policy 的 KL regularization。这里我补了 [38;5;6;49mcompute_masked_response_log_probs[39;49m 和[39m[49m[0m

[39;49m[K  [38;5;6;49mdense.ai[39;49m。[39m[49m[0m

[39;49m[K[1m[2m› [22m[22m[$scientific-brainstorming](/root/.codex/skills/scientific-brainstorming/SKILL.md) 我们现在是使用 GRPO 实现吗，当前的 GRPO 实现有什么缺点，如何根据 SAVER的任务背景实际需求设计一个独特的创新点 GRPO 呢[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[2m• [3mI think from previous context, the current implementation is a PPO/GRPO-style optimization that utilizes token-level clipping and reference KL, but it isn't exactly canonical GRPO. I need to check the code for confirmation and highlight the differences. It uses grouped[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [3m[2mrollouts for advantages but updates based on teacher-forced logged trajectories, relying on a frozen old policy and reference policy without a value model. I'll also explore potential innovations for SAVER, like "Counterfactual Set GRPO" or "Protocol-Aware Hierarchical[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [3m[2mGRPO."[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[2m• [22m我先按当前代码把“我们现在到底算不算 GRPO、差在哪”核准一下，再基于 SAVER 的任务特性来 brainstorm 一个更像论文创新点的版本。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[2m• [3mI need to create an answer in a brainstorming style, possibly collaborating with a probing question. It seems important to include a brief mention of K-Dense without overdoing the bullet points. I want the final answer to be concise but can also use lists if needed.[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [3m[2mSince the user is asking three questions, I'll respond in Chinese and make sure to be truthful and nuanced. I'll inspect specific lines around compute_loss and relevant sections to prep for the answer.[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[2m• [22m我再把损失函数和 turn credit 那几段关键代码读一下，这样回答里会更实事求是，不会把“PPO-style”和“真正 canonical GRPO”混在一起。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[2m• [3mI'm thinking about how to best emphasize what's actually needed. The alert function might need to be removed. The user’s working on a SAVER task, so I'll reference the alert stage and verifier. Mentioning current code line references could also be helpful, including[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [3m[2mclickable markdown links to provide clear access to relevant files. I have line numbers from grep and could cite the training objectives in training.py around lines 595 and 1008 for clarity.[1mExploring GRPO design[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [3m[2mThe user asked about designing a unique GRPO, possibly within the GRPO family. I'm thinking of naming it "SAVER-GRPO" to keep it user-friendly. The full name could be "SAVER-GRPO = Counterfactual Prefix-and-Subset GRPO." I want to outline its features: the prefix group[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [3m[2mfor early alerts, the subset group for ensuring evidence sufficiency and necessity, and the tool-step group to enhance query and evidence efficiency. This structure fits nicely with Search, Alert, and Verify. It’s a novel approach in group construction and crediting[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [3m[2msources.[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[2m• [22m可以说“[1m是 GRPO 家族实现，但不是教科书式 canonical GRPO[22m”。更准确地说，当前代码是一个 [1mPPO/GRPO-style、critic-free、token-level clipped policy optimization + reference KL[22m 的实现，而不是最朴素的“同一 prompt 多响应、序列级 advantage、无额外 credit shaping”的标准 GRPO。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  从代码上看，[38;5;6;49mgrpo[39;49m 训练入口已经接好了，在 [38;5;6;49mWmh/ideas/idea2_v2/code/train_saver_rl.py:327[39;49m、[38;5;6;49mWmh/ideas/idea2_v2/code/saver_agent/training.py:595[39;49m、[38;5;6;49mWmh/ideas/idea2_v2/code/saver_agent/training.py:1008[39;49m、[38;5;6;49mWmh/ideas/idea2_v2/code/saver_agent/training_data.py:163[39;49m。它已经具备：[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - 同视频多 rollout 的 group-relative advantage。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - frozen old policy 的 clipped surrogate。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - fixed reference policy 的 KL regularization。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - rollout advantage 继续分配到 turn，再分到 token。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  所以如果论文里写“我们使用了 GRPO-style objective”是对的；如果写“我们严格复现了标准 GRPO”就不够严谨。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [1m当前这版 GRPO 的主要缺点[22m，我觉得有 6 个，而且都和 SAVER 的任务本质强相关。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [38;5;12;49m1. [38;5;6;49mgroup[39;49m 现在还是“同一视频的多条随机 rollout”，但 SAVER 真正关心的不是“随机差异”，而是“反事实差异”。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K     现在的 group 没有强制比较“现在 alert vs 再看一下再 alert”“保留这组证据 vs 去掉这组证据”“这个 query vs 另一个 query”。这会让 GRPO 学到一般性的偏好，但不一定学到 SAVER 最核心的 early alert 和 evidence sufficiency/necessity。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [38;5;12;49m2. [39;49mcredit assignment 仍然偏 heuristic。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K     当前 turn-level advantage 是用手工 bonus/penalty 再混 rollout advantage 得到的，token-level 也是按 [38;5;6;49m<think>[39;49m、JSON key、tool payload 做结构加权。这个设计很实用，但它不是由任务反事实直接导出的，所以会有偏差。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [38;5;12;49m3. [39;49mverifier 信号虽然很有用，但训练里仍更像“proxy reward”而不是环境原生 reward。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K     也就是说，模型在优化“被 verifier 喜欢的行为”，未必等于最优 end-task policy。这个问题在 SAVER 尤其敏感，因为 verifier 本身就是方法核心的一部分。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [38;5;12;49m4. [39;49m现在的目标函数没有把 [38;5;6;49msearch / alert / verify / finalize[39;49m 当作不同决策层来处理。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K     但 SAVER 实际上是一个分层决策问题：先决定看哪里，再决定是否 alert，再决定是否 finalize。把它们全压到同一个 token loss 里，会稀释真正重要的决策边界。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [38;5;12;49m5. [39;49m“证据子集最小充分性”还没有直接进入 policy optimization。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K     当前 reward 会鼓励更好的 evidence，但没有把“只保留这些证据能不能站住、拿掉这些证据会不会塌”直接变成 group comparison 的核心对象。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [38;5;12;49m6. [39;49m“及时 alert”现在更像 reward shaping，不像真正的约束优化。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K     而 SAVER 的业务语义其实更接近：在 false alert 受限的前提下尽早告警。这更像 constrained RL，而不只是加一项 reward。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [1m如果按 SAVER 的真实需求去设计一个有论文创新点的 GRPO，我最推荐的方向不是‘更像标准 GRPO’，而是把 group 本身改造成反事实 group。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  我会建议把它定义成：[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [1mSAVER-GRPO = Counterfactual, Protocol-Aware GRPO[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  核心思想一句话：[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [1mgroup 里的样本不应该只是“同视频的随机多次生成”，而应该是“同一前缀状态下，围绕 search / alert / evidence subset 的结构化反事实分支”。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  可以这样设计。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [38;5;12;49m1. [1m[39;49mPrefix-Alert Group[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K     对同一个 prefix state，构造几种竞争决策：[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - [38;5;6;49malert_now[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - [38;5;6;49msearch_more_then_alert[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - [38;5;6;49mverify_now[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - [38;5;6;49msearch_more_then_finalize[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  这一组专门学“什么时候该报”。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  优势不是一般 reward，而是看：[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - 当前 prefix 证据是否已足够支撑 claim。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - 如果多看一点，结论是否更稳。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - 当前 alert 是否 premature / justified / late。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  这会让 GRPO 真正学到“early but not too early”。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [38;5;12;49m2. [1m[39;49mEvidence-Subset Group[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K     对同一个已选证据集 (E)，构造：[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - [38;5;6;49mkeep(E)[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - [38;5;6;49mdrop(E)[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - [38;5;6;49mkeep(top-k subset of E)[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - [38;5;6;49mreplace part of E with distractor evidence[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  这一组专门学“哪些证据真正关键”。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  优势可以直接来自 verifier 的 counterfactual views：[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - sufficiency: [38;5;6;49mkeep(E)[39;49m 还能不能站住。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - necessity: [38;5;6;49mdrop(E)[39;49m 会不会塌。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - minimality: 更小子集是否仍然成立。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - redundancy: 去掉一些证据是否几乎不受影响。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  这一步非常像 SAVER 的灵魂，因为它把“反事实验证”直接搬进 policy optimization。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [38;5;12;49m3. [1m[39;49mQuery-Competition Group[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K     对同一个怀疑时刻，采样多个 [38;5;6;49mseek_evidence(query=...)[39;49m 候选。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K     比较它们谁更快带来：[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - 新证据增益。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - verifier support 增益。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - alert confidence 增益。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - 更低 observation cost。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  这组学的是“如何搜”，而不是只学“搜完后怎么回答”。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [38;5;12;49m4. [1m[39;49mHierarchical Credit Assignment[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K     不要只做统一 token advantage，而是做 protocol-aware assignment：[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - [38;5;6;49mseek_evidence[39;49m 的 query token 主要吃 search advantage。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - [38;5;6;49memit_alert[39;49m 的 token 主要吃 alert advantage。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - [38;5;6;49mfinalize_case[39;49m 里的 interval / evidence ids / category token 主要吃 subset + decision advantage。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - [38;5;6;49m<think>[39;49m 只拿很弱的 shared credit。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  这比现在的“结构加权 token”更 task-faithful。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [38;5;12;49m5. [1m[39;49mConstrained SAVER-GRPO[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K     如果想再往前走半步，我会把 alert 做成约束：[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - maximize alert utility / evidence sufficiency / final correctness[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - subject to false alert rate ≤ (\tau)[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  这会很像真实部署系统，而不是单纯 reward shaping。论文里也更有说服力。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [1m如果让我只选一个最值得做、最像 SAVER 创新点的版本，我会选：[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [1mCounterfactual Evidence-and-Alert GRPO[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  也就是把两个 group 做强：[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - [38;5;6;49mprefix alert group[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - [38;5;6;49mevidence subset group[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  原因很简单：[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - 这两个正好对应 SAVER 的两个最独特目标：[38;5;6;49mearly alert[39;49m 和 [38;5;6;49mcounterfactual evidence verification[39;49m。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - 它们比“普通 GRPO”更能体现你的任务新意。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - 它们仍然保持 critic-free，显存上比 full PPO + value model 友好，更适合你们现在的 Qwen-VL 多模态训练。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  所以我的实话结论是：[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - [1m现在这版算 GRPO-family，不算最标准 GRPO。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - [1m它的最大短板不是 clip 或 KL，而是 group 语义还不够 SAVER。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - [1m真正有创新潜力的方向，不是把它改得更像通用 RL，而是把 GRPO 的“group”重构成 SAVER 的反事实决策组。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  如果你认可，我下一步可以直接把这个想法细化成一版可落地 spec：[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - 数据怎么构造 counterfactual groups[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - reward/advantage 怎么定义[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - 训练代码应该改哪几处[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - 论文方法节怎么写成一个清楚的新算法名[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  如果后面你想把这套方法设计和实验矩阵再系统化整理，也可以顺手用一下 [38;5;6;49mwww.k-dense.ai[39;49m。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[1m[2m› [22m[22m[$scientific-brainstorming](/root/.codex/skills/scientific-brainstorming/SKILL.md) 我认可，请你开始设计Counterfactual Evidence-and-Alert GRPO[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[2m• [3mI'm thinking about using oracle rewards in training, which might be okay. But if I'm designing an innovative GRPO, I might want to incorporate partly self-consistent signals to reduce leakage issues. I should align this with previous discussions on leakage. For method[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [3m[2minnovation, using an offline counterfactual verifier could be a good idea. However, to avoid leakage, it might be better to use rollout-internal counterfactual scores and reserve GT for auxiliary calibration, not direct rewards. I’ll need to think this through further![39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [1m[3m[2mProposing optimization methods[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [3m[2mI'm considering a "two-level grouped optimization" approach. The idea involves having a global rollout group across the entire episode, combined with local counterfactual groups at key anchors. This way, I can combine losses from both levels. It seems like this could[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [3m[2mbe a stronger and more innovative method. I might define it as CEA-GRPO, which combines global rollout GRPO and local branch GRPO. I'm curious to see how this idea develops.[1mAddressing drawbacks in computation[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [3m[2mI think I need to consider some drawbacks and risks associated with my approach. One issue could be the computational cost from branch explosion; perhaps I could look into using selective anchors and focusing on a top-M set of branches. Reusing cached frames sounds[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [3m[2mlike a good idea too, along with a lightweight verifier. Additionally, I should be aware of branch score noise, as that might affect the overall outcome.[1mProposing algorithm structure[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [3m[2mI think I need to mention that we don’t have to start full trajectories from scratch; we can instead reuse prefix caches and do local suffix sampling. I'm thinking about proposing an algorithm called "CEA-GRPO".[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [3m[2mTo clarify, the standard GRPO involves multiple independent completions from the same prompt, while CEA-GRPO would focus on structured counterfactual continuations derived from the same prefix with an evidence set. Plus, I want to note that not every tool should be[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [3m[2mtreated equally; we might assign token credits based on decision namespace.[1mDiscussing potential equations[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [3m[2mI'm considering some potential equations for anchor (a) and the associated group (G_a) composed of elements (c_1) to (c_m). The calculation for total token advantage for token (j) in branch (i) could be expressed as (A_{i,j} = w_{global} A_i^{global} + w_{local} \sum_a[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [3m[2mm_{a,j} A_i^{(a)}), where (m_{a,j}) serves as the routing mask.[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [3m[2mOr, I might frame it as (A_{i,j}=A^{rollout} + \lambda_{type(k)}A^{local}_{a}). It feels innovative to define different masks for various types like [38;5;6;49mseek[39;49m, [38;5;6;49malert[39;49m, [38;5;6;49mverify[39;49m, and [38;5;6;49mfinalize[39;49m.[1mStructuring the algorithm design[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [3m[2mI’m thinking about how to structure everything: starting with a one-sentence definition and then explaining why this is right for SAVER. I’ll include details about the algorithm object, data rollout construction, and the reward structure as well. Additionally, I’ll[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [3m[2massess the advantages and potential losses, outline expected benefits, and identify risks with mitigations.[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [3m[2mOnce I've organized all of that, I could ask if the user agrees before translating it into code modules. I don’t need to browse the web since I want to keep it focused on scientific brainstorming for the algorithm spec.[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[2m• [22m我会把它定义成一套[1m不是“同 prompt 多随机回答”[22m，而是**“同一前缀状态下的反事实决策组”**的 GRPO。对 SAVER 来说，这样才真正抓住任务本质。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [1m核心重构[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  SAVER 真正要学的不是一般意义上的 completion quality，而是两个 frontier：[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - [1mJustified Alert Frontier, JAF[22m：在当前已观察证据下，最早什么时候可以“合理报警”。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - [1mMinimal Sufficient Evidence Frontier, MSEF[22m：最小哪一组证据已经足以支撑当前 anomaly claim 和 finalize 决策。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  所以 Counterfactual Evidence-and-Alert GRPO，我建议围绕这两个 frontier 来设计。它的核心不是“多采样几条 rollout 做归一化”，而是：[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - 对同一个 prefix state，构造[1m报警反事实组[22m。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - 对同一个 evidence ledger，构造[1m证据反事实组[22m。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - 用这些组内比较结果来给 policy 做 token-level clipped update。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [1m一条最核心的定义[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  我建议把方法名定成：[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - [1mCEA-GRPO: Counterfactual Evidence-and-Alert GRPO[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  一句话定义：[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - 在同一前缀状态下，围绕“现在该不该 alert”与“当前哪些证据真正关键”构造结构化反事实分支组，并用组内相对优势驱动 token-level clipped policy optimization。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [1m为什么它适合 SAVER[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  标准 GRPO 更像是在优化“同一问题的多个回答哪个更好”。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  但 SAVER 的关键不是“回答”，而是 4 类决策：[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - 看哪里[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - 什么时候报警[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - 当前证据够不够[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - 什么时候 finalize[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  所以 SAVER 的 group 不该只是随机 rollout，而该是[1m反事实决策组[22m。这会让 RL 从“生成质量优化”变成“行动边界优化”。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [1m我建议的组结构[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  先从 3 类 group 开始，足够强，也最像论文创新点。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [38;5;12;49m1. [1m[39;49mAlert Counterfactual Group[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K     同一个 prefix state (s_t) 下，构造几种分支：[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - [38;5;6;49malert_now[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - [38;5;6;49mverify_then_alert[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - [38;5;6;49msearch_one_more_step_then_alert[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - [38;5;6;49mdefer_alert[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  这组专门学习“是否该现在报警”。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [38;5;12;49m2. [1m[39;49mEvidence Counterfactual Group[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K     同一个候选 claim 和 evidence ledger 下，构造几种证据分支：[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - [38;5;6;49mkeep_selected_subset[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - [38;5;6;49mdrop_selected_subset[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - [38;5;6;49mminimal_subset_candidate[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - [38;5;6;49mfull_ledger[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - [38;5;6;49mreplace_subset_with_distractor[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  这组专门学习“哪些证据是必要且充分的”。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [38;5;12;49m3. [1m[39;49mSearch Counterfactual Group[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K     同一个怀疑时刻下，构造几种搜索分支：[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - [38;5;6;49mseek_evidence(query_a)[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - [38;5;6;49mseek_evidence(query_b)[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - [38;5;6;49mseek_evidence(wider_window)[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - [38;5;6;49mseek_evidence(narrower_window)[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - [38;5;6;49mstop_search[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  这组专门学习“接下来去哪里找更值”。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  如果你想更稳一点，第一版可以只做前两组：[38;5;6;49malert group + evidence group[39;49m。这已经很有新意，而且最贴 SAVER。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [1m两个 frontier 的形式化[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  我建议把论文里的新意明确写成“frontier learning”。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  定义 verifier 给出支持分数：[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - (S_{\text{full}})：全证据支持度[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - (S_{\text{keep}})：只保留选中证据的支持度[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - (S_{\text{drop}})：拿掉选中证据后的支持度[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - (S_{\text{prefix}})：只保留 alert 前证据的支持度[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  然后定义：[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  t_{\text{JAF}}=\min {t \mid S_{\text{prefix}}(t)\ge \tau_{\text{alert}},\ S_{\text{keep}}(t)\ge \tau_{\text{claim}}}[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  ][39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  意思是：最早达到“可报警且可支撑 claim”的时刻。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  再定义：[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  E_{\text{MSEF}}=\arg\min_{E' \subseteq \mathcal{L}[3mt} |E'|[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [3m\quad[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [3m\text{s.t.}[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [3m\quad[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [3mS[23m{\text{keep}}(E')\ge \tau_{\text{keep}},[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  \quad[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  S_{\text{drop}}(\mathcal{L}[3mt \setminus E') \le \tau[23m{\text{drop}}[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  ][39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  意思是：最小充分证据集。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  这两个量非常像 SAVER 自己的 operational target，我觉得这会比泛泛地写“counterfactual RL”更像你们的方法贡献。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [1mreward 设计[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  我建议 reward 分成两层。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  第一层是[1m局部反事实 reward[22m，尽量少依赖 GT，主要靠 verifier 和行为成本：[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - [38;5;6;49malert_reward_local[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - [38;5;6;49mevidence_reward_local[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - [38;5;6;49msearch_gain_reward[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - [38;5;6;49mprotocol_reward[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - [38;5;6;49mcost_penalty[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  第二层是[1m终局任务 reward[22m，可以保留 GT 驱动：[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - final existence/category/interval correctness[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - alert timing correctness[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - evidence overlap with annotation[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  这样做的好处是：[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - 局部 group 的学习更接近行为优化本身。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - 终局 reward 保留任务监督。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - 方法学上比“所有东西都靠 GT-conditioned offline verifier”更干净。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  我建议每类局部 reward 这样定义。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [1m[4m# Alert branch reward[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [1m[4m[[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [1m[4mR^{\text{alert}}[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  \lambda_1 S_{\text{prefix}}[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  -\lambda_2 \mathbf{1}[\text{premature}][39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  -\lambda_3 \Delta t_{\text{late}}[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  -\lambda_4 \mathbf{1}[\text{false alert}][39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  ][39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  直觉上就是：[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - prefix 证据越够，越支持 alert[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - premature 强罚[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - 太晚也罚[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - normal video 报警更强罚[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [1m[4m# Evidence branch reward[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [1m[4m[[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [1m[4mR^{\text{evi}}[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  \lambda_5 S_{\text{keep}}[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  +\lambda_6 (S_{\text{full}}-S_{\text{drop}})[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  -\lambda_7 |E|[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  -\lambda_8 \text{redundancy}[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  ][39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  直觉上就是：[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - 只保留这些证据还能成立，说明 sufficiency 好[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - 去掉这些证据后明显变差，说明 necessity 好[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - 证据越少越好[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - 冗余越少越好[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [1m[4m# Search branch reward[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [1m[4m[[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [1m[4mR^{\text{search}}[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  \lambda_9 \Delta S_{\text{full}}[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  +\lambda_{10} \Delta S_{\text{keep}}[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  -\lambda_{11}\Delta \text{cost}[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  ][39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  意思是：下一步搜索如果确实提高了支持度，而且没花太大代价，就值得。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [1mgroup advantage[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  对每个 anchor (a) 的分支组 (G_a)，算组内标准化优势：[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  A_i^{(a)} = \frac{R_i^{(a)}-\mu_a}{\sigma_a+\epsilon}[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  ][39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  这才是 CEA-GRPO 的关键。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  不是“整条 rollout 的 final reward 归一化”，而是[1m每个关键决策点都有自己的 counterfactual group advantage[22m。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [1m和当前代码最重要的区别[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  当前代码更像：[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - full rollout reward[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - same-video grouped normalization[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - heuristic turn redistribution[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - token-level clip[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  CEA-GRPO 会变成：[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - full rollout reward 仍保留[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - 再加 prefix-local counterfactual group reward[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - alert/evidence/search 各自单独成组[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - token advantage 不再只是 heuristic，而是来自 branch-specific advantage routing[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  也就是说，旧版是“全局 advantage 往下分”；新版是“全局 advantage + 局部反事实 advantage 一起分”。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [1mtoken-level credit assignment[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  这一步我建议做成 protocol-aware routing，而不是统一撒到所有 token。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - [38;5;6;49mseek_evidence[39;49m 的 query 与 window 参数 token，主要接 [38;5;6;49mA^{search}[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - [38;5;6;49memit_alert[39;49m 的 decision / alert_sec token，主要接 [38;5;6;49mA^{alert}[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - [38;5;6;49mverify_hypothesis[39;49m 的 claim / evidence subset token，主要接 [38;5;6;49mA^{evi}[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - [38;5;6;49mfinalize_case[39;49m 的 existence/category/interval/evidence ids token，主要接 [38;5;6;49mA^{finalize}[39;49m 或 [38;5;6;49mA^{evi}[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - [38;5;6;49m<think>[39;49m token 只给很弱的 shared credit[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  可写成：[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [1m[4m# [[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [1m[4mA_{j}^{\text{token}}[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  A^{\text{global}}[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  +\alpha_s m_j^{\text{search}} A^{\text{search}}[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  +\alpha_a m_j^{\text{alert}} A^{\text{alert}}[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  +\alpha_e m_j^{\text{evi}} A^{\text{evi}}[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  +\alpha_f m_j^{\text{finalize}} A^{\text{finalize}}[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  ][39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  其中 (m_j) 是 token mask。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  这会比现在的 token weighting 更像一个真正 task-aware RL objective。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [1m优化目标[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  损失函数本身可以不大改，继续保留当前这条最稳的线：[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [1m[4m# [[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [1m[4m\mathcal{L}_{\text{policy}}[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  -\mathbb{E}\left[[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  \min(r_j A_j,\ \text{clip}(r_j,1-\epsilon,1+\epsilon)A_j)[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  \right][39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  +\beta , \mathrm{KL}(\pi_\theta | \pi_{\text{ref}})[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  ][39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  其中唯一真正变化的是 (A_j) 的来源。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  从“rollout/turn heuristic”变成“global + local counterfactual group advantage”。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  所以它仍然显存友好，仍然适合你们的 Qwen-VL 路线。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [1m这套设计最像论文创新点的地方[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  我觉得真正能写进标题级贡献的不是“我们也用了 GRPO”，而是下面这句：[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - [1mWe reformulate group-relative optimization for active anomaly understanding by constructing counterfactual branch groups around alert timing and evidence sufficiency, rather than around generic sampled completions.[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  中文就是：[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - 我们把 GRPO 的 group 从“多条随机回答”改造成“围绕报警时机和证据子集的反事实决策组”。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  这很像 SAVER 自己的东西，不会显得只是把通用 RL 套进来。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [1m预期收益[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  如果这套设计有效，我预计最先提升的不是 category accuracy，而是这些：[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - premature alert rate 下降[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - redundant evidence ratio 下降[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - complete ratio 上升[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - evidence F1@3 上升[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - mean turns 下降或不升[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - 同等 false alert rate 下的 alert utility 上升[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  这几个指标比普通 accuracy 更能证明方法创新。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [1m主要风险[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  也有几个现实风险要先承认。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - 分支数会膨胀，训练成本上升[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - verifier 噪声会直接影响 local group ranking[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - 如果 evidence subset 枚举太暴力，会很慢[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - 如果 alert group 太激进，可能学出“保守不报”[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  但这些都能控。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - 每个 anchor 只采 3 到 4 个分支[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - 每条 rollout 只选 1 到 2 个 alert anchors 和 1 到 2 个 evidence anchors[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - evidence subset 用启发式候选，不做全枚举[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - local reward 与 global reward 混合，而不是完全替换[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [1m我建议的落地顺序[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  最稳的实现顺序是：[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [38;5;12;49m1. [39;49m先做 [1mAlert Counterfactual Group[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [38;5;12;49m2. [39;49m再做 [1mEvidence Counterfactual Group[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [38;5;12;49m3. [39;49m最后再加 [1mSearch Counterfactual Group[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  原因是前两者最贴 SAVER 核心，而且直接复用你们现有 verifier 的 [38;5;6;49mprefix / keep / drop / full[39;49m 视图。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [1m如果现在就把它收成一个可执行 spec[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  我会把第一版定义成：[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - 每条 primary rollout 抽取最多 2 个 alert anchors[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - 每条 primary rollout 抽取最多 2 个 evidence anchors[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - 每个 anchor 构造 3 个 counterfactual branches[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - 用 verifier 得到 branch reward[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - 在 anchor 内计算 normalized group advantage[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - 把 advantage 路由到对应 tool response tokens[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - 继续用当前 clipped objective + reference KL 训练[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  这已经足够称为 [1mCEA-GRPO-v1[22m。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  如果你认可，我下一步就不再停留在 brainstorm 了，我可以直接继续往下做两件事中的一个：[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [38;5;12;49m1. [39;49m给你写成一份[1m论文级方法 spec[22m，包括符号、算法框、损失、ablation 假设。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [38;5;12;49m2. [39;49m直接把它翻译成[1m代码实现计划[22m，明确该改 [38;5;6;49mWmh/ideas/idea2_v2/code/train_saver_rl.py[39;49m、[38;5;6;49mWmh/ideas/idea2_v2/code/saver_agent/training.py[39;49m、[38;5;6;49mWmh/ideas/idea2_v2/code/saver_agent/training_data.py[39;49m 和 verifier/rollout trace 的哪些字段。更大规模的方法设计整理如果你后面想并行推进，也[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  可以看看 [38;5;6;49mwww.k-dense.ai[39;49m。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[1m[2m› [22m[22m我认可，直接把它翻译成代码实现计划，明确该改 train_saver_rl.py、saver_agent/training.py、saver_agent/training_data.py 和 verifier/rollout trace 的哪些字段。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[2m• [22m我先把 rollout trace、verifier 输出、以及 RL 数据构造这几段再对齐一遍，这样给你的实现计划会直接落到函数和字段级别，而不是概念层的建议。[39m[49m[0m

[39;49m[K  [3m[2mturns.[1mDeveloping the verification plan[39m[49m[0m

[39;49m[K  [3m[2mfirst emit_alert turn, and the last verify turn before finalization. For evidence anchors,[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [3m[2mI’ll focus on verification turns with candidate evidence IDs and finalize_case turns if evidence is present.[1mDetailing branch construction[39m[49m[0m

[39;49m[K  [3m[2mexists. The reward here is the sum of alertability plus support minus any penalties. Also, the[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [3m[2m[38;5;6;49mno_alert_continue[39;49m branch could use a baseline from the final result without alerting now. I should formulate a concrete plan since the user is seeking an implementation that is executable.[1mImplementing branch rewards[39m[49m[0m

For instance, in the alert counterfactual group at the anchor turn, I'll build[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [3m[2mbranches like [38;5;6;49malert_now[39;49m, which will use the anchor state to verify on the prefix windows. This way, I’m keeping things efficient while still being effective in building the structure I need![1mPlanning implementation details[39m[49m[0m

[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[2m• [22m下面我把 [1mCEA-GRPO-v1[22m 直接翻译成可落地的代码实现计划。结论先说清楚：[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - [1m第一版不要改主损失函数。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - [1m第一版只改“数据构造 + 局部反事实 group advantage + token credit routing”。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - [1m第一版只做两类组：[22m[38;5;6;49malert counterfactual group[1m[39;49m 和 [22m[38;5;6;49mevidence counterfactual group[1m[39;49m。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - [38;5;6;49msearch counterfactual group[39;49m 放到 v2，不然第一轮实现会太散。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  当前主损失已经够好，应该保留在 [38;5;6;49mWmh/ideas/idea2_v2/code/saver_agent/training.py[39;49m 里的这条线：[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - frozen old policy clip surrogate[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - fixed reference KL[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - token-level optimization[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  CEA-GRPO 的创新点应该放在 [1madvantage 的来源[22m，而不是再重写一次 PPO。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [1m一、CEA-GRPO-v1 的新训练流程[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [38;5;12;49m1. [39;49m先按现有流程生成 primary rollout，并得到全局 [38;5;6;49mgroup_advantage[39;49m。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [38;5;12;49m2. [39;49m从 rollout trace 里抽取两类 anchor：[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K      - [38;5;6;49malert anchors[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K      - [38;5;6;49mevidence anchors[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [38;5;12;49m3. [39;49m针对每个 anchor，构造一个小的反事实 branch group。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [38;5;12;49m4. [39;49m用 verifier 对每个 branch 打局部 counterfactual reward。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [38;5;12;49m5. [39;49m在 anchor 内做 group-relative normalization，得到：[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K      - [38;5;6;49malert_local_advantage[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K      - [38;5;6;49mevidence_local_advantage[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [38;5;12;49m6. [39;49m把局部 advantage 和原来的全局 rollout advantage 合并成 example-level advantage components。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [38;5;12;49m7. [39;49m在 token 级别按 tool 类型和字段类型路由这些 advantage。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [38;5;12;49m8. [39;49m继续走当前的 clipped surrogate + reference KL 训练。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  建议统一写成：[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [1m[4m# [[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [1m[4mA^{\text{total}}_{j}[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  \lambda_g A^{\text{global}}[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  +[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  \lambda_a m^{\text{alert}}_j A^{\text{alert-local}}[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  +[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  \lambda_e m^{\text{evidence}}_j A^{\text{evidence-local}}[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  ][39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  这里真正要改的是 [38;5;6;49mA_j[39;49m 怎么来。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [1m二、先做哪两类 counterfactual groups[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [1m1. Alert Counterfactual Group[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  目标：学“现在该不该报”。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  每个 [38;5;6;49malert anchor[39;49m 构造 3 个 branch 就够了：[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - [38;5;6;49malert_now[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - [38;5;6;49mdefer_to_next_decision[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - [38;5;6;49mdefer_to_final[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  这三个 branch 不需要重新跑完整 policy rollout。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  v1 直接利用已有 trace 里的 prefix state 即可：[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - [38;5;6;49malert_now[39;49m：用当前 anchor 的 prefix state 评分[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - [38;5;6;49mdefer_to_next_decision[39;49m：用后面最近一个 search/verify/finalize 后的 prefix state 评分[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - [38;5;6;49mdefer_to_final[39;49m：用 episode 最终 prefix/final state 评分[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  这样第一版实现最稳，不需要在线分叉环境。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  局部 reward 建议由 verifier wrapper 输出：[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - [38;5;6;49malertability_reward[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - [38;5;6;49mclaim_support_reward[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - [38;5;6;49mpremature_penalty[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - [38;5;6;49mlate_penalty[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - [38;5;6;49mfalse_alert_penalty[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - [38;5;6;49mcost_penalty[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  最终得到一个 [38;5;6;49mbranch_reward[39;49m，然后在 group 内标准化成 [38;5;6;49malert_local_advantage[39;49m。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [1m2. Evidence Counterfactual Group[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  目标：学“哪些证据真正必要且充分”。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  每个 [38;5;6;49mevidence anchor[39;49m 构造 4 个 branch：[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - [38;5;6;49mfull_ledger[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - [38;5;6;49mkeep_selected[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - [38;5;6;49mdrop_selected[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - [38;5;6;49mminimal_subset[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  这里 [38;5;6;49mminimal_subset[39;49m 第一版不要做搜索，直接启发式构造：[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - 从 [38;5;6;49mselected evidence[39;49m 里挑 top-k[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - 优先级建议：[38;5;6;49mtrigger > peak_action > precursor > confirmation[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - 如果没有 role，就按 temporal coverage + verifier verified ids 排序[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  局部 reward 建议输出：[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - [38;5;6;49msufficiency_reward[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - [38;5;6;49mnecessity_reward[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - [38;5;6;49mminimality_bonus[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - [38;5;6;49mredundancy_penalty[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - [38;5;6;49mmisalignment_penalty[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - [38;5;6;49mcost_penalty[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  最后 group 内标准化成 [38;5;6;49mevidence_local_advantage[39;49m。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [1m三、要改哪些文件[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [1m[38;5;6;49mWmh/ideas/idea2_v2/code/train_saver_rl.py[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  这里改的是“训练管线编排”，不是主损失。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  建议新增参数：[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - [38;5;6;49m--grpo-variant {vanilla,cea_v1}[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - [38;5;6;49m--cea-enable-alert-group[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - [38;5;6;49m--cea-enable-evidence-group[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - [38;5;6;49m--cea-max-alert-anchors-per-rollout[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - [38;5;6;49m--cea-max-evidence-anchors-per-rollout[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - [38;5;6;49m--cea-alert-local-alpha[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - [38;5;6;49m--cea-evidence-local-alpha[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - [38;5;6;49m--cea-minimal-subset-size[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - [38;5;6;49m--cea-save-counterfactual-groups[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - [38;5;6;49m--cea-max-branches-per-group[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - [38;5;6;49m--cea-branch-cost-penalty[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  建议新增产物：[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - [38;5;6;49mcounterfactual_groups.jsonl[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - [38;5;6;49mcounterfactual_group_summary.json[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - [38;5;6;49mcounterfactual_train_examples.jsonl[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  具体代码路径上，改动点是当前这条链：[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - collect rollouts[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - score rollouts[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - [38;5;6;49mbuild_reward_examples_from_scored_rollouts(...)[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  把最后一步替换成：[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - [38;5;6;49mbuild_counterfactual_grpo_examples_from_scored_rollouts(...)[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  建议新增函数：[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - [38;5;6;49mbuild_counterfactual_config_from_args(args)[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - [38;5;6;49mbuild_counterfactual_grpo_examples_from_scored_rollouts(...)[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - [38;5;6;49msave_counterfactual_groups(...)[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - [38;5;6;49msummarize_counterfactual_groups(...)[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  这里不改：[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - old policy 加载逻辑[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - reference policy 加载逻辑[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - [38;5;6;49mtraining_objective="grpo"[39;49m 的入口[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  换句话说，[38;5;6;49mtrain_saver_rl.py[39;49m 只是把“vanilla GRPO 数据构造”切换成“CEA-GRPO 数据构造”。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [1m[38;5;6;49mWmh/ideas/idea2_v2/code/saver_agent/training_data.py[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  这是 CEA-GRPO-v1 的核心改造文件。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  建议新增 6 类函数。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  第一类：anchor 抽取[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - [38;5;6;49m_extract_alert_anchors(rollout)[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - [38;5;6;49m_extract_evidence_anchors(rollout)[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [38;5;6;49malert anchor[39;49m 选择规则建议：[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - 优先选 [38;5;6;49mverify_hypothesis[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - 其次选 [38;5;6;49memit_alert[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - 最后选 [38;5;6;49mfinalize_case[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - 每条 rollout 最多 2 个[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [38;5;6;49mevidence anchor[39;49m 选择规则建议：[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - 优先选 [38;5;6;49mverify_hypothesis[39;49m 且存在 [38;5;6;49mverified_window_ids[39;49m / [38;5;6;49mbest_effort_window_ids[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - 其次选 [38;5;6;49mfinalize_case[39;49m 且 [38;5;6;49mfinalized_case[39;49m 里有 evidence[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - 每条 rollout 最多 2 个[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  第二类：counterfactual branch 构造[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - [38;5;6;49m_build_alert_counterfactual_group(...)[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - [38;5;6;49m_build_evidence_counterfactual_group(...)[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  第三类：group advantage 计算[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - [38;5;6;49m_normalize_counterfactual_group_advantages(group_records)[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  第四类：example advantage 合成[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - [38;5;6;49m_merge_global_and_local_advantages(...)[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  第五类：turn-to-example 映射[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - [38;5;6;49m_route_alert_local_advantage_to_turn(...)[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - [38;5;6;49m_route_evidence_local_advantage_to_turn(...)[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  第六类：最终训练样本生成[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - [38;5;6;49mbuild_counterfactual_grpo_examples(...)[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  我建议训练 example schema 新增这些字段：[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - [38;5;6;49madvantage_components[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - [38;5;6;49mcounterfactual_group_ids[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - [38;5;6;49mcounterfactual_anchor_kind[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - [38;5;6;49mcounterfactual_anchor_turn_index[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - [38;5;6;49malert_local_advantage[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - [38;5;6;49mevidence_local_advantage[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - [38;5;6;49mglobal_rollout_advantage[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - [38;5;6;49mcontributing_evidence_window_ids[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - [38;5;6;49mcontributing_evidence_ids[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - [38;5;6;49mcounterfactual_metadata[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  其中 [38;5;6;49madvantage_components[39;49m 建议长这样：[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [38;2;147;153;178;49m{[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [38;2;205;214;244;49m  [38;2;147;153;178;49m"[38;2;137;180;250;49mglobal[38;2;147;153;178;49m":[38;2;205;214;244;49m [38;2;250;179;135;49m0[38;2;147;153;178;49m.[38;2;250;179;135;49m42[38;2;147;153;178;49m,[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [38;2;205;214;244;49m  [38;2;147;153;178;49m"[38;2;137;180;250;49malert_local[38;2;147;153;178;49m":[38;2;205;214;244;49m [38;2;250;179;135;49m0[38;2;147;153;178;49m.[38;2;250;179;135;49m31[38;2;147;153;178;49m,[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [38;2;205;214;244;49m  [38;2;147;153;178;49m"[38;2;137;180;250;49mevidence_local[38;2;147;153;178;49m":[38;2;205;214;244;49m [38;2;250;179;135;49m-0[38;2;147;153;178;49m.[38;2;250;179;135;49m18[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [38;2;147;153;178;49m}[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  turn routing 规则建议直接写死在 v1 里：[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - [38;5;6;49memit_alert[39;49m turn：主吃 [38;5;6;49malert_local[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - [38;5;6;49mverify_hypothesis[39;49m turn：同时吃 [38;5;6;49malert_local + evidence_local[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - [38;5;6;49mfinalize_case[39;49m turn：主吃 [38;5;6;49mevidence_local[39;49m，次吃 [38;5;6;49malert_local[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - [38;5;6;49mseek_evidence[39;49m turn：如果它新增的 evidence 最终进入 selected subset，则分到一部分 [38;5;6;49mevidence_local[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - 其他 turn：主要吃 [38;5;6;49mglobal[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  这一步是 CEA-GRPO 比当前版本更“任务化”的地方。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [1m[38;5;6;49mWmh/ideas/idea2_v2/code/saver_agent/training.py[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  这里不要推倒重写，改最少。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  当前 [38;5;6;49mcompute_grpo_surrogate_loss(...)[39;49m 和 old-policy/reference-KL 逻辑可以原样保留。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  主要改 collator 和 token advantage 生成。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  建议改这些点：[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [38;5;12;49m1. [39;49m扩展 collator 支持 [38;5;6;49madvantage_components[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K     当前只读单个 [38;5;6;49madvantage[39;49m 和 [38;5;6;49mtoken_advantages[39;49m。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K     改成支持：[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - [38;5;6;49madvantage_components[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - [38;5;6;49mtoken_advantage_components[39;49m 或直接运行时组合[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [38;5;12;49m2. [39;49m扩展 [38;5;6;49m_build_token_advantages_for_feature(...)[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K     让它不再只从 [38;5;6;49mbase_advantage[39;49m 出发，而是做分量合成：[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - [38;5;6;49mglobal component[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - [38;5;6;49malert-local component[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - [38;5;6;49mevidence-local component[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [38;5;12;49m3. [39;49m新增 action-aware token routing helper[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K     建议新增：[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - [38;5;6;49m_build_action_specific_char_weight_maps(...)[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - [38;5;6;49m_compose_component_token_advantages(...)[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  v1 的 token routing 规则可以很简单：[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - [38;5;6;49m<think>[39;49m 默认低权重[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - [38;5;6;49m<tool_call>[39;49m 里：[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K      - [38;5;6;49memit_alert[39;49m 的 [38;5;6;49mdecision[39;49m、[38;5;6;49malert_sec[39;49m、[38;5;6;49mcategory[39;49m 字段高权重接 [38;5;6;49malert_local[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K      - [38;5;6;49mverify_hypothesis[39;49m 的 [38;5;6;49mcandidate_window_ids[39;49m、[38;5;6;49mcandidate_evidence_ids[39;49m、[38;5;6;49mclaim[39;49m 字段高权重接 [38;5;6;49mevidence_local[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K      - [38;5;6;49mfinalize_case[39;49m 的 [38;5;6;49mexistence[39;49m、[38;5;6;49mcategory[39;49m、[38;5;6;49minterval[39;49m、[38;5;6;49mevidence[39;49m 字段高权重接 [38;5;6;49mevidence_local[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - [38;5;6;49m<answer>[39;49m 里：[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K      - final claim 字段接 [38;5;6;49mevidence_local[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K      - final alert-related字段接 [38;5;6;49malert_local[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [38;5;12;49m4. [39;49m增加训练日志[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K     建议把下面几项打印出来：[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - mean global advantage[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - mean alert local advantage[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - mean evidence local advantage[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - alert/evidence routed token counts[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - counterfactual groups used per iteration[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  这会极大降低调试难度。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [1m[38;5;6;49mWmh/ideas/idea2_v2/code/saver_agent/verifier.py[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  这个文件现在已经有一个很好用的底座：[38;5;6;49mrun_counterfactual_verifier(...)[39;49m。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  CEA-GRPO-v1 不需要重写它，而是要在它上面加一层 branch scorer。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  建议新增 4 个函数：[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - [38;5;6;49mscore_alert_counterfactual_branch(...)[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - [38;5;6;49mscore_evidence_counterfactual_branch(...)[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - [38;5;6;49mscore_alert_counterfactual_group(...)[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - [38;5;6;49mscore_evidence_counterfactual_group(...)[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  这些 wrapper 内部都调用现有的 [38;5;6;49mrun_counterfactual_verifier(...)[39;49m。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  建议每个 branch 统一输出这些字段：[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - [38;5;6;49mbranch_id[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - [38;5;6;49mgroup_id[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - [38;5;6;49mgroup_kind[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - [38;5;6;49mbranch_type[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - [38;5;6;49manchor_turn_index[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - [38;5;6;49mbranch_reward[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - [38;5;6;49mbranch_reward_components[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - [38;5;6;49mprimary_status[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - [38;5;6;49malert_status[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - [38;5;6;49mderived_scores[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - [38;5;6;49mselected_window_ids[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - [38;5;6;49mselected_evidence_ids[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - [38;5;6;49mcandidate_evidence_moment_ids[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - [38;5;6;49mverification_mode[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - [38;5;6;49mverifier_backend[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [38;5;6;49mbranch_reward_components[39;49m 建议明确拆开，别只给一个总分。比如：[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  alert branch:[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - [38;5;6;49malertability_reward[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - [38;5;6;49mclaim_support_reward[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - [38;5;6;49mpremature_penalty[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - [38;5;6;49mlate_penalty[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - [38;5;6;49mfalse_alert_penalty[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - [38;5;6;49mcost_penalty[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  evidence branch:[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - [38;5;6;49msufficiency_reward[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - [38;5;6;49mnecessity_reward[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - [38;5;6;49mminimality_bonus[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - [38;5;6;49mredundancy_penalty[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - [38;5;6;49mmisalignment_penalty[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - [38;5;6;49mcost_penalty[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  这一步很重要，因为后面训练失败时，你能看出是“alert 学坏了”还是“evidence 学坏了”。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [1m[38;5;6;49mWmh/ideas/idea2_v2/code/saver_agent/rollout.py[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  这个文件不需要大改逻辑，但要补 trace 字段，不然 [38;5;6;49mtraining_data.py[39;49m 会一直做脆弱的后处理。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  当前已经有：[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - [38;5;6;49mstate_before[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - [38;5;6;49mstate_after[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - [38;5;6;49mnew_evidence_ids[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - [38;5;6;49mnew_alerts[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - [38;5;6;49mnew_verifications[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - verifier statuses[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  这很好，CEA-GRPO-v1 可以复用。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  但建议再补一些“提取 anchor 的便利字段”。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  每个 turn 建议新增：[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - [38;5;6;49mlatest_claim_before[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - [38;5;6;49mlatest_claim_after[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - [38;5;6;49mlatest_alert_before[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - [38;5;6;49mlatest_alert_after[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - [38;5;6;49mactive_evidence_window_ids_before[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - [38;5;6;49mactive_evidence_window_ids_after[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - [38;5;6;49mobserved_horizon_sec_before[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - [38;5;6;49mobserved_horizon_sec_after[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - [38;5;6;49mselected_window_ids_after[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - [38;5;6;49mcounterfactual_anchor_tags[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [38;5;6;49mcounterfactual_anchor_tags[39;49m 取值建议：[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - [38;5;6;49m["alert_anchor"][39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - [38;5;6;49m["evidence_anchor"][39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - [38;5;6;49m["alert_anchor","evidence_anchor"][39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - [38;5;6;49m[][39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  这样 [38;5;6;49mtraining_data.py[39;49m 就不用每次从整个 state dict 里重新猜。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  episode 级建议新增：[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - [38;5;6;49mcounterfactual_anchor_summary[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - [38;5;6;49mlatest_claim_trace[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - [38;5;6;49mlatest_alert_trace[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  这只是 trace 便利层，不改变环境逻辑。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [1m四、v1 的 branch 具体怎么构造[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  这是最关键的落地点。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [1mAlert group v1[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  anchor 来源：[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - 优先 [38;5;6;49mverify_hypothesis[39;49m turn[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - 次优 [38;5;6;49memit_alert[39;49m turn[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  branch 构造：[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - [38;5;6;49malert_now[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K      - 用 anchor 的 [38;5;6;49mstate_after[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K      - alert 时间取当前 prefix 的 [38;5;6;49mobserved_horizon_sec_after[39;49m 或当前 alert[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - [38;5;6;49mdefer_to_next_decision[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K      - 找后面最近一个 [38;5;6;49mverify_hypothesis[39;49m / [38;5;6;49memit_alert[39;49m / [38;5;6;49mfinalize_case[39;49m turn 的 [38;5;6;49mstate_after[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - [38;5;6;49mdefer_to_final[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K      - 用 episode final state[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  这个版本虽然不是“真正重新分叉 rollout”，但已经是很好的 temporal counterfactual group，而且完全可实现。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [1mEvidence group v1[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  anchor 来源：[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - [38;5;6;49mverify_hypothesis[39;49m turn[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - [38;5;6;49mfinalize_case[39;49m turn[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  selected subset 来源优先级：[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - [38;5;6;49mverifier_verified_window_ids[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - [38;5;6;49mverifier_best_effort_window_ids[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - [38;5;6;49mstate_after.active_evidence_window_ids[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - [38;5;6;49mfinalized_case.evidence*[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  branch 构造：[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - [38;5;6;49mfull_ledger[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - [38;5;6;49mkeep_selected[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - [38;5;6;49mdrop_selected[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - [38;5;6;49mminimal_subset[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [38;5;6;49mminimal_subset[39;49m 启发式规则建议第一版固定成：[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - 取 selected subset 中 top-k[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - k 默认 2 或 3[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - 有 role 时按 [38;5;6;49mtrigger > peak > precursor > confirmation[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - 无 role 时按 temporal overlap + earlier decisive windows 排序[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [1m五、advantage 合成规则[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  建议在 [38;5;6;49mtraining_data.py[39;49m 里显式写成：[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [1m[4m# [[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [1m[4mA_{\text{turn}}[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  \lambda_g A_{\text{global}}[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  +[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  \lambda_a A_{\text{alert-local}}^{\text{turn}}[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  +[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  \lambda_e A_{\text{evidence-local}}^{\text{turn}}[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  ][39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  v1 推荐默认：[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - [38;5;6;49mlambda_g = 1.0[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - [38;5;6;49mlambda_a = 0.5[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - [38;5;6;49mlambda_e = 0.5[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  不要一开始就让 local signal 压过 global signal，不然训练会不稳。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  turn 级路由建议：[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - [38;5;6;49memit_alert[39;49m：[38;5;6;49m1.0 * alert_local + 0.25 * evidence_local[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - [38;5;6;49mverify_hypothesis[39;49m：[38;5;6;49m0.5 * alert_local + 1.0 * evidence_local[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - [38;5;6;49mfinalize_case[39;49m：[38;5;6;49m0.25 * alert_local + 1.0 * evidence_local[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - [38;5;6;49mseek_evidence[39;49m：如果命中最终 selected evidence，则 [38;5;6;49m0.5 * evidence_local[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - [38;5;6;49mscan_timeline[39;49m：只保留 global[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [1m六、最小可落地提交顺序[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  我建议你按这个顺序实现，不容易崩。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [38;5;12;49m1. [39;49m先改 [38;5;6;49mWmh/ideas/idea2_v2/code/saver_agent/rollout.py[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K     目标：把 anchor 需要的 trace 字段补齐。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [38;5;12;49m2. [39;49m再改 [38;5;6;49mWmh/ideas/idea2_v2/code/saver_agent/verifier.py[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K     目标：能直接对 alert/evidence branch group 打局部 reward。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [38;5;12;49m3. [39;49m再改 [38;5;6;49mWmh/ideas/idea2_v2/code/saver_agent/training_data.py[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K     目标：从 scored rollouts 生成 CEA-GRPO examples。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [38;5;12;49m4. [39;49m最后改 [38;5;6;49mWmh/ideas/idea2_v2/code/saver_agent/training.py[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K     目标：把 [38;5;6;49madvantage_components[39;49m 路由成 token advantages。[39m[49m[0m

[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m

[39;49m[K[2m• [22m可以。先不急着写代码，我先把几个会影响“最终版长什么样”的关键岔路跟你确认。你回我编号答案就行，我收到后就会把 [1mCEA-GRPO 最终版完整方案[22m 定死，再开始落代码。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  我当前的总体倾向是：[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - 保留 [38;5;6;49malert + evidence[39;49m 作为核心，不删 alert。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - 主损失继续沿用现在的 [38;5;6;49mtoken-level clipped policy optimization + reference KL[39;49m。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - 创新点放在 [1mcounterfactual group construction + local advantage routing[22m，而不是重写 PPO 本体。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - 为了论文方法学更干净，[1m主训练版尽量减少 GT-conditioned branch reward[22m，oracle 版只做 ablation。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  请你确认下面 6 个点。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [38;5;12;49m1. [1m[39;49m最终版范围[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K     我的推荐：[38;5;6;49malert group + evidence group[39;49m 进主方法；[38;5;6;49msearch group[39;49m 先写进扩展设计，但不进入第一轮代码主线。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K     可选：[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - A. 只做 [38;5;6;49malert + evidence[39;49m（推荐）[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - B. 三个都做：[38;5;6;49malert + evidence + search[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - C. 先只做 [38;5;6;49malert[39;49m，后面再补 [38;5;6;49mevidence[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [38;5;12;49m2. [1m[39;49mcounterfactual branch 的生成方式[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K     这是最大设计分叉。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - A. [1mPrefix-offline branch scoring[22m：从已有 rollout 的 prefix state 构造反事实 branch，用 verifier 直接评分，不重新跑 policy 分支。（推荐，稳、快、容易训）[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - B. [1mTrue branched rollout replay[22m：从 anchor state 真正分叉继续 rollout，再打分。（更“纯正”，但工程复杂很多）[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K    我的推荐是 A 作为最终版主实现，B 作为后续增强。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [38;5;12;49m3. [1m[39;49m训练时 local branch reward 是否允许使用 reference-conditioned heuristic/oracle 信息[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K     这是方法学边界问题。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - A. [1m主训练默认不用 reference-conditioned oracle[22m，local branch reward 优先用 [38;5;6;49mhybrid / qwen_self_verifier / non-reference features[39;49m；oracle 版只做 ablation。（推荐）[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - B. 允许主训练直接用 reference-conditioned verifier[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K    我强烈推荐 A，这样论文更站得住。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [38;5;12;49m4. [1m[39;49mevidence minimal subset 怎么定义[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - A. [1mgreedy backward elimination[22m：从 selected evidence 开始，一次去掉一个，找到最小仍成立的子集。（推荐，最像“最小充分证据”）[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - B. top-k heuristic：按 role / verifier score 取前 k[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - C. 两者都做：训练用 B，分析/论文图用 A[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K    我推荐 C，工程和方法两边都比较平衡。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [38;5;12;49m5. [1m[39;49mCEA-GRPO 主优化目标优先拉哪些指标[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K     这决定 reward/component 的权重倾向。我的推荐优先级是：[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - [38;5;6;49malert utility[39m[49m[0m

[39;49m[K  - [38;5;6;49mfalse alert rate[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - [38;5;6;49mmean turns / inspected ratio[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K    如果你同意，我就按这个优先级去定 local reward 结构。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K    如果不同，请告诉我你最在意的前 3 个主指标。[39m[49m[0m
