[39;49m[K  [3m[2mit right now.[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [3m[2mA prioritized list could be useful here. First, I believe it’s worth building [38;5;6;49mtraining_examples.json[39;49m to enhance RL. This way, after scoring, the train saver RL won't have to construct reward examples online every time. I can split this into two parts: one for[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [3m[2mgenerating examples from scored rollouts and the other for using those prepared training examples. Another step could be caching an offline verifier minimal reference index, though the cost for that is minor.[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[2m• [22m有，而且按“收益 / 实现成本”来看，我建议分成三档。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [1m最值得离线化[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - [38;5;6;49mprepared_sft.jsonl[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K      - 这个你已经在做了，收益很高。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K      - 它把 schema-driven prompt、多轮轨迹、[38;5;6;49moracle_verifier_feedback[39;49m 都提前展开了，SFT 时不必再重复构造。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - [38;5;6;49m.frame_cache[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K      - 这个你现在也已经有了，是目前最重要的离线项。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K      - 训练和 rollout 最重的 I/O 基本就是视频读帧。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - [38;5;6;49mrollouts.scored.jsonl[39;49m 和 [38;5;6;49msummary.json[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K      - 这个也已经在做。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K      - 一旦 rollout 固定，reward / verifier / summarize 都应尽量复用，不要反复现算。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [1m我建议下一步新增的离线化[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - [38;5;6;49mRL training examples[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K      - 现在 [38;5;6;49mtrain_saver_rl.py[39;49m 里，打完分之后还会在线把 [38;5;6;49mscored_rollouts -> reward/CEA-GRPO examples[39;49m 再构一遍。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K      - 这一步虽然不如视频解码重，但如果你经常“同一批 rollout 反复调 RL 超参”，它会重复做很多工作。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K      - 最适合新增一个类似：[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K          - [38;5;6;49mprepare_saver_rl_examples.py[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K          - 输入 [38;5;6;49mrollouts.scored.jsonl[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K          - 输出 [38;5;6;49mtraining_examples.jsonl[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K          - 然后 [38;5;6;49mtrain_saver_rl.py --prepared-training-examples ...[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K      - 这是我认为你现在最值得补的下一个离线阶段。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [1m可以做，但优先级没那么高[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - [38;5;6;49mcache manifest / cache coverage report[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K      - 比如提前生成每个 split 的 [38;5;6;49mvideo_path -> has_frame_cache[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K      - 主要用于检查，不是性能大头。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - [38;5;6;49mprepared eval subset[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K      - 如果你每次只评固定一批 test 样本，可以把索引清单固定下来，减少反复切分和扫描。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - [38;5;6;49moffline reference index[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K      - [38;5;6;49mscore_saver_rollout.py[39;49m 每次会重新读 reference JSONL。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K      - 可以做轻量索引缓存，但收益通常不大。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [1m当前不建议现在做[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - [38;5;6;49m.feature_cache[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K      - 代码里虽然会加载 [38;5;6;49m.feature_cache[39;49m，但当前主流程里基本没有真正消费这个 [38;5;6;49membedding[39;49m。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K      - 也就是说现在就算你花时间预计算 feature，收益很有限。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - 把 [38;5;6;49mprepared_sft[39;49m 里的 [38;5;6;49mimage_ref[39;49m 全部改成 inline image[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K      - 会让文件非常大，I/O 和存储都变差，不划算。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - 把 verifier 的 keep/drop/full 视图全离线化[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K      - 这类视图强依赖 rollout 时的 [38;5;6;49mclaim[39;49m、[38;5;6;49mcandidate_window_ids[39;49m、alert 决策。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K      - 不是稳定静态数据，没法优雅地一次性预烘焙。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [1m一句话结论[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  现在最值得继续离线化的，不是再去做别的视觉 cache，而是把 [38;5;6;49mscored rollouts -> RL training examples[39;49m 这一层单独固化下来。这样你后面调 [38;5;6;49mCEA-GRPO[39;49m 的很多实验都会轻松很多。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  如果你认可，我下一步可以直接给你补一个 [38;5;6;49mprepare_saver_rl_examples.py[39;49m，把这层正式拆出来。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m

[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[2m• [22m是的，这个现象基本说明你当前的 SFT 不是“GPU 算不动”，而是“GPU 经常在等 CPU / I/O 喂数据”。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  如果 [38;5;6;49mvolatile gpu util[39;49m 大部分时间是 [38;5;6;49m0[39;49m，而 [38;5;6;49mpwr[39;49m 也基本不抬升，最常见含义就是：显卡已经把模型放进去了，但前向/反向并没有持续发生。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [1m结论[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  当前这套 SFT 里，最影响速度的不是模型本身，而是“单样本、多图、多轮消息”的主机侧准备链路。对你现在的代码，最可能的瓶颈顺序通常是：[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - 视频帧读取是否命中 [38;5;6;49m.frame_cache[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - [38;5;6;49mimage_ref -> image[39;49m 的同步 materialization[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - [38;5;6;49mcollator[39;49m 里的图像 resize、消息裁剪、反复 tokenization[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - [38;5;6;49mper_device_train_batch_size=1[39;49m 带来的短促 GPU burst[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - [38;5;6;49mgradient_accumulation_steps[39;49m 偏大导致一个 optimizer step 很久才出现[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - epoch-end rollout eval 把训练节奏切断[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [1m当前代码里真正会拖慢 SFT 的点[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - 数据如果没命中 [38;5;6;49m.frame_cache[39;49m，会直接 fallback 到原视频解码。入口在 [38;5;6;49mWmh/ideas/idea2_v2/code/saver_agent/dataset.py:197[39;49m；warning 在 [38;5;6;49mWmh/ideas/idea2_v2/code/saver_agent/dataset.py:344[39;49m。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - prepared SFT 训练时，[38;5;6;49mWeightedExampleDataset.__getitem__[39;49m 会同步把 [38;5;6;49mimage_ref[39;49m 还原成图像，[38;5;6;49mWmh/ideas/idea2_v2/code/saver_agent/training.py:696[39;49m。如果 cache 没命中，会回退到 raw frame materialization，[38;5;6;49mWmh/ideas/idea2_v2/code/saver_agent/training.py:494[39;49m。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - collator 明确要求 [38;5;6;49mper_device_train_batch_size=1[39;49m，[38;5;6;49mWmh/ideas/idea2_v2/code/saver_agent/training.py:619[39;49m。这意味着每次 GPU 只吃一个样本，本来就很难把 H200 持续打满。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - collator 每个样本都会做一串 CPU 工作：消息裁剪、图片 resize、提取视觉输入、预算拟合，[38;5;6;49mWmh/ideas/idea2_v2/code/saver_agent/training.py:232[39;49m 和 [38;5;6;49mWmh/ideas/idea2_v2/code/saver_agent/training.py:645[39;49m。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - 最重的一点是 [38;5;6;49m_fit_messages_to_budget(...)[39;49m 会反复构建 chat text、反复 tokenization，必要时循环删旧图/旧历史再重试，[38;5;6;49mWmh/ideas/idea2_v2/code/saver_agent/training.py:416[39;49m。这非常容易把 GPU 饿住。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - [38;5;6;49mTrainingArguments[39;49m 在这里创建，[38;5;6;49mWmh/ideas/idea2_v2/code/saver_agent/training.py:1505[39;49m。你当前代码没有显式设置 dataloader worker；我刚在你的 [38;5;6;49mqwen3-vl[39;49m 环境里确认了 [38;5;6;49mtransformers[39;49m 默认是 [38;5;6;49mdataloader_num_workers=0[39;49m。这意味着数据准备基本在主训练进程同步做。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - 训练脚本默认 [38;5;6;49mgradient_accumulation_steps[39;49m 不低。单独跑 SFT 脚本时默认是 [38;5;6;49m16[39;49m，[38;5;6;49mWmh/ideas/idea2_v2/code/scripts/02_train_sft_with_rollout_eval.sh:24[39;49m；[38;5;6;49mfull_pipeline[39;49m 里默认是 [38;5;6;49m4[39;49m，[38;5;6;49mWmh/ideas/idea2_v2/code/scripts/00_full_pipeline.sh:87[39;49m。这会让“一个 step 很久才算完”的感觉更明[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  显。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - 如果你不是用 [38;5;6;49m--prepared-data[39;49m，而是直接 [38;5;6;49m--data[39;49m 在 [38;5;6;49mtorchrun[39;49m 下构样本，每个 rank 都会重复做数据准备，[38;5;6;49mWmh/ideas/idea2_v2/code/train_saver_sft.py:365[39;49m。这会让训练开头尤其像“卡死”。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - 你还开了 epoch-end rollout eval 的话，每个 epoch 结束都会切去跑 rollout evaluation，[38;5;6;49mWmh/ideas/idea2_v2/code/saver_agent/training.py:1644[39;49m。这段时间不是纯 SFT 吞吐。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [1m为什么会看到 [22m[38;5;6;49mvolatile gpu util=0[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - [38;5;6;49mvolatile gpu util[39;49m 是瞬时采样值。你的 GPU 可能是“短时间算一下，然后长时间等数据”，于是大多数采样点都刚好落在等待区间。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - [38;5;6;49mbatch size=1[39;49m 时，Qwen3-VL 的一次前后向可能是很短的 burst；如果前面 CPU 花很多时间准备这个样本，[38;5;6;49mnvidia-smi[39;49m 看上去就会像“几乎没算”。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - [38;5;6;49mpwr[39;49m 基本静态也支持这个判断：显存占着、模型驻留着，但算子没有持续跑起来。这是典型的 GPU starvation，不是 GPU 算力不够。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [1m你现在最该关注的几个日志[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - 训练开始时打印的 [38;5;6;49mtraining frame cache: cached=.../...[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K    这能直接看出 cache 覆盖率。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - 任何 [38;5;6;49m[cache-warning][39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K    只要看到它，就说明这个样本没有走理想缓存路径，而是在现场读原视频或原始帧。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - 如果你看到是从 [38;5;6;49m--data[39;49m 构建 prepared examples，而不是直接 [38;5;6;49mloading prepared SFT examples[39;49m，那训练前就已经有一大段 CPU 工作了。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [1m实话实说地判断[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  对你现在这套代码，如果 GPU 大部分时间 [38;5;6;49mutil=0[39;49m，最可能不是模型太轻，而是下面这个组合：[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - [38;5;6;49mdataloader_num_workers=0[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - [38;5;6;49mper_device_train_batch_size=1[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - [38;5;6;49mimage_ref[39;49m 同步 materialization[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - 共享存储上的 [38;5;6;49m.frame_cache[39;49m/视频读取[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - collator 里反复 tokenization 与 budget fitting[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  也就是说，这是“输入流水线太慢”，不是“算子太慢”。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [1m怎么快速验证是不是这个原因[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  同时开这两个监控最有用：[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [38;2;137;180;250;49mwatch[38;2;147;153;178;49m -[38;2;235;160;172;49mn[38;2;205;214;244;49m 1 [38;2;166;227;161;49m"nvidia-smi --query-gpu=index,utilization.gpu,utilization.memory,memory.used,memory.total,power.draw --format=csv,noheader"[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [38;2;137;180;250;49mpidstat[38;2;147;153;178;49m -[38;2;235;160;172;49mdru[38;2;147;153;178;49m -[38;2;235;160;172;49mp[38;2;205;214;244;49m [38;2;243;139;168;49m$[38;2;147;153;178;49m([38;2;137;180;250;49mpgrep[38;2;147;153;178;49m -[38;2;235;160;172;49md[38;2;205;214;244;49m,[38;2;147;153;178;49m -[38;2;235;160;172;49mf[38;2;205;214;244;49m train_saver_sft.py[38;2;147;153;178;49m)[38;2;205;214;244;49m 1[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  如果你看到：[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - GPU util 大部分时间低[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - 但 CPU、磁盘读、进程上下文切换在动[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - 终端还有 [38;5;6;49m[cache-warning][39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  那就几乎可以确定是数据/CPU 侧瓶颈。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  如果你愿意，我下一步可以直接把 SFT 再优化一轮，优先做这三件事：[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [38;5;12;49m1. [39;49m给 [38;5;6;49mrun_weighted_sft[39;49m 接 [38;5;6;49mdataloader_num_workers / persistent_workers / prefetch_factor[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [38;5;12;49m2. [39;49m进一步减少 collator 里的重复 tokenization[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [38;5;12;49m3. [39;49m把 [38;5;6;49mprepared_sft[39;49m 再往“更接近训练时直接可喂”的方向预烘焙一层[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[1m[2m› [22m[22m给 run_weighted_sft 接 dataloader_num_workers / persistent_workers / prefetch_factor[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  进一步减少 collator 里的重复 tokenization[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  把 prepared_sft 再往“更接近训练时直接可喂”的方向预烘焙一层 这些操作会影响模型性能吗[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[2m• [3mBrainstorming is essential before diving into creative work or building features, although it’s not necessary for this question. The user is asking about code and performance trade-offs, not scientific claims. I might explore existing knowledge rather than needing to[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [3m[2minspect the exact current implementation. The user’s question hints at a conceptual response, focusing on optimizations like [38;5;6;49mdataloader_num_workers[39;49m, which typically do not impact model performance, but could affect randomness in ordering slightly.[1mEvaluating num_workers[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [1m[3m[2min PyTorch[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [3m[2mIn PyTorch, the [38;5;6;49mnum_workers[39;49m parameter can alter sample prefetch timing, but the order remains the same if there's no shuffling. The Trainer may shuffle the training dataset, but the DataLoader maintains order based on the sampler. This setup could impact[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [3m[2mreproducibility due to random augmentations or nondeterminism in CPU transformations. However, since there are no random augmentations in the collator, model quality should remain unaffected. Still, using multiple workers could lead to memory issues if they copy large[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [3m[2mPython objects, causing storage contention. Overall, the model's quality should stay the same if functioning properly.[1mEvaluating pre-bake impacts[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [3m[2mWhen it comes to pre-baking, I realize it can affect performance based on what I choose to prepare. It's safe to pre-bake deterministic and model-agnostic items like expanded oracle branches or normalized tool schema prompts; those shouldn't cause any issues. However,[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [3m[2mif I pre-bake model-dependent elements like tokenized inputs or resized images, that could change performance based on specific configurations. If SFT hyperparameters change, stale prepared parameters might lead to problems. It's vital to consider these factors[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [3m[2mcarefully![1mEvaluating performance modifications[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [3m[2mI’m considering using a 2D table for clarity while addressing the current low utilization. I think it's important to highlight how the changes can tie back to performance improvements. Maybe I should mention that dataloader workers can introduce nondeterminism without[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [3m[2maffecting overall performance. I plan to outline recommended steps, starting with low-risk adjustments, like adding dataloader knobs, and then optimizing collator processes. It’s key not to pre-bake too aggressively, ensuring certain guidelines are followed for[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [3m[2mreproducibility.[1mClarifying optimization effects[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [3m[2mI need to focus on the user's question about the effects of optimizations on GPU behavior. It seems like I shouldn’t rely on any web tools for this, so I'll aim for a final concise response that includes enough information to cover the topic effectively. It’s important[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [3m[2mthat I get this right without any unnecessary complexity. I’ll make sure to present my thoughts clearly and supportively for the user![39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[2m• [22m会分情况。先把“性能”拆开说：[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - 如果你说的是训练吞吐、GPU 利用率，这三项大概率都会明显改善。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - 如果你说的是最终任务指标、模型泛化，它们不应该天然变差，但前提是我们做的是“等价加速”，不是“偷偷改训练输入”。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  我直接给你结论：[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [1m1. [22m[38;5;6;49mdataloader_num_workers / persistent_workers / prefetch_factor[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - 对最终模型指标基本没有本质影响。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - 它主要影响的是“CPU 预处理能不能提前把 batch 准备好”。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - 风险不在精度，而在稳定性和 I/O：[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K      - worker 太多会把共享存储打爆[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K      - 多进程读视频/cache 可能让吞吐反而更差[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K      - 主机内存会涨[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - 所以这是低风险优化，优先做。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [1m2. 减少 collator 里的重复 tokenization[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - 如果我们做的是“严格等价”的优化，基本不影响模型指标。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - 但如果为了省事，改成更激进裁剪、近似 token 计数、少保留一些上下文，那就会影响性能。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - 这项的关键边界是：[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K      - 最终 [38;5;6;49minput_ids / labels / token_advantages / 图像集合[39;49m 不变，就只是加速[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K      - 只要这些有变化，就可能影响结果[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  你现在最重的热点就在这里：[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - [38;5;6;49mWmh/ideas/idea2_v2/code/saver_agent/training.py:416[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - [38;5;6;49mWmh/ideas/idea2_v2/code/saver_agent/training.py:619[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  所以这项可以做，但我会坚持“等价优化”，不做近似。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [1m3. 把 [22m[38;5;6;49mprepared_sft[1m[39;49m 再往前预烘焙一层[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - 这是三项里最容易碰到“会影响模型性能”的一项。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - 因为你一旦把更多东西提前固化，就会把当前训练配置一起固化进去，比如：[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K      - [38;5;6;49mmax_seq_length[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K      - [38;5;6;49mmax_image_side[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K      - [38;5;6;49mmax_total_images[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K      - [38;5;6;49mkeep_recent_text_messages[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K      - preview 帧策略[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K      - 甚至 Qwen processor 版本[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - 如果后面你改了这些参数，但还继续用旧的 prepared 产物，训练输入就变成“静默错配”，这会真实伤性能。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  所以这项不是不能做，而是要分两种：[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - 安全预烘焙[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K      - 只烘焙 model-agnostic 内容[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K      - 比如 expanded trajectory、schema prompt、oracle verifier feedback、稳定的 [38;5;6;49mimage_ref[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K      - 这类基本不伤性能[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - 高风险预烘焙[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K      - 直接烘焙 budget-trimmed messages、tokenized tensors、最终图像尺寸[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K      - 这类必须和模型/预算强绑定[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K      - 只适合同一模型、同一训练配置反复跑[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [1m我的建议[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - 第 1 项可以直接做，低风险高收益。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - 第 2 项只做“等价缓存/等价复用”，不要改训练语义。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - 第 3 项要做，但做成“配置绑定缓存”，不能做成一个永远通用的 prepared 文件。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  最稳的策略是两层产物：[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - [38;5;6;49mprepared_sft.jsonl[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K      - 仍然保持相对通用[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - [38;5;6;49mprepared_sft.runtime_cache/[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K      - 专门绑定某个配置[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K      - 名字里带上关键参数哈希[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  比如至少绑定这些：[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - [38;5;6;49mmodel_path[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - [38;5;6;49mmax_seq_length[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - [38;5;6;49mmax_image_side[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - [38;5;6;49mmax_image_pixels[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - [38;5;6;49mmax_total_images[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - [38;5;6;49mkeep_recent_tool_image_messages[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - [38;5;6;49mkeep_recent_text_messages[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - [38;5;6;49mnum_preview_frames[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - [38;5;6;49mpreview_sampling_fps[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  这样做的结果是：[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - 吞吐会上去[39m[49m[0m

[39;49m[K[2m• [22m我已经把论文里的摘要和方法段落进一步压成了更像投稿稿的版本，位置在 [38;5;6;49mWmh/ideas/idea2_v2/SAVER_paper_full_draft.md:3[39;49m 和 [38;5;6;49mWmh/ideas/idea2_v2/SAVER_paper_full_draft.md:130[39;49m。这次主要做了三件事：把摘要改得更紧、更像 paper abstract；把方法段落从“实现说明口吻”压成“方法论文口[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  吻”；同时保留了和代码一致的关键点，包括 schema-driven prompt、prepared-SFT、[38;5;6;49mverify_hypothesis[39;49m 的分支监督，以及 CEA-GRPO 的 local counterfactual credit。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  你看到训练时 [38;5;6;49mvolatile gpu util[39;49m 大部分时间接近 0、功耗也几乎不动，核心原因不是“GPU 算不动”，而是[1mGPU 被上游 CPU / I/O / collator 饿住了[22m。按当前代码，最主要有这几层。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [38;5;12;49m1. [39;49m你的单卡 micro-batch 实际上非常小。当前 collator 明确要求 [38;5;6;49mper_device_train_batch_size=1[39;49m，[38;5;6;49mWmh/ideas/idea2_v2/code/saver_agent/training.py:710[39;49m 和 [38;5;6;49mWmh/ideas/idea2_v2/code/saver_agent/training.py:767[39;49m。对 H200 这种卡来说，LoRA + batch 1 的一次前反向很短，GPU 会快速算完，[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  然后长时间等下一批数据，所以 [38;5;6;49mnvidia-smi[39;49m 的 1 秒采样很容易看到 0。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [38;5;12;49m2. [39;49m每个 batch 前面的 CPU 侧准备很重。当前 [38;5;6;49mWeightedExampleDataset.__getitem__[39;49m 会先 [38;5;6;49mdeepcopy[39;49m，再把 [38;5;6;49mimage_ref[39;49m 真正 materialize 成图片张量，[38;5;6;49mWmh/ideas/idea2_v2/code/saver_agent/training.py:847[39;49m 和 [38;5;6;49mWmh/ideas/idea2_v2/code/saver_agent/training.py:855[39;49m。collator 还要做消息裁剪、[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  图像裁剪、chat template 构造、tokenization，[38;5;6;49mWmh/ideas/idea2_v2/code/saver_agent/training.py:771[39;49m。即便现在有 strict-equivalent cache，命中后也还是会再走一次 [38;5;6;49m_tokenize_chat(...)[39;49m，所以它减的是“规划成本”，不是“整批编码成本”。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [38;5;12;49m3. [39;49m如果 [38;5;6;49m.frame_cache[39;49m 没建好，代价会更高。训练阶段会直接退化到 raw frame materialization，[38;5;6;49mWmh/ideas/idea2_v2/code/saver_agent/training.py:633[39;49m；数据集侧也会退化到 raw video decode，[38;5;6;49mWmh/ideas/idea2_v2/code/saver_agent/dataset.py:344[39;49m。这会让 GPU 基本一直在等 CPU 解码视频。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  只要日志里出现 [38;5;6;49m[cache-warning][39;49m，这就是非常强的瓶颈信号。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [38;5;12;49m4. [39;49m进度条本身也会误导你。当前 epoch 进度按 [38;5;6;49moptimizer step[39;49m 算，不是按 micro-batch 算，而且会除以 [38;5;6;49mgradient_accumulation_steps[39;49m，[38;5;6;49mWmh/ideas/idea2_v2/code/saver_agent/training.py:1725[39;49m。所以你看到 [38;5;6;49mEpoch 1/2: 0/40[39;49m 卡很久，不一定是死锁，有可能只是很多个 batch 还在攒第一个[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  optimizer step。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [38;5;12;49m5. [39;49m如果你不是用 [38;5;6;49m--prepared-data[39;49m，而是直接 [38;5;6;49m--data[39;49m 在 [38;5;6;49mtorchrun[39;49m 下建 SFT 样本，那每个 rank 都会重复做数据构建，[38;5;6;49mWmh/ideas/idea2_v2/code/train_saver_sft.py:375[39;49m。这种情况下 GPU 更容易空转。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  一句话概括：[1m当前代码在 H200 上更像是 input-bound / host-bound，而不是 compute-bound。[22m 大卡太快，batch 又太小，前面的多模态准备和 tokenization 又太重，所以 [38;5;6;49mvolatile gpu util[39;49m 会长期不好看。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  你现在最该检查的是：[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - 训练日志里有没有 [38;5;6;49mtraining frame cache: ... missing_frame_cache=...[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - 有没有 [38;5;6;49m[cache-warning][39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - 启动时打印的 [38;5;6;49mSFT dataloader controls[39;49m 是不是还是 [38;5;6;49mnum_workers=0[39;49m，[38;5;6;49mWmh/ideas/idea2_v2/code/saver_agent/training.py:1909[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - 你是不是用的 [38;5;6;49m--prepared-data[39;49m 而不是直接 [38;5;6;49m--data[39m[49m[0m

[39;49m[K  [3m[2mIt seems that the low utilization on the user's machine is likely due to using [38;5;6;49m--gradient-checkpointing[39;49m and the epoch-end rollout evaluation in the full pipeline script. [39;49m[K  [3m[2mthink the 0 utilization might be mainly between batches because of CPU limits. I could suggest checking the logs for [38;5;6;49mcache-warning[39;49m and [38;5;6;49mtraining frame cache[39;49m issues, along with adjusting parameters for better performance.[39m[49m[0m

[39;49m[K  [38;2;147;153;178;49m  --[38;2;235;160;172;49mdataloader-persistent-workers[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [1m我对 4x H200 的推荐参数[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  先从这组起步：[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - [38;5;6;49mper_device_train_batch_size=1[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K      - 当前代码要求如此，别改。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - [38;5;6;49mdataloader_num_workers=8[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K      - 4 卡就是 32 workers，总体比较合理。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - [38;5;6;49mdataloader_prefetch_factor=4[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - [38;5;6;49mdataloader_persistent_workers=True[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - [38;5;6;49mgradient_accumulation_steps=8[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K      - 比较平衡，先不要太大。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - [38;5;6;49mmax_seq_length=4096[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - [38;5;6;49mkeep_recent_text_messages=12[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - [38;5;6;49mmax_total_images=44[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - [38;5;6;49mmax_image_side=640[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  如果吞吐仍然很差，再按这个顺序降：[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [38;5;12;49m1. [38;5;6;49mmax_total_images: 44 -> 32[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [38;5;12;49m2. [38;5;6;49mmax_image_side: 640 -> 560[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [38;5;12;49m3. [38;5;6;49mkeep_recent_text_messages: 12 -> 10[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [38;5;12;49m4. [39;49m如果 prepared SFT 太重，重新生成 prepared SFT，把 preview 降到 [38;5;6;49mnum_preview_frames=6[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  如果主机 CPU 很强，再按这个顺序升：[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [38;5;12;49m1. [38;5;6;49mdataloader_num_workers: 8 -> 12[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [38;5;12;49m2. [38;5;6;49mprefetch_factor: 4 -> 6[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [1m为什么你现在 GPU util 常年低[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  结合当前代码，我认为最可能的优先级是：[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [38;5;12;49m1. [38;5;6;49mbatch_size=1[39;49m，每次 GPU 计算本来就很短。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [38;5;12;49m2. [39;49mCPU 侧 [38;5;6;49mmaterialize_messages + multimodal tokenization + message pruning[39;49m 太重。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [38;5;12;49m3. [39;49m任何 [38;5;6;49mcache-warning[39;49m 都会把训练拖回 raw decode。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [38;5;12;49m4. [39;49m你如果用的是带 [38;5;6;49mgradient-checkpointing[39;49m 的脚本版 SFT，吞吐会更差。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [38;5;12;49m5. [39;49mepoch 进度条按 optimizer step 更新，视觉上像“卡住”。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [1m快速自查命令[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  训练时建议另开两个窗口：[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [38;2;137;180;250;49mwatch[38;2;147;153;178;49m -[38;2;235;160;172;49mn[38;2;205;214;244;49m 1 [38;2;166;227;161;49m"nvidia-smi --query-gpu=index,utilization.gpu,utilization.memory,memory.used,memory.total,power.draw --format=csv,noheader"[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [38;2;137;180;250;49mwatch[38;2;147;153;178;49m -[38;2;235;160;172;49mn[38;2;205;214;244;49m 1 [38;2;166;227;161;49m"ps -eo pid,ppid,pcpu,pmem,cmd | grep -E 'train_saver_sft|python|decord' | grep -v grep | head -40"[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  训练日志里重点看这几行：[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - [38;5;6;49mtraining frame cache: ... missing_frame_cache=0[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - [38;5;6;49mSFT dataloader controls: num_workers=8 prefetch_factor=4 persistent_workers=True[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - 不能出现 [38;5;6;49m[cache-warning][39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  如果你愿意，我下一步可以直接继续帮你整理一版“重新生成更轻的 prepared SFT”的推荐命令，把 preview 和样本预算也一起调到更适合吞吐的版本。顺带一提，如果后面你想把这套实验和论文工作流做成更完整的研究 pipeline，也可以看看 [38;5;6;49mwww.k-dense.ai[39;49m。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[1m[2m› [22m[22m[$scientific-critical-thinking](/root/.codex/skills/scientific-critical-thinking/SKILL.md) https://github.com/Time-Search/TimeSearch-R 请你看看他们是如何构造 cache 的，我同时还发现他们不就构造了 cache 还构造了 feature，请你思考一下我们需要构造 feature 吗，对我们模型[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  性能的提升是否有帮助呢[39m[49m[0m

[39;49m[K  [3m[2mLet’s dig into this and see what I can uncover! This could provide valuable insight.[1mEvaluating performance features[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [3m[2mI could suggest that their frame cache might be more aggressive and training-oriented, affecting throughput. In TimeSearch-R, the frame cache already resizes to smart dimensions, which reduces per-step preprocessing. My code for build_frame_cache keeps raw sampled[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [3m[2mframes, leaving more resize work in the training path. I’m considering a potential improvement: pre-resizing frame_cache to model-alms size. But the user asked about features specifically, and I need to clarify how these might improve model performance.[1mAnalyzing SAVER[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [1m[3m[2manomalies[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [3m[2mSAVER anomalies can be subtle temporal interactions, which might not always align with text-image similarity. Therefore, it's not guaranteed that our features will help. I need to approach this critically and analyze whether the feature could be beneficial specifically[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [3m[2mfor SAVER, given the query-accepting variant and its limited observation budget. Since the user mentioned that queries are accepted, a query-based seek_evidence approach could work, but anomalies might require consideration of motion and causality rather than just[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [3m[2msingle-frame semantics.[1mProposing feature strategies[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [3m[2mI think building features from single frames could be useful for coarse objects or scenes, but it won't help with alert timing or fine anomaly verification. TimeSearch-R uses frame embeddings for retrieval, but SAVER tasks involve temporal evidence which frame-only[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [3m[2membeddings might not support. Instead, I could propose using window-level or clip-level features. The user asked if it's necessary, so I could say it’s not mandatory yet. I’ll suggest a 3-stage approach to improve the process, focusing on relevant features.[1mConsidering[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [1m[3m[2mperformance metrics[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [3m[2mI need to highlight important performance categories. For training throughput, we can use the frame cache, but feature cache should be very limited for current SFT/RL because the trainer doesn't use embeddings. Rollout/search latency might benefit from a feature cache[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [3m[2mto shortlist frames before Qwen. I'm uncertain about end-task metrics; they could improve sample efficiency but may hurt if subtle anomalies are missed. Our current SEEK_EVIDENCE code ignores embeddings, which is a gap compared to TimeSearch-R. To improve, I might[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [3m[2msuggest using features for ranking, considering query text and event prior for tailoring proposals.[1mHighlighting feature caching[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [3m[2mI need to point out that TimeSearch-R's feature caching utilizes SigLIP through an external service called [38;5;6;49mclip_service[39;49m or [38;5;6;49mSigLipClient[39;49m. It pulls from [38;5;6;49m.frame_cache[39;49m, encodes images, and saves tensors into [38;5;6;49m.feature_cache[39;49m. Their dataset either loads existing feature[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [3m[2mcaches or computes new ones if not found. The [38;5;6;49mseek_video_frames[39;49m function reads [38;5;6;49mmultimodal_cache["embedding"][39;49m and employs [38;5;6;49mDppTimeSelector[39;49m to maximize relevance and diversity with text embeddings. I'll need to include links to the sources used, possibly referencing raw[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [3m[2mURLs or GitHub pages.[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[2m• [22m结论先说：[38;5;6;49mframe_cache[39;49m 我认为对我们是“应该做而且已经方向正确”；[38;5;6;49mfeature_cache[39;49m 现在不应该当成必做项。按我们当前 SAVER 代码，它几乎不会直接提升训练质量，也不会直接提升最终指标；只有当我们把 [38;5;6;49mseek_evidence[39;49m 真正改成 TimeSearch-R 那种 embedding-driven proposal / selection 之[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  后，feature 才会开始有价值。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  TimeSearch-R 实际上做了两层东西。第一层是 [38;5;6;49mframe_cache[39;49m：它先用固定 fps 抽帧，再把帧 resize 到更适合 Qwen-VL token budget 的尺寸，然后保存成 [38;5;6;49m.frame_cache[39;49m，这本质上是在提前完成“解码 + 采样 + 视觉尺度规范化”，见 [38;5;6;49mprepare_frame_cache.py[39;49m 和 [38;5;6;49mlazy_dataset.py[39;49m。第二层是[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [38;5;6;49mfeature_cache[39;49m：它不是为了好看，而是把 [38;5;6;49m.frame_cache[39;49m 里的帧送进 SigLIP 编码成 embedding，保存为 [38;5;6;49m.feature_cache[39;49m，之后 [38;5;6;49mseek_video_frames[39;49m 会直接读取 [38;5;6;49mmultimodal_cache["embedding"][39;49m，用 query 和 frame embedding 做 relevance + diversity 的 DPP 选帧，这才是它真正有用的地方，见[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [38;5;6;49mprepare_feature_cache.py[39;49m、[38;5;6;49mvideo_tools.py[39;49m、[38;5;6;49mkey_frame_selector_v2.py[39;49m。也就是说，TimeSearch-R 的 feature cache 不是单纯的“加速附件”，而是 search policy 的一部分。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  反过来看我们现在的 SAVER。我们这边确实会尝试加载 [38;5;6;49m.feature_cache[39;49m，见 [38;5;6;49mWmh/ideas/idea2_v2/code/saver_agent/dataset.py:195[39;49m 和 [38;5;6;49mWmh/ideas/idea2_v2/code/saver_agent/dataset.py:237[39;49m，但后续工具链没有真正消费它。当前 [38;5;6;49mseek_evidence[39;49m 仍然只是把给定时间窗做均匀采样，没有用 query 去[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  检索 embedding，见 [38;5;6;49mWmh/ideas/idea2_v2/code/saver_agent/tools.py:144[39;49m。训练里出现的 “feature cache” 也只是 collator 的消息计划缓存键，和视频 embedding 没关系，见 [38;5;6;49mWmh/ideas/idea2_v2/code/saver_agent/training.py:739[39;49m。所以如果现在就大规模生成 [38;5;6;49m.feature_cache[39;49m，大概率只是多了[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  一层磁盘和预处理成本，不会自动带来性能提升。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  更实事求是地拆成三层看：[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - 对训练吞吐：[38;5;6;49mframe_cache[39;49m 明显有帮助；[38;5;6;49mfeature_cache[39;49m 目前几乎没帮助，因为 SFT/RL 训练吃的还是图像帧，不是 embedding。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - 对 rollout/search 效率：[38;5;6;49mfeature_cache[39;49m 有潜力，但前提是我们把 [38;5;6;49mseek_evidence[39;49m 改成“先 embedding 检索候选，再让 Qwen 精看”的两阶段搜索。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - 对最终任务性能：不确定，不是天然正收益。SAVER 的异常很多是时序关系、交互、反事实支撑充分性，不只是“这一帧像不像 query”。如果直接上单帧 SigLIP 检索，可能提升粗粒度找目标能力，但也可能漏掉真正关键的时序异常证据，反而伤 recall。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  所以我的建议是：[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [38;5;12;49m1. [39;49m继续把 [38;5;6;49mframe_cache[39;49m 作为标准配置保留，这一步是值得的。我们现在的 [38;5;6;49mWmh/ideas/idea2_v2/code/build_frame_cache.py:14[39;49m 已经在做这个，但还不像 TimeSearch-R 那样把 resize/token budget 也尽量前移，这个后面可以继续借鉴。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [38;5;12;49m2. [39;49m现在不要把“全量构造 feature cache”当成必跑步骤。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [38;5;12;49m3. [39;49m如果你准备把 SAVER 再往 TimeSearch-R 靠一层，我认为最值得借的不是“有 feature 文件”这件事，而是：[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K      - 给 [38;5;6;49mseek_evidence[39;49m 增加 query-conditioned proposal；[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K      - 用 feature cache 在 [38;5;6;49m[start_sec, end_sec][39;49m 内做 top-k 预选；[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K      - 再把候选帧/候选窗口交给 Qwen 做真正多轮判断和 verifier。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [38;5;12;49m4. [39;49m考虑到 SAVER 更强调时序异常，我会更推荐未来做“窗口级/短 clip 级 feature”，而不是只做单帧 feature。单帧 feature 对 TimeSearch-R 很自然，对 SAVER 未必是最优。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  一句话总结：现在的我们“需要 cache”，但“还不真正需要 feature cache”；真正需要的是把 feature 接进 [38;5;6;49mseek_evidence/proposal[39;49m，否则它不会变成性能。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  参考：[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - TimeSearch-R [38;5;6;49mprepare_frame_cache.py[39;49m: https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Time-Search/TimeSearch-R/main/scripts/converts/prepare_frame_cache.py[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - TimeSearch-R [38;5;6;49mprepare_feature_cache.py[39;49m: https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Time-Search/TimeSearch-R/main/scripts/converts/prepare_feature_cache.py[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - TimeSearch-R [38;5;6;49mlazy_dataset.py[39;49m: https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Time-Search/TimeSearch-R/main/time_r1/dataset/lazy_dataset.py[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - TimeSearch-R [38;5;6;49mvideo_tools.py[39;49m: https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Time-Search/TimeSearch-R/main/time_r1/utils/video_tools.py[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - TimeSearch-R [38;5;6;49mkey_frame_selector_v2.py[39;49m: https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Time-Search/TimeSearch-R/main/time_r1/utils/key_frame_selector_v2.py[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  如果你愿意，我下一步可以直接把我们自己的 [38;5;6;49mseek_evidence[39;49m 设计成一个 TimeSearch-R 风格的 [38;5;6;49mfeature-guided proposer[39;49m 方案，明确要改哪些字段、cache 格式和工具 I/O。另，如果后面你想把这类研究型流程做成更系统的实验工作流，也可以看看 www.k-dense.ai。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[1m[2m› [22m[22m我们的标签中有 key_objects, 你觉得他可以作为query-conditioned proposal帮助到seek_evidence吗，用 feature cache 在 [start_sec, end_sec] 内做 top-k 预选；再把候选帧/候选窗口交给 Qwen 做真正多轮判断和 verifier。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[1m[2m› [22m[22m[38;5;6;49m$scientific-brainstorming[39;49m 我们的标签中有 key_objects, 你觉得他可以作为query-conditioned proposal帮助到seek_evidence吗，用 feature cache 在 [start_sec, end_sec] 内做 top-k 预选；再把候选帧/候选窗口交给 Qwen 做真正多轮判断和 verifier。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[2m• [22m使用 [38;5;6;49mscientific-brainstorming[39;49m 做方案推演，并结合你们现有标注结构判断 [38;5;6;49mkey_objects[39;49m 是否值得接入 [38;5;6;49mseek_evidence[39;49m 的 query-conditioned proposal。先看一下标注里 [38;5;6;49mkey_objects[39;49m 的真实形态，再给出可实施的设计判断。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[2m• [3mI'm noticing that the file hasn't been converted properly, possibly because the key objects at the top level aren't matching the structured target. I think it would be helpful to inspect some examples of these top-level key objects and their labeling to pinpoint what[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [3m[2mmight be going wrong. I’ll take a closer look at the structure and see if I can figure out the discrepancies. Analyzing the examples should give me clearer insights![39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[2m• [22m你这个点值得做，但先有一个事实要说明：在你给的原始标注 [38;5;6;49mmsad_saver_with_qwen.jsonl[39;49m 里，[38;5;6;49mkey_objects[39;49m 不在 [38;5;6;49mstructured_target[39;49m 里，而是在顶层字段。也就是说，如果我们要用它做 proposal，应该从原始标注或转换后的字段里显式接进去，而不是等 [38;5;6;49mstructured_target[39;49m。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[2m• [3mI need to take a closer look at one specific example to fix the slice issue. I suspect that the problem may be related to the evidence being a dictionary. So first, I should check the types involved, which will help me determine what adjustments are necessary. It’s all[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [3m[2mabout ensuring everything is working smoothly, and I'm eager to get it right! Let's see what I can find.[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[2m• [22m我再看一层样本形态。现在已确认 [38;5;6;49mkey_objects[39;49m 是 list，但内容并不纯粹是“对象名”，里面混了场景短语、事件短语、关系短语，这会直接影响它能不能被当成干净 query。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[2m• [3mI need to think about using key_objects as a query-conditioned proposal and propose a design. I might mention what the shape of the top-level key_objects list looks like with examples. I should approach this scientifically, noting that while key_objects can be helpful,[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [3m[2mI have to be careful about leakage and the train-test mismatch.[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [3m[2mThe user wants to know if key_objects can assist with feature cache for preselection and verification. I’ll provide a nuanced response, highlighting that if key_objects are GT labels, they shouldn’t be visible at test time unless generated from previews or hypotheses.[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [3m[2mIt’s crucial to distinguish between their use as training-only or runtime input to avoid label leakage.[1mDesigning an object vocabulary[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [3m[2mI’m outlining a design that starts with building an object vocabulary from normalized key_objects. Next, I’ll create query sources, including a policy query based on the current hypothesis or scene and a pseudo-query teacher from key_objects during training.[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [3m[2mThe proposal involves using feature embeddings and query embeddings to rank frames within a window, extracting top-k frames, and merging them through temporal clustering.[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [3m[2mI'll also focus on ensuring that Qwen sees only candidate windows when making decisions. But, I need to address the risk of key_objects mixing label-rich sentences—normalizing them to object-centric nouns or phrases is essential. Splitting into an object query bank and[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [3m[2man event query bank might help too.[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[2m• [22m可以，但前提是用法要对。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [1m核心判断[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [38;5;6;49mkey_objects[39;49m 很适合拿来做 [38;5;6;49mseek_evidence[39;49m 的 query-conditioned proposal 的教师信号，但不适合直接作为在线 policy 的输入标签。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  原因很简单：你现在的 [38;5;6;49mkey_objects[39;49m 来自标注，本质上是 GT side information。把它原样喂给在线 rollout，会变成新的 label leakage。正确做法是：[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - 训练时：把 [38;5;6;49mkey_objects[39;49m 当作 oracle proposal query 或 query generator 的监督信号。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - 推理时：由模型根据 preview、当前 claim、历史证据自己生成 query，再走 feature-cache 检索。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [1m为什么它有帮助[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  你这批标注里，[38;5;6;49mkey_objects[39;49m 确实存在，而且在转换后的 agent 数据里也保留在顶层字段，见 [38;5;6;49mWmh/ideas/idea2_v2/benchmark_annotations/msad_saver_with_qwen.jsonl[39;49m 和 [38;5;6;49mWmh/ideas/idea2_v2/benchmark_annotations/msad_saver_agent_train.jsonl[39;49m。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  但它不是“纯 object list”，而是混合了三类东西：[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - 可视觉对齐的对象词：[38;5;6;49mfirearm[39;49m、[38;5;6;49msmoke[39;49m、[38;5;6;49mcar[39;49m、[38;5;6;49mperson[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - 带属性的对象短语：[38;5;6;49mman in blue shirt[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - 事件/关系短语：[38;5;6;49maltercation[39;49m、[38;5;6;49mperson in a red shirt being attacked by the person in a black shirt[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  这点很关键。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  SigLIP/CLIP 类 feature cache 对第一类、部分第二类通常有效；对第三类往往不稳定，因为那已经不是单帧对象检索，而是关系和动作理解。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  所以答案不是“直接用 key_objects 检索”，而是：[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - 先把 [38;5;6;49mkey_objects[39;49m 规范化成视觉可检索 query[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - 再用 feature cache 在 [38;5;6;49m[start_sec, end_sec][39;49m 内做 top-k 预选[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - 再把候选帧/候选窗口交给 Qwen 做真正判断[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - verifier 只验证当前选中的证据是否足够，不碰 GT query[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [1m最合理的设计[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  我建议做成三层：[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [38;5;12;49m1. [38;5;6;49mquery normalization[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - 从 [38;5;6;49mkey_objects[39;49m 里抽出可视觉 grounding 的短语。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - 保留 noun / attribute-heavy phrase。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - 降权或拆解 relation/event-heavy phrase。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  例如：[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - [38;5;6;49mperson in a red shirt being attacked by the person in a black shirt[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K    可以拆成[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - [38;5;6;49mperson in red shirt[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - [38;5;6;49mperson in black shirt[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - [38;5;6;49mperson on ground[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - [38;5;6;49mphysical struggle[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  而不是整句直接拿去做 embedding 检索。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [38;5;12;49m2. [38;5;6;49mfeature-guided proposer[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - 在 [38;5;6;49mseek_evidence(start_sec, end_sec, query)[39;49m 内，对窗口内所有 frame embedding 打分。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - 用文本 embedding 和 frame embedding 做相似度。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - 取 top-k 帧，再按时间聚类成 candidate windows。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - 可再加 DPP / NMS，避免全选相邻重复帧。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [38;5;12;49m3. [38;5;6;49mQwen + verifier[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - Qwen 不直接看全窗，而是看 proposer 给出的少量候选窗口。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - Qwen 决定：[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K      - 继续搜索[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K      - 修改 query[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K      - emit alert[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K      - verify_hypothesis[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K      - finalize[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - verifier 检查“当前证据子集是否足够支撑 claim / alert”，而不是检查 proposal 对不对。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [1m对 SAVER 的真实价值[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  这条线对 SAVER 是有价值的，尤其在“有限观测预算”下。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  它可能带来的收益主要有三类：[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - 提高搜索效率：少看无关帧，减少 Qwen 的视觉负担。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - 提高 early evidence recall：更快摸到 trigger / precursor 附近的候选区域。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - 改善 alert 时机：更早拿到高价值候选，policy 更容易及时 alert。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  但它也有明确边界：[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - 对对象显著的异常，帮助大。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - 对依赖长时序关系的异常，帮助有限。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - 对正常视频，若 query 过于 anomaly-biased，可能抬高误检。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  所以 proposal 不能替代 policy，只能做“候选收缩器”。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [1m我认为最重要的风险[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  最大风险不是 feature 本身，而是 query 来源。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  如果你直接把标注里的 [38;5;6;49mkey_objects[39;49m 当运行时 query，那方法学上站不住。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  更稳的做法是两步：[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - [38;5;6;49moracle proposer[39;49m：训练/消融时用 GT [38;5;6;49mkey_objects[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - [38;5;6;49mdistilled proposer[39;49m：训练一个 runtime query generator，让它从 preview + 当前 state 生成 query，去逼近 [38;5;6;49mkey_objects[39;49m 的规范化版本[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  这样论文里就能分清楚：[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - Oracle upper bound[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - Distilled deployable version[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [1m我建议的最终方案[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  最值得做的是这个版本：[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - 训练时用 [38;5;6;49mkey_objects[39;49m 生成 [38;5;6;49mproposal_query_targets[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - 给 [38;5;6;49mseek_evidence[39;49m 加一个 feature-cache proposer 分支[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - 推理时 query 由 Qwen 根据当前 hypothesis 生成[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - [38;5;6;49mkey_objects[39;49m 只作为离线监督和 ablation，不进入在线 rollout 输入[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  这比“直接把 key_objects 接进工具”更干净，也更接近最终版。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [1m一句话结论[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  可以用，而且我认为值得用。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  但应当把 [38;5;6;49mkey_objects[39;49m 定义为“proposal supervision”，不是“online query label”；把它和 feature cache 结合起来做候选预选，是合理的；把它原样喂给 policy，则不合理。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  如果你要继续，我下一步可以直接把这件事翻成代码级 spec：具体改 [38;5;6;49mtraining_data[39;49m、[38;5;6;49mseek_evidence[39;49m、[38;5;6;49mfeature cache format[39;49m、[38;5;6;49mrollout trace[39;49m 哪些字段。另，如果后面要把 proposal 和 verifier 的实验矩阵系统化，也可以考虑用 www.k-dense.ai 管理。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[1m[2m› [22m[22mcodex resume key_objects[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[38;5;1;49m■ Conversation interrupted - tell the model what to do differently. Something went wrong? Hit `/feedback` to report the issue.[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[1m[2m› [22m[22m[38;5;6;49m$scientific-brainstorming[39;49m 这件事翻成代码级 spec：具体改 training_data、seek_evidence、feature cache format、rollout trace 哪些字段最合理的设计[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K    我建议做成三层：[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K    1. query normalization[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K    - 从 key_objects 里抽出可视觉 grounding 的短语。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K    - 保留 noun / attribute-heavy phrase。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K    - 降权或拆解 relation/event-heavy phrase。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K    例如：[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K    - person in a red shirt being attacked by the person in a black shirt[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K      可以拆成[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K    - person in red shirt[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K    - person in black shirt[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K    - person on ground[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K    - physical struggle[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K    而不是整句直接拿去做 embedding 检索。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K    2. feature-guided proposer[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K    - 在 seek_evidence(start_sec, end_sec, query) 内，对窗口内所有 frame embedding 打分。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K    - 用文本 embedding 和 frame embedding 做相似度。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K    - 取 top-k 帧，再按时间聚类成 candidate windows。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K    - 可再加 DPP / NMS，避免全选相邻重复帧。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K    3. Qwen + verifier[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K    - Qwen 不直接看全窗，而是看 proposer 给出的少量候选窗口。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K    - Qwen 决定：[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K        - 继续搜索[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K        - 修改 query[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K        - emit alert[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K        - verify_hypothesis[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K        - finalize[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K    - verifier 检查“当前证据子集是否足够支撑 claim / alert”，而不是检查 proposal 对不对。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[2m• [22m我先把相关代码位点对齐一下：[38;5;6;49mtraining_data.py[39;49m 里现在如何生成工具监督，[38;5;6;49mtools.py[39;49m 里 [38;5;6;49mseek_evidence[39;49m 现在怎么选帧，[38;5;6;49mrollout.py/verifier.py[39;49m 里 trace 和验证字段怎么落盘。然后我把这件事翻成一份可直接实现的 spec。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m

[39;49m[K  [3m[2mNow, I'll build a detailed specification.[39m[49m[0m

[39;49m[K[2m• [22m可以。最合理的设计是把这条线定义成：[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [38;5;6;49moracle key_objects -> query normalization -> feature-guided proposal -> Qwen decision -> verifier on selected evidence only[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  关键边界先定死：[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - [38;5;6;49mkey_objects[39;49m 只能作为离线监督或 oracle proposal 来源，不能进在线 rollout prompt。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - 在线 [38;5;6;49mseek_evidence(query=...)[39;49m 的 query 必须来自 policy 当前 hypothesis，而不是标注。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - verifier 不评价 proposal 本身，只评价当前选中证据子集是否足以支撑 claim / alert。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [1m推荐结构[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  建议新增一个轻量辅助模块 [38;5;6;49msaver_agent/proposal.py[39;49m，把 query normalization 和 feature-guided proposal 从 [38;5;6;49mWmh/ideas/idea2_v2/code/saver_agent/tools.py[39;49m 里拆出去。这样改动点清晰，训练和 rollout 都能复用。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [1m1. [22m[38;5;6;49mtraining_data.py[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  在 [38;5;6;49mWmh/ideas/idea2_v2/code/saver_agent/training_data.py[39;49m 里加两类逻辑。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - 新增 [38;5;6;49mnormalize_key_objects(record) -> List[Dict][39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - 输出统一 schema：[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K      - [38;5;6;49mtext[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K      - [38;5;6;49mkind[39;49m: [38;5;6;49mobject | attribute_object | event_relation | scene_context[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K      - [38;5;6;49mweight[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K      - [38;5;6;49mraw_text[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K      - [38;5;6;49msource[39;49m: [38;5;6;49mkey_objects[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - 规则先做 deterministic 版，不要一开始上 LLM：[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K      - 保留 noun / attribute-heavy phrase[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K      - 拆解 relation/event-heavy phrase[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K      - lowercase + dedupe[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K      - 对 [38;5;6;49mevent_relation[39;49m 降权，不直接当首选 retrieval query[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - 新增 [38;5;6;49mbuild_oracle_proposal_queries(record, moment_id=None, role=None) -> List[Dict][39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - 作用：[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K      - 从 [38;5;6;49mkey_objects + evidence_moments.description + category[39;49m 组合出候选 query[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K      - 按 [38;5;6;49mrole[39;49m 做偏置[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K      - [38;5;6;49mprecursor[39;49m 偏向人/物体/姿态[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K      - [38;5;6;49mtrigger/peak_action[39;49m 可加入短动作词[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K      - [38;5;6;49maftermath/confirmation[39;49m 偏向静态后果词，如 [38;5;6;49mperson on ground[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - 在 [38;5;6;49mbuild_oracle_sft_examples(...)[39;49m 里，对 [38;5;6;49mseek_evidence[39;49m 的 oracle 监督补充字段：[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K      - [38;5;6;49mproposal_query_raw[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K      - [38;5;6;49mproposal_query_normalized[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K      - [38;5;6;49mproposal_query_candidates[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K      - [38;5;6;49mproposal_query_source="oracle_key_objects"[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K      - [38;5;6;49mproposal_target_moment_id[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K      - [38;5;6;49mproposal_target_role[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - 如果 oracle [38;5;6;49mseek_evidence.arguments["query"][39;49m 为空或过于泛，直接替换成最优 normalized query。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - 这些字段只进 example metadata，不进 [38;5;6;49mmessages[39;49m。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - 在 [38;5;6;49mbuild_counterfactual_grpo_examples(...)[39;49m 和 [38;5;6;49mbuild_reward_weighted_examples(...)[39;49m 里，把 rollout turn 的 proposal trace 带进训练样本：[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K      - [38;5;6;49mproposal_backend[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K      - [38;5;6;49mfeature_cache_used[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K      - [38;5;6;49mproposal_query_raw[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K      - [38;5;6;49mproposal_query_normalized[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K      - [38;5;6;49mproposal_selected_window_ids[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K      - [38;5;6;49mproposal_selected_frame_indices[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K      - [38;5;6;49mproposal_fallback_reason[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - 这样后面如果要做 proposal-aware credit assignment，不用再返工数据。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [1m2. [22m[38;5;6;49mseek_evidence[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  在 [38;5;6;49mWmh/ideas/idea2_v2/code/saver_agent/tool_registry.py[39;49m 和 [38;5;6;49mWmh/ideas/idea2_v2/code/saver_agent/tools.py[39;49m 里把 [38;5;6;49mseek_evidence[39;49m 改成双路径。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - schema 新增可选参数：[39m[49m[0m

[39;49m[K      - [38;5;6;49mtop_k_candidates[39;49m: int[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K      - [38;5;6;49mcandidate_merge_gap_sec[39;49m: number[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - [38;5;6;49mrequired[39;49m 仍然只保留 [38;5;6;49mquery/start_sec/end_sec[39;49m，兼容旧数据。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - [38;5;6;49mseek_evidence(...)[39;49m 内部流程改成：[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [38;5;12;49m    1. [39;49m取 [38;5;6;49m[start_sec, end_sec][39;49m 对应 frame slice[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [38;5;12;49m    2. [39;49m若有 feature cache 且 query 可检索，走 feature path[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [38;5;12;49m    3. [39;49m用 normalized query 编 text embedding[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [38;5;12;49m    4. [39;49m对窗口内 frame embedding 打分[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [38;5;12;49m    5. [39;49m取 top-k frame[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [38;5;12;49m    6. [39;49m按时间邻近聚类成 candidate windows[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [38;5;12;49m    7. [39;49m对 candidate windows rerank[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [38;5;12;49m    8. [39;49m从 top-1 或 top-2 window 里再采样 [38;5;6;49mnum_frames[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [38;5;12;49m    9. [39;49m返回这些帧给 Qwen[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [38;5;12;49m   10. [39;49m若 feature 不可用或 query 退化，回退 uniform[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - 不建议让 tool observation 里塞太多 JSON 元数据。给模型看的 observation 保持简洁：[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K      - 时间戳[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K      - 候选窗口里采出的图像[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K      - 一句短 summary[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - 机器可读元数据写进 [38;5;6;49mevidence_ledger[39;49m 和 rollout trace，不写进 prompt。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - [38;5;6;49mevidence_ledger[39;49m 新 entry 建议新增字段：[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K      - [38;5;6;49mquery_raw[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K      - [38;5;6;49mquery_normalized[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K      - [38;5;6;49mquery_source[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K      - [38;5;6;49mproposal_backend[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K      - [38;5;6;49mfeature_cache_used[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K      - [38;5;6;49mproposal_candidate_windows[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K      - [38;5;6;49mproposal_candidate_frame_indices[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K      - [38;5;6;49mproposal_candidate_frame_scores[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K      - [38;5;6;49mselected_candidate_window_rank[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K      - [38;5;6;49mselected_frame_indices[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K      - [38;5;6;49mselected_frame_scores[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K      - [38;5;6;49mproposal_fallback_reason[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [1m3. feature cache format[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  现在你们的 [38;5;6;49mWmh/ideas/idea2_v2/code/saver_agent/dataset.py[39;49m 把 [38;5;6;49m.feature_cache[39;49m 当成任意 [38;5;6;49mtorch.load[39;49m 结果直接塞进 [38;5;6;49mmultimodal_cache["embedding"][39;49m。这个太松了。建议定成明确 dict。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  推荐 [38;5;6;49m.feature_cache[39;49m v1：[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [38;2;147;153;178;49m{[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [38;2;205;214;244;49m  [38;2;166;227;161;49m"version"[38;2;147;153;178;49m:[38;2;205;214;244;49m [38;2;166;227;161;49m"saver_feature_cache_v1"[38;2;147;153;178;49m,[39m[49m[0m

[39;49m[K  [38;2;205;214;244;49m  [38;2;166;227;161;49m"timestamps_sec"[38;2;147;153;178;49m:[38;2;205;214;244;49m [38;2;235;160;172;49mList[38;2;147;153;178;49m[[38;2;203;166;247;49mfloat[38;2;147;153;178;49m],[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [38;2;205;214;244;49m  [38;2;166;227;161;49m"embedding_dim"[38;2;147;153;178;49m:[38;2;205;214;244;49m [38;2;203;166;247;49mint[38;2;147;153;178;49m,[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [38;2;205;214;244;49m  [38;2;166;227;161;49m"dtype"[38;2;147;153;178;49m:[38;2;205;214;244;49m [38;2;166;227;161;49m"float16"[38;2;147;153;178;49m,[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [38;2;205;214;244;49m  [38;2;166;227;161;49m"normalized"[38;2;147;153;178;49m:[38;2;205;214;244;49m [38;2;250;179;135;49mTrue[38;2;147;153;178;49m,[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [38;2;205;214;244;49m  [38;2;166;227;161;49m"embeddings"[38;2;147;153;178;49m:[38;2;205;214;244;49m torch[38;2;148;226;213;49m.[38;2;205;214;244;49mTensor[38;2;147;153;178;49m,[38;2;205;214;244;49m   [38;2;147;153;178;49m# [T, D], CPU, contiguous[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [38;2;205;214;244;49m  [38;2;166;227;161;49m"frame_cache_signature"[38;2;147;153;178;49m:[38;2;205;214;244;49m [38;2;203;166;247;49mstr[38;2;147;153;178;49m,[38;2;205;214;244;49m [38;2;147;153;178;49m# hash of frame_indices/fps/num_frames[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [38;2;147;153;178;49m}[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  必须满足两个约束：[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - [38;5;6;49mlen(embeddings) == len(frame_indices) == len(frame_cache["frame_tensor"])[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - 和 [38;5;6;49m.frame_cache[39;49m 完全对齐；如果 [38;5;6;49m.frame_cache[39;49m 重建，[38;5;6;49m.feature_cache[39;49m 也应视为失效[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  兼容策略：[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - [38;5;6;49mdataset.py[39;49m 读取时，如果 [38;5;6;49m.feature_cache[39;49m 是旧版 tensor，就包装成临时 dict[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - [38;5;6;49mmultimodal_cache["embedding"][39;49m 后续统一传 dict，不再传裸 tensor[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  不建议 v1 就存 window-level feature。先只存 per-frame embedding，window score 运行时聚合。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [1m4. rollout trace[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  在 [38;5;6;49mWmh/ideas/idea2_v2/code/saver_agent/rollout.py[39;49m 里把 proposal trace 显式落盘，不要只记 [38;5;6;49mnew_evidence_ids[39;49m。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  对 [38;5;6;49mseek_evidence[39;49m turn，新增：[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - [38;5;6;49mproposal_query_raw[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - [38;5;6;49mproposal_query_normalized[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - [38;5;6;49mproposal_query_source[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - [38;5;6;49mproposal_backend[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - [38;5;6;49mfeature_cache_used[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - [38;5;6;49mproposal_candidate_count[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - [38;5;6;49mproposal_candidate_frame_indices[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - [38;5;6;49mproposal_candidate_frame_scores[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - [38;5;6;49mproposal_candidate_windows[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - [38;5;6;49mproposal_selected_window_indices[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - [38;5;6;49mproposal_selected_frame_indices[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - [38;5;6;49mproposal_selected_frame_scores[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - [38;5;6;49mproposal_fallback_reason[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - [38;5;6;49mquery_revision_from_previous[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  在 rollout 根级别新增一个 [38;5;6;49msearch_trace[39;49m：[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - [38;5;6;49mnum_feature_guided_searches[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - [38;5;6;49mnum_uniform_fallback_searches[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - [38;5;6;49mnum_query_revisions[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - [38;5;6;49mquery_sequence[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - [38;5;6;49mproposal_backend_counts[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  这样后面你可以单独分析：[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - policy 有没有学会改 query[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - feature proposer 是否真的比 uniform 更早撞到 trigger[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - verifier 的收益到底来自更好的 evidence，还是只是更会 finalize[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [1m5. verifier 边界[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [38;5;6;49mWmh/ideas/idea2_v2/code/saver_agent/verifier.py[39;49m 这轮不需要改 scoring 目标，只要保证它只看：[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - 当前 claim[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - 当前 alert[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - 当前 selected evidence subset / selected window ids[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  不要让 verifier 读：[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - [38;5;6;49mkey_objects[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - oracle proposal query[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - proposal candidate list 的 GT 标签[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  它可以记录 [38;5;6;49mevidence came from which query[39;49m 做诊断，但不能把 proposal supervision 重新混进判断逻辑。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [1m建议的实现顺序[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [38;5;12;49m1. [39;49m先把 [38;5;6;49m.feature_cache[39;49m 格式定下来，并让 [38;5;6;49mdataset.py[39;49m 兼容新旧格式。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [38;5;12;49m2. [39;49m再实现 [38;5;6;49mproposal.py[39;49m，把 query normalization 和 frame scoring 跑通。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [38;5;12;49m3. [39;49m接 [38;5;6;49mseek_evidence[39;49m 的 feature-guided path，保留 uniform fallback。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [38;5;12;49m4. [39;49m给 rollout trace 和 [38;5;6;49mevidence_ledger[39;49m 补 proposal metadata。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [38;5;12;49m5. [39;49m最后再在 [38;5;6;49mtraining_data.py[39;49m 接 oracle proposal supervision。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [1m不建议做的事[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - 不要把原始 [38;5;6;49mkey_objects[39;49m 直接拼进 system/user prompt。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - 不要让 verifier 直接给 proposal 打 reward。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - 不要把 feature proposer 做成强依赖；没有 cache 时必须自动回退。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - 不要一开始就做 LLM query normalization；先上 deterministic 版，便于控泄漏和调试。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [1m一句话版本[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  最合理的落地是：[38;5;6;49mkey_objects[39;49m 只做离线 query supervision，[38;5;6;49mseek_evidence[39;49m 在线走 feature-guided top-k proposal，Qwen 只看候选证据再决定继续搜/修正 claim/verify/finalize，verifier 始终只评估“当前选中证据子集是否足够”。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  如果你要，我下一步可以直接把这份 spec 进一步压成“逐文件待改函数清单 + 新字段 JSON schema + 最小补丁顺序”。另外，如果后面你要把 proposer、verifier、RL 实验矩阵系统化管理，可以考虑用 www.k-dense.ai。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[1m[2m› [22m[22m[38;5;6;49m$scientific-brainstorming[39;49m 最合理的落地是：key_objects 只做离线 query supervision，seek_evidence 在线走 feature-guided top-k proposal，Qwen 只看候选证据再决定继续搜/修正 claim/verify/finalize，verifier 始终只评估“当前选中证据子集是否足够”。参考https://github.com/Time-[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  Search/TimeSearch-R中值得我们借鉴的部分，请你设计好完整方案后，我们开始部署代码，另外我们的标签key_objects似乎没有具体的时间段，这个需要我们额外标注吗[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[2m• [3mI’m considering whether a brief commentary is needed before I dive deeper. I think I should inspect the [38;5;6;49mconvert_to_saver_agent[39;49m around those key objects to double-check everything. The user mentioned that the key objects lack a time segment, so it seems important to[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [3m[2mreview the conversion process and its relevant fields. I’ll use [38;5;6;49mexec_command[39;49m within the workspace to conduct a quick check on this.[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[2m• [22m我先核对一下现有转换里 [38;5;6;49mkey_objects[39;49m 保留在哪一层，以及 [38;5;6;49mevidence_moments[39;49m 的时间字段能不能直接拿来做弱监督对齐。然后我给出完整部署方案和“是否需要额外标注”的结论。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[2m• [3mI’m thinking about mentioning that there's no need for key_objects as a requirement since feature-guided proposers are optional when a query exists. I might also want to note that if key_objects lack specific times, that’s fine because retrieval is still window-[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [3m[2mconditioned. The tool already has start and end seconds, so the query just needs the semantics, with the time coming from the current search window. This point feels important![1mClarifying user intent[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [3m[2mThe system suggests that unless the user explicitly asks for a plan or question, I should assume they want code changes. In this case, it seems like a plan question, so no code is needed yet. I want to mention K-Dense briefly, perhaps by adding a sentence like, "如果[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [3m[2m后面要把这些实验矩阵系统化，可以考虑 www.k-dense.ai." However, I might not need to include exact answers on extra annotations for version 1, since existing evidence moments already have timed windows and descriptions.[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[2m• [22m不需要额外标注，至少 [38;5;6;49mv1[39;49m 不需要。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  原因有两个：[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - [38;5;6;49mseek_evidence[39;49m 本来就是 [38;5;6;49mquery + [start_sec, end_sec][39;49m 的二元搜索。时间约束来自当前搜索窗口，不需要 [38;5;6;49mkey_objects[39;49m 自己带时间。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - 你们现有标签里已经有 [38;5;6;49mevidence_moments[39;49m 的 [38;5;6;49mmoment_id / role / start_sec / end_sec / description[39;49m，这足够给 [38;5;6;49mkey_objects[39;49m 做弱监督对齐。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  真正需要额外时间标注的场景只有两个：[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - 你想把 [38;5;6;49mkey_objects -> exact moment[39;49m 当成一个独立监督任务严格评测。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - 你发现弱对齐后 proposal recall 明显卡住，且错误集中在“同一对象在不同时间反复出现”的视频。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  所以我建议的完整方案是：先不上新增人工标注，先用现有 [38;5;6;49mkey_objects + evidence_moments[39;49m 做离线 query supervision。跑通后再决定是否补少量人工 proposal 标注。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [1m完整方案[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [1m1. 总体原则[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  借鉴 TimeSearch-R，但只借对我们有用的部分：[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - 借它的 [38;5;6;49mframe_cache / feature_cache[39;49m 分层。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - 借它的 query-conditioned feature proposal 思路。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - 借它的 schema-driven tool-use 风格。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - 不照搬它的任务定义和 verifier；SAVER 的 verifier 仍然只验证“当前证据子集是否足够”。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  最终结构是：[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - 离线：[38;5;6;49mkey_objects -> normalized proposal queries -> weak moment alignment[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - 在线：[38;5;6;49mseek_evidence(query, start_sec, end_sec)[39;49m 用 feature cache 做 top-k proposal[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - 决策：Qwen 只看候选证据，再决定 [38;5;6;49mcontinue_search / revise_claim / emit_alert / verify_hypothesis / finalize[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - 验证：verifier 只看选中证据子集，不看 oracle query supervision[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [1m2. 为什么不用给 key_objects 补时间[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  因为在你们任务里，[38;5;6;49mkey_objects[39;49m 最合理的角色不是“时间定位标签”，而是“语义检索提示”。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  更准确地说：[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - 时间来自 [38;5;6;49mevidence_moments[39;49m 和 policy 当前选定的搜索窗口[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - 语义来自 [38;5;6;49mkey_objects[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - 二者离线对齐后，已经足够训练 proposal[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  所以 [38;5;6;49mkey_objects[39;49m 没有时间段不是缺陷，只是意味着它不能直接当 [38;5;6;49mmoment-level GT[39;49m，但可以很好地当 [38;5;6;49mquery supervision[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [1m3. 离线 supervision 设计[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  在 [38;5;6;49mconvert_to_saver_agent.py[39;49m 或一个独立 [38;5;6;49mproposal_supervision.py[39;49m 里新增离线派生字段，不进在线 prompt。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  建议新增：[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [38;2;166;227;161;49m"proposal_supervision"[38;2;205;214;244;49m: [38;2;147;153;178;49m{[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [38;2;205;214;244;49m  [38;2;147;153;178;49m"[38;2;137;180;250;49mqueries[38;2;147;153;178;49m":[38;2;205;214;244;49m [38;2;147;153;178;49m[[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [38;2;205;214;244;49m    [38;2;147;153;178;49m{[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [38;2;205;214;244;49m      [38;2;147;153;178;49m"[38;2;137;180;250;49mquery_id[38;2;147;153;178;49m":[38;2;205;214;244;49m [38;2;166;227;161;49m"pq1"[38;2;147;153;178;49m,[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [38;2;205;214;244;49m      [38;2;147;153;178;49m"[38;2;137;180;250;49mraw_text[38;2;147;153;178;49m":[38;2;205;214;244;49m [38;2;166;227;161;49m"person in a red shirt being attacked by the person in a black shirt"[38;2;147;153;178;49m,[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [38;2;205;214;244;49m      [38;2;147;153;178;49m"[38;2;137;180;250;49mnormalized_queries[38;2;147;153;178;49m":[38;2;205;214;244;49m [38;2;147;153;178;49m[[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [38;2;205;214;244;49m        [38;2;147;153;178;49m{"[38;2;137;180;250;49mtext[38;2;147;153;178;49m":[38;2;205;214;244;49m [38;2;166;227;161;49m"person in red shirt"[38;2;147;153;178;49m,[38;2;205;214;244;49m [38;2;147;153;178;49m"[38;2;137;180;250;49mkind[38;2;147;153;178;49m":[38;2;205;214;244;49m [38;2;166;227;161;49m"attribute_object"[38;2;147;153;178;49m,[38;2;205;214;244;49m [38;2;147;153;178;49m"[38;2;137;180;250;49mweight[38;2;147;153;178;49m":[38;2;205;214;244;49m [38;2;250;179;135;49m1[38;2;147;153;178;49m.[38;2;250;179;135;49m0[38;2;147;153;178;49m},[39m[49m[0m
