[39;49m[K  [3m[2mclearer understanding of how it works and what key points I should highlight when presenting it. Let’s make sure I clarify this well![39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[2m• [22m下面我按最细的方式讲。你可以把当前代码理解成 4 层：[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [38;5;12;49m1. [39;49m数据层：把一条视频标注变成 agent 任务[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [38;5;12;49m2. [39;49m感知层：把视频变成可快速读取的帧和特征[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [38;5;12;49m3. [39;49m交互层：让 Qwen 一轮一轮决定“下一步做什么”[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [38;5;12;49m4. [39;49m训练层：先 SFT 学协议，再用 rollout + score 做 CEA-GRPO[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  我会一直用 [38;5;6;49mAssault_1[39;49m 这个真实样本来讲。相关入口主要在 [38;5;6;49mWmh/ideas/idea2_v2/code/README.md[39;49m、[38;5;6;49mWmh/ideas/idea2_v2/code/saver_agent/dataset.py[39;49m、[38;5;6;49mWmh/ideas/idea2_v2/code/saver_agent/rollout.py[39;49m、[38;5;6;49mWmh/ideas/idea2_v2/code/saver_agent/tools.py[39;49m、[38;5;6;49mWmh/ideas/idea2_v2/code/saver_agent/[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [38;5;6;49mtraining_data.py:415[39;49m、[38;5;6;49mWmh/ideas/idea2_v2/code/saver_agent/training_data.py:847[39;49m。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [1m一、先把所有名词翻成人话[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [38;5;6;49mpolicy[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  当前“做决策的模型”。在代码里，policy 不是单纯的底层 Qwen 权重，而是“Qwen 模型 + prompt 格式 + 图片输入方式 + 生成参数”这一整套决策器。它的职责只有一个：看当前上下文，输出下一步动作。实现是 [38;5;6;49mWmh/ideas/idea2_v2/code/saver_agent/qwen_policy.py[39;49m。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [38;5;6;49mpreview frames[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  开局先给模型看的少量代表帧。不是全视频，只是一个缩略版预览。代码会从已经缓存好的视频帧里，均匀抽几张出来，放进第一轮 user message。实现是 [38;5;6;49mWmh/ideas/idea2_v2/code/saver_agent/dataset.py:377[39;49m。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [38;5;6;49mmessages[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  给模型看的“对话历史”。里面有 [38;5;6;49msystem[39;49m、[38;5;6;49muser[39;49m、[38;5;6;49massistant[39;49m、[38;5;6;49mtool[39;49m 四种消息。模型每做一步，新的 assistant 消息和 tool 返回消息都会被加进去。它相当于模型的可见记忆。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [38;5;6;49mstate[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  环境内部的“结构化记账本”。模型看不到 Python 对象本身，但工具执行时会改它。比如已经看过哪些窗口、搜到了哪些证据、发过哪些 alert、做过哪些 verify、最终案子是否 finalized。定义在 [38;5;6;49mWmh/ideas/idea2_v2/code/saver_agent/schema.py[39;49m。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [38;5;6;49mmultimodal_cache[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  每条视频在运行时附带的一包数据。里面有视频帧、feature embedding、fps、duration、preview frames、structured target、tool schema 等。你可以把它理解成“当前视频的运行时资源包”。构造在 [38;5;6;49mWmh/ideas/idea2_v2/code/saver_agent/dataset.py:196[39;49m。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [38;5;6;49mframe_cache[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  离线存好的视频帧缓存文件，路径通常是 [38;5;6;49mxxx.mp4.frame_cache[39;49m。里面存的是采样后的 [38;5;6;49mframe_tensor[39;49m、[38;5;6;49mframe_indices[39;49m、[38;5;6;49mfps[39;49m。作用是避免训练和 rollout 时反复解码原始视频。构建脚本是 [38;5;6;49mWmh/ideas/idea2_v2/code/build_frame_cache.py[39;49m。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [38;5;6;49mfeature_cache[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  离线存好的帧特征缓存文件，路径通常是 [38;5;6;49mxxx.mp4.feature_cache[39;49m。里面存的是每一帧的 embedding。作用是给 [38;5;6;49mseek_evidence(query=...)[39;49m 做快速 top-k proposal。构建脚本是 [38;5;6;49mWmh/ideas/idea2_v2/code/build_feature_cache.py[39;49m。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [38;5;6;49mquery[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  给 [38;5;6;49mseek_evidence[39;49m 用的文本搜索词，表示“我现在想找什么视觉证据”。例如 [38;5;6;49mperson in red shirt[39;49m、[38;5;6;49mphysical struggle[39;49m。它可能来自 oracle [38;5;6;49mkey_objects[39;49m，也可能来自模型自己生成。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [38;5;6;49mproposal[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  不是最终判断，只是“候选证据提议”。代码会拿 [38;5;6;49mquery[39;49m 去和 [38;5;6;49mfeature_cache[39;49m 做相似度匹配，先找出最相关的候选帧/候选窗口，再把这些候选真正喂给 Qwen 看。核心函数是 [38;5;6;49mWmh/ideas/idea2_v2/code/saver_agent/proposal.py:349[39;49m。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [38;5;6;49mtool observation[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  工具执行完后返回给模型看的内容。通常是“若干时间戳 + 若干图像 + 一段提醒文本”。模型下一轮就是根据这个 observation 决定要继续 search、verify 还是 finalize。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [38;5;6;49mrollout[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  模型在一条视频上完整跑一局的过程。也就是：开局看 preview，输出一步，环境执行，再输出一步，直到 [38;5;6;49m<answer>[39;49m 或达到 [38;5;6;49mmax_turns[39;49m。实现是 [38;5;6;49mWmh/ideas/idea2_v2/code/saver_agent/rollout.py:54[39;49m。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [38;5;6;49mverifier[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  不是“最后答案对不对”的普通分类器，而是检查“当前选中的证据子集，是否足以支撑当前 claim / alert”。它会输出 [38;5;6;49mcomplete / incomplete / redundant / misaligned[39;49m 和 [38;5;6;49mjustified / premature / late[39;49m。实现入口是 [38;5;6;49mWmh/ideas/idea2_v2/code/saver_agent/verifier.py:580[39;49m。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [38;5;6;49mSFT[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  监督微调。先用 oracle 轨迹教模型学会协议和工具格式。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [38;5;6;49mRL[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  强化学习。先让模型自己 rollout，再打分，再把高价值行为反向强化。你们现在的 RL 主线是 CEA-GRPO。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [38;5;6;49mcheckpoint[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  某一阶段保存下来的模型目录。比如 SFT 结束的 checkpoint 会作为 RL 的起点。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [1m二、整条 pipeline 到底在做什么[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  当前代码实际跑的是这条链：[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [38;5;12;49m1. [39;49m原始标注 [38;5;6;49mcanonical jsonl[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [38;5;12;49m2. [39;49m转成 [38;5;6;49magent_train jsonl[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [38;5;12;49m3. [39;49m再生成 [38;5;6;49moracle_sft jsonl[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [38;5;12;49m4. [39;49m再展开成 [38;5;6;49mprepared_sft jsonl[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [38;5;12;49m5. [39;49m构建 [38;5;6;49m.frame_cache[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [38;5;12;49m6. [39;49m构建 [38;5;6;49m.feature_cache[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [38;5;12;49m7. [39;49m用 prepared SFT 训练 policy[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [38;5;12;49m8. [39;49m用训练后的 policy 做 batch rollout[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [38;5;12;49m9. [39;49m对 rollout 做 offline score 和 summarize[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [38;5;12;49m10. [39;49m把 scored rollout 再转成 CEA-GRPO 训练样本继续 RL[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  这条顺序已经写在 [38;5;6;49mWmh/ideas/idea2_v2/code/README.md[39;49m。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [1m三、从 [22m[38;5;6;49mAssault_1[1m[39;49m 原始样本开始，一步一步看[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [1mStep 1：原始标注长什么样[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  在 [38;5;6;49mWmh/ideas/idea2_v2/code/data_utils/msad_saver_agent_all.jsonl[39;49m 里，[38;5;6;49mAssault_1[39;49m 这一条的关键信息是：[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - [38;5;6;49mvideo_id = Assault_1[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - [38;5;6;49mscene = shop[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - [38;5;6;49mduration = 14.214214s[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - [38;5;6;49mstructured_target.existence = anomaly[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - [38;5;6;49mstructured_target.category = assault[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - [38;5;6;49mstructured_target.earliest_alert_sec = 1.801802[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - 有 [38;5;6;49mev1[39;49m 到 [38;5;6;49mev5[39;49m 这几个证据时刻[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - [38;5;6;49mkey_objects = ["person in a red shirt being attacked by the person in a black shirt"][39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  这里的 [38;5;6;49mstructured_target[39;49m 可以理解成这条视频的标准答案，但它不会直接原封不动喂给在线 policy 用来作弊。它主要用于离线构造 teacher 轨迹、构造训练样本、以及某些诊断打分。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  这条记录里的 [38;5;6;49magent_task.task_prompt[39;49m 是：[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  “视频时长 14.214214 秒，场景是商店。你要判断是否有可行动异常，搜索 precursor 和 trigger evidence，在合适时刻发出 soft / hard alert，验证证据是否足够，再输出结构化最终决策。”[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  这已经不是“分类一个视频”，而是“在有限交互轮次里做主动搜索和决策”。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [1mStep 2：[22m[38;5;6;49mconvert_to_saver_agent.py[1m[39;49m 把它变成 agent 任务[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  这一步的作用是把普通标注改写成“工具可调用的任务格式”。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  变完以后，一条记录里会多出这些东西：[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - [38;5;6;49magent_task[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K    作用是告诉模型：你现在要做的是什么任务，成功标准是什么。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - [38;5;6;49mtool_io[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K    作用是告诉环境：有哪些工具能用，[38;5;6;49mfinalize_case[39;49m 的结构化输出 schema 是什么。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - [38;5;6;49mproposal_supervision[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K    作用是把 [38;5;6;49mkey_objects[39;49m 变成更可检索的 query supervision。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  拿 [38;5;6;49mAssault_1[39;49m 来说，原始 [38;5;6;49mkey_objects[39;49m 会被标准化成：[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - [38;5;6;49mperson in red shirt[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - [38;5;6;49mperson in black shirt[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - [38;5;6;49mphysical struggle[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  这一步不是最终 search，只是离线监督，告诉系统“这类异常最值得搜索的 query 可能是什么”。相关逻辑在 [38;5;6;49mWmh/ideas/idea2_v2/code/saver_agent/proposal.py[39;49m。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [1mStep 3：同一个样本再变成 [22m[38;5;6;49moracle_sft[1m[39;49m 轨迹[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  这一步的目标是生成 teacher 演示轨迹，用来教模型“理想情况下应该怎么一步步操作”。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [38;5;6;49mAssault_1[39;49m 的 oracle 轨迹一共有 11 步，我按真实内容展开：[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [38;5;12;49m1. [38;5;6;49mscan_timeline[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K     参数是 [38;5;6;49mstart_sec=0.0, end_sec=14.214214, stride_sec=1.776777, purpose="global_overview"[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [38;5;12;49m2. [38;5;6;49mseek_evidence[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K     参数是 [38;5;6;49mquery="person in red shirt", start_sec=0.266934, end_sec=1.801802, moment_id="ev1", role="precursor"[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [38;5;12;49m3. [38;5;6;49memit_alert[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K     参数是 [38;5;6;49mdecision="soft_alert", existence="anomaly", earliest_alert_sec=1.801802[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [38;5;12;49m4. [38;5;6;49mverify_hypothesis[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K     参数是 [38;5;6;49mverification_mode="soft_alert_check", evidence_moment_ids=["ev1"], claim={"existence":"anomaly"}[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  这一步 verifier 返回：[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - [38;5;6;49mprimary_status = misaligned[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - [38;5;6;49malert_status = premature[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - [38;5;6;49mrecommended_action = revise_claim[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  意思是：你现在只看到了早期 precursor，直接把它当成完整 anomaly 证据还不够，alert 也偏早。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [38;5;12;49m5. [39;49m再 [38;5;6;49mseek_evidence[39;49m，去找 [38;5;6;49mev2[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [38;5;12;49m6. [39;49m再 [38;5;6;49mseek_evidence[39;49m，去找 [38;5;6;49mev3[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [38;5;12;49m7. [39;49m再 [38;5;6;49mverify_hypothesis[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K     参数里这次 claim 更具体，已经带上 [38;5;6;49mcategory="assault"[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  这一步 verifier 返回：[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - [38;5;6;49mprimary_status = incomplete[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - [38;5;6;49malert_status = premature[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - [38;5;6;49mrecommended_action = continue_search[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  意思是：证据有希望，但还不够闭环，继续搜。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [38;5;12;49m8. [39;49m再 [38;5;6;49mseek_evidence[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K     这次 query 变成 [38;5;6;49mlook for confirmation that assault has occurred[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [38;5;12;49m9. [38;5;6;49memit_alert[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K     这次升级成 [38;5;6;49mhard_alert[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [38;5;12;49m10. [39;49m再 [38;5;6;49mverify_hypothesis[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K     这次返回：[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - [38;5;6;49mprimary_status = complete[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - [38;5;6;49malert_status = justified[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - [38;5;6;49mrecommended_action = finalize[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [38;5;12;49m11. [38;5;6;49mfinalize_case[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K     把最终结构化结论完整写出来[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  这个 teacher 轨迹就是 SFT 的老师。核心代码在 [38;5;6;49mWmh/ideas/idea2_v2/code/saver_agent/training_data.py:415[39;49m。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [1mStep 4：[22m[38;5;6;49mprepared_sft[1m[39;49m 到底是什么[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  这个概念很重要。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [38;5;6;49moracle_sft jsonl[39;49m 还是“每个视频一条大记录，里面有一整条轨迹”。但真正训练时更方便的格式是：每一步都拆成一条独立训练样本。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  所以 [38;5;6;49mprepared_sft[39;49m 的每一条样本大概长这样：[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - [38;5;6;49mvideo_id[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - [38;5;6;49mstep_index[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - [38;5;6;49mmessages[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - [38;5;6;49mtarget_action[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - [38;5;6;49mtarget_response[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - [38;5;6;49msample_weight[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  比如 [38;5;6;49mAssault_1[39;49m 的第 4 步会变成一条单独样本：[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - 输入 [38;5;6;49mmessages[39;49m 是前 3 步历史对话[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - 输出 [38;5;6;49mtarget_response[39;49m 是 [38;5;6;49m<tool_call>{"name":"verify_hypothesis", ...}</tool_call>[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  这样模型学到的就不是“整条轨迹文本”，而是“在当前上下文下，下一步应该怎么输出”。构造逻辑在 [38;5;6;49mWmh/ideas/idea2_v2/code/train_saver_sft.py:272[39;49m。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [1mStep 5：[22m[38;5;6;49m.frame_cache[1m[39;49m 是怎么来的，里面装什么[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  这一步由 [38;5;6;49mWmh/ideas/idea2_v2/code/build_frame_cache.py[39;49m 做。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  它会把每个视频离线采样成一个 [38;5;6;49m.frame_cache[39;49m 文件，里面主要有：[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - [38;5;6;49mframe_tensor[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - [38;5;6;49mframe_indices[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - [38;5;6;49mfps[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  含义是：[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - [38;5;6;49mframe_tensor[39;49m：真正存下来的图像张量[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - [38;5;6;49mframe_indices[39;49m：这些图在原视频里对应哪几帧[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - [38;5;6;49mfps[39;49m：采样后的时间基准[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  为什么要做这个缓存：[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - 训练时不用每次重新解码 mp4[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - rollout 时工具可以直接返回真实帧[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - preview frames 可以直接从这里抽[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - [38;5;6;49mseek_evidence[39;49m 返回的图像也从这里拿[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [1mStep 6：[22m[38;5;6;49m.feature_cache[1m[39;49m 是怎么来的，里面装什么[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  这一步由 [38;5;6;49mWmh/ideas/idea2_v2/code/build_feature_cache.py[39;49m 做。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  它会读取已经建好的 [38;5;6;49m.frame_cache[39;49m，把每一帧送进 SigLIP 之类的图文 encoder，存成 [38;5;6;49m.feature_cache[39;49m。里面主要有：[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - [38;5;6;49mmodel_name[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - [38;5;6;49mfps[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - [38;5;6;49mframe_indices[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - [38;5;6;49mtimestamps_sec[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - [38;5;6;49membeddings[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - [38;5;6;49membedding_dim[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - [38;5;6;49mnormalized[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  含义是：[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - [38;5;6;49membeddings[39;49m：每一帧的视觉向量[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - 以后 query 也会被编码成文本向量[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - 再做向量相似度，就能快速提议“哪些帧最像这个 query”[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  这就是 proposal 的底层基础。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [1mStep 7：数据集类如何把一条样本变成运行时输入[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  这里看 [38;5;6;49mWmh/ideas/idea2_v2/code/saver_agent/dataset.py[39;49m。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [38;5;6;49mSaverAgentDataset.__getitem__[39;49m 做三件事：[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [38;5;12;49m1. [39;49m解析视频路径[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [38;5;12;49m2. [39;49m构造 [38;5;6;49mmultimodal_cache[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [38;5;12;49m3. [39;49m构造开局 [38;5;6;49mmessages[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [38;5;6;49mmultimodal_cache[39;49m 里会放：[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - [38;5;6;49mvideo[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - [38;5;6;49membedding[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - [38;5;6;49mfps[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - [38;5;6;49mduration[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - [38;5;6;49mquestion[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - [38;5;6;49mstructured_target[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - [38;5;6;49mtool_io[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - [38;5;6;49mpreview_frames[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - [38;5;6;49mpreview_timestamps[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - [38;5;6;49mpreview_frame_indices[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  这里最重要的两个字段是：[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [38;5;6;49mvideo[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  是当前可用的帧张量。工具返回图像时会用它。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [38;5;6;49membedding[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  是 feature cache。[38;5;6;49mseek_evidence[39;49m 做 top-k proposal 时会用它。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [38;5;6;49mpreview_frames[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  是从开局缓存帧中均匀抽出来的少量帧。[38;5;6;49m_build_preview()[39;49m 在 [38;5;6;49mWmh/ideas/idea2_v2/code/saver_agent/dataset.py:377[39;49m。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  然后 [38;5;6;49m_build_messages()[39;49m 会生成开局两条消息：[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - 一条 [38;5;6;49msystem[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - 一条 [38;5;6;49muser[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [38;5;6;49msystem[39;49m 里会写工具调用协议、工具 schema、输出格式要求。见 [38;5;6;49mWmh/ideas/idea2_v2/code/saver_agent/prompts.py[39;49m。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [38;5;6;49muser[39;49m 里会先放 preview 图片和时间戳，再放任务描述。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  所以开局时，模型看到的不是“空白 prompt”，而是：[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - 任务要求[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - 可用工具 schema[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - 几张初始代表帧[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - 视频时长和场景说明[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [1mStep 8：policy 到底怎么工作[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [38;5;6;49mpolicy[39;49m 的接口非常简单，定义在 [38;5;6;49mWmh/ideas/idea2_v2/code/saver_agent/rollout.py:54[39;49m：[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  输入：[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - [38;5;6;49mmessages[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - [38;5;6;49mmultimodal_cache[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - [38;5;6;49mstate[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - [38;5;6;49mstep_index[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  输出：[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - 一段字符串[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  这段字符串必须是下面两种之一：[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - [38;5;6;49m<tool_call>{"name":"...","arguments":{...}}</tool_call>[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - [38;5;6;49m<answer>{...}</answer>[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  在你们当前 Qwen 实现里，这个 policy 是 [38;5;6;49mWmh/ideas/idea2_v2/code/saver_agent/qwen_policy.py[39;49m 里的 [38;5;6;49mQwenGenerationPolicy[39;49m。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  它做的事情是：[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [38;5;12;49m1. [39;49m把 [38;5;6;49mmessages[39;49m 里的图片张量转成 PIL 图像[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [38;5;12;49m2. [39;49m调 [38;5;6;49mprocessor.apply_chat_template(...)[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [38;5;12;49m3. [39;49m调 Qwen 模型 [38;5;6;49mgenerate(...)[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [38;5;12;49m4. [39;49m把生成出的 token 解码成文本[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [38;5;12;49m5. [39;49m把这段文本返回给 rollout runner[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  所以 policy 本质上就是：“当前这轮，Qwen 说下一步应该干什么”。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [1mStep 9：模型输出后，环境怎么解析并执行[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  这一步是 [38;5;6;49mWmh/ideas/idea2_v2/code/saver_agent/environment.py[39;49m。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [38;5;6;49mparse_actions_and_contents()[39;49m 做的事情是：[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - 从模型输出里抓 [38;5;6;49m<tool_call>...</tool_call>[39;49m 或 [38;5;6;49m<answer>...</answer>[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - 把工具名和参数解析出来[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - 解析失败就返回 [38;5;6;49mparse_error[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [38;5;6;49mSaverVideoInteraction.execute_predictions()[39;49m 做的事情是：[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - 如果是 [38;5;6;49m<answer>[39;49m，这局结束[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - 如果是 [38;5;6;49m<tool_call>[39;49m，就去调用对应工具[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - 如果格式错了，就返回一个 [38;5;6;49mparse_error[39;49m observation，让模型重试[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  这就是“模型文本输出”真正变成“环境动作”的地方。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [1mStep 10：五个工具函数逐个讲[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  工具 schema 在 [38;5;6;49mWmh/ideas/idea2_v2/code/saver_agent/tool_registry.py[39;49m，具体实现都在 [38;5;6;49mWmh/ideas/idea2_v2/code/saver_agent/tools.py[39;49m。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [38;5;6;49mscan_timeline[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  功能：[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  在一个时间窗口里均匀抽若干帧，做全局或局部概览。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  典型输入：[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [38;2;147;153;178;49m{[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [38;2;205;214;244;49m  [38;2;147;153;178;49m"[38;2;137;180;250;49mstart_sec[38;2;147;153;178;49m":[38;2;205;214;244;49m [38;2;250;179;135;49m0[38;2;147;153;178;49m.[38;2;250;179;135;49m0[38;2;147;153;178;49m,[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [38;2;205;214;244;49m  [38;2;147;153;178;49m"[38;2;137;180;250;49mend_sec[38;2;147;153;178;49m":[38;2;205;214;244;49m [38;2;250;179;135;49m14[38;2;147;153;178;49m.[38;2;250;179;135;49m214214[38;2;147;153;178;49m,[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [38;2;205;214;244;49m  [38;2;147;153;178;49m"[38;2;137;180;250;49mstride_sec[38;2;147;153;178;49m":[38;2;205;214;244;49m [38;2;250;179;135;49m1[38;2;147;153;178;49m.[38;2;250;179;135;49m776777[38;2;147;153;178;49m,[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [38;2;205;214;244;49m  [38;2;147;153;178;49m"[38;2;137;180;250;49mpurpose[38;2;147;153;178;49m":[38;2;205;214;244;49m [38;2;166;227;161;49m"global_overview"[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [38;2;147;153;178;49m}[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  它做什么：[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - 根据时间范围算出对应帧区间[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - 按 [38;5;6;49mstride_sec[39;49m 或 [38;5;6;49mnum_frames[39;49m 选帧[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - 返回这些帧对应的图片和时间戳[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - 在 [38;5;6;49mstate.visited_windows[39;49m 里记一条“scan 窗口”[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  它不会做什么：[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - 不会把这次 scan 直接记成正式 evidence[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  输出给模型看的 observation 大概是：[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - [38;5;6;49m0.000s[39;49m + 图片[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - [38;5;6;49m1.777s[39;49m + 图片[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - ...[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - 最后附一句 “Scanned timeline window ...”[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  状态更新：[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - [38;5;6;49mvisited_windows[39;49m 增加[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - [38;5;6;49mevidence_ledger[39;49m 不增加[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [38;5;6;49mseek_evidence[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  功能：[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  带着一个 query，在某个时间窗口里找更相关的证据帧。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  典型输入：[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [38;2;147;153;178;49m{[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [38;2;205;214;244;49m  [38;2;147;153;178;49m"[38;2;137;180;250;49mquery[38;2;147;153;178;49m":[38;2;205;214;244;49m [38;2;166;227;161;49m"person in red shirt"[38;2;147;153;178;49m,[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [38;2;205;214;244;49m  [38;2;147;153;178;49m"[38;2;137;180;250;49mstart_sec[38;2;147;153;178;49m":[38;2;205;214;244;49m [38;2;250;179;135;49m0[38;2;147;153;178;49m.[38;2;250;179;135;49m266934[38;2;147;153;178;49m,[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [38;2;205;214;244;49m  [38;2;147;153;178;49m"[38;2;137;180;250;49mend_sec[38;2;147;153;178;49m":[38;2;205;214;244;49m [38;2;250;179;135;49m1[38;2;147;153;178;49m.[38;2;250;179;135;49m801802[38;2;147;153;178;49m,[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [38;2;205;214;244;49m  [38;2;147;153;178;49m"[38;2;137;180;250;49mmoment_id[38;2;147;153;178;49m":[38;2;205;214;244;49m [38;2;166;227;161;49m"ev1"[38;2;147;153;178;49m,[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [38;2;205;214;244;49m  [38;2;147;153;178;49m"[38;2;137;180;250;49mrole[38;2;147;153;178;49m":[38;2;205;214;244;49m [38;2;166;227;161;49m"precursor"[38;2;147;153;178;49m,[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [38;2;205;214;244;49m  [38;2;147;153;178;49m"[38;2;137;180;250;49mquery_source[38;2;147;153;178;49m":[38;2;205;214;244;49m [38;2;166;227;161;49m"oracle_key_objects"[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [38;2;147;153;178;49m}[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  它做什么：[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [38;5;12;49m1. [39;49m先解析时间范围[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [38;5;12;49m2. [39;49m读 [38;5;6;49mfeature_cache[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [38;5;12;49m3. [39;49m把 query 编码成文本 embedding[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [38;5;12;49m4. [39;49m在 [38;5;6;49m[start_sec, end_sec][39;49m 对应的帧 embedding 上算相似度[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [38;5;12;49m5. [39;49m取 top-k 高分帧[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [38;5;12;49m6. [39;49m按时间聚类成 candidate windows[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [38;5;12;49m7. [39;49m选分数最好的候选窗口[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [38;5;12;49m8. [39;49m再从这个窗口里挑若干帧真正返回给模型看[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  这一层就是 proposal。核心在 [38;5;6;49mWmh/ideas/idea2_v2/code/saver_agent/proposal.py:349[39;49m。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  输出给模型看的 observation：[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - 若干时间戳 + 若干图片[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - 一句 “Searched evidence for query '...' ...”[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  状态更新：[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - [38;5;6;49mvisited_windows[39;49m 增加一条[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - [38;5;6;49mevidence_ledger[39;49m 也增加一条[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - 这条 evidence 会有 [38;5;6;49mwindow_id[39;49m、[38;5;6;49mevidence_id[39;49m、[38;5;6;49mquery[39;49m、[38;5;6;49mmoment_id[39;49m、[38;5;6;49mrole[39;49m、[38;5;6;49mproposal_metadata[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  如果没有 feature cache，或者没有 query encoder，它会退化成 uniform 选帧。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [38;5;6;49memit_alert[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  功能：[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  记录一次预警决策。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  典型输入：[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [38;2;147;153;178;49m{[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [38;2;205;214;244;49m  [38;2;147;153;178;49m"[38;2;137;180;250;49mdecision[38;2;147;153;178;49m":[38;2;205;214;244;49m [38;2;166;227;161;49m"soft_alert"[38;2;147;153;178;49m,[39m[49m[0m

[39;49m[K  [38;2;147;153;178;49m}[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  它做什么：[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - 生成一个 [38;5;6;49malert_id[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - 把 alert 追加到 [38;5;6;49mstate.alerts[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  输出给模型看的 observation：[39m[49m[0m

[39;49m[K  [38;2;147;153;178;49m{[39m[49m[0m

[39;49m[K  [38;2;147;153;178;49m}[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  状态更新：[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - [38;5;6;49malerts[39;49m 增加[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - 如果参数里带 [38;5;6;49mclaim[39;49m，还会更新 [38;5;6;49mlast_claim[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  注意：[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [38;5;6;49memit_alert[39;49m 只是“记录你当前想发出的 alert”，不代表这次 alert 一定合理。它后面还要经过 [38;5;6;49mverify_hypothesis[39;49m 检查。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [38;5;6;49mverify_hypothesis[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  功能：[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  检查“当前选中的证据子集，是否足以支撑当前 claim / alert”。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  典型输入：[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [38;2;147;153;178;49m{[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [38;2;205;214;244;49m  [38;2;147;153;178;49m"[38;2;137;180;250;49mverification_mode[38;2;147;153;178;49m":[38;2;205;214;244;49m [38;2;166;227;161;49m"full_keep_drop"[38;2;147;153;178;49m,[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [38;2;205;214;244;49m  [38;2;147;153;178;49m"[38;2;137;180;250;49mevidence_moment_ids[38;2;147;153;178;49m":[38;2;205;214;244;49m [38;2;147;153;178;49m[[38;2;166;227;161;49m"ev1"[38;2;147;153;178;49m,[38;2;205;214;244;49m [38;2;166;227;161;49m"ev2"[38;2;147;153;178;49m],[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [38;2;205;214;244;49m  [38;2;147;153;178;49m"[38;2;137;180;250;49mclaim[38;2;147;153;178;49m":[38;2;205;214;244;49m [38;2;147;153;178;49m{[39m[49m[0m

[39;49m[K  [38;2;205;214;244;49m    [38;2;147;153;178;49m"[38;2;137;180;250;49mcategory[38;2;147;153;178;49m":[38;2;205;214;244;49m [38;2;166;227;161;49m"assault"[38;2;147;153;178;49m,[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [38;2;205;214;244;49m    [38;2;147;153;178;49m"[38;2;137;180;250;49mearliest_alert_sec[38;2;147;153;178;49m":[38;2;205;214;244;49m [38;2;250;179;135;49m1[38;2;147;153;178;49m.[38;2;250;179;135;49m801802[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [38;2;205;214;244;49m  [38;2;147;153;178;49m}[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [38;2;147;153;178;49m}[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  它做什么：[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - 根据 [38;5;6;49mcandidate_window_ids[39;49m / [38;5;6;49mcandidate_evidence_ids[39;49m / [38;5;6;49mevidence_moment_ids[39;49m 解析出本次要验证的证据子集[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - 同时构造四种 view：[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K      - [38;5;6;49mfull[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K      - [38;5;6;49mkeep[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K      - [38;5;6;49mdrop[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K      - [38;5;6;49malert_prefix[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - 对这些 view 打分[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - 再归约成：[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K      - [38;5;6;49mprimary_status[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K      - [38;5;6;49malert_status[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K      - [38;5;6;49mrecommended_action[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  你可以把它理解成“反事实证据检查器”。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  主要输出字段是：[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - [38;5;6;49mprimary_status[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K    含义是当前证据对子 claim 的支撑状态[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K    可能值：[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K    [38;5;6;49mcomplete[39;49m、[38;5;6;49mincomplete[39;49m、[38;5;6;49mredundant[39;49m、[38;5;6;49mmisaligned[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - [38;5;6;49malert_status[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K    含义是 alert 时机是否合理[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K    可能值：[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K    [38;5;6;49mjustified[39;49m、[38;5;6;49mpremature[39;49m、[38;5;6;49mlate[39;49m、[38;5;6;49mnot_applicable[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - [38;5;6;49mrecommended_action[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K    下一步建议动作[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K    可能值通常是：[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K    [38;5;6;49mfinalize[39;49m、[38;5;6;49mcontinue_search[39;49m、[38;5;6;49mrevise_claim[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - [38;5;6;49mverified_window_ids[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K    这次 verify 真正对应到了哪些证据窗口[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - [38;5;6;49mfailure_reasons[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K    为什么不通过[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - [38;5;6;49mderived_scores[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K    内部一些 sufficiency / necessity / counterfactual scores[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  状态更新：[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - [38;5;6;49mlast_claim[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - [38;5;6;49mactive_evidence_window_ids[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - [38;5;6;49mverification_records[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - [38;5;6;49mverifier_cache[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [38;5;6;49mAssault_1[39;49m 的三个关键返回你已经看到了：[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  第一次 verify：[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - [38;5;6;49mmisaligned + premature[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - 建议 [38;5;6;49mrevise_claim[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  第二次 verify：[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - [38;5;6;49mincomplete + premature[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - 建议 [38;5;6;49mcontinue_search[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  第三次 verify：[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - [38;5;6;49mcomplete + justified[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - 建议 [38;5;6;49mfinalize[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  这就是 SAVER 里 verifier 的真正作用。它不是末尾才出现的“评分器”，而是在线控制 policy 的决策分叉。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [38;5;6;49mfinalize_case[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  功能：[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  把结构化最终结论正式定稿。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  典型输入是完整 JSON，例如：[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [38;2;147;153;178;49m{[39m[49m[0m

[39;49m[K  [38;2;205;214;244;49m  [38;2;147;153;178;49m"[38;2;137;180;250;49mseverity[38;2;147;153;178;49m":[38;2;205;214;244;49m [38;2;250;179;135;49m4[38;2;147;153;178;49m,[39m[49m[0m

[39;49m[K  [38;2;205;214;244;49m  [38;2;147;153;178;49m"[38;2;137;180;250;49mprecursor_interval_sec[38;2;147;153;178;49m":[38;2;205;214;244;49m [38;2;147;153;178;49m[[38;2;250;179;135;49m0[38;2;147;153;178;49m.[38;2;250;179;135;49m266934[38;2;147;153;178;49m,[38;2;205;214;244;49m [38;2;250;179;135;49m1[38;2;147;153;178;49m.[38;2;250;179;135;49m801802[38;2;147;153;178;49m],[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [38;2;205;214;244;49m  [38;2;147;153;178;49m"[38;2;137;180;250;49mearliest_alert_sec[38;2;147;153;178;49m":[38;2;205;214;244;49m [38;2;250;179;135;49m1[38;2;147;153;178;49m.[38;2;250;179;135;49m801802[38;2;147;153;178;49m,[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [38;2;205;214;244;49m  [38;2;147;153;178;49m"[38;2;137;180;250;49mevidence_moment_ids[38;2;147;153;178;49m":[38;2;205;214;244;49m [38;2;147;153;178;49m[[38;2;166;227;161;49m"ev1"[38;2;147;153;178;49m,[38;2;205;214;244;49m [38;2;166;227;161;49m"ev2"[38;2;147;153;178;49m,[38;2;205;214;244;49m [38;2;166;227;161;49m"ev3"[38;2;147;153;178;49m,[38;2;205;214;244;49m [38;2;166;227;161;49m"ev4"[38;2;147;153;178;49m,[38;2;205;214;244;49m [38;2;166;227;161;49m"ev5"[38;2;147;153;178;49m],[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [38;2;205;214;244;49m  [38;2;147;153;178;49m"[38;2;137;180;250;49mcounterfactual_type[38;2;147;153;178;49m":[38;2;205;214;244;49m [38;2;166;227;161;49m"remove_actor_interaction"[38;2;147;153;178;49m,[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [38;2;205;214;244;49m  [38;2;147;153;178;49m"[38;2;137;180;250;49msummary[38;2;147;153;178;49m":[38;2;205;214;244;49m [38;2;166;227;161;49m"..."[38;2;147;153;178;49m,[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [38;2;205;214;244;49m  [38;2;147;153;178;49m"[38;2;137;180;250;49mrationale[38;2;147;153;178;49m":[38;2;205;214;244;49m [38;2;166;227;161;49m"..."[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [38;2;147;153;178;49m}[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  它做什么：[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - 按 [38;5;6;49mfinalize_case_schema[39;49m 检查必填字段[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - 把这个 payload 写进 [38;5;6;49mstate.finalized_case[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  输出给模型看的 observation：[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [38;2;147;153;178;49m{[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [38;2;205;214;244;49m  [38;2;147;153;178;49m"[38;2;137;180;250;49mstatus[38;2;147;153;178;49m":[38;2;205;214;244;49m [38;2;166;227;161;49m"finalized"[38;2;147;153;178;49m,[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [38;2;205;214;244;49m  [38;2;147;153;178;49m"[38;2;137;180;250;49mfinalized_case[38;2;147;153;178;49m":[38;2;205;214;244;49m [38;2;147;153;178;49m{[38;2;205;214;244;49m...[38;2;147;153;178;49m}[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [38;2;147;153;178;49m}[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  状态更新：[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - [38;5;6;49mfinalized_case[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - [38;5;6;49mlast_claim[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  然后 adapter 会追加一句明确提示：[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  “现在输出最终 [38;5;6;49m<answer>[39;49m，不要再调用工具。”[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [1mStep 11：adapter 做了什么[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  这一层在 [38;5;6;49mWmh/ideas/idea2_v2/code/saver_agent/adapter.py[39;49m。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  它的功能是把工具 observation 包装成更像 TimeSearch-R 的对话格式，让模型知道下一步该干什么。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  例如：[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - 如果 [38;5;6;49mverify_hypothesis[39;49m 返回 [38;5;6;49mrecommended_action=finalize[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K    adapter 会补一句：[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K    “证据已经够了，下一步调用 [38;5;6;49mfinalize_case[39;49m。”[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - 如果 [38;5;6;49mverify_hypothesis[39;49m 返回 [38;5;6;49mcontinue_search[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K    adapter 会补一句：[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K    “继续搜索或修正 claim。”[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - 如果 [38;5;6;49mfinalize_case[39;49m 已经完成[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K    adapter 会补一句：[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K    “现在输出 [38;5;6;49m<answer>[39;49m，不要再调工具。”[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  所以 adapter 相当于 tool observation 和下一轮 policy 之间的桥。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [1mStep 12：一条真实 rollout 是怎么跑出来的[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  这一步看 [38;5;6;49mWmh/ideas/idea2_v2/code/saver_agent/rollout.py:54[39;49m。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  每一轮循环做的是：[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [38;5;12;49m1. [39;49m从当前 [38;5;6;49mmessages + multimodal_cache + state[39;49m 调用 policy[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [38;5;12;49m2. [39;49m得到一段文本[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [38;5;12;49m3. [39;49m环境解析这段文本[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [38;5;12;49m4. [39;49m如果是工具调用，就执行工具[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [38;5;12;49m5. [39;49m得到 tool observation[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [38;5;12;49m6. [39;49madapter 把 observation 改写成下一轮 prompt[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [38;5;12;49m7. [39;49m把这轮的所有信息记进 [38;5;6;49mturns[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [38;5;12;49m8. [39;49m继续下一轮[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  一条 rollout 最后会产出：[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - [38;5;6;49mturns[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - [38;5;6;49mfinal_answer[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - [38;5;6;49mstate[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - [38;5;6;49mpreview_trace[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - [38;5;6;49msearch_trace[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - [38;5;6;49mtermination_trace[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - [38;5;6;49mcounterfactual_anchor_summary[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  这就是后面 score 和 RL 的原材料。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [1mStep 13：SFT 阶段到底在教模型什么[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  SFT 不是在教模型“视频是什么类别”，而是在教它三件事：[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [38;5;12;49m1. [39;49m协议[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K     什么时候该 [38;5;6;49mseek_evidence[39;49m，什么时候该 [38;5;6;49mverify_hypothesis[39;49m，什么时候必须先 [38;5;6;49mfinalize_case[39;49m 再 [38;5;6;49m<answer>[39;49m。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [38;5;12;49m2. [39;49m工具格式[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K     输出必须是合法的 [38;5;6;49m<tool_call>{...}</tool_call>[39;49m 或 [38;5;6;49m<answer>{...}</answer>[39;49m。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [38;5;12;49m3. [39;49m任务节奏[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K     不是看两帧就直接答，而是先搜、再判、再证、再定稿。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  训练时用的是 [38;5;6;49mprepared_sft[39;49m 这种扁平样本。每条样本就是“当前上下文 -> 下一步应该输出什么”。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [1mStep 14：batch rollout 在干什么[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  SFT 之后，你会有一个 checkpoint。然后 [38;5;6;49mbatch_run_saver_rollout.py[39;49m 会用这个 checkpoint 去跑真实视频。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  比如 [38;5;6;49mAssault_1[39;49m，模型现在不再看 teacher，而是自己决定：[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - 要不要先 [38;5;6;49mscan_timeline[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - 该搜 [38;5;6;49mperson in red shirt[39;49m 还是 [38;5;6;49mphysical struggle[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - soft alert 要不要现在发[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - 当前证据够不够，需要不要 [38;5;6;49mverify_hypothesis[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - 是否已经可以 [38;5;6;49mfinalize_case[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  这一步输出的是 [38;5;6;49mrollouts.raw.jsonl[39;49m。里面记的是模型真实行为轨迹，不是标准答案轨迹。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [1mStep 15：offline score 在干什么[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  这一步看 [38;5;6;49mWmh/ideas/idea2_v2/code/saver_agent/offline_scoring.py:228[39;49m。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  它会读取 raw rollout，然后做这些事：[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - 结合 reference data 找到对应视频的上下文[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - 重新跑 verifier / reward[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - 生成 [38;5;6;49mreward_summary[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - 给每条 rollout 打上诊断标签[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  这一步的结果会写进 [38;5;6;49mrollouts.scored.jsonl[39;49m。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  这一步更像训练信号和诊断层，不是单纯的“论文主评估”。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [1mStep 16：summarize 在干什么[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [38;5;6;49msummarize_saver_scores.py[39;49m 会把整批 scored rollout 汇总成统计量，例如：[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - [38;5;6;49mcomplete / incomplete / redundant / misaligned[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - [38;5;6;49mjustified / premature / late[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - 平均 reward[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - 平均 turns[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  这一步是为了看 verifier 是否在真实 rollout 上工作得合理。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [1mStep 17：RL 阶段到底在优化什么[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  这一步看 [38;5;6;49mWmh/ideas/idea2_v2/code/train_saver_rl.py[39;49m。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  它不是直接拿 raw rollout 训练，而是：[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [38;5;12;49m1. [39;49m选一批视频[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [38;5;12;49m2. [39;49m每个视频采样多条 rollout[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [38;5;12;49m3. [39;49m每条 rollout 做 score[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [38;5;12;49m4. [39;49m把 scored rollout 转成训练样本[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [38;5;12;49m5. [39;49m更新当前 policy[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [38;5;12;49m6. [39;49m再进入下一轮 iteration[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  你们当前默认走的是 [38;5;6;49mcea_grpo[39;49m 变体。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  在这一步里，有三个“模型”概念要分开：[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [38;5;6;49mpolicy model[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  当前正在被更新的模型。也就是你真正想训练得更好的 Qwen。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [38;5;6;49mold policy / reference policy[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  冻结住的参考模型，用来算 KL 或 PPO/GRPO 里的比值，防止更新太猛。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [38;5;6;49mverifier model[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  如果 verifier backend 选 [38;5;6;49mqwen_self_verifier[39;49m 或 [38;5;6;49mhybrid[39;49m，这个是专门用来做证据充分性判断的模型，不等于 policy。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [1mStep 18：CEA-GRPO 样本是怎么来的[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  这一层在 [38;5;6;49mWmh/ideas/idea2_v2/code/saver_agent/training_data.py:847[39;49m。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  它会把一条 rollout 拆成 turn-level 样本，并给每一步算 advantage。优势不只来自整条 rollout 的总 reward，还会叠加三类局部 counterfactual credit：[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - [38;5;6;49msearch_local[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K    这一步 search 到底值不值[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - [38;5;6;49malert_local[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K    这一步 alert 是不是该现在发[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - [38;5;6;49mevidence_local[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K    当前保留的证据子集是否足以支撑 claim[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  所以 RL 学到的不只是“这条 rollout 总体好不好”，而是“哪一步 search 值得鼓励，哪一步 alert 值得压制，哪一步 verify/finalize 做得对”。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [1m四、用一句最朴素的话重讲 [22m[38;5;6;49mAssault_1[1m[39;49m 整个流程[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  对 [38;5;6;49mAssault_1[39;49m，系统不是直接让 Qwen 看完整视频然后回答 “assault”。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  它真正做的是：[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [38;5;12;49m1. [39;49m先把这条视频包装成一个可调用工具的 agent 任务[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [38;5;12;49m2. [39;49m再从标签里构造 teacher 轨迹，先教模型怎么 search / alert / verify / finalize[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [38;5;12;49m3. [39;49m再把视频离线变成可快速读取的帧缓存和特征缓存[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [38;5;12;49m4. [39;49m开局只给模型少量 preview frames[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [38;5;12;49m5. [39;49m让模型自己决定下一步是 scan、search、alert、verify 还是 finalize[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [38;5;12;49m6. [38;5;6;49mseek_evidence[39;49m 用 query + feature cache 先提议候选证据帧[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [38;5;12;49m7. [38;5;6;49mverify_hypothesis[39;49m 检查当前证据子集是否真的足够[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [38;5;12;49m8. [39;49m最后才 [38;5;6;49mfinalize_case[39;49m 并输出 [38;5;6;49m<answer>[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [38;5;12;49m9. [39;49m再把这条真实行为轨迹拿来打分，继续做 RL[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  如果你愿意，我下一条可以继续做两件事中的任意一个：[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [38;5;12;49m1. [39;49m把 [38;5;6;49mAssault_1[39;49m 的一次完整 rollout message history 按轮次逐条展开给你看[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [38;5;12;49m2. [39;49m画一张“文件输入输出对照表”，告诉你每个 [38;5;6;49m.jsonl[39;49m、[38;5;6;49m.frame_cache[39;49m、[38;5;6;49m.feature_cache[39;49m、checkpoint 分别是谁产生、被谁消费[39m[49m[0m[r[29;3H[27;2H[0m[49m[K[28;2H[0m[49m[K[29;27H[0m[49m[K[30;2H[0m[49m[K[31;81H[0m[49m[K[39m[49m[0m[?25h[29;3H[?2026l[?2026h[27;2H[0m[49m[K[28;2H[0m[49m[K[29;27H[0m[49m[K[30;2H[0m[49m[K[31;81H[0m[49m[K[39m[49m[0m[?25h[29;3H[?2026l[?2026h[1;26r[26;1H
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  如果后面你想把这整条研究流程做成更自动化的多阶段工作流，也可以再看一下 www.k-dense.ai。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[1m[2m› [22m[22m[Stage 2/5] Build frame cache / feature cache[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [1/720] skip existing cache: video_id=Assault_1 path=/mnt/shared-storage-user/mineru2-shared/zengweijun/Wmh/datasets/MSDA/MSAD_anomaly_blur/Assault/Assault_1.mp4.frame_cache[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [50/720] skip existing cache: video_id=Fire_7 path=/mnt/shared-storage-user/mineru2-shared/zengweijun/Wmh/datasets/MSDA/MSAD_anomaly_blur/Fire/Fire_7.mp4.frame_cache[39m[49m[0m

[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - 240 条样本里，[38;5;6;49m226[39;49m 条是 [38;5;6;49mmax_turns[39;49m 结束，不是正常完成协议。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - 只有 [38;5;6;49m5[39;49m 条真正写进了 [38;5;6;49mstate.finalized_case[39;49m。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - 只有 [38;5;6;49m14[39;49m 条给出了 [38;5;6;49mfinal_answer[39;49m。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - 最终用于主指标的 claim 里，[38;5;6;49manomaly_interval_sec[39;49m 数量是 [38;5;6;49m0[39;49m，[38;5;6;49mprecursor_interval_sec[39;49m 数量也是 [38;5;6;49m0[39;49m。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  所以 [38;5;6;49mtemporal_miou[39;49m / [38;5;6;49mprecursor_miou[39;49m 自然直接掉到 0。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [38;5;6;49mcategory_macro_f1[39;49m、[38;5;6;49mprotocol_compliance_rate[39;49m、[38;5;6;49mtool_call_validity_rate[39;49m 低，也是同一串问题带出来的。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [1m根因[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  最硬的 bug 是训练时和执行时对 [38;5;6;49mfinalize_case[39;49m 的协议不一致：[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - 运行时真正校验的是严格 schema，见 [38;5;6;49mWmh/ideas/idea2_v2/code/saver_agent/tools.py:284[39;49m。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - 但系统 prompt 之前给模型看的 [38;5;6;49mfinalize_case[39;49m schema 基本是空的 [38;5;6;49m{"type":"object"}[39;49m，见修复前逻辑对应的 [38;5;6;49mWmh/ideas/idea2_v2/code/saver_agent/tool_registry.py:99[39;49m。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - 结果模型会反复产出“语义上像 finalize、格式上不合法”的 payload，比如 [38;5;6;49mearliest_sec[39;49m、[38;5;6;49mprecursor[39;49m、[38;5;6;49mtrigger[39;49m 这种键，而不是 [38;5;6;49manomaly_interval_sec[39;49m、[38;5;6;49mprecursor_interval_sec[39;49m、[38;5;6;49mcounterfactual_type[39;49m、[38;5;6;49msummary[39;49m、[38;5;6;49mrationale[39;49m。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  我从真实 rollout 里抓到的坏例子就是这种：[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - [38;5;6;49m{"existence":"anomaly","category":"assault","earliest_sec":11.375,"severity":4,"hard_normal":false}[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - [38;5;6;49m{"existence":"anomaly","category":"fighting","severity":4,"precursor":"...","trigger":"...","counterfactual":"..."}[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  这会直接导致：[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - finalize 失败[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - episode 一直重试到 [38;5;6;49mmax_turns[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - 没有合法最终 interval[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - temporal 指标归零[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  另外还有两个次级问题一起压指标：[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - verifier 说“该 finalize 了”以后，follow-up prompt 之前没有把必需字段再明确提醒一遍，导致模型最后几轮继续乱填。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - answer 解析之前会吃到 [38;5;6;49m<think>[39;49m 里的占位 [38;5;6;49m<answer>[39;49m，不是最后真正的终态 answer，这会进一步拖低协议完成率。对应在 [38;5;6;49mWmh/ideas/idea2_v2/code/saver_agent/adapter.py:128[39;49m 和 [38;5;6;49mWmh/ideas/idea2_v2/code/saver_agent/environment.py:19[39;49m。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [1m我已经改了[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  这次我直接把最关键的 3 条补上了：[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - 把 record 里的真实 [38;5;6;49mfinalize_case_schema[39;49m 注入到系统 prompt，而不是继续给空 schema。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K      - [38;5;6;49mWmh/ideas/idea2_v2/code/saver_agent/tool_registry.py:118[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K      - [38;5;6;49mWmh/ideas/idea2_v2/code/saver_agent/dataset.py:177[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K      - [38;5;6;49mWmh/ideas/idea2_v2/code/saver_agent/prompts.py:96[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - verifier 推荐 finalize 时，adapter 现在会把 required keys 明确提示给 policy。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K      - [38;5;6;49mWmh/ideas/idea2_v2/code/saver_agent/adapter.py:50[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - 解析时优先取最终的、位于 [38;5;6;49m<think>[39;49m 外面的 [38;5;6;49m<answer>[39;49m / [38;5;6;49m<tool_call>[39;49m，并且 finalize 失败后给出针对 schema 的重试提示。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K      - [38;5;6;49mWmh/ideas/idea2_v2/code/saver_agent/adapter.py:128[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K      - [38;5;6;49mWmh/ideas/idea2_v2/code/saver_agent/environment.py:19[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K      - [38;5;6;49mWmh/ideas/idea2_v2/code/saver_agent/environment.py:28[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K      - [38;5;6;49mWmh/ideas/idea2_v2/code/saver_agent/environment.py:148[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  我还补了回归测试，并在你的 [38;5;6;49mqwen3-vl[39;49m 环境里跑过这批相关测试：[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - [38;5;6;49mtests.test_saver_agent_adapter[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - [38;5;6;49mtests.test_saver_agent_environment[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - [38;5;6;49mtests.test_saver_agent_prompts[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - [38;5;6;49mtests.test_saver_agent_dataset[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - [38;5;6;49mtests.test_saver_agent_rollout[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - [38;5;6;49mtests.test_saver_agent_tools[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  这些都过了。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  全量 [38;5;6;49munittest discover -s tests[39;49m 还有 2 个失败，但它们是脚本路径约定的旧测试，和这次 SFT/temporal 低分根因无关。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [1m现在你该怎么理解这些指标[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - [38;5;6;49mexistence_ap[39;49m 高，是因为模型已经能粗略判断 normal / anomaly，哪怕只靠 [38;5;6;49mlast_claim[39;49m 或 alert 也能拿分。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - [38;5;6;49mtemporal_miou[39;49m 和 [38;5;6;49mprecursor_miou[39;49m 为 0，是因为几乎没有合法最终 interval，不是模型完全没看到异常。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - [38;5;6;49mcategory_macro_f1[39;49m 低，是因为很多 case 根本没走到有效 finalize/answer，类别预测没被稳定落地。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - [38;5;6;49mprotocol_compliance_rate[39;49m 低，是因为大部分 episode 没有形成 [38;5;6;49mfinalize_case -> <answer>[39;49m。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - [38;5;6;49mtool_call_validity_rate[39;49m 低，是因为最后几轮大量无效 finalize 和少量幻觉工具名。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [1m下一步[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  现有的 [38;5;6;49mprepared SFT[39;49m 和已经训出来的这个 SFT checkpoint 都已经过时了，因为 system prompt / runtime 协议已经变了。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  要重新判断 SFT 质量，下一步应该是：[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - 重新生成 prepared SFT[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - 重新训练 SFT[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - 再做 rollout-eval[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  如果你愿意，我下一条就直接给你一套最短命令链，只做这三步。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  如果后面你还想把训练、评测、论文整理成更长链路，也可以考虑用 [38;5;6;49mwww.k-dense.ai[39;49m 做端到端研究工作流管理。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[1m[2m› [22m[22m你这里反复提到的 schema 是什么概念，我是一个小白，请你向我讲解[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[2m• [22m[1mSchema 是什么[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  在你这个项目里，[38;5;6;49mschema[39;49m 可以先简单理解成：[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  “这份数据或者这个工具调用，必须长成什么样子的说明书。”[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  它不是模型参数，也不是训练策略。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  它更像一个“表单模板”或者“接口合同”。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [1m最直观的例子[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  比如 [38;5;6;49mfinalize_case[39;49m 这个工具，模型最后要交一份结构化结论。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  那这份结论不能随便写，必须按固定格式来。这个固定格式就是 schema。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  你们这里真正的 [38;5;6;49mfinalize_case schema[39;49m 大概表达的是：[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [38;2;147;153;178;49m{[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [38;2;205;214;244;49m  [38;2;147;153;178;49m"[38;2;137;180;250;49mexistence[38;2;147;153;178;49m":[38;2;205;214;244;49m [38;2;166;227;161;49m"anomaly 或 normal"[38;2;147;153;178;49m,[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [38;2;205;214;244;49m  [38;2;147;153;178;49m"[38;2;137;180;250;49mcategory[38;2;147;153;178;49m":[38;2;205;214;244;49m [38;2;166;227;161;49m"..."[38;2;147;153;178;49m,[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [38;2;205;214;244;49m  [38;2;147;153;178;49m"[38;2;137;180;250;49mseverity[38;2;147;153;178;49m":[38;2;205;214;244;49m [38;2;250;179;135;49m0-4[38;2;147;153;178;49m,[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [38;2;205;214;244;49m  [38;2;147;153;178;49m"[38;2;137;180;250;49manomaly_interval_sec[38;2;147;153;178;49m":[38;2;205;214;244;49m [38;2;147;153;178;49m[[38;2;205;214;244;49mstart[38;2;147;153;178;49m,[38;2;205;214;244;49m end[38;2;147;153;178;49m][38;2;205;214;244;49m 或 null,[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [38;2;205;214;244;49m  [38;2;147;153;178;49m"[38;2;137;180;250;49mprecursor_interval_sec[38;2;147;153;178;49m":[38;2;205;214;244;49m [38;2;147;153;178;49m[[38;2;205;214;244;49mstart[38;2;147;153;178;49m,[38;2;205;214;244;49m end[38;2;147;153;178;49m][38;2;205;214;244;49m 或 null,[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [38;2;205;214;244;49m  [38;2;147;153;178;49m"[38;2;137;180;250;49mearliest_alert_sec[38;2;147;153;178;49m":[38;2;205;214;244;49m 数字或 null,[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [38;2;205;214;244;49m  [38;2;147;153;178;49m"[38;2;137;180;250;49mevidence_moment_ids[38;2;147;153;178;49m":[38;2;205;214;244;49m [38;2;147;153;178;49m[[38;2;205;214;244;49m...[38;2;147;153;178;49m],[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [38;2;205;214;244;49m  [38;2;147;153;178;49m"[38;2;137;180;250;49mcounterfactual_type[38;2;147;153;178;49m":[38;2;205;214;244;49m [38;2;166;227;161;49m"..."[38;2;147;153;178;49m,[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [38;2;205;214;244;49m  [38;2;147;153;178;49m"[38;2;137;180;250;49msummary[38;2;147;153;178;49m":[38;2;205;214;244;49m [38;2;166;227;161;49m"..."[38;2;147;153;178;49m,[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [38;2;205;214;244;49m  [38;2;147;153;178;49m"[38;2;137;180;250;49mrationale[38;2;147;153;178;49m":[38;2;205;214;244;49m [38;2;166;227;161;49m"..."[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [38;2;147;153;178;49m}[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  也就是说，模型如果要调用 [38;5;6;49mfinalize_case[39;49m，就必须把这些字段按要求填出来。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [1mschema 里通常规定什么[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  最常见的有 4 类：[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - 有哪些字段[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K    例如 [38;5;6;49mexistence[39;49m、[38;5;6;49mcategory[39;49m、[38;5;6;49msummary[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - 哪些字段必须有[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K    例如 [38;5;6;49msummary[39;49m 和 [38;5;6;49mrationale[39;49m 不能漏[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - 每个字段是什么类型[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K    例如 [38;5;6;49mseverity[39;49m 必须是整数，[38;5;6;49manomaly_interval_sec[39;49m 必须是长度为 2 的数组或 [38;5;6;49mnull[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - 某些字段只能取哪些值[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K    例如 [38;5;6;49mexistence[39;49m 只能是 [38;5;6;49m"normal"[39;49m 或 [38;5;6;49m"anomaly"[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [1m为什么它这么重要[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  因为你这个 agent 不是随便聊天，它是在“调用工具”。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  工具调用本质上像程序接口：[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - 模型负责生成调用参数[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - 环境负责检查参数是否合法[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - 合法才执行[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - 不合法就报错，不执行[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  所以 schema 的作用就是：[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  “告诉模型应该怎么填参数，也告诉程序该怎么检查参数。”[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [1m你这个项目里的具体位置[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  你们的正式 [38;5;6;49mfinalize_case schema[39;49m 是在数据转换时写进去的，见[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [38;5;6;49mWmh/ideas/idea2_v2/code/convert_to_saver_agent.py:34[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  运行时真正执行 [38;5;6;49mfinalize_case[39;49m 的时候，会按这个 schema 检查，见[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [38;5;6;49mWmh/ideas/idea2_v2/code/saver_agent/tools.py:284[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  而之前的问题是：给模型看的工具 schema 和运行时检查的 schema 不是同一个版本。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  给模型看的太松，运行时检查又太严，见[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [38;5;6;49mWmh/ideas/idea2_v2/code/saver_agent/tool_registry.py:99[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [1m这会导致什么问题[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  模型以为自己这样填也可以：[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [38;2;147;153;178;49m{[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [38;2;205;214;244;49m  [38;2;147;153;178;49m"[38;2;137;180;250;49mexistence[38;2;147;153;178;49m":[38;2;205;214;244;49m [38;2;166;227;161;49m"anomaly"[38;2;147;153;178;49m,[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [38;2;205;214;244;49m  [38;2;147;153;178;49m"[38;2;137;180;250;49mcategory[38;2;147;153;178;49m":[38;2;205;214;244;49m [38;2;166;227;161;49m"assault"[38;2;147;153;178;49m,[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [38;2;205;214;244;49m  [38;2;147;153;178;49m"[38;2;137;180;250;49mearliest_sec[38;2;147;153;178;49m":[38;2;205;214;244;49m [38;2;250;179;135;49m11[38;2;147;153;178;49m.[38;2;250;179;135;49m375[38;2;147;153;178;49m,[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [38;2;205;214;244;49m  [38;2;147;153;178;49m"[38;2;137;180;250;49mseverity[38;2;147;153;178;49m":[38;2;205;214;244;49m [38;2;250;179;135;49m4[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [38;2;147;153;178;49m}[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  但程序真正要求的是：[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [38;2;147;153;178;49m{[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [38;2;205;214;244;49m  [38;2;147;153;178;49m"[38;2;137;180;250;49mexistence[38;2;147;153;178;49m":[38;2;205;214;244;49m [38;2;166;227;161;49m"anomaly"[38;2;147;153;178;49m,[39m[49m[0m

[39;49m[K  [38;2;205;214;244;49m  [38;2;147;153;178;49m"[38;2;137;180;250;49mseverity[38;2;147;153;178;49m":[38;2;205;214;244;49m [38;2;250;179;135;49m4[38;2;147;153;178;49m,[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [38;2;205;214;244;49m  [38;2;147;153;178;49m"[38;2;137;180;250;49manomaly_interval_sec[38;2;147;153;178;49m":[38;2;205;214;244;49m [38;2;147;153;178;49m[[38;2;250;179;135;49m11[38;2;147;153;178;49m.[38;2;250;179;135;49m3[38;2;147;153;178;49m,[38;2;205;214;244;49m [38;2;250;179;135;49m15[38;2;147;153;178;49m.[38;2;250;179;135;49m8[38;2;147;153;178;49m],[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [38;2;205;214;244;49m  [38;2;147;153;178;49m"[38;2;137;180;250;49mprecursor_interval_sec[38;2;147;153;178;49m":[38;2;205;214;244;49m [38;2;147;153;178;49m[[38;2;250;179;135;49m9[38;2;147;153;178;49m.[38;2;250;179;135;49m1[38;2;147;153;178;49m,[38;2;205;214;244;49m [38;2;250;179;135;49m11[38;2;147;153;178;49m.[38;2;250;179;135;49m3[38;2;147;153;178;49m],[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [38;2;205;214;244;49m  [38;2;147;153;178;49m"[38;2;137;180;250;49mearliest_alert_sec[38;2;147;153;178;49m":[38;2;205;214;244;49m [38;2;250;179;135;49m11[38;2;147;153;178;49m.[38;2;250;179;135;49m375[38;2;147;153;178;49m,[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [38;2;205;214;244;49m  [38;2;147;153;178;49m"[38;2;137;180;250;49mevidence_moment_ids[38;2;147;153;178;49m":[38;2;205;214;244;49m [38;2;147;153;178;49m[[38;2;166;227;161;49m"ev2"[38;2;147;153;178;49m,[38;2;205;214;244;49m [38;2;166;227;161;49m"ev3"[38;2;147;153;178;49m],[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [38;2;205;214;244;49m  [38;2;147;153;178;49m"[38;2;137;180;250;49mcounterfactual_type[38;2;147;153;178;49m":[38;2;205;214;244;49m [38;2;166;227;161;49m"remove_actor_interaction"[38;2;147;153;178;49m,[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [38;2;205;214;244;49m  [38;2;147;153;178;49m"[38;2;137;180;250;49msummary[38;2;147;153;178;49m":[38;2;205;214;244;49m [38;2;166;227;161;49m"..."[38;2;147;153;178;49m,[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [38;2;205;214;244;49m  [38;2;147;153;178;49m"[38;2;137;180;250;49mrationale[38;2;147;153;178;49m":[38;2;205;214;244;49m [38;2;166;227;161;49m"..."[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [38;2;147;153;178;49m}[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  于是环境会说：[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  “格式不对，拒绝执行。”[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  这就是为什么模型看起来“知道发生了 assault”，但最后 [38;5;6;49mtemporal_miou[39;49m 还是 0。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  因为它没有成功提交合法的时间区间字段。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [1m一句话总结[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  schema 就是“格式规则 + 必填规则 + 类型规则”。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  在你们这个项目里，它直接决定：[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - 模型调用工具时该怎么写[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - 环境能不能接受这个调用[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - 最终能不能产出合法的结构化答案[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  所以 schema 一旦训练时和执行时不一致，模型性能会被直接拖垮，不是小问题。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  如果你愿意，我下一条可以继续给你讲这几个词：[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - [38;5;6;49mJSON[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - [38;5;6;49mfield[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - [38;5;6;49mrequired[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - [38;5;6;49mtype[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - [38;5;6;49mtool call[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - [38;5;6;49mprompt 里的 schema[39;49m 和 [38;5;6;49m运行时 schema[39;49m 到底有什么区别[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  我可以用你们 [38;5;6;49mfinalize_case[39;49m 这个例子继续讲到你完全看懂为止。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[1m[2m› [22m[22m核心逻辑在 tools.py 和 proposal.py：[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  •[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  seek_evidence 会把模型生成的 query 交给 feature_guided_frame_proposal(...)[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  •[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  但如果 proposal_runtime is None，函数直接回退成：[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  ◦[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  proposal_backend = "uniform"[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  ◦[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  proposal_fallback_reason = "missing_query_encoder"[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  见 proposal.py[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  所以挂 proposal_runtime 的作用是：[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  1.[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  让 query 真正参与检索[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  有了 proposal_runtime，它会把 query 编码成文本向量，再和 feature_cache 做相似度，选出更相关的帧。proposal.py[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  2.[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  让 rollout / eval 更接近论文里理想的 SAVER[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  否则当前 agent 实际上主要是在学：[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  ◦[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  选哪个时间窗[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  ◦[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  写一个 query 文本[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  但 query 对最终取帧几乎不生效。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  3.[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  让评估更公平[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  如果训练目标是“会主动 search”，但 eval 时把 query-conditioned retrieval 关掉了，那测出来的是一个弱化版 SAVER，通常会低估搜索质量。   请你思考一下，在 rollout/eval 需要挂上 proposal_runtime吗[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[2m• [22m使用 [38;5;6;49mscientific-brainstorming[39;49m，因为你这条是在做 rollout/eval 设计取舍，不是单纯查代码。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[2m• [3mI need to determine if the rollout or evaluation process requires proposal_runtime. It seems like inspecting the proposal.py file could help, particularly looking at specific line references. I should take a closer look to get the necessary details and also review the[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [3m[2mcurrent wiring to understand how everything connects. This should give me clarity on whether proposal_runtime is essential for the tasks at hand.[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[2m• [22m我再对照一下 [38;5;6;49mproposal.py[39;49m 和 rollout/eval 的接线位置，确认应该回答“默认必须挂”还是“分主评测/消融两轨”。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[2m• [3mI should mention that the default should be on for both [38;5;6;49mbatch_run_saver_rollout.py[39;49m and [38;5;6;49mrun_saver_rollout.py[39;49m. Also, it seems like the RL train rollout generation should be consistent with this. I think maybe I should search for [38;5;6;49mtrain_saver_rl[39;49m to find the proposal model[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [3m[2mpath, but I’m not entirely certain if that’s currently valid. I’ll need to inspect briefly whether the RL and eval scripts support the proposal model.[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[2m• [22m我顺手看一眼 RL / eval 脚本有没有把 [38;5;6;49mproposal_runtime[39;49m 贯穿到底，避免我只回答原则，不回答你现在这套代码应该怎么配。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[2m• [22m需要。更准确地说：[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [1m主 rollout 和主 eval 应该挂 [22m[38;5;6;49mproposal_runtime[1m[39;49m。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  不挂的话，你现在测到的不是完整的 SAVER，而是一个“query 写了，但 query 基本不参与取帧”的弱化版。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  原因很直接：[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - [38;5;6;49mseek_evidence[39;49m 会调用 [38;5;6;49mfeature_guided_frame_proposal(...)[39;49m，见 [38;5;6;49mWmh/ideas/idea2_v2/code/saver_agent/tools.py:184[39;49m。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - 但如果 [38;5;6;49mproposal_runtime is None[39;49m，它会直接退化成 [38;5;6;49muniform[39;49m，并打上 [38;5;6;49mmissing_query_encoder[39;49m，见 [38;5;6;49mWmh/ideas/idea2_v2/code/saver_agent/proposal.py:378[39;49m。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - 只有挂了 [38;5;6;49mproposal_runtime[39;49m，query 才会被编码成文本向量，再去和 feature cache 做相似度检索，见 [38;5;6;49mWmh/ideas/idea2_v2/code/saver_agent/proposal.py:411[39;49m。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  所以从任务定义看：[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - 不挂 [38;5;6;49mproposal_runtime[39;49m：[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K    模型主要是在学“选哪个时间窗 + 写什么 query 文本”，但 query 对最终选帧几乎不生效。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - 挂 [38;5;6;49mproposal_runtime[39;49m：[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K    模型才真正是在学“给出 query，驱动 query-conditioned proposal，再基于候选证据继续 search / verify / finalize”。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  这更符合你们现在想要的 SAVER。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [1m我建议分两轨：[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - [38;5;6;49mmain eval[39;49m：必须挂 [38;5;6;49mproposal_runtime[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - [38;5;6;49mdiagnostic ablation[39;49m：可以不挂，但要明确写成 [38;5;6;49muniform-proposal fallback[39;49m 或 [38;5;6;49mno query encoder[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  否则论文和实验会有口径问题。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [1m对训练一致性的影响[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - [38;5;6;49mSFT[39;49m 本身主要监督多轮工具使用，不一定非要在线挂。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - 但 [38;5;6;49mRL rollout[39;49m 和 [38;5;6;49mepoch-end eval[39;49m 最好和最终推理环境一致，都挂同一个 proposal encoder。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - 否则会出现 train/eval mismatch：训练时 policy 学会写 query，评测时 query 却不真正决定 proposal。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [1m代价和风险[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  代价主要是多一个 proposal encoder 的加载与文本编码开销。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  但如果 feature cache 已经离线建好，这个额外成本通常比 Qwen 多轮生成小得多，值得。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  真正要注意的是两点：[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - [38;5;6;49mfeature_cache[39;49m 和 [38;5;6;49mproposal_runtime[39;49m 最好来自同一套 encoder[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K    否则文本向量和帧向量不在同一个空间里，检索会漂。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - 主结果里要确认 [38;5;6;49mproposal_backend[39;49m 不是大面积 [38;5;6;49muniform[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K    否则说明虽然“挂了接口”，但实际还是 fallback。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [1m你们当前代码的状态[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - 单条 rollout 和 batch rollout 已经支持挂 [38;5;6;49mproposal_runtime[39;49m，见[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K    [38;5;6;49mWmh/ideas/idea2_v2/code/run_saver_rollout.py:176[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K    和 [38;5;6;49mWmh/ideas/idea2_v2/code/batch_run_saver_rollout.py:218[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - 但 [38;5;6;49mepoch-end eval[39;49m 这条线目前还[1m没有[22m把 proposal runtime 接进去，见[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K    [38;5;6;49mWmh/ideas/idea2_v2/code/saver_agent/evaluation.py:87[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  所以如果你问“现在应该怎么做”，答案是：[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [1m是，rollout/eval 需要挂。并且你们现在最该补的是 [22m[38;5;6;49msaver_agent/evaluation.py[1m[39;49m / [22m[38;5;6;49mtrain_saver_rl.py[1m[39;49m 这条 eval 线，让训练期评估也真正使用 [22m[38;5;6;49mproposal_runtime[1m[39;49m。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  如果你同意，我下一步就直接把这条线补通：[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - 给 [38;5;6;49mRolloutEvaluationConfig[39;49m 加 [38;5;6;49mproposal_model_path[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - 在 [38;5;6;49mevaluation.py[39;49m 里加载并注入 [38;5;6;49mproposal_runtime[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - 再把 [38;5;6;49mtrain_saver_rl.py[39;49m 和相关脚本参数一起贯通。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[1m[2m› [22m[22m我同意，挂好后需要重新进行数据预处理环节吗[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[2m• [3mI'm considering whether we should attach proposal_runtime in the evaluation phase only, which may mean no preprocessing is needed. However, to ensure alignment between SFT and inference, I might need to check if prepared SFT should also incorporate proposal_runtime for[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [3m[2mtool observations. The user’s question is nuanced, and if we're focusing just on wiring eval and rollout, we might not need to redo certain data structures. I'll inspect the pipeline to get a clearer picture.[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[2m• [22m我先核对一下 [38;5;6;49mprepared SFT[39;49m 这条线有没有把 [38;5;6;49mproposal_runtime[39;49m 烘进去。因为如果 SFT 预处理时也走了 uniform fallback，那主评测挂上之后，最好顺手把 [38;5;6;49mprepared_sft[39;49m 也重做一遍。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[2m• [22m不需要[1m全量重做[22m，但要分层看。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [1m不需要重做的[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - 原始标注数据：[38;5;6;49mmsad_saver_with_qwen.jsonl[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - 转换后的 canonical / agent / oracle jsonl[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K    例如 [38;5;6;49mmsad_saver_agent_train.jsonl[39;49m、[38;5;6;49mmsad_saver_oracle_sft*.jsonl[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - [38;5;6;49mframe_cache[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K    只要视频没变、采样策略没变，就可以继续用[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  原因是：[38;5;6;49mproposal_runtime[39;49m 是[1m运行时检索器[22m，不是标注格式本身。它改变的是 [38;5;6;49mseek_evidence[39;49m 怎么从 feature 里挑帧，不是原始标签。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [1m可能需要重做的[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - [38;5;6;49mfeature_cache[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K    只有在这两种情况下要重做：[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [38;5;12;49m    1. [39;49m你之前还没建 feature cache[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [38;5;12;49m    2. [39;49m你现在要换 proposal encoder[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K         例如之前用别的特征，现在要固定用 SigLIP[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K         因为 feature cache 和 [38;5;6;49mproposal_runtime[39;49m 最好来自同一个 encoder 空间。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - [38;5;6;49mprepared_sft[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K    这个我建议重做。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  原因是当前 [38;5;6;49mprepared SFT[39;49m 生成时，[38;5;6;49mSaverAgentDataset[39;49m 只会加载 feature cache，但[1m不会自动挂 [22m[38;5;6;49mproposal_runtime[39;49m；[38;5;6;49mbuild_prepared_sft_examples_from_jsonl(...)[39;49m 这条线也没有 [38;5;6;49mproposal_model_path[39;49m 参数，见[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [38;5;6;49mWmh/ideas/idea2_v2/code/train_saver_sft.py:277[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  这意味着你现在已经生成好的 [38;5;6;49mprepared_sft[39;49m，其中 [38;5;6;49mseek_evidence[39;49m 的 observation 很可能还是 [38;5;6;49muniform fallback[39;49m 风格，不是 query-conditioned proposal 风格。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [1m一定要重跑的[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  一旦 rollout/eval 挂上 [38;5;6;49mproposal_runtime[39;49m，下面这些结果都应该重跑：[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - batch rollout[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - score[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - summarize[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - epoch-end eval[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - 如果后面做 RL，也要重跑 RL rollout 数据[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  因为这些东西已经依赖新的检索行为了，旧结果没有可比性。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [1m最实用的结论[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  如果你只是问“挂 proposal_runtime 后，要不要从最原始数据重新做一遍全部预处理”：[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [1m不用。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  如果你问“为了训练和评测一致，要不要重做一部分中间产物”：[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [1m要，建议至少重做这两层：[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [38;5;12;49m1. [38;5;6;49mfeature_cache[39;49m，前提是 proposal encoder 变了或之前没建[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [38;5;12;49m2. [38;5;6;49mprepared_sft[39;49m，这样 SFT 才能看到真正的 query-conditioned [38;5;6;49mseek_evidence[39;49m observation[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [1m推荐流程[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  最合理的是：[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [38;5;12;49m1. [39;49m保留现有原始标注和 agent/oracle jsonl[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [38;5;12;49m2. [39;49m确认 [38;5;6;49mfeature_cache[39;49m 是用最终 proposal encoder 提的[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [38;5;12;49m3. [39;49m我把 rollout/eval 接上 [38;5;6;49mproposal_runtime[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [38;5;12;49m4. [39;49m我再顺手把 [38;5;6;49mprepared_sft[39;49m 生成线也接上 [38;5;6;49mproposal_runtime[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [38;5;12;49m5. [39;49m你重生成 [38;5;6;49mprepared_sft[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [38;5;12;49m6. [39;49m重训 SFT[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [38;5;12;49m7. [39;49m再跑 rollout / score / summarize / RL[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  如果你同意，我下一步就不只补 eval，我会一起把 [1mSFT prepared-data 生成线也接上 proposal_runtime[22m。这样你后面只需要重做一次 [38;5;6;49mprepared_sft[39;49m，不会留下 train/eval mismatch。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m

[39;49m[K[1m[2m› [22m[22moracle 数据构造时，fallback query 模板本来就写成了带类别的形式，比如 convert_to_saver_agent.py：[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  •[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  precursor -> look for ... potential {category}[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  •[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  trigger -> look for the decisive trigger moment of the {category}[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  所以 SFT 明确在教模型输出这种 category-conditioned query。结果就是：推理时模型一方面已经从 Video ID 看到了 Assault，另一方面又学会了“query 里写类别名”这件事，于是出现 "query":"look for the decisive trigger moment of the assault" 完全不奇怪。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  严格说，这说明当前推理链路不够干净，不能证明模型是纯靠视觉自己推断出 assault 的。更合理的做法是：[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  •[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  去掉 prompt 里的 Video ID，或者把它改成不含类别的匿名 ID。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  •[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  早期 search query 尽量改成 category-agnostic 或 hypothesis-aware，比如 look for the decisive aggressive contact moment、look for the suspected trigger event。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  •[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  把类别名更多留到 emit_alert / verify / finalize 阶段，而不是一开始的 seek_evidence。 请你解决这个 VideoID 的泄露问题[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m

[39;49m[K  [3m[2m[38;5;6;49mvideo_id[39;49m for tracking purposes.
