I just need to consider how deletion might impact matching caches and evaluations.[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[2m• [22m这个判断基本对一半：[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - 对 [38;5;6;49mpolicy[39;49m 来说，[38;5;6;49mvideo_id[39;49m 没有任务语义价值，最好完全不要看到。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - 但对训练管线本身，[38;5;6;49mvideo_id[39;49m 目前还是有工程价值，不能直接从整个数据结构里硬删。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  原因很具体。现在代码里 [38;5;6;49mvideo_id[39;49m 主要被拿来做这些事：[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - rollout / score / metric 对齐参考标注[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - offline scorer 用它把 rollout 重新对回 reference record[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - RL 里构造 group / anchor / trace 标识[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - 日志、缓存告警、结果汇总、错误定位[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  也就是说，[38;5;6;49mvideo_id[39;49m 现在更像“主键”，不是“模型输入”。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  所以最合理的做法不是“全局删除”，而是“两层隔离”：[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - 保留 [38;5;6;49mvideo_id[39;49m 作为内部 bookkeeping key[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - 从所有 model-facing 内容里彻底移除它[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  这也是我刚刚先修的方向：不让它进入 prompt，并且把 [38;5;6;49m{video_id}[39;49m 模板位也替换成匿名 [38;5;6;49mcase_id[39;49m。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  如果你想再更激进一点，我建议下一步做成下面这个最终形态：[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [38;5;12;49m1. [39;49m保留内部字段 [38;5;6;49mvideo_id[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [38;5;12;49m2. [39;49m新增公开字段 [38;5;6;49mpublic_case_id[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [38;5;12;49m3. [39;49mpolicy/messages/prepared_sft 只用 [38;5;6;49mpublic_case_id[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [38;5;12;49m4. [39;49mrollout trace 对外可见部分也尽量只写 [38;5;6;49mpublic_case_id[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [38;5;12;49m5. [38;5;6;49mvideo_id[39;49m 只留在 scorer / metrics / logging 内部链路[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  这样比“直接删掉”更稳，因为不会把评估和数据对齐链路一起打断。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  如果你愿意，我下一步可以直接把代码再推进一层：[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - 把 [38;5;6;49mvideo_id[39;49m 在 [38;5;6;49mprepared_sft[39;49m、rollout trace、可见日志里也统一替换成 [38;5;6;49mpublic_case_id[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - 只在 offline scoring / metrics 的内部对齐路径保留原始 [38;5;6;49mvideo_id[39;49m。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[2m• [22m对 [38;5;6;49mpolicy[39;49m 来说，是，基本没用，应该删出模型可见范围。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  但对整条工程链路来说，不能直接全删，因为它现在还是内部主键。代码里 [38;5;6;49mvideo_id[39;49m 还在做这些事：[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - rollout 和 reference 标注对齐[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - offline scoring / metrics 查回原样本[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - RL group / anchor / trace 标识[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - 日志、报错、缓存定位[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  所以更合理的是：[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - 对模型输入删掉[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - 对内部 bookkeeping 保留[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  这也是我刚刚修的方向：[38;5;6;49mvideo_id[39;49m 不再进入 prompt，连自定义 [38;5;6;49m{video_id}[39;49m 模板位也只会拿到匿名 [38;5;6;49mcase_<hash>[39;49m。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  如果你说的是“为什么不从 schema 里也完全删掉”，答案是可以，但要一起改一串内部逻辑，代价比收益大。更干净的最终版是：[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - 内部保留 [38;5;6;49mvideo_id[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - 新增/统一使用 [38;5;6;49mpublic_case_id[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - [38;5;6;49mmessages / prepared_sft / rollout trace[39;49m 只暴露 [38;5;6;49mpublic_case_id[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - [38;5;6;49mvideo_id[39;49m 只留给 scorer、metrics、debug[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  如果你要，我下一步可以继续把这层也做完，把可见 trace 和训练中间产物里的原始 [38;5;6;49mvideo_id[39;49m 也尽量清掉。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[1m[2m› [22m[22m你只要保证 video_id 不会被输入到模型就行，其他地方允许使用，争取做最小改动[39m[49m[0m

[39;49m[K[2m• [22m对，按你的要求，最小原则就是：[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - [38;5;6;49mvideo_id[39;49m 允许继续留在内部数据结构里[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - 但不能再进入任何 model-facing 输入[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  这一步现在已经按这个口径处理了，没有去动 scorer / metrics / rollout bookkeeping。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  实际效果是：[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - 默认 user prompt 不再暴露原始 [38;5;6;49mvideo_id[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - 自定义模板里的 [38;5;6;49m{video_id}[39;49m 也只会拿到匿名 [38;5;6;49mcase_<hash>[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - 连 [38;5;6;49m{raw_video_id}[39;49m 这种口子也封掉了，现在同样只会得到匿名 case id[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - 内部 [38;5;6;49mvideo_id[39;49m 仍保留给 offline scoring、metrics、日志、对齐参考标注使用[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  相关文件：[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - [38;5;6;49mWmh/ideas/idea2_v2/code/saver_agent/prompts.py[39m[49m[0m

[39;49m[K  结合前面那轮回归，当前可以认为：[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - [38;5;6;49mvideo_id[39;49m 不再进入 prompt[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - [38;5;6;49mvideo_id[39;49m 仍可在内部链路继续用[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  你现在需要做的最小后续动作是：[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - 重生成一次 [38;5;6;49mprepared_sft.jsonl[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  因为旧的 [38;5;6;49mprepared_sft[39;49m 里已经把旧 prompt 序列化进去了。内部原始 [38;5;6;49magent_train.jsonl[39;49m 不用为了这个单独重建。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[1m[2m› [22m[22m我们当前的 verifier 是另外一个新的模型还是正在微调的模型呢，他是如何工作的[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[2m• [3mI need to provide clear explanations since the user is a beginner. I should mention offline verifier backend options like heuristic, qwen_self_verifier, and hybrid models. It's important to note that training uses a verifier-model-path that is separate from the default[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [3m[2mmodel-path.[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [3m[2mI can explain that the verifier is a distinct inference component, not jointly trained with the policy in the current pipeline. The self-verifier backend uses QwenSelfVerifier from_pretrained, so I’ll need to inspect the code for precise details.[1mInspecting training[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [1m[3m[2mscripts[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [3m[2mI need to check the default values in the training scripts, specifically for qwen_verifier. It might be helpful to look into reward.py and verifier.py to explain how everything functions. Inspecting these files will give me a clearer understanding of their roles and[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [3m[2mhow they interact. I'll make sure to take thorough notes while I do this so I can provide accurate information to the user later. Let's get started![39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[2m• [22m我先看一下 [38;5;6;49mverifier[39;49m 相关代码和训练入口参数，确认它在当前实现里到底是独立模型、复用同一权重，还是训练中跟着更新。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[2m• [3mI realize I need to explain how everything works better. I’ll probably want to look into the offline_scoring selection and the logic in verifier.py, especially around the hybrid function at runtime. It would help to identify specific lines for this hybrid function. I’m[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [3m[2malso thinking about searching more around score_rollout_records in offline_scoring and verify_hypothesis in the tools. Finally, I should clarify how the online verifier call operates during tool execution. Let's dive deeper![39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[2m• [22m我再看一下它在“在线 rollout 里”和“离线打分里”各是怎么被调用的，这样可以把它的工作流程说清楚。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[2m• [3mI need to clarify concepts around the current verifier, which isn’t trained jointly. There might be a single underlying model loaded separately, or it could involve a different path altogether. I should mention that the online verify_hypothesis uses[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [3m[2m[38;5;6;49muse_reference_supervision=False[39;49m. For offline scoring, it may force a reverify, and the reference data can involve reference supervision, possibly for diagnostic or training rewards. I think I need to inspect the offline_scoring line closely.[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[2m• [22m还差最后一块：offline scoring 会不会把 verifier 当成训练中的 reward 组件，以及那时是不是同一个模型实例。看完这个我就能把全链路讲完整。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[2m• [22m当前的 [38;5;6;49mverifier[39;49m 不是“正在微调的 policy 本体”，而是一个单独调用的验证组件。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  最核心的区分是：[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - [38;5;6;49mmodel-path[39;49m：你正在训练/推理的 [38;5;6;49mpolicy[39;49m 模型，也就是会决定 [38;5;6;49mscan_timeline / seek_evidence / verify_hypothesis / finalize_case[39;49m 这些动作的模型。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - [38;5;6;49mverifier-model-path[39;49m：[38;5;6;49mverifier[39;49m 用的模型路径。如果后端是 [38;5;6;49mqwen_self_verifier[39;49m 或 [38;5;6;49mhybrid[39;49m，这里会单独加载一个 Qwen3-VL 作为验证器；如果后端是 [38;5;6;49mheuristic[39;49m，那就根本不加载模型。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  对应代码：[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - [38;5;6;49mWmh/ideas/idea2_v2/code/train_saver_rl.py[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - [38;5;6;49mWmh/ideas/idea2_v2/code/saver_agent/qwen_verifier.py[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  所以答案分两种情况：[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [38;5;12;49m1. [39;49m如果你当前用的是 [38;5;6;49mheuristic[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - 它不是模型，只是规则打分器。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - 不存在“另外一个新模型”或“正在微调”。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [38;5;12;49m2. [39;49m如果你当前用的是 [38;5;6;49mqwen_self_verifier[39;49m 或 [38;5;6;49mhybrid[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - 它会单独 [38;5;6;49mfrom_pretrained(...)[39;49m 加载一个 verifier runtime。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - 这个 verifier 在当前代码里是 [38;5;6;49meval()[39;49m 推理态，不参与训练更新，不跟着 RL/SFT 反向传播。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - 即使它和 policy 指向同一个初始模型目录，本质上也是两个独立实例。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  也就是说，当前实现里：[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - [38;5;6;49mpolicy[39;49m 在训练[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - [38;5;6;49mverifier[39;49m 在打分/给反馈[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - [38;5;6;49mverifier[39;49m 本身没有被联合微调[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  它怎么工作的，可以按两层理解。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [1m在线 rollout 里[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - policy 调用 [38;5;6;49mverify_hypothesis[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - [38;5;6;49mWmh/ideas/idea2_v2/code/saver_agent/tools.py[39;49m 会进入 [38;5;6;49mrun_counterfactual_verifier(...)[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - 这里明确是 [38;5;6;49muse_reference_supervision=False[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - 也就是在线决策时不看 GT，只看当前 state 里已经搜到的证据子集[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  它会构造四个视图：[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - [38;5;6;49mfull[39;49m：当前所有证据[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - [38;5;6;49mkeep[39;49m：当前选中的证据子集[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - [38;5;6;49mdrop[39;49m：把这部分证据拿掉后剩下的证据[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - [38;5;6;49malert_prefix[39;49m：发 alert 之前那部分证据[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  然后 verifier 对这四个视图分别打支持分，最后压成：[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - [38;5;6;49mprimary_status[39;49m：[38;5;6;49mcomplete / incomplete / redundant / misaligned[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - [38;5;6;49malert_status[39;49m：[38;5;6;49mjustified / premature / late / not_applicable[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - [38;5;6;49mrecommended_action[39;49m：[38;5;6;49mfinalize / continue_search / revise_claim / refine_evidence[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  核心逻辑在：[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - [38;5;6;49mWmh/ideas/idea2_v2/code/saver_agent/verifier.py[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [1m如果 backend=heuristic[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - 直接根据窗口覆盖、角色匹配、时间重叠这些规则算分[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [1m如果 backend=qwen_self_verifier[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - 会把这四个视图的图像和文本摘要打包成 prompt[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - 喂给单独的 Qwen verifier[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - 让它输出严格 JSON 分数[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - 代码在 [38;5;6;49mWmh/ideas/idea2_v2/code/saver_agent/qwen_verifier.py[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [1m如果 backend=hybrid[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - 两边都算[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - 最后做加权融合[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - 当前实现是 [38;5;6;49malpha * heuristic + (1 - alpha) * qwen[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - 默认 [38;5;6;49malpha=0.7[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - 也就是更偏规则，Qwen 只占一部分[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [1m离线 scoring 里[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - [38;5;6;49mWmh/ideas/idea2_v2/code/saver_agent/offline_scoring.py[39;49m 会把 rollout 再拿去做一次 offline verifier[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - 这里通常是 [38;5;6;49muse_reference_supervision=True[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - 所以它会带 reference-conditioned 信息[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - 当前代码已经把它明确标记成 [38;5;6;49mtraining_or_diagnostic_only[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  这部分主要用于：[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - reward[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - 诊断[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - 训练分析[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  不是你论文主结果里最干净的 main eval。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  如果你想用一句话记住现在的结构：[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - [38;5;6;49mpolicy[39;49m 负责“搜、看、判、答”[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - [38;5;6;49mverifier[39;49m 负责“你现在这批证据到底够不够支撑这个 claim/alert”[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  如果你愿意，我下一步可以继续帮你把“当前你的默认命令下，实际跑起来的是哪一种 verifier、加载哪一个路径、是不是和 policy 同一套权重”按你现有脚本逐条对应出来。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[1m[2m› [22m[22m我们当前是采用哪种方式呢，如果使用加载一个原始的 qwen 的话，他没有被微调过缺乏识别异常的能力，那他怎么胜任 verifier 的工作[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[2m• [22m我先把“当前默认到底在用哪种 verifier”从脚本和入口参数里对齐一下，再回答你第二个问题。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[2m• [22m当前不是“统一只用一种 verifier”，而是分阶段的。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  如果你按现在的默认脚本跑，实际是这样：[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - SFT epoch-end eval：[38;5;6;49mheuristic[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - batch rollout + [38;5;6;49mscore_saver_rollout.py[39;49m：默认也是 [38;5;6;49mheuristic[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - RL 训练里的在线 [38;5;6;49mverify_hypothesis[39;49m：默认是 [38;5;6;49mhybrid[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - RL 的 local CEA branch verifier：默认 [38;5;6;49mheuristic[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - RL epoch-end eval：默认 [38;5;6;49mheuristic[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  对应默认值在：[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - [38;5;6;49mWmh/ideas/idea2_v2/code/scripts/00_full_pipeline.sh[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - [38;5;6;49mWmh/ideas/idea2_v2/code/train_saver_rl.py[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - [38;5;6;49mWmh/ideas/idea2_v2/code/train_saver_sft.py[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - [38;5;6;49mWmh/ideas/idea2_v2/code/score_saver_rollout.py[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  所以如果你问“当前训练时真正在线用到的 verifier 是什么”：[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - 默认是 [38;5;6;49mhybrid[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - 而且默认 [38;5;6;49mverifier-model-path[39;49m 指向一个原始的 Qwen3-VL checkpoint[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - 不是正在微调的 policy，也不是一个已经单独训好的 verifier[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  你第二个问题是关键：原始 Qwen 没学过异常检测，为什么还能做 verifier？[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  实话说：[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - 如果让它单独做 [38;5;6;49mqwen_self_verifier[39;49m 主判官，我不认为当前默认原始 Qwen 足够可靠。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - 当前代码之所以还能用，是因为默认不是纯 Qwen，而是 [38;5;6;49mhybrid[39;49m。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [38;5;6;49mhybrid[39;49m 的具体含义是：[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - 先用 task-specific heuristic verifier 算一套分数[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - 再用 Qwen verifier 看四个反事实视图[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - 最后做加权融合[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  代码在 [38;5;6;49mWmh/ideas/idea2_v2/code/saver_agent/verifier.py[39;49m：[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - [38;5;6;49mview_scores = alpha * heuristic + (1 - alpha) * qwen[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - 默认 [38;5;6;49malpha=0.7[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  也就是说默认权重下：[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - heuristic 占 70%[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - Qwen 只占 30%[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  所以当前 Qwen 的角色更像：[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - 给 heuristic 一个“视觉常识补充”[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - 帮助判断当前证据子集是否看起来足以支撑 claim[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - 不是从零开始独立完成异常分类[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  而且 verifier 的任务本身比 policy 更窄：[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - policy 要决定去哪里搜、什么时候 alert、什么时候 finalize[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - verifier 只需要回答：[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K      - 当前这批证据够不够支撑 claim[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K      - 去掉它们后结论会不会塌[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K      - 只保留它们时结论还能不能站住[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  这比“直接识别整段视频的 anomaly category”要容易一些，所以原始 Qwen 在 hybrid 里还能提供一点有用信号。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  但我还是要直接说结论：[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - 当前默认原始 Qwen verifier 不是论文级强 verifier[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - 它现在能工作的前提，是你主要依赖 heuristic，Qwen 只是辅助[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - 如果你把 backend 切成纯 [38;5;6;49mqwen_self_verifier[39;49m，我不建议直接相信结果[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  更实际的建议是：[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [38;5;12;49m1. [39;49m现在先继续用 [38;5;6;49mhybrid[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [38;5;12;49m2. [39;49m不要把 Qwen 权重占比设太高，[38;5;6;49malpha=0.7[39;49m 这个保守值是合理的[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [38;5;12;49m3. [39;49m如果后面要做更强 verifier，有两个靠谱方向[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - 把 [38;5;6;49mverifier-model-path[39;49m 指到你训好的 SFT policy checkpoint，看它是否比原始 Qwen 更懂异常视频[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - 单独做一个 verifier SFT / reward-style finetune，训练专门判断 [38;5;6;49mcomplete / incomplete / redundant / misaligned[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  一句话总结：[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - 当前默认 verifier 不是“一个已经训好的新 verifier 模型”[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - 而是“规则主导 + 原始 Qwen 辅助”的 hybrid verifier[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  如果你要，我下一步可以直接帮你判断：[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - 你的 [38;5;6;49mSFT checkpoint[39;49m 适不适合直接拿来当 verifier[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - 还是应该单独训练一个 verifier 更合理。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[1m[2m› [22m[22m[Stage 2/5] Build frame cache / feature cache[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  {[39m[49m[0m

[39;49m[K    "data_root": "/mnt/shared-storage-user/mineru2-shared/zengweijun",[39m[49m[0m

[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[2m• [22m这个输出是正常的。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  含义是：[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - [38;5;6;49mwritten: 0, skipped_existing: 720[39;49m：720 个视频的 [38;5;6;49m.frame_cache[39;49m 都已经存在了，所以这次没有重建。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - [38;5;6;49mmissing_videos: 0, decode_failures: 0[39;49m：没有坏视频，也没有解码失败。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - [38;5;6;49mSkip feature cache stage because PROPOSAL_MODEL_PATH is empty[39;49m：也正常，但这说明这次流程没有启用 proposal encoder，所以不会走你想要的 query-conditioned proposal 检索。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  这句话的实际后果是：[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - 当前 run 里 [38;5;6;49mseek_evidence[39;49m 不会用 SigLIP 文本查询去检索 feature cache[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - 会退回非 proposal 的搜索路径[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - 如果你想跑 proposal 版 SAVER，这不是报错，但不是你最终想要的配置[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  也就是说：[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - 作为“只跑 frame cache / 非 proposal 流程”，正常[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - 作为“想启用 feature-guided proposal”，不够，需要补 [38;5;6;49mPROPOSAL_MODEL_PATH[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  关于 verifier，当前默认情况是：[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - SFT 的 epoch-end eval：[38;5;6;49mheuristic[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - [38;5;6;49mscore_saver_rollout.py[39;49m：默认 [38;5;6;49mheuristic[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - RL 在线 [38;5;6;49mverify_hypothesis[39;49m：默认 [38;5;6;49mhybrid[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - [38;5;6;49mhybrid[39;49m 里用的 [38;5;6;49mverifier-model-path[39;49m，默认是原始 [38;5;6;49mqwen3-vl-8b-Instruct[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  所以如果你没手工改参数，当前 RL 在线 verifier 确实是：[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - 规则 verifier 为主[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - 原始 Qwen 为辅[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  原始 Qwen 为什么还能“有点用”：[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - 因为 verifier 不是让它从整段视频里自己发现 anomaly[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - 而是给它：[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K      - 当前 claim[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K      - 已选证据子集[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K      - full / keep / drop / alert_prefix 四个视图[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K      - 对应图片和时间戳[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - 它只需要判断“这些证据够不够支撑 claim”[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - 这是比完整 anomaly search 更窄的任务[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  但实话说：[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - 原始 Qwen 单独做 [38;5;6;49mqwen_self_verifier[39;49m，我不建议直接信[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - 当前能用，主要是因为默认是 [38;5;6;49mhybrid[39;49m，而且 heuristic 占主导[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  我对你现在这个 SFT checkpoint 的判断是：[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - 直接拿它替换原始 Qwen，作为 [38;5;6;49mhybrid[39;49m 里的 verifier 子模型：合理，而且大概率比原始 Qwen 更合适[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - 直接把它当成“纯 verifier 模型”单独用：不够理想[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - 最终版论文如果 verifier 是核心卖点：单独训练一个 verifier 更合理[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  原因很简单：[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - 你的 SFT checkpoint 至少学过异常视频域、工具轨迹、[38;5;6;49mverify/finalize[39;49m 语义[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - 原始 Qwen 没学过这些[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - 但 SFT checkpoint 训练目标本质上还是 [38;5;6;49mpolicy/tool-use[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - 它没有被专门训练成“四视图打分器 + 状态归约器”[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  所以最实用的建议是：[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [38;5;12;49m1. [39;49m现在先把 [38;5;6;49mverifier-model-path[39;49m 改成你的最新 SFT checkpoint[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [38;5;12;49m2. [39;49mbackend 继续用 [38;5;6;49mhybrid[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [38;5;12;49m3. [38;5;6;49mverifier_hybrid_alpha[39;49m 先保守一点，用 [38;5;6;49m0.7[39;49m 到 [38;5;6;49m0.8[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  如果只让我给一个结论：[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - 现在立刻可做：用 SFT checkpoint 替换原始 Qwen 做 [38;5;6;49mhybrid verifier[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - 更终版、更论文级：单独训 verifier，但最好从 SFT checkpoint 初始化，不要从原始 Qwen 起步[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  如果你愿意，我下一步可以直接给你一条把 [38;5;6;49mSFT checkpoint[39;49m 接成 verifier 的最短命令。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[1m[2m› [22m[22msft 训练的时候需要走proposal encoder和走 query-conditioned proposal 检索吗[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[2m• [3mI’m considering the meaning of “SFT 训练.” If it refers to Trainer.train on prepared_sft, then it's not necessary. However, if it means the entire SFT process from start to finish, then yes, data preparation and epoch-end rollout evaluation should use the proposal[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [3m[2mencoder. This is important because, without it, SFT examples don't effectively learn since the model receives query tokens that don't change the evidence returned, weakening learning overall. Including proposal runtime during preparation helps ensure that training[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [3m[2maligns with inference.[1mInspecting proposal.py[39m[49m[0m

[39;49m[K  [3m[2mwon’t function as it should. I want to make sure everything works properly, so my inclination is to check this out to avoid any issues down the line.[39m[49m[0m

[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[2m• [22m要分开看，不能笼统说“要”或“不要”。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  严格说，SFT 这个阶段里有 3 个环节：[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [38;5;12;49m1. [38;5;6;49mprepared SFT[39;49m 数据生成：需要，最好开[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K     在这一步，oracle 轨迹里的 [38;5;6;49mseek_evidence(query=...)[39;49m 会真正走 query-conditioned proposal。你现在的代码就是在这里把 [38;5;6;49mproposal_runtime[39;49m 挂到样本上，[38;5;6;49mWmh/ideas/idea2_v2/code/train_saver_sft.py:415[39;49m 到 [38;5;6;49mWmh/ideas/idea2_v2/code/train_saver_sft.py:448[39;49m。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K     如果这里不开，检索会退化成 [38;5;6;49muniform[39;49m fallback，而不是被 query 真正控制，[38;5;6;49mWmh/ideas/idea2_v2/code/saver_agent/proposal.py:391[39;49m。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [38;5;12;49m2. [39;49m真正的 [38;5;6;49mTrainer.train()[39;49m：不需要[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K     这一步吃的是已经准备好的样本或 tensor cache，本身不再实时跑 proposal encoder。也就是说，proposal 的作用主要发生在“构造训练样本”之前，而不是每个训练 step 里都再检索一遍。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [38;5;12;49m3. [39;49mepoch-end rollout eval：需要，最好开[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K     否则你训练的是 query-aware agent，评估时却不用 query-conditioned retrieval，测出来会偏弱。现在 eval 这边也已经接好了 proposal runtime，[38;5;6;49mWmh/ideas/idea2_v2/code/saver_agent/evaluation.py:173[39;49m。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  所以结论是：[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - 如果你问“反向传播那一步要不要跑 proposal encoder”：不要。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - 如果你问“整套 SFT 流程要不要走 proposal/query-conditioned retrieval”：要，建议开在[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K      - [38;5;6;49mprepared_sft[39;49m 生成[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K      - SFT 的 rollout eval[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  最实用的做法是：[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [38;5;12;49m1. [39;49m先建好 [38;5;6;49mframe_cache[39;49m 和 [38;5;6;49mfeature_cache[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [38;5;12;49m2. [39;49m用 [38;5;6;49m--proposal-model-path[39;49m 重生成 [38;5;6;49mprepared_sft[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [38;5;12;49m3. [39;49m再用 [38;5;6;49m--prepared-data[39;49m 训 SFT[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [38;5;12;49m4. [39;49m同时给 SFT 的 rollout eval 也传 proposal 参数[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  否则就会出现一种弱化版训练：模型学会写 query，但 query 实际并没有真正参与检索。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  如果你要，我下一条直接给你一套最短可跑的命令链：[38;5;6;49mbuild_feature_cache -> regenerate prepared_sft -> train_saver_sft(with eval proposal)[39;49m。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  复杂研究流程如果后面想做更系统的实验编排，也可以直接用 K-Dense Web: [38;5;6;49mwww.k-dense.ai[39;49m。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[1m[2m› [22m[22m请你检查一下我们的脚本，是否给 rollout eval 也传 proposal 参数[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m

[39;49m[K  [38;2;205;214;244;49mPROPOSAL_MODEL_PATH[38;2;148;226;213;49m=[38;2;166;227;161;49m"[38;2;205;214;244;49m$[38;2;147;153;178;49m{[38;2;205;214;244;49mPROPOSAL_MODEL_PATH[38;2;148;226;213;49m:-[38;2;166;227;161;49m/mnt/shared-storage-user/mineru2-shared/zengweijun/Wmh/MLLMs/siglip[38;2;147;153;178;49m}[38;2;166;227;161;49m"[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  补两点实用建议：[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [38;5;12;49m1. [39;49m这是 [38;5;6;49mproposal encoder[39;49m 的路径，不是 policy Qwen 的路径[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K     它会用于 [38;5;6;49mfeature_cache[39;49m 提取和 query-conditioned proposal 检索。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [38;5;12;49m2. [39;49m最好再配一个设备[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K     例如：[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [38;2;205;214;244;49mPROPOSAL_DEVICE[38;2;148;226;213;49m=[38;2;166;227;161;49m"[38;2;205;214;244;49m$[38;2;147;153;178;49m{[38;2;205;214;244;49mPROPOSAL_DEVICE[38;2;148;226;213;49m:-[38;2;166;227;161;49mcuda:0[38;2;147;153;178;49m}[38;2;166;227;161;49m"[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [38;2;205;214;244;49mPROPOSAL_TORCH_DTYPE[38;2;148;226;213;49m=[38;2;166;227;161;49m"[38;2;205;214;244;49m$[38;2;147;153;178;49m{[38;2;205;214;244;49mPROPOSAL_TORCH_DTYPE[38;2;148;226;213;49m:-[38;2;166;227;161;49mauto[38;2;147;153;178;49m}[38;2;166;227;161;49m"[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  如果你不单独设 [38;5;6;49mEVAL_PROPOSAL_MODEL_PATH[39;49m，当前脚本会默认让 rollout eval 继承这个 [38;5;6;49mPROPOSAL_MODEL_PATH[39;49m。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  如果你要，我下一条可以直接给你一套完整环境变量模板，包含：[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - [38;5;6;49mPROPOSAL_MODEL_PATH[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - [38;5;6;49mPROPOSAL_DEVICE[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - [38;5;6;49mEVAL_PROPOSAL_MODEL_PATH[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - [38;5;6;49mMODEL_PATH[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - [38;5;6;49mVERIFIER_MODEL_PATH[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - 4 卡 H200 下推荐的 [38;5;6;49mfull_pipeline[39;49m 参数。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[1m[2m› [22m[22m关于 verifier，当前默认情况是：[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K    - SFT 的 epoch-end eval：heuristic[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K    - score_saver_rollout.py：默认 heuristic[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K    - RL 在线 verify_hypothesis：默认 hybrid[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K    - hybrid 里用的 verifier-model-path，默认是原始 qwen3-vl-8b-Instruct[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K    所以如果你没手工改参数，当前 RL 在线 verifier 确实是：[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K    - 规则 verifier 为主[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K    - 原始 Qwen 为辅  这里提到的规则 verifier 是什么东西[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[2m• [22m我直接看 [38;5;6;49mverifier.py[39;49m 里的 [38;5;6;49mheuristic[39;49m 实现，把“规则 verifier”拆成输入、判断逻辑和输出三部分说明清楚。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[2m• [3mI need to make sure I use absolute paths for clickable file references and include line references from [verifier.py]. It sounds like I should avoid using ranges, opting instead for multiple single line references. They mentioned that I can include line references per[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [3m[2mconcept. So, I’ll cite specific lines like run_counterfactual_verifier at line 580, _score_view at 292, _derive_scores at 377, and _reduce_primary_status at 493, etc.[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[2m• [22m这里的“规则 verifier”不是另一个模型，而是一套写死在代码里的启发式判定逻辑，核心在 [38;5;6;49mWmh/ideas/idea2_v2/code/saver_agent/verifier.py:580[39;49m。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  它做的事可以理解成 4 步：[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [38;5;12;49m1. [39;49m先取当前要验证的证据子集[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K     来自当前 [38;5;6;49mstate.evidence_ledger / visited_windows[39;49m，以及你传进去的 [38;5;6;49mcandidate_window_ids / candidate_evidence_ids / candidate_evidence_moment_ids[39;49m，见 [38;5;6;49mWmh/ideas/idea2_v2/code/saver_agent/verifier.py:139[39;49m。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [38;5;12;49m2. [39;49m再构造 4 个“视角”打分[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K     它不是只看“当前保留的证据”，而是同时看：[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - [38;5;6;49mfull[39;49m：全部证据[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - [38;5;6;49mkeep[39;49m：只保留当前选中的证据[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - [38;5;6;49mdrop[39;49m：把当前选中的证据拿掉后剩下的证据[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - [38;5;6;49malert_prefix[39;49m：只看 alert 时间点之前的证据[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K    这些是在 [38;5;6;49mWmh/ideas/idea2_v2/code/saver_agent/verifier.py:635[39;49m 开始组出来的。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [38;5;12;49m3. [39;49m每个视角算一组 support 分数[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K     例如：[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - [38;5;6;49mexist_support[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - [38;5;6;49mcategory_support[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - [38;5;6;49mtemporal_support[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - [38;5;6;49mprecursor_support[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - [38;5;6;49malert_support[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - [38;5;6;49mcounterfactual_support[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K    这些分数怎么来，取决于有没有参考监督：[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - 有 GT 参考时，它会用 oracle windows / structured target，按时间重叠和角色覆盖来算，见 [38;5;6;49mWmh/ideas/idea2_v2/code/saver_agent/verifier.py:292[39;49m。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - 没有 GT 时，它会退化成 fallback heuristic，比如看覆盖了多少视频、看了几个窗口，见 [38;5;6;49mWmh/ideas/idea2_v2/code/saver_agent/verifier.py:204[39;49m 和 [38;5;6;49mWmh/ideas/idea2_v2/code/saver_agent/verifier.py:260[39;49m。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [38;5;12;49m4. [39;49m最后把分数压成离散结论[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K     它会先算几个反事实量：[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - [38;5;6;49msufficiency = keep_score[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - [38;5;6;49mnecessity = full_score - drop_score[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - [38;5;6;49mcounterfactual_faithfulness[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K    见 [38;5;6;49mWmh/ideas/idea2_v2/code/saver_agent/verifier.py:377[39;49m。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  然后再阈值化成：[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - [38;5;6;49mprimary_status[39;49m: [38;5;6;49mcomplete / incomplete / redundant / misaligned[39;49m，见 [38;5;6;49mWmh/ideas/idea2_v2/code/saver_agent/verifier.py:493[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - [38;5;6;49malert_status[39;49m: [38;5;6;49mjustified / premature / late / not_applicable[39;49m，见 [38;5;6;49mWmh/ideas/idea2_v2/code/saver_agent/verifier.py:519[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - [38;5;6;49mrecommended_action[39;49m: [38;5;6;49mcontinue_search / revise_claim / refine_evidence / finalize[39;49m，见 [38;5;6;49mWmh/ideas/idea2_v2/code/saver_agent/verifier.py:548[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  所以一句话概括：[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  规则 verifier = 一个纯 Python 的、基于时间窗覆盖/角色重叠/反事实 keep-drop 逻辑的判分器，不是神经网络模型。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  你前面看到的 [38;5;6;49mhybrid[39;49m，就是：[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - 先跑这套规则 verifier[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - 再跑一次 Qwen self-verifier[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - 最后按权重混合，见 [38;5;6;49mWmh/ideas/idea2_v2/code/saver_agent/verifier.py:469[39;49m 和 [38;5;6;49mWmh/ideas/idea2_v2/code/saver_agent/verifier.py:683[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  默认 [38;5;6;49malpha=0.7[39;49m，意思通常是：[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - 70% 信规则 verifier[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - 30% 信 Qwen verifier[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  如果你愿意，我下一条可以继续把这套规则 verifier 用一个具体视频案例，从 [38;5;6;49mkeep/drop/full[39;49m 三个视角给你逐步演示一遍。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[1m[2m› [22m[22m把这套规则 verifier 用一个具体视频案例，从 keep/drop/full 三个视角给你逐步演示一遍。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[2m• [3mI realize I can look into the schema and possibly use an existing sample from code tests. It's important to have a code-grounded approach. I'll need to check out available tests or samples. Maybe I can find a test for the verifier. To make this easier, I could use[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [3m[2mgrep, or rg if it's present, but if not, I can go with grep -R instead. Let's get started on this![39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[2m• [22m我用现有代码结构做一个最贴近真实运行的例子，把 [38;5;6;49mfull / keep / drop[39;49m 三个视角和最终状态判定逐步拆开。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[2m• [3mI think I need to take a closer look at the verifier tests and maybe check some example numbers. It seems crucial to ensure everything's working correctly. I wonder what specific numbers or tests would be most useful to examine. By analyzing these cases, I can better[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [3m[2munderstand the overall performance and accuracy of the verifier. This attention to detail should help me ensure that everything is running smoothly![39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[2m• [22m我补读一下 verifier 的单测，用代码里现成的例子讲，比我自己编一个更准确。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[2m• [3mI'm thinking about providing a detailed walkthrough for calculating scores based on certain formulas. It seems like I could compute exact scores, which might be useful. I’ll consider anomaly intervals and the different windows that trigger and peak. For the overall[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [3m[2mscore, I'm applying weights to various factors like support metrics and coverage. Calculating things like anomaly coverage can get intricate, especially when breaking down intervals and assessing how they relate to the targets.[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[2m• [22m我把这个示例所在的测试行号取出来，下面会直接按这些对象解释，不空口说。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[2m• [22m我用代码单测里的一个最标准案例来讲。这个案例不是某个真实文件名的视频，而是 verifier 的最小化“攻击异常”样本，定义在 [38;5;6;49mWmh/ideas/idea2_v2/code/tests/test_saver_agent_verifier.py:36[39;49m 和 [38;5;6;49mWmh/ideas/idea2_v2/code/tests/test_saver_agent_verifier.py:60[39;49m。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [1m案例设置[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  这个视频被假定为一个 [38;5;6;49massault[39;49m 异常，目标区间是 [38;5;6;49m[1.0, 8.0][39;49m，最早预警时间是 [38;5;6;49m1.0s[39;49m，并且 oracle 里有 3 个关键证据窗口：[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - [38;5;6;49mw0001 = [1,4][39;49m，角色是 [38;5;6;49mtrigger[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - [38;5;6;49mw0002 = [4,6][39;49m，角色是 [38;5;6;49mpeak_action[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - [38;5;6;49mw0003 = [6,8][39;49m，角色是 [38;5;6;49mconfirmation[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  这些定义在 [38;5;6;49mWmh/ideas/idea2_v2/code/tests/test_saver_agent_verifier.py:41[39;49m 到 [38;5;6;49mWmh/ideas/idea2_v2/code/tests/test_saver_agent_verifier.py:55[39;49m，以及 [38;5;6;49mWmh/ideas/idea2_v2/code/tests/test_saver_agent_verifier.py:61[39;49m 到 [38;5;6;49mWmh/ideas/idea2_v2/code/tests/[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [38;5;6;49mtest_saver_agent_verifier.py:101[39;49m。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [1m先理解 [22m[38;5;6;49mfull / keep / drop[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  在 verifier 里这 3 个视角是这样来的，见 [38;5;6;49mWmh/ideas/idea2_v2/code/saver_agent/verifier.py:299[39;49m 到 [38;5;6;49mWmh/ideas/idea2_v2/code/saver_agent/verifier.py:394[39;49m：[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - [38;5;6;49mfull[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K    当前状态里“你一共搜到过的全部证据窗口”。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - [38;5;6;49mkeep[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K    你这次声称“真正支撑当前 claim 的那一小撮证据”。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - [38;5;6;49mdrop[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K    把 [38;5;6;49mkeep[39;49m 从 [38;5;6;49mfull[39;49m 里删掉后，剩下的证据。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  然后每个视角各自算一组 support 分数：[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - [38;5;6;49mexist_support[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - [38;5;6;49mcategory_support[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - [38;5;6;49mtemporal_support[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - [38;5;6;49malert_support[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - [38;5;6;49mcounterfactual_support[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - 最后合成为 [38;5;6;49moverall_support[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  核心规则在 [38;5;6;49mWmh/ideas/idea2_v2/code/saver_agent/verifier.py:331[39;49m 到 [38;5;6;49mWmh/ideas/idea2_v2/code/saver_agent/verifier.py:374[39;49m。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  之后再派生出：[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - [38;5;6;49msufficiency = keep.overall_support[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - [38;5;6;49mnecessity = full.overall_support - drop.overall_support[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - [38;5;6;49mconsistency = 1 - |full - keep|[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K    见 [38;5;6;49mWmh/ideas/idea2_v2/code/saver_agent/verifier.py:378[39;49m 到 [38;5;6;49mWmh/ideas/idea2_v2/code/saver_agent/verifier.py:393[39;49m。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [1m例子 1：为什么 [22m[38;5;6;49mkeep = {w0001,w0002}[1m[39;49m 会被判成 [22m[38;5;6;49mcomplete[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  这就是单测 [38;5;6;49mWmh/ideas/idea2_v2/code/tests/test_saver_agent_verifier.py:200[39;49m。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  这里：[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - [38;5;6;49mfull = {w0001,w0002,w0003}[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - [38;5;6;49mkeep = {w0001,w0002}[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - [38;5;6;49mdrop = {w0003}[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  直觉上：[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - [38;5;6;49mfull[39;49m 很强，因为 trigger、peak、confirmation 全都有。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - [38;5;6;49mkeep[39;49m 也很强，因为它至少包含 [38;5;6;49mtrigger + peak_action[39;49m，已经足够支持“这里确实发生了 assault，而且证据比较扎实”。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - [38;5;6;49mdrop[39;49m 只剩 confirmation，说明“把 keep 拿掉以后，剩下的证据明显弱很多”。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  按代码规则大致会变成：[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - [38;5;6;49mkeep.overall_support[39;49m 高，说明“只保留这部分证据，结论还能站住”[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - [38;5;6;49mdrop.overall_support[39;49m 明显下降，说明“把这部分证据拿掉，结论会塌很多”[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - 所以 [38;5;6;49msufficiency[39;49m 高，[38;5;6;49mnecessity[39;49m 也高[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  于是命中 [38;5;6;49mWmh/ideas/idea2_v2/code/saver_agent/verifier.py:510[39;49m 到 [38;5;6;49mWmh/ideas/idea2_v2/code/saver_agent/verifier.py:515[39;49m 的条件：[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - [38;5;6;49mkeep >= 0.60[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - [38;5;6;49mnecessity >= 0.20[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - [38;5;6;49mconsistency >= 0.75[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  最后输出：[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - [38;5;6;49mprimary_status = complete[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - [38;5;6;49mrecommended_action = finalize[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [1m例子 2：为什么 [22m[38;5;6;49mkeep = {w0003}[1m[39;49m 会被判成 [22m[38;5;6;49mincomplete[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  这就是单测 [38;5;6;49mWmh/ideas/idea2_v2/code/tests/test_saver_agent_verifier.py:217[39;49m。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  这里：[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - [38;5;6;49mkeep = {w0003}[39;49m，只有 confirmation[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - 也就是你只拿了“后果/确认”这一段，却没有拿到真正决定性的 [38;5;6;49mtrigger[39;49m 或 [38;5;6;49mpeak[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  直觉上：[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - [38;5;6;49mfull[39;49m 还是强的，因为全证据在那[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - 但 [38;5;6;49mkeep[39;49m 太弱，只靠 confirmation 不足以单独支撑当前异常 claim[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - 所以 [38;5;6;49msufficiency[39;49m 低[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  按代码规则，会命中 [38;5;6;49mWmh/ideas/idea2_v2/code/saver_agent/verifier.py:506[39;49m 到 [38;5;6;49mWmh/ideas/idea2_v2/code/saver_agent/verifier.py:507[39;49m：[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - [38;5;6;49mkeep.overall_support < 0.55[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - 但 [38;5;6;49mfull.overall_support >= 0.60[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  意思就是：[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  “你明明已经搜到足够证据了，但你当前挑出来保留的这部分还不够。”[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  所以输出：[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - [38;5;6;49mprimary_status = incomplete[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - [38;5;6;49mrecommended_action = continue_search[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  这正对应 SAVER 想要的语义：不是“答案错了”，而是“当前选中的证据子集还不够支撑你的 claim”。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [1m例子 3：为什么 [22m[38;5;6;49mkeep = {w0001}[1m[39;49m 会被判成 [22m[38;5;6;49mredundant[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  这就是单测 [38;5;6;49mWmh/ideas/idea2_v2/code/tests/test_saver_agent_verifier.py:232[39;49m。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  这里：[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - [38;5;6;49mkeep = {w0001}[39;49m，只有 trigger[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - [38;5;6;49mdrop = {w0002,w0003}[39;49m，剩下 peak 和 confirmation[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  直觉上：[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - [38;5;6;49mkeep[39;49m 本身不算弱，因为 trigger 很关键[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - 但问题是，把它拿掉以后，[38;5;6;49mdrop[39;49m 仍然很强[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - 换句话说，这个 [38;5;6;49mkeep[39;49m 不是“必要证据”，因为不用它，结论照样还能成立得差不多[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  按代码规则，会命中 [38;5;6;49mWmh/ideas/idea2_v2/code/saver_agent/verifier.py:508[39;49m 到 [38;5;6;49mWmh/ideas/idea2_v2/code/saver_agent/verifier.py:509[39;49m：[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - [38;5;6;49mkeep.overall_support >= 0.60[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - [38;5;6;49mdrop.overall_support >= 0.65[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  这表示：[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  “你保留的这部分证据不是没用，但它不够必要，删掉以后剩余证据仍然太强。”[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  所以输出：[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - [38;5;6;49mprimary_status = redundant[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - [38;5;6;49mrecommended_action = refine_evidence[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [1m顺手说一下 alert 为什么也能一起判[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  除了 [38;5;6;49mfull / keep / drop[39;49m，代码还会多算一个 [38;5;6;49malert_prefix[39;49m，也就是“只看 alert 时间点之前能拿到的证据”，见 [38;5;6;49mWmh/ideas/idea2_v2/code/saver_agent/verifier.py:382[39;49m 和 [38;5;6;49mWmh/ideas/idea2_v2/code/saver_agent/verifier.py:519[39;49m。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  所以：[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - 如果你在 [38;5;6;49m1.2s[39;49m 报警，此时前缀里已经覆盖到 [38;5;6;49mw0001[39;49m，[38;5;6;49malertability[39;49m 够高，就会是 [38;5;6;49mjustified[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - 如果你在 [38;5;6;49m0.4s[39;49m 就报警，这时前缀里几乎没有可用证据，就会是 [38;5;6;49mpremature[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  这对应单测 [38;5;6;49mWmh/ideas/idea2_v2/code/tests/test_saver_agent_verifier.py:247[39;49m。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [1m一句话总结[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  这套规则 verifier 的核心不是“最终答案对不对”，而是：[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - [38;5;6;49mkeep[39;49m 看“只保留这些证据，结论还能不能站住”[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - [38;5;6;49mdrop[39;49m 看“把这些证据拿掉，结论会不会塌”[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - [38;5;6;49mfull[39;49m 看“你其实总共已经搜到了多少有效信息”[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  然后把这三者组合成：[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - [38;5;6;49mcomplete[39;49m：既够用，又必要[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - [38;5;6;49mincomplete[39;49m：不够用[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - [38;5;6;49mredundant[39;49m：够用，但不够必要[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - [38;5;6;49mmisaligned[39;49m：根本没对上 claim[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  如果你愿意，我下一条可以继续把这个例子再翻成“真实 rollout 里 policy 调 [38;5;6;49mverify_hypothesis[39;49m 时，state 里到底传了什么字段”，把 [38;5;6;49mcandidate_window_ids / evidence_ledger / alerts / verification_records[39;49m 全部串起来讲。复杂研究流程如果后面要做成更系统的实验工作流，也可以考虑[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [38;5;6;49mwww.k-dense.ai[39;49m。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[1m[2m› [22m[22m这样写死的 verifier 能胜任实际工作吗，在推理的时候我们有用到 verifier 吗[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[2m• [3mI need to provide a conceptual answer to the user’s inquiry. I might need to check the code for how the verifier is used in inference or rollout. I don't need the web, just my local codebase. The user is asking for critical analysis, which involves scientific-critical-[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [3m[2mthinking. While they didn’t cite this skill, I think I should announce its use in commentary. So for this task, using that skill seems like a good choice![39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[2m• [22m使用 [38;5;6;49mscientific-critical-thinking[39;49m 来判断这套 verifier 的实际可行性，并核对代码里推理阶段是否真的调用了 verifier。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[2m• [22m我再看 [38;5;6;49mtools.py[39;49m 和 [38;5;6;49mrollout.py[39;49m 两处，确认推理时 verifier 是“真的参与决策”还是只是记录日志。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[2m• [3mI need to think about whether a hardcoded verifier can do practical work and if it plays a role in inference.[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [3m[2mA heuristic verifier can function as a safety gate and protocol controller, but it isn’t reliable for judging semantics in open-world anomalies. It does supervise relevance but has limitations, like reliance on handcrafted thresholds.[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [3m[2mIn the current code, the verifier is used only if the policy calls the verify_hypothesis tool, which directly influences subsequent model behavior and timing. It's not always active; it's based on specific triggers.[1mClarifying verifier roles[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [3m[2mBatch evaluation and offline scoring do use the verifier, but it’s a different context. Online settings have default heuristics, while the current reinforcement learning (RL) online setup for verifying hypotheses is hybrid, not purely heuristic.[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [3m[2mIn actual inference during a batch rollout, whether the verifier is invoked depends on the script. In production, it seems the verifier is called in the SaverRolloutRunner.[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [3m[2mOnce the model uses the verify_hypothesis tool, it influences the next turn. It's worth mentioning that offline evaluation doesn't rely on the online verifier, and the final response can often bypass it unless specifically prompted.[1mDefining verifier usage[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [3m[2mIf the model doesn't call verify_hypothesis, then no online verifier is applied to that sample. Instead, only offline diagnostics or evaluations may occur afterward, depending on the pipeline. I should point to relevant code lines, like in tools.py, which detail the[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [3m[2muse of run_counterfactual_verifier with use_reference_supervision set to false.[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [3m[2mThe adapter modifies output based on recommended actions, and the rollout stores relevant verifier fields. It’s worth mentioning that the hybrid model uses Qwen for semantic checks if configured; otherwise, it relies solely on heuristics, which are rule-based methods.[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [3m[2mI should keep things beginner-friendly and define terms as needed![39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[2m• [22m结论先说清楚：[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [38;5;12;49m1. [39;49m这套写死的规则 verifier，能做一部分实际工作，但不能单独承担“最终语义裁判”[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [38;5;12;49m2. [39;49m在你当前代码里，推理时确实会用到 verifier，但它不是每一步自动触发，而是当 policy 主动调用 [38;5;6;49mverify_hypothesis[39;49m 时才在线生效[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [1m它能做什么[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  作为在线“证据充分性/必要性控制器”，它是有用的。原因是它判断的不是开放语义本身，而是更窄的东西：[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - 当前选中的证据子集够不够支撑 claim[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - 把这些证据拿掉后结论会不会塌[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - 现在发 alert 是否为时过早[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - 下一步更应该 [38;5;6;49mcontinue_search[39;49m、[38;5;6;49mrevise_claim[39;49m、[38;5;6;49mrefine_evidence[39;49m 还是 [38;5;6;49mfinalize[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  这类判断，本来就比较适合规则化，因为它依赖的是：[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - 已搜索到哪些窗口[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - 当前 claim 是什么[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - 当前 alert 在什么时刻[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - keep / drop / full 这几个反事实视角下支持度怎么变化[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  这正是 [38;5;6;49mWmh/ideas/idea2_v2/code/saver_agent/verifier.py[39;49m 现在在做的事情。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [1m它做不了什么[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  如果你指望它像一个真正视觉模型那样判断：[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - 这是不是 assault[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - 这是不是 fire[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - 这段画面里到底有没有关键动作[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - claim 文本和视频语义是否真的一致[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  那规则 verifier 本身不够。因为它没有真正“看懂视频语义”，它主要是在看：[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - 时间窗覆盖[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - 角色覆盖[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - 证据删掉后支持度变化[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - 一些写死的阈值[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  所以实事求是地说：[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - 当任务是“控制搜索流程、控制 finalize 时机、控制 alert 时机”时，它有价值[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - 当任务是“做最终高置信语义判别”时，它不够，最好配合 Qwen self-verifier 或单独训练 verifier[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [1m在推理时有没有用到 verifier[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  有，但是“按需调用”的，不是后台自动一直跑。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  在线推理路径是：[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [38;5;12;49m1. [39;49mpolicy 生成一个工具调用[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K     如果它调用 [38;5;6;49mverify_hypothesis[39;49m，就进入 verifier。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [38;5;12;49m2. [38;5;6;49mverify_hypothesis[39;49m 工具会直接调用 [38;5;6;49mrun_counterfactual_verifier(...)[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K     见 [38;5;6;49mWmh/ideas/idea2_v2/code/saver_agent/tools.py:263[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [38;5;12;49m3. [39;49m这里在线推理明确是 [38;5;6;49muse_reference_supervision=False[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K     也就是不会把 GT oracle 混回去，见 [38;5;6;49mWmh/ideas/idea2_v2/code/saver_agent/tools.py:274[39;49m 到 [38;5;6;49mWmh/ideas/idea2_v2/code/saver_agent/tools.py:278[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [38;5;12;49m4. [39;49mverifier 的结果会写回状态[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K     包括：[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - [38;5;6;49mstate.last_claim[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - [38;5;6;49mstate.active_evidence_window_ids[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - [38;5;6;49mstate.verification_records[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K    见 [38;5;6;49mWmh/ideas/idea2_v2/code/saver_agent/tools.py:279[39;49m 到 [38;5;6;49mWmh/ideas/idea2_v2/code/saver_agent/tools.py:281[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [38;5;12;49m5. [39;49madapter 会把 verifier 的 [38;5;6;49mrecommended_action[39;49m 重新喂给模型下一轮[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K     比如：[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - “继续搜”[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - “修正 claim”[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - “现在可以 finalize”[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K    见 [38;5;6;49mWmh/ideas/idea2_v2/code/saver_agent/adapter.py:44[39;49m 到 [38;5;6;49mWmh/ideas/idea2_v2/code/saver_agent/adapter.py:79[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  所以答案是：[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  不是“只做离线打分”，而是真的会影响在线决策。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [1m但要补一句关键限制[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  它只在模型调用 [38;5;6;49mverify_hypothesis[39;49m 时才参与。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  如果模型一路跳过 verifier，直接去 [38;5;6;49mfinalize_case[39;49m 或直接 [38;5;6;49m<answer>[39;49m，那在线 verifier 就没有真正介入该样本的行为控制。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [1m当前最合理的定位[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  以你们 SAVER 的目标来看，当前 verifier 最合理的定位是：[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - 第一职责：在线流程控制器[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - 第二职责：RL 局部 counterfactual reward 评估器[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - 第三职责：诊断工具[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  而不是：[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - 唯一的最终真实性裁判[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [1m我的判断[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  当前这套设计方向是对的，但单靠规则 verifier 不够最终版。更稳的最终版应该是：[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - 在线默认走 [38;5;6;49mhybrid[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - 规则 verifier 负责结构化 keep/drop/full 判断[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - Qwen verifier 负责补语义判断[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - 主评估尽量 reference-free，不把 verifier 分数直接当论文主指标[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  如果你愿意，我下一步可以直接把“当前 heuristic / hybrid / qwen_self_verifier 三者在你们系统里的职责边界”画成一张非常清楚的表，方便你后面决定训练时和推理时默认开哪个。复杂实验工作流如果后面想统一管理，也可以考虑 [38;5;6;49mwww.k-dense.ai[39;49m。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[1m[2m› [22m[22m总结一下，规则 verifier主要是靠窗口覆盖率打分的是吗，他的输入与输出又是什么呢[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[2m• [3mI'm thinking about how online heuristic methods differ. For an anomaly claim without reference supervision, it seems to mainly focus on the number of selected windows. On the other hand, for a normal claim without reference supervision, the important factor appears to[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [3m[2mbe the coverage ratio over the entire video, along with the total number of windows. I wonder how these elements impact the analysis overall. It’s interesting to consider the implications of these differences![39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[2m• [22m不完全是，但可以近似理解成“一个以窗口结构和覆盖为主的规则打分器”。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  更准确地说，它主要看 3 类信息：[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - 你选了哪些证据窗口[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K    也就是 [38;5;6;49mkeep / drop / full[39;49m 三个视角下，各自有哪些 [38;5;6;49mwindow[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - 这些窗口和目标证据结构是否对得上[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K    如果开了 reference supervision，会看它们和 [38;5;6;49mtrigger / peak_action / confirmation[39;49m 这些 oracle 窗口的重叠[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - 把这些窗口拿掉之后，支撑度掉了多少[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K    这就是反事实的 [38;5;6;49mnecessity[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  所以它不是纯“窗口覆盖率”一个指标，但确实是以时间窗覆盖、角色覆盖、keep-drop 差值这类结构信号为主。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  有一个关键区别你要记住：[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - 离线/诊断模式下，如果有 [38;5;6;49mstructured_target[39;49m 和 [38;5;6;49moracle_windows_sec[39;49m，它会比较像“带 GT 的结构判分器”[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - 在线推理时，[38;5;6;49mverify_hypothesis[39;49m 明确传的是 [38;5;6;49muse_reference_supervision=False[39;49m，见 [38;5;6;49mWmh/ideas/idea2_v2/code/saver_agent/tools.py:263[39;49m。这时 heuristic 会弱很多，基本退化成“你搜了多少窗口、覆盖了多少内容、keep/drop 后还剩多少支撑”的规则控制器[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [1m它的输入[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  核心输入在 [38;5;6;49mWmh/ideas/idea2_v2/code/saver_agent/verifier.py:580[39;49m：[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - [38;5;6;49mstate[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K    里面最重要的是：[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K      - [38;5;6;49mvisited_windows[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K      - [38;5;6;49mevidence_ledger[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K      - [38;5;6;49malerts[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K      - [38;5;6;49mlast_claim[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - [38;5;6;49mmultimodal_cache[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K    里面可能有：[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K      - [38;5;6;49mduration[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K      - [38;5;6;49mfps[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K      - [38;5;6;49mquestion[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K      - 离线时的 [38;5;6;49mstructured_target[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K      - 离线时的 [38;5;6;49moracle_windows_sec[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K      - hybrid/Qwen verifier 的模型配置[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - [38;5;6;49mverification_mode[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K    比如 [38;5;6;49msoft_alert_check[39;49m、[38;5;6;49mfinal_check[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - [38;5;6;49mclaim[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K    当前要验证的异常主张[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - [38;5;6;49mcandidate_window_ids / candidate_evidence_ids / candidate_evidence_moment_ids[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K    你这次想验证的证据子集[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - [38;5;6;49malert[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K    当前 alert 决策[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - [38;5;6;49mquery[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K    当前搜索 query[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - [38;5;6;49mbackend[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K    [38;5;6;49mheuristic / hybrid / qwen_self_verifier[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - [38;5;6;49muse_reference_supervision[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K    在线一般是 [38;5;6;49mFalse[39;49m，离线诊断可为 [38;5;6;49mTrue[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [1m它的中间过程[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  它会先构造 4 个视角，见 [38;5;6;49mWmh/ideas/idea2_v2/code/saver_agent/verifier.py:635[39;49m：[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - [38;5;6;49mfull[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K    全部证据[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - [38;5;6;49mkeep[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K    当前保留证据[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - [38;5;6;49mdrop[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K    去掉当前保留证据后剩下的证据[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - [38;5;6;49malert_prefix[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K    只看 alert 时间点之前的证据[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  然后每个视角都会算一组分数，核心在 [38;5;6;49mWmh/ideas/idea2_v2/code/saver_agent/verifier.py:299[39;49m：[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - [38;5;6;49mexist_support[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - [38;5;6;49mcategory_support[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - [38;5;6;49mtemporal_support[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - [38;5;6;49mprecursor_support[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - [38;5;6;49malert_support[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - [38;5;6;49mcounterfactual_support[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - [38;5;6;49moverall_support[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  再进一步汇总成，见 [38;5;6;49mWmh/ideas/idea2_v2/code/saver_agent/verifier.py:378[39;49m：[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - [38;5;6;49msufficiency[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - [38;5;6;49mnecessity[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - [38;5;6;49mconsistency[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - [38;5;6;49malertability[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - [38;5;6;49mcounterfactual_faithfulness[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [1m它的输出[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  最终输出是一个 [38;5;6;49mverdict dict[39;49m，最重要的字段有：[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - [38;5;6;49mprimary_status[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K    [38;5;6;49mcomplete / incomplete / redundant / misaligned[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - [38;5;6;49malert_status[39m[49m[0m

[39;49m[K  - [38;5;6;49mrecommended_action[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K    [38;5;6;49mcontinue_search / revise_claim / refine_evidence / finalize[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - [38;5;6;49mview_scores[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K    4 个视角各自的分数[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - [38;5;6;49mderived_scores[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K    [38;5;6;49msufficiency / necessity / consistency / alertability / counterfactual_faithfulness[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - [38;5;6;49mverified_window_ids[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K    本次真正被 verifier 认定的证据窗口[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - [38;5;6;49mbest_effort_window_ids[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K    兜底窗口集合[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - [38;5;6;49mfailure_reasons[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K    失败原因[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - [38;5;6;49mexplanation[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K    文字解释[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - [38;5;6;49mverifier_backend[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K    最终实际用的是哪个 backend[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  这些状态压缩规则在 [38;5;6;49mWmh/ideas/idea2_v2/code/saver_agent/verifier.py:493[39;49m 和 [38;5;6;49mWmh/ideas/idea2_v2/code/saver_agent/verifier.py:519[39;49m。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [1m一句话总结[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  如果只说 heuristic verifier：[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - 离线时：它是“基于 GT 结构的窗口-证据判分器”[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - 在线时：它更像“基于搜索覆盖和 keep/drop 反事实的流程控制器”[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  所以你可以把它理解成：[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  不是“看懂视频的模型”，而是“管理证据是否足够、是否必要、是否该继续搜/该 finalize 的规则裁判”。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  如果你愿意，我下一条可以把 [38;5;6;49mstate / multimodal_cache / verdict[39;49m 三个 JSON 直接按你们代码风格手写一个最小样例给你看。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[1m[2m› [22m[22m所以说在线推理时，这个规则 verifier 会变成异常的弱，所以我觉得他不能胜任 verifier 的工作你觉得对吗，如果是的话，我们有没有必要用正在微调的 qwen 作为 verifier 或者重新训练一个基于 qwen 或者其他神经网络架构的 verifier呢[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[2m• [3mI need to point out a potential conflict here: using the same online policy as a verifier could lead to non-stationary rewards and the risk of self-confirmation, plus it may add computational overhead. A possible recommendation is to take a staged approach: use the SFT[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [3m[2mcheckpoint as a hybrid backend for the near term and over time, train a separate verifier with collected data. I should also clarify what the current online heuristic does and check the code to understand its backend better.[39m[49m[0m

[39;49m[K[2m• [22m我先看一下当前 [38;5;6;49mqwen_self_verifier[39;49m 的实现方式，再给你一个明确建议：继续用规则、改用共享 Qwen，还是单独训 verifier。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[2m• [3mI’m outlining minimal and optimal options. In the short-term, I might keep the heuristic as a safety gate and switch the online verifier backend to a hybrid model, pointing the verifier model path to the best frozen SFT checkpoint. In the medium-term, there’s the[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [3m[2mpossibility of training a separate verifier head/model using traces and labels. I need to be careful about past leakage issues while ensuring the verifier can assess claim support from chosen views. I’ll think about dataset requirements too.[39m[49m[0m
