[39;49m[K[2m•[22m [1mSearched[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[2m• [3mI’m considering the pros and cons of different verification models. The strongest design offers stability and semantic strength, but requires extra data and training. The raw Qwen base is simple, but lacks strong adaptation. My recommendation is to switch the online[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [3m[2minference verifier backend to a hybrid model for immediate improvement, while pointing to the best frozen SFT checkpoint. In the medium term, I suggest creating a dedicated verifier from that SFT checkpoint and freezing it during the RL/inference phase.[1mProposing final[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [1m[3m[2marchitecture[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [3m[2mI'm considering a final architecture for my proposal. I'll set an online inference default with a hybrid backend that includes a frozen verifier model. The backend will have components like a heuristic for subset integrity and a neural verifier, specifically the Qwen3-[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [3m[2mVL-8B-verifier. For offline training, I plan to utilize a stronger 32B or 72B teacher for pseudo-labeling support scores and train the 8B verifier. I need to clarify why I’m not choosing other architectures like CLIP or video encoder classifiers.[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[2m───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[2m• [22m对，我基本同意你的判断。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  当前在线推理里，规则 verifier 不能单独胜任“真正的 verifier”。原因很直接：[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - 在线 [38;5;6;49mverify_hypothesis[39;49m 明确关闭了 reference supervision，见 [38;5;6;49mWmh/ideas/idea2_v2/code/saver_agent/tools.py:263[39;49m。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - 一旦没有 [38;5;6;49moracle_windows_sec / structured_target[39;49m，anomaly claim 的 heuristic 会退化到 [38;5;6;49m_fallback_view_scores(...)[39;49m，本质上主要看“选了几个窗口”，见 [38;5;6;49mWmh/ideas/idea2_v2/code/saver_agent/verifier.py:215[39;49m 和 [38;5;6;49mWmh/ideas/idea2_v2/code/saver_agent/verifier.py:317[39;49m。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - normal claim 的 fallback 稍强一点，会再看视频覆盖率，但仍然主要是结构量，不是异常语义理解，见 [38;5;6;49mWmh/ideas/idea2_v2/code/saver_agent/verifier.py:257[39;49m。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  所以它现在更像：[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - 证据子集 bookkeeping / keep-drop 结构裁判[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - 流程控制器[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - fallback guardrail[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  而不是：[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - 真正的语义 verifier[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [1m要不要上神经网络 verifier[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  要。对 SAVER 这种任务，最终版最好是“结构 verifier + 神经 verifier”的双轨。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  我建议分 3 档看：[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - 最差方案：继续只用 heuristic[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K    这不够，尤其在线 anomaly verify 太弱。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - 过渡方案：用你们已经微调过的 Qwen checkpoint，当 frozen verifier[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K    这比“原始 qwen3-vl-8b-Instruct”明显更合理，因为它至少已经学过异常任务、工具协议和你们的 claim 格式。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K    但不要用“正在同步更新的 policy 本体”去当同一轮 RL 的 verifier。那会有自我确认和目标漂移问题。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - 最终方案：单独训练一个 verifier[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K    这是我更推荐的。初始化可以直接从你们最好的 SFT checkpoint 来，而不是从原始 base model 开始。这样最稳。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [1m我对这三个选择的判断[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - 原始 Qwen 直接当 verifier：不够好。你前面质疑是对的。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - 把当前最好的 SFT Qwen checkpoint 冻结后拿来当 verifier：值得立刻做，作为过渡版。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - 单独训练 verifier：论文级最终版更应该这样做。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [1m为什么“单独训练 verifier”更合理[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  因为 verifier 和 policy 的职责不同：[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - policy 要学“去哪搜、何时 verify、何时 finalize”[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - verifier 要学“当前证据子集是否足够、是否必要、alert 是否已可辩护”[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  如果直接共用同一个在线更新模型，会有几个问题：[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - 同源偏差[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K    policy 看错的地方，verifier 往往也会一起看错。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - 自我确认[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K    同一个模型容易给自己的坏证据背书。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - RL 不稳定[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K    如果 verifier 跟着 policy 一起变，reward / control signal 也在漂。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - 论文说服力弱[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K    actor 和 judge 不分家，方法学上会更难 defend。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [1m所以最合理的部署建议[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  我建议你们这样做：[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - 在线推理默认用 [38;5;6;49mhybrid[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - 把 heuristic 保留下来，但只负责结构约束[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K    也就是 keep/drop/full、evidence subset、一致性、兜底[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - 把神经 verifier 作为主语义打分器[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - 神经 verifier 先用“冻结的最佳 SFT checkpoint”顶上[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - 后续再把它单独训练成专门的 [38;5;6;49mQwen-verifier[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [1m这个 verifier 用什么架构最合适[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  优先级我会这样排：[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - 第一选择：基于 Qwen3-VL-8B 单独训练 verifier[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K    最合适。因为你们 verifier 的输入不是纯分类，而是“claim + 多视角证据图像 + 时间戳 + structured output”，这正适合 Qwen-VL。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - 第二选择：用更强模型做 teacher，再蒸馏到 8B verifier[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K    比如用 32B 只做离线 teacher / pseudo-label / difficult case judge，线上还是 8B。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - 不优先：重新做一个 CLIP/VideoMAE 式轻量判别器[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K    速度可能快，但它不擅长你们这种结构化、多视角、反事实 keep/drop 判定，第一版不值得走这条线。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [1m具体到你问的“用正在微调的 qwen 还是单独训练一个”[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  我的建议是：[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - 现在立刻可做：把 [38;5;6;49mverifier-model-path[39;49m 从原始 base model 改成你们最好的 SFT checkpoint，且冻结使用。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - 不建议：让当前 RL 正在更新的 policy 权重同时充当 verifier。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - 最终推荐：从该 SFT checkpoint 复制一份，单独训练 [38;5;6;49mverifier-only[39;49m 模型。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [1mTimeSearch-R 对我们有什么参考价值[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  有，但不是“直接照搬一个独立 verifier 模块”。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  我查了他们仓库，关键信息是：[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - README 明确写了他们的 [38;5;6;49mGRPO-CSV[39;49m 是“用同一个 policy model 去 self-verify 已搜索帧是否充分”，不是你们这种显式外接 [38;5;6;49mverify_hypothesis[39;49m 工具式 verifier。来源：TimeSearch-R README[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K    https://github.com/Time-Search/TimeSearch-R[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - 他们训练时还另外用了一个更强的 LLM-as-a-judge reward model，README 里写的是 [38;5;6;49mQwen-2.5-72B-Instruct[39;49m。来源：TimeSearch-R README[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K    https://github.com/Time-Search/TimeSearch-R[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - 他们推理环境代码里，运行时主要暴露的是视频搜索工具，并没有看到像你们这样显式的在线 [38;5;6;49mverify_hypothesis[39;49m 工具接口。来源：[38;5;6;49mtime_r1/inference.py[39;49m 和 [38;5;6;49mtime_r1/environment/video_env.py[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K    https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Time-Search/TimeSearch-R/main/time_r1/inference.py[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K    https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Time-Search/TimeSearch-R/main/time_r1/environment/video_env.py[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - 他们 reward 目录里有 [38;5;6;49mllm_judge.py[39;49m，说明训练阶段确实依赖外部 judge。来源：[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K    https://github.com/Time-Search/TimeSearch-R/blob/main/time_r1/reward/llm_judge.py[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  这对你们的启发是：[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - 可以借鉴他们的思路：自验证应该深度进入 RL 和搜索过程，而不是只做离线后处理。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - 但不能完全照抄他们的形式：SAVER 比他们多了“证据子集 sufficiency / necessity”和“alert 合理性”这两个更强的结构需求，所以你们保留显式 verifier tool 是对的。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - 你们真正该借的是：[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K      - self-verification 要参与策略学习[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K      - 外部强 judge 可以做 teacher / reward / distillation[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - 而不是把 verifier 永远停留在 heuristic[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [1m我的最终判断[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - 你说“在线规则 verifier 太弱，不能胜任 verifier 工作”，这个判断基本正确。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - 但它不该被删掉，而该降级为结构 prior 和 fallback。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - 真正该补的是一个神经 verifier。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - 最务实路线是：[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [38;5;12;49m    1. [39;49m先把线上 [38;5;6;49mverifier-model-path[39;49m 切到最佳 SFT checkpoint[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [38;5;12;49m    2. [39;49m默认用 [38;5;6;49mhybrid[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [38;5;12;49m    3. [39;49m开始单独训练 [38;5;6;49mQwen verifier[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [38;5;12;49m    4. [39;49m以后可以再用更强模型做 teacher，蒸馏到 8B verifier[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  如果你同意，我下一步可以直接把“专用 verifier 训练方案”翻成代码级 spec：数据样本怎么构造、label 怎么定义、训练脚本怎么接、线上如何替换 [38;5;6;49mhybrid[39;49m 默认后端。复杂研究工作流如果后面想系统化编排，也可以考虑 [38;5;6;49mwww.k-dense.ai[39;49m。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[1m[2m› [22m[22m在 sft 或者 rl 阶段能不能一起训练反事实 verifier 的能力呢，换言之在 sft 和 rl 除了训练现有的能力外也要训练反事实验证的能力实现不用外接 verifier ，实现端到端的训练，rl 阶段模仿 GRPO-CSV 是“用同一个 policy model 去 self-verify 已搜索帧是否充分”，不需要外接 verifier[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[2m• [3mI’m thinking about how to approach self-verification through a combination of scientific brainstorming and critical thinking. I need to assess the end-to-end route effectively. To kick things off, I’ll execute the relevant skill files, starting with the first 200[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [3m[2mlines. It's essential to ensure I'm gathering accurate insights as I work through this process. Getting the foundation right is key to successful execution.[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[2m• [22m我用 [38;5;6;49mscientific-brainstorming[39;49m 和 [38;5;6;49mscientific-critical-thinking[39;49m 来评估这个方向：能不能把反事实 verifier 吸收到同一个 policy 里，做成真正端到端、推理时不外接 verifier。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[2m•[22m [1mSearched[22m TimeSearch-R GRPO-CSV self-verify searched frames are sufficient README[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[2m•[22m [1mSearched[22m https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Time-Search/TimeSearch-R/main/README.md[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[2m• [3mI think it's possible to train verification ability within SFT/RL for SAVER, but there should be some caveats. I’m considering a two-stage approach: first, using SFT to teach self-verification through structured feedback combined with oracle outputs; second,[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [3m[2mincorporating RL with a self-verification objective. But I see the need to retain an external verifier during training as an auxiliary label. I’m also evaluating whether this is feasible with my current resources.[1mExploring self-verification risks[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [3m[2mI'm thinking about using the same model for self-verification, but there are several risks involved, such as self-confirmation, the potential to collapse into consistently finalizing or continuing outputs, and challenges with credit assignment. Additionally,[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [3m[2mverification relies on comparing counterfactual views, which could lead to instability if not designed properly. I should consider creating a unique approach termed Counterfactual Self-Verification (CSV-SAVER). Maybe I should ask if the user wants to explore this[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [3m[2mconceptually without code just yet?[1mClarifying training structure[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [3m[2mI’m thinking about how training uses an external reward model, like a 72B judge, while the inference path operates independently since the environment only provides [38;5;6;49mseek_video_frames[39;49m and lacks an explicit runtime verifier tool. I should mention it's possible to have no[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [3m[2mexternal verifier during training, but it would be less stable. It could be better to keep the teacher during training but eliminate it during inference. I should cite relevant local code files like [convert_to_saver_agent.py] or [training_data.py] for[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [3m[2mclarity.[1mStructuring the response clearly[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [3m[2mI’m considering that it might be better not to provide exact code lines, but I could mention appropriate files instead. While keeping my answer concise yet clear, I think I should outline the response with a short answer: yes, recommending that for the final SAVER,[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [3m[2minference should have no external verifier while training uses teacher-assisted self-verification. The current heuristic is too weak online; self-verification would serve better, although going completely without a teacher is risky. A three-stage design would be ideal.[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[2m───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[2m• [22m结论：可以，而且我认为这才是你们更合理的最终方向。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  但要分清两件事：[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - 推理时不外接 verifier：我支持[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - 训练时完全不借助任何外部 verifier / judge：我不建议一上来就这么做[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [1m先回答你的核心判断[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  你的判断基本对。当前在线 [38;5;6;49mheuristic[39;49m verifier 太弱，单独拿它做真正的 verifier 不够。它现在更适合当：[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - 结构先验[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - fallback guardrail[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - 训练诊断器[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  不适合当最终语义 verifier。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  原因很简单：[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - 在线 [38;5;6;49mverify_hypothesis[39;49m 已经明确 [38;5;6;49muse_reference_supervision=False[39;49m，见 [38;5;6;49mWmh/ideas/idea2_v2/code/saver_agent/tools.py:263[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - 这时 anomaly claim 的 heuristic 会退化到 [38;5;6;49m_fallback_view_scores(...)[39;49m，主要看窗口数量和简单 coverage，而不是异常语义，见 [38;5;6;49mWmh/ideas/idea2_v2/code/saver_agent/verifier.py:215[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  所以如果你的目标是“当前证据子集是否真的足以支撑 claim / alert”，在线纯规则版确实不够。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [1m能不能在 SFT / RL 里把 verifier 能力一起训进同一个 policy[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  能，而且我认为应该这么做。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  这条路线本质上就是把 [38;5;6;49mverify_hypothesis[39;49m 从“外接裁判”变成“policy 自己会的一项能力”。这和 TimeSearch-R 的核心方向是一致的：他们 README 明确写了 [38;5;6;49mGRPO-CSV[39;49m 是“用同一个 policy model 去验证 searched frames 是否充分”，而不是推理时再挂一个独立 verifier。来源：[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - TimeSearch-R README: https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Time-Search/TimeSearch-R/main/README.md[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  同时，他们训练又不是完全无外部信号的。README 也明确写了训练时使用 [38;5;6;49mQwen-2.5-72B-Instruct[39;49m 作为 LLM-as-a-judge reward model。来源：[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - TimeSearch-R README: https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Time-Search/TimeSearch-R/main/README.md[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  这说明一个很重要的边界：[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - 推理时可以 self-verify[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - 训练时仍然可以有 teacher / judge / reward model 辅助[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  我认为这正是你们 SAVER 最该借鉴的点。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [1m对 SAVER，我建议的最终版不是“外接 verifier”也不是“完全无 verifier”，而是[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [38;5;6;49mself-verifying policy + optional training-time teacher[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  也就是：[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - 推理阶段：不用外接 verifier model[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - SFT 阶段：显式教模型做反事实验证[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - RL 阶段：让同一个 policy 自己输出 self-verification[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - 训练阶段：可以继续用更强 teacher/judge 做辅助监督或校准[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - 线上部署：只保留一个 model[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [1m这比“共享同一个 policy 直接裸奔 self-verify”更稳[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  因为如果你完全不用任何 teacher，直接让 policy 自己 judge 自己，会有 4 个明显风险：[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - 自我确认偏差：模型容易给自己找理由 finalize[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - 校准差：会出现“过早 finalize”或“永远 continue_search”[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - credit assignment 难：self-verify 对不对，往往要后续 rollout 才知道[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - RL 容易塌缩：模型可能学会说看起来正确的 verifier 话术，而不是学会真正的证据判断[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  所以我不建议“从今天开始把外部 verifier 全删掉”。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [1m更合理的路线[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  我建议你们走 3 步。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [38;5;12;49m1. [39;49mSFT 先把反事实 verifier 能力训进 policy[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K     你们其实已经有基础了：[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - oracle 里已经有 [38;5;6;49mverify_hypothesis[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - 也已经有 [38;5;6;49moracle_verifier_feedback[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - 还有 [38;5;6;49mrecommended_action=continue_search / revise_claim / finalize[39;49m 这些分支[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K    相关代码就在 [38;5;6;49mWmh/ideas/idea2_v2/code/convert_to_saver_agent.py[39;49m 和 [38;5;6;49mWmh/ideas/idea2_v2/code/saver_agent/training_data.py[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  下一步不是继续强化外接 verifier，而是把这些监督改造成“模型自己会输出自验证结论”。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [38;5;12;49m2. [39;49mRL 阶段把 self-verification 变成同一个 policy 的内部能力[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K     这一步就对齐 TimeSearch-R 的 GRPO-CSV 思路，但要改成 SAVER 版本。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K     TimeSearch-R 更关注“searched frames 是否充分”，你们则要扩展成：[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - [38;5;6;49msufficiency[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - [38;5;6;49mnecessity[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - [38;5;6;49malertability[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - [38;5;6;49mrecommended_action[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  也就是更像：[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [38;5;6;49mCounterfactual Evidence-and-Alert Self-Verification[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [38;5;12;49m3. [39;49m训练时保留 teacher，推理时移除 teacher[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K     这是我最推荐的工程边界。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K     也就是：[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - 训练时：[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K      - 可以用冻结的 SFT Qwen verifier[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K      - 或更强的 Qwen / judge model[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K      - 只作为 reward / consistency regularizer / pseudo-label teacher[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - 推理时：[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K      - 不再调用外接 verifier[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K      - 只靠同一个 policy 自己 self-verify[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [1m你问“要不要用正在微调的 qwen 作为 verifier，或者重训一个 verifier”[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  我的建议是分阶段：[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - 短期：可以把“当前最好的 SFT checkpoint”作为 teacher verifier 用于训练辅助[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - 中期：不要让“正在同轮更新的 policy”直接兼任唯一 judge[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - 最终：推理时用同一个 policy self-verify，训练时保留一个冻结 teacher 或历史快照做稳定器[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  换句话说：[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - [38;5;6;49m同一个模型负责推理和 self-verify[39;49m：我支持[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - [38;5;6;49m同一个正在更新的模型同时充当唯一 reward/verifier[39;49m：我不支持[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [1mTimeSearch-R 对我们的直接参考价值[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  有，而且很大，但不是“照抄”。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  我看到的关键点是：[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - README 写明他们的核心是 same-policy self-verification[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K    链接： https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Time-Search/TimeSearch-R/main/README.md[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - README 同时写明训练用外部 judge reward model[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K    链接： https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Time-Search/TimeSearch-R/main/README.md[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - 公开 inference 入口里，默认暴露的工具主要是视频搜索工具 [38;5;6;49mseek_video_frames[39;49m，没有你们这种显式独立 verifier tool[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K    链接： https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Time-Search/TimeSearch-R/main/time_r1/inference.py[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - 他们的 runtime environment 也是围绕搜索工具展开，而不是外挂 verifier stage[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K    链接： https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Time-Search/TimeSearch-R/main/time_r1/environment/video_env.py[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  所以对你们最有价值的借鉴不是：[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  “照搬一个 verifier 模块”[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  而是：[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  “把 verifier 能力吸收到 policy 本身；外部 judge 只留在训练时做辅助”[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [1m我的最终建议[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  如果目标是最终版 SAVER，我建议你们明确采用下面这个原则：[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - 推理默认不外接 verifier[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - policy 自己学会：[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K      - 当前证据是否足够[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K      - 去掉这些证据后是否会塌[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K      - 现在该不该 alert[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K      - 现在该不该 finalize[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - heuristic verifier 保留，但降级为：[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K      - fallback[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K      - ablation[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K      - diagnostic[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - 训练时允许使用：[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K      - 冻结 teacher verifier[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K      - 更强 judge model[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K      - rollout branch outcome 做自一致性监督[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  如果你认可，我下一步可以直接把这个方向翻成一套可落地的代码级方案：[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - SFT 怎么改 supervision[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - RL 怎么把 [38;5;6;49mverify_hypothesis[39;49m 改成 same-policy self-verification[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - 训练时 teacher 怎么接[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - 推理时怎么真正做到“不外接 verifier，只用一个模型”[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K    复杂实验编排后面如果想做成完整研究工作流，也可以考虑 [38;5;6;49mwww.k-dense.ai[39;49m。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m

[39;49m[K  [38;5;6;49mWmh/ideas/idea2_v2/code/docs/superpowers/plans/2026-03-30-self-verifying-saver-policy.md[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  核心方向是把当前“外接 verifier”改成“同一个 policy 的 self-verification 能力”：[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - [38;5;6;49mverify_hypothesis[39;49m 不再去调用外部 backend 做在线裁判。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - policy 自己输出结构化验证结果：[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K      - [38;5;6;49mselected_window_ids[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K      - [38;5;6;49msufficiency_score[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K      - [38;5;6;49mnecessity_score[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K      - [38;5;6;49malertability_score[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K      - [38;5;6;49mverification_decision[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K      - [38;5;6;49mrecommended_action[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - [38;5;6;49mtools.py[39;49m 只负责校验、写入 state、把结果反馈给下一轮 prompt。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - SFT 显式教模型学会：[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K      - 何时 verify[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K      - 验证后是 [38;5;6;49mcontinue_search / revise_claim / refine_evidence / finalize[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - RL 用同一个 policy 的 self-verification 结果做 credit assignment，外部 judge 只做训练期 teacher，不进推理链路。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  这条方案的代码落点我已经固定到了这些文件：[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m

[39;49m[K  - [38;5;6;49mWmh/ideas/idea2_v2/code/convert_to_saver_agent.py[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - [38;5;6;49mWmh/ideas/idea2_v2/code/saver_agent/training_data.py[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - [38;5;6;49mWmh/ideas/idea2_v2/code/saver_agent/rollout.py[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - [38;5;6;49mWmh/ideas/idea2_v2/code/saver_agent/reward.py[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - [38;5;6;49mWmh/ideas/idea2_v2/code/train_saver_sft.py[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - [38;5;6;49mWmh/ideas/idea2_v2/code/train_saver_rl.py[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  关于 [38;5;6;49mteacher judge model[39;49m，[38;5;6;49mQwen-2.5-72B-Instruct[39;49m 可以用，但我建议你把它定位准确：[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - 可以用作训练期 [38;5;6;49mteacher judge[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - 不建议作为推理期在线 verifier[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - 更适合判“结构化文本包”，不适合直接看原始帧[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  原因是官方模型卡把 [38;5;6;49mQwen2.5-72B-Instruct[39;49m 定义为 text generation / causal language model，不是 VL 模型；如果你要看图，官方另有 [38;5;6;49mQwen2.5-VL-72B-Instruct[39;49m。来源：[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - Hugging Face model card: https://huggingface.co/Qwen/Qwen2.5-72B-Instruct[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - Hugging Face VL model card: https://huggingface.co/Qwen/Qwen2.5-VL-72B-Instruct[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  这也和 TimeSearch-R 的思路是一致的：他们的 README 里，[38;5;6;49mGRPO-CSV[39;49m 强调 same-policy self-verification，同时训练还用了更强的 LLM-as-a-judge reward model，文中提到的是 [38;5;6;49mQwen-2.5-72B-Instruct[39;49m。来源：[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - TimeSearch-R repo: https://github.com/Time-Search/TimeSearch-R[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - TimeSearch-R README raw: https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Time-Search/TimeSearch-R/main/README.md[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  所以对 SAVER 最合理的组合是：[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - 推理时：单模型 policy，自带 self-verification[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - 训练时：可选 teacher judge[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - teacher judge 首选 [38;5;6;49mQwen-2.5-72B-Instruct[39;49m，但输入应是文本化证据包：[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K      - claim JSON[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K      - full/keep/drop/alert_prefix 的窗口摘要[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K      - timestamps[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K      - selected evidence ids[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K      - policy 的 self-verification 输出[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - 如果你坚持让 teacher 直接看帧，再换成多模态 teacher，比如 [38;5;6;49mQwen2.5-VL-72B-Instruct[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  我对工程上的建议是：[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - 第一版 teacher judge 用 [38;5;6;49mQwen-2.5-72B-Instruct[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - 只做训练期 sparse teacher，不要每一步都同步调用[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - 优先用于：[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K      - SFT 离线 label enrichment[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K      - RL anchor turn 校准[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K      - epoch-end diagnostic[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - 不要和正在训练的 policy 共占同一轮在线推理路径[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  因为你现在只有 4 张 H200，如果同时训练 policy 再同步托管 72B teacher，会明显拖慢吞吐。更现实的做法是：[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - teacher judge 离线批量打分[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - 或单独起服务做异步/稀疏调用[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - 线上 rollout 默认只跑 policy 自己[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  如果你同意，我下一步就直接进入代码落实，顺序我建议是：[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [38;5;12;49m1. [39;49m先改 [38;5;6;49mverify_hypothesis[39;49m schema 和 [38;5;6;49mtools.py[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [38;5;12;49m2. [39;49m再改 oracle SFT supervision[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [38;5;12;49m3. [39;49m再改 RL 的 self-verification reward[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [38;5;12;49m4. [39;49m最后接 teacher judge client[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  复杂实验编排如果后面想整成完整研究工作流，也可以考虑 [38;5;6;49mwww.k-dense.ai[39;49m。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[1m[2m› [22m[22m让 teacher judge 看原始帧效果是否会好些呢相比使用 Qwen-2.5-72B-Instruct[39m[49m[0m

I think Qwen3-VL details might come from official documentation or Hugging Face, but I'm aware that they[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [3m[2mcould be temporarily unstable. So, I should conduct a search to gather the most reliable data available. Let's get started on that![39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[2m───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────[39m[49m[0m

[39;49m[K[2m• [22m我先核对这两个模型的官方定位，再给你一个直接可执行的选择建议。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[2m•[22m [1mSearched[22m site:huggingface.co/Qwen Qwen3-VL-32B-Instruct model card[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[2m• [3mI think I have enough information. I might need to mention that TimeSearch-R uses a text judge. Since the user only wants to compare teacher judge options, I could mention that their design relies on a text LLM judge, validating text-only teachers for rewards. I wonder[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [3m[2mif I need to look for a source in the README. Maybe I should check the raw README to gather additional context.[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[2m•[22m [1mSearched[22m "TimeSearch-R" "Qwen-2.5-72B-Instruct" README[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[2m• [3mI need to answer without relying on exact TimeSearch-R if it’s not available. The user wants a comparison. I can refer to official cards and mention that Qwen3-VL-32B is multimodal, perhaps better for visual grounding, despite having fewer parameters than the text-only[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [3m[2m72B. However, if the focus is on structured consistency, the 72B model might be more stable and cost-effective. I need to discuss these aspects in the answer directly.[1mComparing teacher-judging models[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [3m[2mI think I need to say that if a teacher judges directly by looking at raw frames, then Qwen3-VL-32B-Instruct is probably better than Qwen2.5-72B-Instruct for assessing whether evidence supports an anomaly claim. The former grounds semantics in frames and excels in[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [3m[2munderstanding video, temporal context, and agent interactions. However, it's not automatically superior for all judging tasks. For structured output consistency, like JSON and rationales, Qwen2.5-72B-Instruct might be more stable and cost-effective, despite being[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [3m[2mlarger.[1mChoosing the right teacher model[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [3m[2mI need to be careful in making my choices. For the SAVER model, a hybrid teacher pipeline seems best. In Stage A, I'd use the text teacher, Qwen2.5-72B-Instruct, for large-scale offline judging, utilizing summaries and full payloads. In Stage B, the sparse VL teacher,[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [3m[2mQwen3-VL-32B-Instruct, would be ideal for selected hard anchors, particularly when judging requires subtle visual details or temporal nuances. If I can only choose one, I'd opt for Qwen3-VL-32B-Instruct for evaluating raw frames, but Qwen2.5-72B-Instruct is better for[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [3m[2mstructured summaries.[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[2m───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[2m• [22m如果 teacher judge 真的要看原始帧，我会优先选 [38;5;6;49mQwen3-VL-32B-Instruct[39;49m，而不是 [38;5;6;49mQwen-2.5-72B-Instruct[39;49m。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  原因很直接：[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - [38;5;6;49mQwen-2.5-72B-Instruct[39;49m 是纯文本 causal LM，不是多模态模型。官方模型卡写的是 [38;5;6;49mType: Causal Language Models[39;49m。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K    来源：https://huggingface.co/Qwen/Qwen2.5-72B-Instruct ([4m[38;5;6;49mhttps://huggingface.co/Qwen/Qwen2.5-72B-Instruct[24m[39;49m)[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - [38;5;6;49mQwen3-VL-32B-Instruct[39;49m 是明确面向视觉和视频理解的 VL 模型，官方模型卡强调了：[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K      - video understanding[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K      - timestamp-grounded event localization[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K      - stronger agent interaction[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K        来源：https://huggingface.co/Qwen/Qwen3-VL-32B-Instruct ([4m[38;5;6;49mhttps://huggingface.co/Qwen/Qwen3-VL-32B-Instruct[24m[39;49m)[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  所以如果你的问题是：[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  “teacher judge 要不要直接看帧，若看帧该用哪个？”[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  答案是：[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - 看原始帧：[38;5;6;49mQwen3-VL-32B-Instruct[39;49m 更合适[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - 只看结构化摘要/窗口文本/时间戳：[38;5;6;49mQwen-2.5-72B-Instruct[39;49m 更合适[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  但这里还有一个更重要的工程判断：[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [1m看原始帧不一定总是更好。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  对 SAVER 的 teacher judge，任务不是普通分类，而是判断：[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - 当前 [38;5;6;49mkeep[39;49m 证据子集是否足够[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - 把这些证据拿掉后结论是否塌[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - [38;5;6;49malert_prefix[39;49m 是否已经 actionable[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  这类判断有两部分：[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [38;5;12;49m1. [39;49m视觉真实性[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K     画面里到底是不是那个异常、关键动作是否真的出现。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K     这一部分 [38;5;6;49mQwen3-VL-32B-Instruct[39;49m 更强。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [38;5;12;49m2. [39;49m反事实结构判断[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K     [38;5;6;49mfull / keep / drop / alert_prefix[39;49m 之间的关系是否满足 sufficiency / necessity / alertability。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K     这一部分不完全依赖原始图像，反而很依赖结构化输入是否清楚。这里 [38;5;6;49mQwen-2.5-72B-Instruct[39;49m 作为文本 judge 其实很有价值。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  所以我的实际建议不是二选一，而是：[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [1m最优方案：双层 teacher[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - 主 teacher：[38;5;6;49mQwen-2.5-72B-Instruct[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K    用于大规模离线 judge[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K    输入是结构化 evidence package：[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K      - claim JSON[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K      - [38;5;6;49mfull / keep / drop / alert_prefix[39;49m 的窗口摘要[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K      - timestamps[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K      - selected window ids[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K      - policy 的 self-verification 输出[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - 稀疏视觉 teacher：[38;5;6;49mQwen3-VL-32B-Instruct[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K    只在困难样本上看原始帧：[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K      - subtle anomaly[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K      - temporal ambiguity[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K      - keep/drop 差异主要靠画面细节决定[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K      - teacher disagreement case[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  如果你现在只能先上一个，我建议这样选：[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - 如果你要的是“论文最终版、teacher 真正有视觉裁判能力”：先上 [38;5;6;49mQwen3-VL-32B-Instruct[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - 如果你要的是“先把整套 self-verification 训练链路稳定跑通”：先上 [38;5;6;49mQwen-2.5-72B-Instruct[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  因为：[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - [38;5;6;49mQwen3-VL-32B-Instruct[39;49m 更贴近任务本质[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - 但 [38;5;6;49mQwen-2.5-72B-Instruct[39;49m 更容易先做成稳定的离线 teacher judge[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  对你们当前 4x H200 的机器，我更务实的建议是：[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - 第一阶段：用 [38;5;6;49mQwen-2.5-72B-Instruct[39;49m 做文本 teacher，先把 self-verification 训练逻辑跑通[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - 第二阶段：加一个 [38;5;6;49mQwen3-VL-32B-Instruct[39;49m 的稀疏视觉 teacher 分支，只打 hardest cases[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - 推理阶段：仍然只保留单个 self-verifying policy，不带外接 teacher[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  这比“所有训练样本都让 VL 32B 看原始帧”更现实，因为后者会非常重，吞吐会明显下降。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  顺便说一句，这也和 TimeSearch-R 的取向一致：他们强调 same-policy self-verification，而训练时另配强 judge。你们可以借这个思想，但把 judge 从纯文本扩展成“文本主 judge + 稀疏视觉 judge”。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  如果你同意，我下一步可以直接把这件事翻成代码级 spec：[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - 哪些 rollout anchor 送 [38;5;6;49mQwen3-VL-32B-Instruct[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - teacher 输入包长什么样[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - 如何在 [38;5;6;49mtrain_saver_rl.py[39;49m 里接成 sparse judge[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - 如何控制成本，不让训练吞吐崩掉。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[1m[2m› [22m[22m[38;5;6;49m$scientific-brainstorming[39;49m  为了和 Timesearch-r 区分开来，我们先用单 qwen3 vl 32b Instruct 吧，请你根据这个方案修改完善代码级spec[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m

[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m

[39;49m[K[2m───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────[39m[49m[0m

[39;49m[K[2m• [22m可以，这样更有区分度，我已经把 plan 收紧成“单一 [38;5;6;49mQwen3-VL-32B-Instruct[39;49m 视觉 teacher judge”版本了。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  更新后的计划文件在：[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [38;5;6;49mWmh/ideas/idea2_v2/code/docs/superpowers/plans/2026-03-30-self-verifying-saver-policy.md[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  现在这份代码级 spec 的核心设定是：[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - 推理阶段：只用单个 self-verifying policy，不外接 verifier[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - 训练阶段：只用一个视觉 teacher judge[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - teacher 固定为 [38;5;6;49mQwen3-VL-32B-Instruct[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - 不再走“文本 judge + 视觉 judge”双 teacher 路线，避免和 TimeSearch-R 太像[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [1m这版 spec 的关键变化[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [38;5;12;49m1. [38;5;6;49mverify_hypothesis[39;49m 改成 policy 自己产出结构化自验证结果[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K     不是再去调用外部 backend，而是输出：[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - [38;5;6;49mselected_window_ids[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - [38;5;6;49msufficiency_score[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - [38;5;6;49mnecessity_score[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - [38;5;6;49malertability_score[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - [38;5;6;49mcounterfactual_faithfulness[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - [38;5;6;49mverification_decision[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - [38;5;6;49mrecommended_action[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [38;5;12;49m2. [38;5;6;49mtools.py[39;49m 只做 state recorder[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K     它负责：[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - 校验 payload[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - 写入 [38;5;6;49mstate.verification_records[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - 更新 [38;5;6;49mactive_evidence_window_ids[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - 把结果反馈给下一轮 prompt[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [38;5;12;49m3. [39;49mSFT 显式教模型反事实验证[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K     oracle supervision 不再只是“verify 一下然后 finalize”，而是会监督：[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - insufficient -> [38;5;6;49mcontinue_search[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - misaligned -> [38;5;6;49mrevise_claim[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - redundant -> [38;5;6;49mrefine_evidence[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - sufficient -> [38;5;6;49mfinalize[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [38;5;12;49m4. [39;49mRL 改成 self-verification reward[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K     CEA-GRPO 的局部 advantage 不再默认依赖外接 verifier，而是优先用 policy 自己的 self-verification trace 来打：[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - sufficiency quality[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - necessity quality[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - action calibration[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - self-consistency[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [38;5;12;49m5. [38;5;6;49mQwen3-VL-32B-Instruct[39;49m 只做训练期视觉 teacher judge[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K     teacher 输入包包含：[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - policy claim[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - [38;5;6;49mfull / keep / drop / alert_prefix[39;49m 四个视角摘要[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - timestamps[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - 每个视角采样的原始帧[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - policy 自己的 self-verification 输出[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  teacher 的职责是：[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - 给 self-verification 打校准分[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - 给 difficult cases 做蒸馏标签[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - 给 RL anchor turns 做 sparse reward augmentation[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [1m这版和 TimeSearch-R 的差异[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  这条线和 TimeSearch-R 的核心区别会比较清楚：[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - TimeSearch-R 更强调 same-policy self-verify searched frames sufficiency[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - 我们这里明确把任务扩展成：[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K      - evidence sufficiency[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K      - evidence necessity[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K      - alertability[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K      - recommended next action[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - 并且 teacher judge 直接是视觉 teacher，不是他们 README 里强调的 [38;5;6;49mQwen-2.5-72B-Instruct[39;49m 这种文本 judge 路线[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  所以论文上你们可以把这个点写成更明确的差异：[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - TimeSearch-R 风格是 search sufficiency self-verification[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - SAVER 最终版是 counterfactual evidence-and-alert self-verification[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [1m我对这版的工程建议[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  这版最稳的落地顺序仍然是：[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [38;5;12;49m1. [39;49m先改 [38;5;6;49mverify_hypothesis[39;49m schema 和 [38;5;6;49mtools.py[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [38;5;12;49m2. [39;49m再改 oracle SFT supervision[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [38;5;12;49m3. [39;49m再改 rollout trace 和 reward[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [38;5;12;49m4. [39;49m最后接 [38;5;6;49mQwen3-VL-32B-Instruct[39;49m teacher judge client[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  因为 teacher judge 最重，应该最后接，不然你会在前面基础链路还没稳时就把复杂度拉满。[39m[49m[0m[r[29;3H[27;2H[0m[49m[K[28;2H[0m[49m[K[29;27H[0m[49m[K[30;2H[0m[49m[K[31;81H[0m[49m[K[39m[49m[0m[?25h[29;3H[?2026l[?2026h[1;26r[26;1H

[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [3m[2mI could mention that the safest way to run manual parallel processes is to split the prepared JSONL into multiple files and run the same script on each with either different output directories or the same if the examples are disjoint.[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [3m[2mHowever, if using the same output directory, it's better to avoid this due to potential race conditions with metadata and manifest writes. It’s safest to shard after adding support or to separate the outputs into different directories and merge them later. I want to[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [3m[2mkeep my explanations concise and clear.[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[2m• [22m有，已经支持“跳过已完成部分”。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  在 [38;5;6;49mWmh/ideas/idea2_v2/code/prepare_sft_tensor_cache.py[39;49m 里，每个样本都会先生成一个确定性的 cache key；如果对应的 [38;5;6;49m.pt[39;49m 已存在，且你没有传 [38;5;6;49m--overwrite-existing[39;49m，它就会直接跳过。最终 [38;5;6;49msummary.json[39;49m 和终端输出里会有 [38;5;6;49mnum_skipped_existing[39;49m。另一个保护是：如果同一 [38;5;6;49moutput_dir[39;49m 里的[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [38;5;6;49mmetadata.json[39;49m 和这次的预处理配置不一致，它会直接报错，而不是混用旧缓存。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  它慢的主要原因不是“模型推理”，而是这三步串行逐条做：[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [38;5;12;49m1. [38;5;6;49mimage_ref -> 真正图片张量[39;49m 的物化。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [38;5;12;49m2. [39;49mQwen-VL processor 的多模态 tokenization / budget 裁剪。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [38;5;12;49m3. [38;5;6;49mtorch.save(...)[39;49m 落盘。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K     相关逻辑在 [38;5;6;49mWmh/ideas/idea2_v2/code/saver_agent/training.py[39;49m 里。当前实现本质上是单进程、单流，瓶颈通常是 CPU + I/O，不是 GPU。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  不影响质量的提速办法，优先级建议如下：[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - 先确保 [38;5;6;49mframe_cache[39;49m 是完整的。现在如果某个视频没有 [38;5;6;49m.frame_cache[39;49m，会回退到 [38;5;6;49mdecord/cv2[39;49m 直接读原视频帧，这会慢很多。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - 重跑时始终复用同一个 [38;5;6;49m--output-dir[39;49m，并且不要加 [38;5;6;49m--overwrite-existing[39;49m。这是最直接的断点续跑。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - 把 [38;5;6;49moutput-dir[39;49m 放到本地高速盘，比如 [38;5;6;49m/tmp/...[39;49m，跑完再拷回共享盘。共享存储上的大量小文件写入通常很慢。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - 训练前调试只跑 [38;5;6;49m--include-splits train[39;49m 或 [38;5;6;49m--max-examples[39;49m，不要每次都全量重建。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - 如果内存够，可以把 [38;5;6;49m--frame-cache-max-cached-videos[39;49m 调大一点，比如 [38;5;6;49m128[39;49m 或 [38;5;6;49m256[39;49m，减少视频级 cache 反复换入换出。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - 最值得做的代码级优化是给这个脚本加 [38;5;6;49m--num-shards / --shard-index[39;49m。这不会改结果，只是把样本切成几份并行构建。当前脚本还没有这个功能。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  有一个边界要注意：当前版本不适合多个进程同时写同一个 [38;5;6;49moutput-dir[39;49m，因为 [38;5;6;49mmanifest.jsonl[39;49m / [38;5;6;49msummary.json[39;49m 的写法不是并发安全的。要并行，最好我直接给它补正式的 shard 支持。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m

[39;49m[K  [3m[2mthe full file. Since speed is a priority for the user, chunking could help reduce repeated frame cache loads when working with similar videos. [39;49m[K  [3m[2mcalculate the start and end for each shard: shard 0 would get examples 0 and 1, while shard 1 would receive examples 2, 3, and 4. This matches the expected count, but I need to ensure the correct row assignments.[39m[49m[0m

[39;49m[K  - [38;5;6;49m--num-shards[39;49m / [38;5;6;49m--shard-index[39;49m 参数与合法性校验。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - 连续分块式分片，不是模切，这样更保留同视频样本的局部性，减少重复拉 [38;5;6;49mframe_cache[39;49m。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - 多个 shard 共用同一个 [38;5;6;49moutput-dir[39;49m 时，[38;5;6;49mentries/[39;49m 和 [38;5;6;49mmetadata.json[39;49m 共享，但 [38;5;6;49mmanifest[39;49m/[38;5;6;49msummary[39;49m 改成分片独立文件，例如 [38;5;6;49mmanifest.shard-1-of-4.jsonl[39;49m、[38;5;6;49msummary.shard-1-of-4.json[39;49m，避免互相覆盖。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - 不分片时仍保持原来的 [38;5;6;49mmanifest.jsonl[39;49m 和 [38;5;6;49msummary.json[39;49m 行为不变。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  我补了对应测试在 [38;5;6;49mWmh/ideas/idea2_v2/code/tests/test_prepare_sft_tensor_cache.py:22[39;49m，覆盖了：[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - 默认模式兼容旧输出名。[39m[49m[0m

[39;49m[K[1m[2m› [22m[22m现在 verifier 在 sft 和 rl 中都在工作吗[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[2m• [3mI need to figure out whether SFT has any online verification during loss. It seems like SFT data could include things like verifier-related actions and teacher annotations, depending on how it's prepared. For RL, it looks like the verifier participates in the rollout[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [3m[2mthrough the verify_hypothesis tool and influences offline scoring or rewards based on the configuration. So, I guess I should inspect the current code to clarify this. Let's search for the relevant terms![39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[2m• [22m我先查 [38;5;6;49mtrain_saver_sft.py[39;49m、[38;5;6;49mtrain_saver_rl.py[39;49m 和 verifier 相关模块，确认“在 SFT 中工作”到底是指在线工具、监督信号，还是 reward 这几个层面。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[2m• [22m我再看两块：SFT 训练样本里有没有真的监督 [38;5;6;49mverify_hypothesis[39;49m，以及 RL rollout 里 [38;5;6;49mverify_hypothesis[39;49m 走的是哪条 verifier 路径。这样可以把“有在工作”拆成可执行层面来回答。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[2m• [3mI need to take a closer look at the [38;5;6;49mrun_weighted_sft[39;49m function to check how it's set up. It seems like there might not be a verifier used during training, apart from the examples. I’ll also search through the [38;5;6;49mtraining.py[39;49m file to find relevant information and clarify how[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [3m[2mthings are set up there. It’s crucial to ensure everything is functioning as expected![39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[2m• [22m我补最后一眼 [38;5;6;49mrun_weighted_sft[39;49m 和 [38;5;6;49mevaluation[39;49m 入口，避免把“epoch-end eval 用 verifier”误说成“训练损失里用了 verifier”。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[2m• [22m我已经把边界查清了：SFT 和 RL 都“接触到 verifier”，但作用层级不同。为了避免说得太泛，我取几处精确行号给你。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[2m• [22m严格说，不是“同一种方式在两个阶段都工作”。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  SFT 里，[38;5;6;49mverifier[39;49m 主要有 3 种角色，但默认不会像 RL 那样在线跑一个 verifier backend。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - 第一层是“数据监督”：oracle SFT 样本里已经把 [38;5;6;49mverify_hypothesis[39;49m 的反馈写进 tool observation，模型会学会什么时候调 [38;5;6;49mverify_hypothesis[39;49m、怎么根据验证结果继续决策。对应 [38;5;6;49mWmh/ideas/idea2_v2/code/saver_agent/training_data.py:232[39;49m 和 [38;5;6;49mWmh/ideas/idea2_v2/code/saver_agent/[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [38;5;6;49mtraining_data.py:488[39;49m。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - 第二层是可选的 [38;5;6;49mteacher judge[39;49m 标注与重加权。如果你传了 [38;5;6;49m--teacher-judge-model-path[39;49m，SFT 会先给 [38;5;6;49mverify_hypothesis[39;49m 样本打 teacher label，再重加权。对应 [38;5;6;49mWmh/ideas/idea2_v2/code/train_saver_sft.py:425[39;49m 和 [38;5;6;49mWmh/ideas/idea2_v2/code/train_saver_sft.py:538[39;49m。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - 第三层是可选的 epoch-end rollout eval。只有你传了 [38;5;6;49m--eval-data[39;49m，SFT 训练后每个 epoch 才会加载 verifier backend 做 rollout 评估。对应 [38;5;6;49mWmh/ideas/idea2_v2/code/train_saver_sft.py:241[39;49m 和 [38;5;6;49mWmh/ideas/idea2_v2/code/saver_agent/evaluation.py:141[39;49m。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  所以，SFT 默认情况是：[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - 有 verifier 相关监督信号。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - 不一定有“运行中的 verifier 模型”。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - 只有开了 [38;5;6;49mteacher judge[39;49m 或 [38;5;6;49meval-data[39;49m 才会额外跑模型式验证。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  RL 里则是 verifier 真正在工作，而且分在线和离线两层。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - 在线 rollout 时，只要 policy 调了 [38;5;6;49mverify_hypothesis[39;49m，工具就会执行验证；如果 policy 直接给出 self-verification payload，就走解析；否则就调用 [38;5;6;49mrun_counterfactual_verifier(...)[39;49m。对应 [38;5;6;49mWmh/ideas/idea2_v2/code/saver_agent/tools.py:326[39;49m。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - RL 默认会加载 verifier runtime，因为默认 [38;5;6;49m--verifier-backend hybrid[39;49m。对应 [38;5;6;49mWmh/ideas/idea2_v2/code/train_saver_rl.py:107[39;49m 和 [38;5;6;49mWmh/ideas/idea2_v2/code/train_saver_rl.py:407[39;49m。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - rollout 之后，RL 还会对 rollouts 再做一次 [38;5;6;49mscore_rollout_records(... force_reverify=True)[39;49m，这个离线 scoring 也会用 verifier，并把结果送进 reward / GRPO 数据构造。对应 [38;5;6;49mWmh/ideas/idea2_v2/code/train_saver_rl.py:898[39;49m。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  最短结论：[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - SFT：有 verifier supervision，但默认不一定真正跑 verifier backend。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - RL：有，而且默认在线 rollout + 离线 scoring 两处都会用到 verifier。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - [38;5;6;49mteacher judge[39;49m 是额外信号，不等于当前主 verifier。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  如果你愿意，我下一条可以直接给你画一个“SFT 阶段 verifier 流”和“RL 阶段 verifier 流”的对照图，用最简单的话把数据流拆开。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m

[39;49m[K  [1m1. [22m[38;5;6;49mannotate_teacher_judge_sft.py[1m[39;49m 产出的是什么[39m[49m[0m

[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  对应逻辑在 [38;5;6;49mWmh/ideas/idea2_v2/code/saver_agent/teacher_judge.py:238[39;49m 和 [38;5;6;49mWmh/ideas/idea2_v2/code/saver_agent/teacher_judge.py:286[39;49m。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  它的用途是：[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - 给 SFT 的 [38;5;6;49mverify_hypothesis[39;49m 样本增加更强的“老师意见”[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - 让训练时对好/坏 verify 行为的权重不同[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - 后面也可以复用到 RL 的离线诊断或 teacher-aware reward[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  一句话：这是“语义监督数据”。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [1m2. [22m[38;5;6;49mprepare_sft_tensor_cache.py[1m[39;49m 产出的是什么[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  它产出的是“训练加速缓存目录”，不是新的训练语义数据。它会把 prepared SFT JSONL 中每条样本提前做完：[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - [38;5;6;49mimage_ref -> 真正图像张量[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - processor/tokenizer 多模态预处理[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - labels / attention_mask / input_ids 等训练张量[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  然后写到一个 cache 目录里。核心写入在 [38;5;6;49mWmh/ideas/idea2_v2/code/prepare_sft_tensor_cache.py:265[39;49m 到 [38;5;6;49mWmh/ideas/idea2_v2/code/prepare_sft_tensor_cache.py:276[39;49m。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  这个目录里主要有：[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - [38;5;6;49mentries/.../*.pt[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K    每个样本一个张量缓存文件[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - [38;5;6;49mmetadata.json[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K    记录 cache 配置，防止和别的配置混用[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - [38;5;6;49mmanifest.jsonl[39;49m 或 [38;5;6;49mmanifest.shard-*-of-*.jsonl[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K    记录每个 cache entry 对应哪个样本[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - [38;5;6;49msummary.json[39;49m 或 [38;5;6;49msummary.shard-*-of-*.json[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K    统计建了多少、跳过多少[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  见 [38;5;6;49mWmh/ideas/idea2_v2/code/prepare_sft_tensor_cache.py:283[39;49m 到 [38;5;6;49mWmh/ideas/idea2_v2/code/prepare_sft_tensor_cache.py:326[39;49m。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  它的用途只有一个：[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - 让 [38;5;6;49mtrain_saver_sft.py[39;49m 训练时直接读张量缓存，少做大量重复的图像物化和 processor 工作[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  一句话：这是“训练加速缓存”。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [1m3. 和以前的 verifier 有什么区别[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  区别非常大。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  以前的 verifier，是 rollout / tool / scoring 里的“判定器”：[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - 在线 [38;5;6;49mverify_hypothesis[39;49m 工具会真正调用 verifier，更新 state 和验证结果，见 [38;5;6;49mWmh/ideas/idea2_v2/code/saver_agent/tools.py:326[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - RL rollout 默认也会挂 verifier backend，见 [38;5;6;49mWmh/ideas/idea2_v2/code/train_saver_rl.py:107[39;49m 和 [38;5;6;49mWmh/ideas/idea2_v2/code/train_saver_rl.py:831[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - epoch-end eval 也可以跑 verifier backend，见 [38;5;6;49mWmh/ideas/idea2_v2/code/saver_agent/evaluation.py:141[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  而 [38;5;6;49mteacher judge[39;49m 明确不是这个角色。它在代码里就写了：[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - [38;5;6;49mOffline teacher judge used for SFT/RL supervision, not inference-time control.[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K    见 [38;5;6;49mWmh/ideas/idea2_v2/code/saver_agent/teacher_judge.py:471[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  所以本质区别是：[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - 以前的 verifier：训练/推理流程里的“执行时判定器”[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - [38;5;6;49mannotate_teacher_judge_sft.py[39;49m：离线给训练样本加老师标签，不直接控制推理[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - [38;5;6;49mprepare_sft_tensor_cache.py[39;49m：纯加速，不参与判定，也不改变模型学什么[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  你可以把三者记成：[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - [38;5;6;49mverifier[39;49m：做判断[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - [38;5;6;49mteacher judge[39;49m：教模型怎么判断[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - [38;5;6;49mtensor cache[39;49m：让训练跑得更快[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  最实用的顺序是：[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [38;5;12;49m1. [39;49m先得到 [38;5;6;49mprepared_sft.jsonl[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [38;5;12;49m2. [39;49m再跑 [38;5;6;49mannotate_teacher_judge_sft.py[39;49m 得到 [38;5;6;49mprepared_sft.teacher.jsonl[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [38;5;12;49m3. [39;49m再对这个 teacher 版 JSONL 跑 [38;5;6;49mprepare_sft_tensor_cache.py[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [38;5;12;49m4. [39;49m最后 SFT 训练时同时用 [38;5;6;49m--prepared-data prepared_sft.teacher.jsonl[39;49m 和 [38;5;6;49m--tensor-cache-dir ...[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  如果你愿意，我下一条可以直接给你画一个“这三个东西在 SFT 和 RL pipeline 里分别处于哪一层”的流程图。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[1m[2m› [22m[22m我们当前在 sft 和 rl 中开启了 teacher 吗，你觉得适合开启吗[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m

[39;49m[K  [3m[2mdependent on that path being set. If the user has set it, then SFT teacher annotations happen before SFT training. For RL, it can be used conditionally as an auxiliary signal.[1mDiscussing teacher model recommendations[39m[49m[0m

[39;49m[K  [3m[2mI'm considering the CEA-GRPO and how the teacher local reward offers a signal during verification turns, but I think it shouldn’t dominate the process. [39;49m[K  [3m[2mwith SFT turned on while using RL if the user has a strong model. If compute is limited, I suggest starting with the SFT teacher enabled and RL turned off. [39;49m[K  [3m[2mthe teacher is different from the old verifier.[1mClarifying teacher model usage[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [3m[2mThe user asked whether the teacher is enabled in SFT and RL and if it’s suitable. I think it's important to clarify that the teacher serves as optional offline supervision rather than an online verifier. To ensure clarity, I might reference specific lines in the[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [3m[2mdocumentation, using clickable absolute paths and line numbers for easy navigation. I should also mention K-Dense and suggest that while signing up isn’t necessary, it could be beneficial. I’ll keep it concise and organized into three short sections.[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[2m• [22m当前默认是没开的。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  代码层面是条件触发的，只有传了 [38;5;6;49m--teacher-judge-model-path[39;49m 才会启用：[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - SFT 里，[38;5;6;49m--teacher-judge-model-path[39;49m 默认是空串，空的话直接跳过 teacher 标注，见 [38;5;6;49mWmh/ideas/idea2_v2/code/train_saver_sft.py:60[39;49m 和 [38;5;6;49mWmh/ideas/idea2_v2/code/train_saver_sft.py:431[39;49m。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - RL 里也是一样，默认空串，空的话不加载 teacher judge，见 [38;5;6;49mWmh/ideas/idea2_v2/code/train_saver_rl.py:115[39;49m 和 [38;5;6;49mWmh/ideas/idea2_v2/code/train_saver_rl.py:420[39;49m。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - 你现在的脚本默认值也是空的，所以 [38;5;6;49m00_full_pipeline.sh[39;49m、[38;5;6;49m02_train_sft_with_rollout_eval.sh[39;49m、[38;5;6;49m04_train_rl.sh[39;49m 默认都不会开 teacher。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  如果你手动设了 [38;5;6;49mTEACHER_JUDGE_MODEL_PATH[39;49m，两阶段会这样工作：[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - SFT：先给 prepared SFT 里的 [38;5;6;49mverify_hypothesis[39;49m 样本打 teacher 标签，再做重加权，见 [38;5;6;49mWmh/ideas/idea2_v2/code/train_saver_sft.py:425[39;49m 和 [38;5;6;49mWmh/ideas/idea2_v2/code/train_saver_sft.py:538[39;49m。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - RL：先收集 rollout，再给 rollout 里的 [38;5;6;49mverify_hypothesis[39;49m turn 打 teacher 标签，然后这些标签会进入训练样本里的 [38;5;6;49mteacher_local[39;49m / [38;5;6;49mteacher_judge_reward[39;49m，见 [38;5;6;49mWmh/ideas/idea2_v2/code/train_saver_rl.py:837[39;49m 和 [38;5;6;49mWmh/ideas/idea2_v2/code/saver_agent/training_data.py:960[39;49m。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  我觉得适合开，但建议分阶段开。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - SFT：适合开，优先级高。因为 teacher 主要在修 [38;5;6;49mverify_hypothesis[39;49m 这条分支的监督质量，帮模型学“验证后继续搜/修 claim/再 finalize”，这对你们的 SAVER 很关键。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - RL：也适合开，但建议把它当辅助信号，不要把它当唯一真理。现在代码里它本来就是辅助局部 advantage，不是替代主 rollout reward，这个设计是合理的，见 [38;5;6;49mWmh/ideas/idea2_v2/code/saver_agent/training_data.py:964[39;49m 和 [38;5;6;49mWmh/ideas/idea2_v2/code/saver_agent/training_data.py:1092[39;49m。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  我的建议很直接：[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - 如果你现在要追最终效果，开 SFT teacher。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - RL 也可以开，但先保持它是辅助项，[38;5;6;49mteacher_judge_local_alpha[39;49m 不要太大。当前 [38;5;6;49m0.5[39;49m 能用，但如果你担心 teacher 偏置，可以先试 [38;5;6;49m0.2[39;49m 到 [38;5;6;49m0.3[39;49m。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - 不要把 teacher 和旧 verifier 混为一谈。旧 verifier 是 rollout 里的执行/评分器；teacher 是离线监督器。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m

This tool either parses the self-verification payload directly or runs [38;5;6;49mrun_counterfactual_verifier[39;49m without reference supervision. The offline[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [3m[2mverifier, used for diagnostics and rewards, can be attached as needed. Additionally, there's the teacher judge, which serves as a separate offline labeler for the [38;5;6;49mverify_hypothesis[39;49m turns. There's a difference compared to the initial version, as it was mainly a GT-[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [3m[2mconditioned heuristic mixed into online rollout, causing label and evaluator leakage.[39m[49m[0m

[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[2m• [22m代码里最容易混淆的点已经确认：teacher judge 不是 verifier，本质上是额外监督信号。接下来我补 reward、metrics、evaluation 的边界，这样你看到“主评估”和“训练诊断”时就能对应上。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[2m• [3mI need to check the relevant arguments and defaults for train_sft and reinforcement learning. Gathering information about the teacher integration may not be necessary. The user is asking about the differences between the latest version and the initial version, so I[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [3m[2mshould explain clearly. It might be useful to inspect the training data for verification supervision or to note that there’s still oracle feedback in supervised fine-tuning. Let's grep the relevant lines for clarity.[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[2m• [22m我还要补一处关键限制：SFT 里的 verify supervision 仍然是 oracle supervision，它和“推理时在线 verifier”不是一回事。这个边界如果不说清楚，很容易误解成训练和部署行为完全相同。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[2m• [3mI'm thinking about the risk in supervised settings involving oracle-style labels. For reinforcement learning (RL), the rollout executes a process to verify hypotheses online. After the rollout, the score saver links with an offline verifier and an optional teacher. The[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [3m[2mCEA-GRPO approach uses global rewards alongside local evidence, alert signals, and teacher input. The benefit here is that the verifier acts as a control signal rather than just a final checker, which could enhance accuracy in training.[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[2m• [22m我先给结论。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  最新版本的 verifier，和最初版本最大的区别，不是“打分公式变了”，而是角色变了：[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  初始版本更像一个带 GT 的离线裁判。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  最新版本变成了“三轨分离”：[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - 在线 verifier：推理时真实参与 [38;5;6;49mverify_hypothesis[39;49m，不再默认读 GT。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - 离线 reference verifier：只给训练和诊断用，明确标成 [38;5;6;49mtraining_or_diagnostic_only[39;49m。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - teacher judge：额外的离线监督器，不是 verifier，本质是辅助训练信号。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  对应代码主要在 [38;5;6;49mWmh/ideas/idea2_v2/code/saver_agent/verifier.py[39;49m, [38;5;6;49mWmh/ideas/idea2_v2/code/saver_agent/tools.py[39;49m, [38;5;6;49mWmh/ideas/idea2_v2/code/saver_agent/offline_scoring.py[39;49m, [38;5;6;49mWmh/ideas/idea2_v2/code/saver_agent/teacher_judge.py[39;49m。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [1m核心区别[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  初始版本的问题有四个。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - 它会把 [38;5;6;49mstructured_target[39;49m、[38;5;6;49moracle_windows_sec[39;49m 这类参考标签重新混进 verifier。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - 这个 verifier 不只做诊断，还被 reward、部分指标、甚至早期在线 rollout 复用，边界不清。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - verifier 更像“答案对不对的裁判”，而不是“当前证据子集是否足够”的反事实检验器。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - [38;5;6;49mevidence_moment_ids[39;49m 以前会退化成验证整份 [38;5;6;49mevidence_ledger[39;49m，keep/drop/full 的子集语义不稳。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  最新版本修正后的变化是：[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - 在线 [38;5;6;49mverify_hypothesis[39;49m 走 [38;5;6;49muse_reference_supervision=False[39;49m，不再默认把 GT 混回 claim。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - verifier 现在围绕 [38;5;6;49mfull / keep / drop / alert_prefix[39;49m 四个视角，判断证据的 sufficiency、necessity、consistency、alertability、counterfactual_faithfulness。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - [38;5;6;49mevidence_moment_ids[39;49m 会先映射回运行时真实证据子集，再做验证，不再悄悄退化成“验证全部证据”。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - 主评估默认不再依赖 reference-conditioned verifier；离线 reference verifier 只保留给训练和诊断。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - 另外新增了 teacher judge，它是一个单独的离线监督器，不等于 verifier。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  所以，初始版 verifier 更像 evaluator；最新版 verifier 更像 policy 的证据决策模块。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [1m它在 SFT 里的作用[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  SFT 里实际上有两层东西。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  第一层是 oracle SFT supervision，在 [38;5;6;49mWmh/ideas/idea2_v2/code/saver_agent/training_data.py[39;49m 里会把 [38;5;6;49mverify_hypothesis[39;49m 的结构化输出教给 policy。也就是说，模型会学会：[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - 什么时候调用 [38;5;6;49mverify_hypothesis[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - verifier 输出长什么样[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - 验证后是继续搜、修正 claim，还是 finalize[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  第二层是可选的 teacher judge，在 [38;5;6;49mWmh/ideas/idea2_v2/code/train_saver_sft.py[39;49m 里可以对 [38;5;6;49mverify_hypothesis[39;49m 样本再打标签、再重加权。它的作用不是替代 oracle，而是让“哪些 verify 样本更重要”这件事更精细。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  好处是：[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - policy 从 SFT 阶段就开始学“验证是决策步骤”，不是装饰动作。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - verifier 输出格式和多轮协议会更稳。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - teacher judge 能强化那些真正关键的 verify turn。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  风险是：[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - SFT 里的 verify supervision 仍然带有 oracle 性质，它是训练信号，不是部署时真实可用的信息。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - 如果 teacher judge 有偏差，SFT 的样本权重也会跟着偏。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [1m它在 RL 里的作用[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  RL 阶段最复杂。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  在线 rollout 时，policy 会真实调用 [38;5;6;49mverify_hypothesis[39;49m。这一步走的是 [38;5;6;49mWmh/ideas/idea2_v2/code/saver_agent/tools.py[39;49m 里的在线路径：[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - 如果 policy 自己产出了 self-verification payload，就直接解析它。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - 否则就调用在线 verifier backend，默认可选 [38;5;6;49mheuristic / qwen_self_verifier / hybrid[39;49m。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  rollout 结束后，进入离线打分：[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - [38;5;6;49mWmh/ideas/idea2_v2/code/saver_agent/offline_scoring.py[39;49m 会给 rollout 追加 reference-conditioned offline verifier 结果。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - [38;5;6;49mWmh/ideas/idea2_v2/code/saver_agent/reward.py[39;49m 会把 verifier 分数和 teacher judge 分数合成 reward。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - [38;5;6;49mWmh/ideas/idea2_v2/code/train_saver_rl.py[39;49m 再把这些信号做成 CEA-GRPO 的 global/local advantage。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  所以 RL 里 verifier 的作用有两个：[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - 在线时，它是行为控制器，影响“现在该继续搜还是 finalize”。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - 离线时，它是 reward 组成部分，影响“这条 rollout 值不值得强化”。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  好处是：[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - verifier 不再只是最后盖章，而是进入训练闭环。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - CEA-GRPO 可以把 credit 更集中地打到 search / alert / evidence verify 这些关键 turn 上。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - teacher judge 可以作为额外局部信号，补强 verify turn 的学习。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  风险也最明显：[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - 当前 RL 默认仍然大量依赖 reference-conditioned offline verifier 做 reward，这本质上还是 oracle-style training signal。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - 所以 RL 的训练增益，不能直接等同于“纯部署泛化能力提升”。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - 论文里必须把“训练信号”和“主评估”严格分开写。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [1m它在推理里的作用[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  真正部署推理时，只看在线 verifier。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  也就是说：[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - teacher judge 不参与推理。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - offline reference verifier 不参与推理。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - 真正起作用的是 policy 自己的 self-verification，或者在线 backend verifier。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  这一步的目标已经不是“判断答案对不对”，而是：[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - 当前选中的证据够不够支撑 claim[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - 把这些证据拿掉后，结论会不会塌[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - 只保留这些证据时，alert / finalize 是否还能站住[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  这和 SAVER 的核心 idea 是对齐的。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  好处是：[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - 推理路径终于和任务定义一致了，重点是证据充分性与必要性。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - 没有 GT 在线泄露。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - verifier 真正变成“控制何时停、何时报、何时修正”的机制。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  风险是：[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - 如果在线 backend 只是 heuristic，它在没有 GT 时会明显变弱。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - 如果换成 [38;5;6;49mqwen_self_verifier[39;49m 或 [38;5;6;49mhybrid[39;49m，能力更强，但代价是更慢、更贵、也更可能有生成不稳定和解析失败。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - 如果 policy 本身的 self-verification 学得不够好，推理时 verifier 仍可能退化成形式动作。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [1m这么做的好处[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  最主要的好处有四个。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - 从方法学上，把“主评估”和“训练诊断”切开了，泄漏风险比初始版小很多。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - 从任务定义上，verifier 终于围绕“证据子集是否足够”而不是“答案对不对”。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - 从训练上，verifier 不再只是后验评分器，而是进入 SFT 和 RL 的决策闭环。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - 从工程上，在线 verifier、离线 verifier、teacher judge 三者职责清楚，后面替换其中一个不会把全系统一起搅乱。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [1m现在还存在的风险[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  最值得你继续记住的风险有五个。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - 在线 heuristic verifier 仍然偏弱，它更适合做结构化约束，不足以单独承担强视觉反事实判断。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - RL 默认 reward 仍然大量使用 reference-conditioned offline verifier，所以训练中仍有 oracle dependence。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - SFT 的 verify 样本仍然含 oracle-style verifier supervision，这有助于 warm start，但论文必须明确这是训练监督，不是部署能力。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - teacher judge 本身也会引入偏差；如果 teacher 错，student 会被带偏。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - 如果主表里再次混入 offline verifier 诊断项，就会重新回到 evaluator leakage 的老问题。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  一句话概括：[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  初始版 verifier 是“带参考答案的裁判”；[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  最新版 verifier 是“在线证据充分性检查器 + 离线训练诊断器 + 独立 teacher judge”的分层体系。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  如果你愿意，我下一条可以继续把这套 verifier 用一个具体视频案例，按 [38;5;6;49mseek_evidence -> verify_hypothesis -> finalize_case[39;49m 的真实运行流程，从输入、内部状态变化、输出字段三个层次给你拆开讲。另一个可选工具是 K-Dense Web，复杂科研流程想做成端到端多代理工作流时可以看一下[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [38;5;6;49mwww.k-dense.ai[39;49m。[39m[49m[0m

[39;49m[K  teacher judge 写进了 SFT 重加权和 RL 的 teacher-local credit。第四，把实验默认配置改到了当前版本，包括 8-frame preview、12-turn rollout、query-conditioned proposal、CEA-GRPO、reference KL，以及 teacher-aware full pipeline 的说明。[39m[49m[0m

[39;49m[K[1m[2m› [22m[22m我们现在是外接一个 verifier 这种模式吗[39m[49m[0m

[39;49m[K[2m• [3mI need to clarify the current setup by stages. The online inference path can use either a heuristic/hybrid verifier or a self-verifier backend, but it’s only loaded if the policy doesn’t self-report verification. The question was about whether we’re using an external[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [3m[2mverifier. I think the answer is that it’s not a strictly single external verifier; instead, we have a hybrid implementation. The policy model can output a self-verification JSON that can be parsed directly, supporting an external verification backend as[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [3m[2mneeded.[1mReferencing code files[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [3m[2mI think it might be helpful to reference code files using absolute clickable paths. It’s important to touch on the advantages and disadvantages, as this likely leads to a follow-up.[1mConsidering backend dependencies[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  [3m[2mI need to mention that if the goal is an end-to-end solution, the next step is to reduce external backend dependencies and focus on training the policy for self-verification. [39;49m[K  [3m[2mshould keep my points crisp and specific, listing exact files like tools.py for branching, verifier.py for the external verifier, train_saver_rl.py for the default backend hybrid and teacher judge, and self_verification.py.[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[2m• [22m严格说，当前版本不是“纯外接一个 verifier”，但默认运行形态仍然是“有外接 verifier backend 的混合模式”。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  具体分三层看。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  第一，在线推理/rollout 时，[38;5;6;49mverify_hypothesis[39;49m 有两条路，在 [38;5;6;49mWmh/ideas/idea2_v2/code/saver_agent/tools.py[39;49m。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - 如果 policy 自己已经输出了完整的 self-verification 字段，比如 [38;5;6;49mverification_decision[39;49m、[38;5;6;49msufficiency_score[39;49m、[38;5;6;49mselected_window_ids[39;49m，代码会直接走 [38;5;6;49mWmh/ideas/idea2_v2/code/saver_agent/self_verification.py[39;49m 解析，不再额外调用另一个模型。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - 如果 policy 没有自己给出这些字段，就会调用 [38;5;6;49mWmh/ideas/idea2_v2/code/saver_agent/verifier.py[39;49m 里的 verifier backend。这个 backend 可以是 [38;5;6;49mheuristic[39;49m、[38;5;6;49mqwen_self_verifier[39;49m 或 [38;5;6;49mhybrid[39;49m。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  第二，按当前默认训练脚本看，RL 阶段实际上通常还是会“外接 verifier backend”。在 [38;5;6;49mWmh/ideas/idea2_v2/code/train_saver_rl.py[39;49m 里，默认 [38;5;6;49m--verifier-backend[39;49m 是 [38;5;6;49mhybrid[39;49m。这意味着 rollout 时常常会加载一个单独的 Qwen verifier runtime，再和 heuristic 一起工作。所以从工程默认值看，[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  现在还是“外接 verifier 参与在线决策”。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  第三，teacher judge 是另一件事，不等于 verifier。它在 [38;5;6;49mWmh/ideas/idea2_v2/code/saver_agent/teacher_judge.py[39;49m 里，主要用于 SFT 标注和 RL 的离线辅助 reward/credit，不参与最终部署推理控制。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  所以结论很明确：[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  当前系统是“支持 policy 自验，但默认仍带外接 verifier backend”的混合架构，不是完全端到端、无外接 verifier 的版本。[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  如果你想把论文和系统进一步收紧成“同一个 policy 自己完成 search + verify + finalize”，那下一步就应该继续削弱 [38;5;6;49mqwen_self_verifier/hybrid[39;49m 这条外接路径，把 [38;5;6;49mverify_hypothesis[39;49m 更多变成 policy 自己产出结构化 self-verification，再把外接 teacher 只保留成训练期 teacher，不进推理[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  期。[39m[49m[0m[r[29;3H[27;2H[0m[49m[K[28;2H[0m[49m[K[29;27H[0m[49m[K[30;2H[0m[49m[K[31;81H[0m[49m[K[39m[49m[0m[?25h[29;3H[?2026l[27;1H[J]0;\[<1u[?2004l[?1004l[?25h^C
